authors_text: Zechen Bai,Zhigang Wang,Jian Wang,Di Hu,Errui Ding
title: Unsupervised Multi-Source Domain Adaptation for Person Re-Identification
title_zh: 用于人员重新识别的无监督多源域适应
comment: CVPR 2021 Oral
comments: CVPR 2021 Oral
abstract: Unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) methods for person re-identification (re-ID) aim at transferring re-ID knowledge from labeled source data to unlabeled target data. Although achieving great success, most of them only use limited data from a single-source domain for model pre-training, making the rich labeled data insufficiently exploited. To make full use of the valuable labeled data, we introduce the multi-source concept into UDA person re-ID field, where multiple source datasets are used during training. However, because of domain gaps, simply combining different datasets only brings limited improvement. In this paper, we try to address this problem from two perspectives, \ie{} domain-specific view and domain-fusion view. Two constructive modules are proposed, and they are compatible with each other. First, a rectification domain-specific batch normalization (RDSBN) module is explored to simultaneously reduce domain-specific characteristics and increase the distinctiveness of person features. Second, a graph convolutional network (GCN) based multi-domain information fusion (MDIF) module is developed, which minimizes domain distances by fusing features of different domains. The proposed method outperforms state-of-the-art UDA person re-ID methods by a large margin, and even achieves comparable performance to the supervised approaches without any post-processing techniques.
summary: Unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) methods for person re-identification (re-ID) aim at transferring re-ID knowledge from labeled source data to unlabeled target data. Although achieving great success, most of them only use limited data from a single-source domain for model pre-training, making the rich labeled data insufficiently exploited. To make full use of the valuable labeled data, we introduce the multi-source concept into UDA person re-ID field, where multiple source datasets are used during training. However, because of domain gaps, simply combining different datasets only brings limited improvement. In this paper, we try to address this problem from two perspectives, \ie{} domain-specific view and domain-fusion view. Two constructive modules are proposed, and they are compatible with each other. First, a rectification domain-specific batch normalization (RDSBN) module is explored to simultaneously reduce domain-specific characteristics and increase the distinctiveness of person features. Second, a graph convolutional network (GCN) based multi-domain information fusion (MDIF) module is developed, which minimizes domain distances by fusing features of different domains. The proposed method outperforms state-of-the-art UDA person re-ID methods by a large margin, and even achieves comparable performance to the supervised approaches without any post-processing techniques.
abstract_zh: 用于人员重新识别 (re-ID) 的无监督域适应 (UDA) 方法旨在将重新 ID 知识从标记的源数据转移到未标记的目标数据。虽然取得了巨大的成功，但大多数只使用来自单一来源领域的有限数据进行模型预训练，使得丰富的标记数据没有得到充分利用。为了充分利用有价值的标记数据，我们将多源概念引入UDA行人重识别领域，在训练过程中使用多个源数据集。然而，由于领域差距，简单地组合不同的数据集只能带来有限的改进。在本文中，我们尝试从两个角度来解决这个问题，即领域特定视图和领域融合视图。提出了两个建设性模块，并且它们彼此兼容。首先，探索了校正域特定批量归一化（RDSBN）模块，以同时减少域特定特征并增加人物特征的独特性。其次，开发了基于图卷积网络（GCN）的多域信息融合（MDIF）模块，该模块通过融合不同域的特征来最小化域距离。所提出的方法大大优于最先进的 UDA 行人重识别方法，甚至在没有任何后处理技术的情况下实现了与监督方法相当的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无监督多源领域自适应方法用于行人重识别，通过利用多个源域数据提升目标域性能。
AI.motivation: 现有UDA方法仅依赖单一源域数据，导致标签数据利用率不足；简单多源数据融合因领域差异效果有限。
AI.method: 提出RDSBN模块减少领域特异性并增强行人特征区分度，以及基于GCN的MDIF模块融合多领域特征以缩小领域差距。
AI.result: 方法在UDA person re-ID任务中显著优于现有技术，且无需后处理即可达到接近监督方法的性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过领域特定优化与多源信息融合的协同设计，有效解决了多源领域自适应中的特征对齐与数据利用问题。

title: Navigation of a Self-Driving Vehicle Using One Fiducial Marker
title_zh: 使用一个基准标记的自动驾驶车辆导航
comment: 6 pages, 9 figures
comments: 6 pages, 9 figures
abstract: Navigation using only one marker, which contains four artificial features, is a challenging task since camera pose estimation using only four coplanar points suffers from the rotational ambiguity problem in a real-world application. This paper presents a framework of vision-based navigation for a self-driving vehicle equipped with multiple cameras and a wheel odometer. A multiple camera setup is presented for the camera cluster which has 360-degree vision such that our framework solely requires one planar marker. A Kalman-Filter-based fusion method is introduced for the multiple-camera and wheel odometry. Furthermore, an algorithm is proposed to resolve the rotational ambiguity problem using the prediction of the Kalman Filter as additional information. Finally, the lateral and longitudinal controllers are provided. Experiments are conducted to illustrate the effectiveness of the theory.
summary: Navigation using only one marker, which contains four artificial features, is a challenging task since camera pose estimation using only four coplanar points suffers from the rotational ambiguity problem in a real-world application. This paper presents a framework of vision-based navigation for a self-driving vehicle equipped with multiple cameras and a wheel odometer. A multiple camera setup is presented for the camera cluster which has 360-degree vision such that our framework solely requires one planar marker. A Kalman-Filter-based fusion method is introduced for the multiple-camera and wheel odometry. Furthermore, an algorithm is proposed to resolve the rotational ambiguity problem using the prediction of the Kalman Filter as additional information. Finally, the lateral and longitudinal controllers are provided. Experiments are conducted to illustrate the effectiveness of the theory.
abstract_zh: 仅使用一个包含四个人工特征的标记进行导航是一项具有挑战性的任务，因为仅使用四个共面点进行相机姿态估计在实际应用中会遇到旋转模糊问题。本文提出了一种基于视觉的导航框架，适用于配备多个摄像头和车轮里程计的自动驾驶车辆。为具有 360 度视野的相机集群提供了多相机设置，因此我们的框架仅需要一个平面标记。针对多摄像机和车轮里程计引入了基于卡尔曼滤波器的融合方法。此外，提出了一种使用卡尔曼滤波器的预测作为附加信息来解决旋转模糊度问题的算法。最后，提供横向和纵向控制器。进行实验来说明该理论的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于单一标记的自动驾驶车辆视觉导航框架，通过多摄像头和轮式里程计融合解决旋转模糊问题。
AI.motivation: 传统单标记导航因四共面点导致的旋转模糊问题难以在实际场景中应用，需开发更鲁棒的单标记导航方案。
AI.method: 采用多摄像头实现360度视觉覆盖，结合卡尔曼滤波融合多摄像头与轮式里程计数据，并利用预测信息消除旋转模糊，设计横向与纵向控制器。
AI.result: 实验验证了该框架在实际环境中的有效性，成功解决了单标记导航的旋转模糊问题。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法通过多传感器融合与算法优化，实现了基于单一标记的自动驾驶车辆可靠导航，为实际应用提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Yuandu Lai,Yucheng Shi,Yahong Han,Yunfeng Shao,Meiyu Qi,Bingshuai Li
title: Exploring Uncertainty in Deep Learning for Construction of Prediction Intervals
title_zh: 探索深度学习中的不确定性以构建预测区间
abstract: Deep learning has achieved impressive performance on many tasks in recent years. However, it has been found that it is still not enough for deep neural networks to provide only point estimates. For high-risk tasks, we need to assess the reliability of the model predictions. This requires us to quantify the uncertainty of model prediction and construct prediction intervals. In this paper, We explore the uncertainty in deep learning to construct the prediction intervals. In general, We comprehensively consider two categories of uncertainties: aleatory uncertainty and epistemic uncertainty. We design a special loss function, which enables us to learn uncertainty without uncertainty label. We only need to supervise the learning of regression task. We learn the aleatory uncertainty implicitly from the loss function. And that epistemic uncertainty is accounted for in ensembled form. Our method correlates the construction of prediction intervals with the uncertainty estimation. Impressive results on some publicly available datasets show that the performance of our method is competitive with other state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Deep learning has achieved impressive performance on many tasks in recent years. However, it has been found that it is still not enough for deep neural networks to provide only point estimates. For high-risk tasks, we need to assess the reliability of the model predictions. This requires us to quantify the uncertainty of model prediction and construct prediction intervals. In this paper, We explore the uncertainty in deep learning to construct the prediction intervals. In general, We comprehensively consider two categories of uncertainties: aleatory uncertainty and epistemic uncertainty. We design a special loss function, which enables us to learn uncertainty without uncertainty label. We only need to supervise the learning of regression task. We learn the aleatory uncertainty implicitly from the loss function. And that epistemic uncertainty is accounted for in ensembled form. Our method correlates the construction of prediction intervals with the uncertainty estimation. Impressive results on some publicly available datasets show that the performance of our method is competitive with other state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 近年来，深度学习在许多任务上取得了令人印象深刻的表现。然而，人们发现深度神经网络仅提供点估计仍然不够。对于高风险任务，我们需要评估模型预测的可靠性。这就需要我们量化模型预测的不确定性并构建预测区间。在本文中，我们探讨了深度学习中的不确定性来构建预测区间。一般来说，我们综合考虑两类不确定性：偶然不确定性和认知不确定性。我们设计了一个特殊的损失函数，它使我们能够在没有不确定性标签的情况下学习不确定性。我们只需要监督回归任务的学习即可。我们从损失函数中隐含地了解了偶然的不确定性。这种认知上的不确定性是以整体形式来解释的。我们的方法将预测区间的构造与不确定性估计相关联。一些公开数据集上令人印象深刻的结果表明，我们的方法的性能与其他最先进的方法具有竞争力。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了深度学习中不确定性在构建预测区间中的应用，旨在提高模型预测的可靠性。
AI.motivation: 深度学习模型通常仅提供点估计，无法满足高风险任务中对预测可靠性的需求，需量化模型不确定性以构建预测区间。
AI.method: 设计特殊损失函数，无需不确定性标签即可学习回归任务；隐式学习偶然不确定性，并通过集成形式处理认知不确定性。
AI.result: 在公开数据集上表现出色，性能与现有最先进方法具有竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 通过整合两种不确定性类型，本文方法有效构建了预测区间，验证了其在不确定性量化中的有效性。

search_text: Exploring Uncertainty in Deep Learning for Construction of Prediction Intervals 探索深度学习中的不确定性以构建预测区间 Deep learning has achieved impressive performance on many tasks in recent years. However, it has been found that it is still not enough for deep neural networks to provide only point estimates. For high-risk tasks, we need to assess the reliability of the model predictions. This requires us to quantify the uncertainty of model prediction and construct prediction intervals. In this paper, We explore the uncertainty in deep learning to construct the prediction intervals. In general, We comprehensively consider two categories of uncertainties: aleatory uncertainty and epistemic uncertainty. We design a special loss function, which enables us to learn uncertainty without uncertainty label. We only need to supervise the learning of regression task. We learn the aleatory uncertainty implicitly from the loss function. And that epistemic uncertainty is accounted for in ensembled form. Our method correlates the construction of prediction intervals with the uncertainty estimation. Impressive results on some publicly available datasets show that the performance of our method is competitive with other state-of-the-art methods. 近年来，深度学习在许多任务上取得了令人印象深刻的表现。然而，人们发现深度神经网络仅提供点估计仍然不够。对于高风险任务，我们需要评估模型预测的可靠性。这就需要我们量化模型预测的不确定性并构建预测区间。在本文中，我们探讨了深度学习中的不确定性来构建预测区间。一般来说，我们综合考虑两类不确定性：偶然不确定性和认知不确定性。我们设计了一个特殊的损失函数，它使我们能够在没有不确定性标签的情况下学习不确定性。我们只需要监督回归任务的学习即可。我们从损失函数中隐含地了解了偶然的不确定性。这种认知上的不确定性是以整体形式来解释的。我们的方法将预测区间的构造与不确定性估计相关联。一些公开数据集上令人印象深刻的结果表明，我们的方法的性能与其他最先进的方法具有竞争力。 本文探讨了深度学习中不确定性在构建预测区间中的应用，旨在提高模型预测的可靠性。 Yuandu Lai,Yucheng Shi,Yahong Han,Yunfeng Shao,Meiyu Qi,Bingshuai Li cs.LG,cs.AI,stat.ML

authors_text: Abhay M Shalghar,Ayush Kumar,Balaji Ganesan,Aswin Kannan,Akshay Parekh,Shobha G
title: Document Structure aware Relational Graph Convolutional Networks for Ontology Population
title_zh: 用于本体群体的文档结构感知关系图卷积网络
comment: 8 pages single column, 5 figures. DLG4NLP Workshop at ICLR 2022
comments: 8 pages single column, 5 figures. DLG4NLP Workshop at ICLR 2022
abstract: Ontologies comprising of concepts, their attributes, and relationships are used in many knowledge based AI systems. While there have been efforts towards populating domain specific ontologies, we examine the role of document structure in learning ontological relationships between concepts in any document corpus. Inspired by ideas from hypernym discovery and explainability, our method performs about 15 points more accurate than a stand-alone R-GCN model for this task.
summary: Ontologies comprising of concepts, their attributes, and relationships are used in many knowledge based AI systems. While there have been efforts towards populating domain specific ontologies, we examine the role of document structure in learning ontological relationships between concepts in any document corpus. Inspired by ideas from hypernym discovery and explainability, our method performs about 15 points more accurate than a stand-alone R-GCN model for this task.
abstract_zh: 由概念、其属性和关系组成的本体被用于许多基于知识的人工智能系统。虽然人们一直在努力填充特定领域的本体，但我们研究了文档结构在学习任何文档语料库中概念之间的本体关系中的作用。受到上位词发现和可解释性的启发，我们的方法比独立的 R-GCN 模型在此任务上的准确度高出约 15 个点。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合文档结构的图卷积网络方法，用于提升本体填充任务中概念间关系学习的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有本体填充方法未充分考虑文档结构对概念关系学习的影响，而文档结构能提供关键语义信息以增强关系推理。
AI.method: 设计文档结构感知的图卷积网络（R-GCN），通过整合文档层级信息与概念关系，结合超义词发现机制提升模型可解释性。
AI.result: 在目标任务中，该方法相较独立R-GCN模型准确率提升约15个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 文档结构信息能显著增强本体关系学习效果，为知识密集型AI系统提供更精准的本体填充方案。

title: Exponentially Improved Dimensionality Reduction for $\ell_1$: Subspace Embeddings and Independence Testing
title_zh: $\ell_1$ 的降维呈指数级提高：子空间嵌入和独立性测试
comment: Appeared in COLT 2021; abstract shortened to meet arXiv requirements; v2: minor fixes for camera ready version; v3: improved bounds
comments: Appeared in COLT 2021; abstract shortened to meet arXiv requirements; v2: minor fixes for camera ready version; v3: improved bounds
abstract: Despite many applications, dimensionality reduction in the $\ell_1$-norm is much less understood than in the Euclidean norm. We give two new oblivious dimensionality reduction techniques for the $\ell_1$-norm which improve exponentially over prior ones: 1. We design a distribution over random matrices $S \in \mathbb{R}^{r \times n}$, where $r = 2^{\tilde O(d/(\varepsilon δ))}$, such that given any matrix $A \in \mathbb{R}^{n \times d}$, with probability at least $1-δ$, simultaneously for all $x$, $\|SAx\|_1 = (1 \pm \varepsilon)\|Ax\|_1$. Note that $S$ is linear, does not depend on $A$, and maps $\ell_1$ into $\ell_1$. Our distribution provides an exponential improvement on the previous best known map of Wang and Woodruff (SODA, 2019), which required $r = 2^{2^{Ω(d)}}$, even for constant $\varepsilon$ and $δ$. Our bound is optimal, up to a polynomial factor in the exponent, given a known $2^{\sqrt d}$ lower bound for constant $\varepsilon$ and $δ$. 2. We design a distribution over matrices $S \in \mathbb{R}^{k \times n}$, where $k = 2^{O(q^2)}(\varepsilon^{-1} q \log d)^{O(q)}$, such that given any $q$-mode tensor $A \in (\mathbb{R}^{d})^{\otimes q}$, one can estimate the entrywise $\ell_1$-norm $\|A\|_1$ from $S(A)$. Moreover, $S = S^1 \otimes S^2 \otimes \cdots \otimes S^q$ and so given vectors $u_1, \ldots, u_q \in \mathbb{R}^d$, one can compute $S(u_1 \otimes u_2 \otimes \cdots \otimes u_q)$ in time $2^{O(q^2)}(\varepsilon^{-1} q \log d)^{O(q)}$, which is much faster than the $d^q$ time required to form $u_1 \otimes u_2 \otimes \cdots \otimes u_q$. Our linear map gives a streaming algorithm for independence testing using space $2^{O(q^2)}(\varepsilon^{-1} q \log d)^{O(q)}$, improving the previous doubly exponential $(\varepsilon^{-1} \log d)^{q^{O(q)}}$ space bound of Braverman and Ostrovsky (STOC, 2010).

We give two new oblivious dimensionality reduction techniques for the $\ell_1$-norm which improve exponentially over prior ones: 1. We design a distribution over random matrices $S \in \mathbb{R}^{r \times n}$, where $r = 2^{\tilde O(d/(\varepsilon δ))}$, such that given any matrix $A \in \mathbb{R}^{n \times d}$, with probability at least $1-δ$, simultaneously for all $x$, $\|SAx\|_1 = (1 \pm \varepsilon)\|Ax\|_1$. Note that $S$ is linear, does not depend on $A$, and maps $\ell_1$ into $\ell_1$. Our distribution provides an exponential improvement on the previous best known map of Wang and Woodruff (SODA, 2019), which required $r = 2^{2^{Ω(d)}}$, even for constant $\varepsilon$ and $δ$. Our bound is optimal, up to a polynomial factor in the exponent, given a known $2^{\sqrt d}$ lower bound for constant $\varepsilon$ and $δ$. 2. We design a distribution over matrices $S \in \mathbb{R}^{k \times n}$, where $k = 2^{O(q^2)}(\varepsilon^{-1} q \log d)^{O(q)}$, such that given any $q$-mode tensor $A \in (\mathbb{R}^{d})^{\otimes q}$, one can estimate the entrywise $\ell_1$-norm $\|A\|_1$ from $S(A)$. Moreover, $S = S^1 \otimes S^2 \otimes \cdots \otimes S^q$ and so given vectors $u_1, \ldots, u_q \in \mathbb{R}^d$, one can compute $S(u_1 \otimes u_2 \otimes \cdots \otimes u_q)$ in time $2^{O(q^2)}(\varepsilon^{-1} q \log d)^{O(q)}$, which is much faster than the $d^q$ time required to form $u_1 \otimes u_2 \otimes \cdots \otimes u_q$. Our linear map gives a streaming algorithm for independence testing using space $2^{O(q^2)}(\varepsilon^{-1} q \log d)^{O(q)}$, improving the previous doubly exponential $(\varepsilon^{-1} \log d)^{q^{O(q)}}$ space bound of Braverman and Ostrovsky (STOC, 2010).
abstract_zh: 尽管有许多应用，但 $\ell_1$-范数中的降维比欧几里得范数中的降维要少得多。我们为 $\ell_1$-norm 提供了两种新的不经意降维技术，它们比之前的技术呈指数级提高： 1. 我们设计了随机矩阵 $S \in \mathbb{R}^{r \times n}$ 的分布，其中 $r = 2^{\tilde O(d/(\varepsilon δ))}$，这样给定任何矩阵 $A \in \mathbb{R}^{n \times d}$，概率至少为 $1-δ$，同时对于所有 $x$，$\|SAx\|_1 = (1 \pm \varepsilon)\|Ax\|_1$。请注意，$S$ 是线性的，不依赖于$A$，并将$\ell_1$ 映射到$\ell_1$。我们的分布比之前最著名的 Wang 和 Woodruff 地图（SODA，2019）提供了指数级改进，即使对于常数 $\varepsilon$ 和 $δ$，也需要 $r = 2^{2^{Ω(d)}}$。给定常数 $\varepsilon$ 和 $δ$ 的已知 $2^{\sqrt d}$ 下限，我们的界限是最优的，最多可达指数中的多项式因子。 2. 我们在矩阵 $S \in \mathbb{R}^{k \times n}$ 上设计一种分布，其中 $k = 2^{O(q^2)}(\varepsilon^{-1} q \log d)^{O(q)}$，这样给定任何 $q$ 模张量 $A \in (\mathbb{R}^{d})^{\otimes q}$，就可以估计entrywise $\ell_1$-范数 $\|A\|_1$ 来自 $S(A)$。此外，$S = S^1 \otimes S^2 \otimes \cdots \otimes S^q$ ，因此给定向量 $u_1, \ldots, u_q \in \mathbb{R}^d$，可以及时计算 $S(u_1 \otimes u_2 \otimes \cdots \otimes u_q)$ $2^{O(q^2)}(\varepsilon^{-1} q \log d)^{O(q)}$，这比形成 $u_1 \otimes u_2 \otimes \cdots \otimes u_q$ 所需的 $d^q$ 时间要快得多。我们的线性映射给出了使用空间$2^{O(q^2)}(\varepsilon^{-1} q \log d)^{O(q)}$进行独立性测试的流算法，改进了Braverman和Ostrovsky之前的双指数$(\varepsilon^{-1} \log d)^{q^{O(q)}}$空间界限（STOC，2010）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种新的$\\ell_1$范数下的维度约简技术，显著改进了先前的成果。
AI.motivation: 尽管$\\ell_1$范数下的维度约简在许多应用中非常重要，但其理解程度远不如欧几里得范数。因此，需要开发更高效的维度约简方法。
AI.method: 设计了两种新的随机矩阵分布：第一种是线性映射，将$\\ell_1$映射到$\\ell_1$；第二种是用于张量的维度约简，能够快速估计$\\ell_1$范数。
AI.result: 第一种方法在概率保证下实现了指数级的改进，第二种方法提供了更高效的流式独立性测试算法。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出了两种新的维度约简方法，显著提升了$\\ell_1$范数下的性能，并为相关应用提供了更高效的解决方案。

We design a distribution over matrices $S \in \mathbb{R}^{k \times n}$, where $k = 2^{O(q^2)}(\varepsilon^{-1} q \log d)^{O(q)}$, such that given any $q$-mode tensor $A \in (\mathbb{R}^{d})^{\otimes q}$, one can estimate the entrywise $\ell_1$-norm $\|A\|_1$ from $S(A)$. Our linear map gives a streaming algorithm for independence testing using space $2^{O(q^2)}(\varepsilon^{-1} q \log d)^{O(q)}$, improving the previous doubly exponential $(\varepsilon^{-1} \log d)^{q^{O(q)}}$ space bound of Braverman and Ostrovsky (STOC, 2010). 尽管有许多应用，但 $\ell_1$-范数中的降维比欧几里得范数中的降维要少得多。我们为 $\ell_1$-norm 提供了两种新的不经意降维技术，它们比之前的技术呈指数级提高： 1. 我们设计了随机矩阵 $S \in \mathbb{R}^{r \times n}$ 的分布，其中 $r = 2^{\tilde O(d/(\varepsilon δ))}$，这样给定任何矩阵 $A \in \mathbb{R}^{n \times d}$，概率至少为 $1-δ$，同时对于所有 $x$，$\|SAx\|_1 = (1 \pm \varepsilon)\|Ax\|_1$。请注意，$S$ 是线性的，不依赖于$A$，并将$\ell_1$ 映射到$\ell_1$。我们的分布比之前最著名的 Wang 和 Woodruff 地图（SODA，2019）提供了指数级改进，即使对于常数 $\varepsilon$ 和 $δ$，也需要 $r = 2^{2^{Ω(d)}}$。给定常数 $\varepsilon$ 和 $δ$ 的已知 $2^{\sqrt d}$ 下限，我们的界限是最优的，最多可达指数中的多项式因子。 2. 我们在矩阵 $S \in \mathbb{R}^{k \times n}$ 上设计一种分布，其中 $k = 2^{O(q^2)}(\varepsilon^{-1} q \log d)^{O(q)}$，这样给定任何 $q$ 模张量 $A \in (\mathbb{R}^{d})^{\otimes q}$，就可以估计entrywise $\ell_1$-范数 $\|A\|_1$ 来自 $S(A)$。此外，$S = S^1 \otimes S^2 \otimes \cdots \otimes S^q$ ，因此给定向量 $u_1, \ldots, u_q \in \mathbb{R}^d$，可以及时计算 $S(u_1 \otimes u_2 \otimes \cdots \otimes u_q)$ $2^{O(q^2)}(\varepsilon^{-1} q \log d)^{O(q)}$，这比形成 $u_1 \otimes u_2 \otimes \cdots \otimes u_q$ 所需的 $d^q$ 时间要快得多。我们的线性映射给出了使用空间$2^{O(q^2)}(\varepsilon^{-1} q \log d)^{O(q)}$进行独立性测试的流算法，改进了Braverman和Ostrovsky之前的双指数$(\varepsilon^{-1} \log d)^{q^{O(q)}}$空间界限（STOC，2010）。 本文提出两种新的$\\ell_1$范数下的维度约简技术，显著改进了先前的成果。 Yi Li,David P. Woodruff,Taisuke Yasuda cs.DS

title: Quantitative Risk Indices for Autonomous Vehicle Training Systems
title_zh: 自动驾驶车辆训练系统的定量风险指数
abstract: The development of Autonomous Vehicles (AV) presents an opportunity to save and improve lives. However, achieving SAE Level 5 (full) autonomy will require overcoming many technical challenges. There is a gap in the literature regarding the measurement of safety for self-driving systems. Measuring safety and risk is paramount for the generation of useful simulation scenarios for training and validation of autonomous systems. The limitation of current approaches is the dependence on near-crash data. Although near-miss data can substantially increase scarce available accident data, the definition of a near-miss or near-crash is arbitrary. A promising alternative is the introduction of the Responsibility-Sensitive Safety (RSS) model by Shalev-Shwartz et al., which defines safe lateral and longitudinal distances that can guarantee impossibility of collision under reasonable assumptions for vehicle dynamics. We present a framework that extends the RSS model for cases when reasonable assumptions or safe distances are violated. The proposed framework introduces risk indices that quantify the likelihood of a collision by using vehicle dynamics and driver's risk aversion. The present study concludes with proposed experiments for tuning the parameters of the formulated risk indices.
summary: The development of Autonomous Vehicles (AV) presents an opportunity to save and improve lives. However, achieving SAE Level 5 (full) autonomy will require overcoming many technical challenges. There is a gap in the literature regarding the measurement of safety for self-driving systems. Measuring safety and risk is paramount for the generation of useful simulation scenarios for training and validation of autonomous systems. The limitation of current approaches is the dependence on near-crash data. Although near-miss data can substantially increase scarce available accident data, the definition of a near-miss or near-crash is arbitrary. A promising alternative is the introduction of the Responsibility-Sensitive Safety (RSS) model by Shalev-Shwartz et al., which defines safe lateral and longitudinal distances that can guarantee impossibility of collision under reasonable assumptions for vehicle dynamics. We present a framework that extends the RSS model for cases when reasonable assumptions or safe distances are violated. The proposed framework introduces risk indices that quantify the likelihood of a collision by using vehicle dynamics and driver's risk aversion. The present study concludes with proposed experiments for tuning the parameters of the formulated risk indices.
abstract_zh: 自动驾驶汽车 (AV) 的发展为拯救和改善生活提供了机会。然而，实现 SAE 5 级（完全）自治需要克服许多技术挑战。关于自动驾驶系统安全性测量的文献中存在空白。衡量安全性和风险对于生成用于训练和验证自主系统的有用模拟场景至关重要。当前方法的局限性在于依赖于近乎崩溃的数据。尽管未遂事故数据可以大大增加稀缺的可用事故数据，但未遂事故或未遂事故的定义是任意的。一个有前途的替代方案是 Shalev-Shwartz 等人引入的责任敏感安全（RSS）模型，该模型定义了安全的横向和纵向距离，可以保证在合理的车辆动力学假设下不会发生碰撞。我们提出了一个框架，可以扩展 RSS 模型，以应对违反合理假设或安全距离的情况。所提出的框架引入了风险指数，通过使用车辆动力学和驾驶员的风险规避来量化碰撞的可能性。本研究最后提出了调整制定的风险指数参数的实验。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于责任敏感安全模型（RSS）的框架，用于量化自动驾驶系统训练中的碰撞风险指数。
AI.motivation: 现有自动驾驶安全评估方法依赖主观的近事故数据，缺乏客观量化标准，而RSS模型能提供更可靠的碰撞风险定义。
AI.method: 扩展RSS模型以处理合理假设被违反的情况，结合车辆动力学与驾驶者风险厌恶参数构建风险指数计算框架。
AI.result: 建立可量化碰撞概率的风险指数体系，并提出参数调优实验方案以验证框架有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过实验参数调整可完善风险指数模型，为自动驾驶训练场景生成提供更精准的安全度量工具。

authors_text: Qingchao Zhang,Mehrdad Alvandipour,Wenjun Xia,Yi Zhang,Xiaojing Ye,Yunmei Chen
title: Provably Convergent Learned Inexact Descent Algorithm for Low-Dose CT Reconstruction
title_zh: 用于低剂量 CT 重建的可证明收敛的学习不精确下降算法
abstract: We propose a provably convergent method, called Efficient Learned Descent Algorithm (ELDA), for low-dose CT (LDCT) reconstruction. ELDA is a highly interpretable neural network architecture with learned parameters and meanwhile retains convergence guarantee as classical optimization algorithms. To improve reconstruction quality, the proposed ELDA also employs a new non-local feature mapping and an associated regularizer. We compare ELDA with several state-of-the-art deep image methods, such as RED-CNN and Learned Primal-Dual, on a set of LDCT reconstruction problems. Numerical experiments demonstrate improvement of reconstruction quality using ELDA with merely 19 layers, suggesting the promising performance of ELDA in solution accuracy and parameter efficiency.
summary: We propose a provably convergent method, called Efficient Learned Descent Algorithm (ELDA), for low-dose CT (LDCT) reconstruction. ELDA is a highly interpretable neural network architecture with learned parameters and meanwhile retains convergence guarantee as classical optimization algorithms. To improve reconstruction quality, the proposed ELDA also employs a new non-local feature mapping and an associated regularizer. We compare ELDA with several state-of-the-art deep image methods, such as RED-CNN and Learned Primal-Dual, on a set of LDCT reconstruction problems. Numerical experiments demonstrate improvement of reconstruction quality using ELDA with merely 19 layers, suggesting the promising performance of ELDA in solution accuracy and parameter efficiency.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种可证明收敛的方法，称为高效学习下降算法 (ELDA)，用于低剂量 CT (LDCT) 重建。 ELDA是一种高度可解释的神经网络架构，具有学习参数，同时保留了经典优化算法的收敛保证。为了提高重建质量，所提出的 ELDA 还采用了新的非局部特征映射和相关的正则化器。我们在一组 LDCT 重建问题上将 ELDA 与几种最先进的深度图像方法（例如 RED-CNN 和 Learned Primal-Dual）进行比较。数值实验证明使用仅 19 层的 ELDA 即可提高重建质量，表明 ELDA 在求解精度和参数效率方面具有良好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为ELDA的高效学习下降算法，用于低剂量CT重建，该方法结合了神经网络与经典优化算法的收敛性保证。
AI.motivation: 低剂量CT重建面临图像质量与辐射剂量的平衡挑战，传统方法在精度与效率上存在不足，需开发兼具收敛性与高性能的新型算法。
AI.method: 设计ELDA架构，融合可解释神经网络参数与经典优化算法的收敛性，引入非局部特征映射及正则化项，提升重建质量。
AI.result: 实验表明，ELDA仅用19层即可超越RED-CNN和Learned Primal-Dual等方法，在参数效率与重建精度上表现优异。
AI.conclusion: ELDA在保证算法收敛性的同时实现了高效低剂量CT重建，为医学影像领域提供了参数精简且性能优越的解决方案。

authors_text: Evgenia Rusak,Steffen Schneider,George Pachitariu,Luisa Eck,Peter Gehler,Oliver Bringmann,Wieland Brendel,Matthias Bethge
title: If your data distribution shifts, use self-learning
title_zh: 如果您的数据分布发生变化，请使用自学习
comment: Web: https://domainadaptation.org/selflearning
comments: Web: https://domainadaptation.org/selflearning
abstract: We demonstrate that self-learning techniques like entropy minimization and pseudo-labeling are simple and effective at improving performance of a deployed computer vision model under systematic domain shifts. We conduct a wide range of large-scale experiments and show consistent improvements irrespective of the model architecture, the pre-training technique or the type of distribution shift. At the same time, self-learning is simple to use in practice because it does not require knowledge or access to the original training data or scheme, is robust to hyperparameter choices, is straight-forward to implement and requires only a few adaptation epochs. This makes self-learning techniques highly attractive for any practitioner who applies machine learning algorithms in the real world. We present state-of-the-art adaptation results on CIFAR10-C (8.5% error), ImageNet-C (22.0% mCE), ImageNet-R (17.4% error) and ImageNet-A (14.8% error), theoretically study the dynamics of self-supervised adaptation methods and propose a new classification dataset (ImageNet-D) which is challenging even with adaptation.
summary: We demonstrate that self-learning techniques like entropy minimization and pseudo-labeling are simple and effective at improving performance of a deployed computer vision model under systematic domain shifts. We conduct a wide range of large-scale experiments and show consistent improvements irrespective of the model architecture, the pre-training technique or the type of distribution shift. At the same time, self-learning is simple to use in practice because it does not require knowledge or access to the original training data or scheme, is robust to hyperparameter choices, is straight-forward to implement and requires only a few adaptation epochs. This makes self-learning techniques highly attractive for any practitioner who applies machine learning algorithms in the real world. We present state-of-the-art adaptation results on CIFAR10-C (8.5% error), ImageNet-C (22.0% mCE), ImageNet-R (17.4% error) and ImageNet-A (14.8% error), theoretically study the dynamics of self-supervised adaptation methods and propose a new classification dataset (ImageNet-D) which is challenging even with adaptation.
abstract_zh: 我们证明，熵最小化和伪标记等自学习技术可以简单有效地提高系统域转移下已部署的计算机视觉模型的性能。我们进行了广泛的大规模实验，并显示出一致的改进，无论模型架构、预训练技术或分布偏移的类型如何。同时，自学习在实践中使用起来很简单，因为它不需要知识或访问原始训练数据或方案，对超参数选择具有鲁棒性，易于实施，并且只需要几个适应时期。这使得自学习技术对于任何在现实世界中应用机器学习算法的从业者来说都极具吸引力。我们在 CIFAR10-C（8.5% 错误）、ImageNet-C（22.0% mCE）、ImageNet-R（17.4% 错误）和 ImageNet-A（14.8% 错误）上展示了最先进的适应结果，从理论上研究了自监督适应方法的动态，并提出了一个新的分类数据集（ImageNet-D），即使在适应情况下，该数据集也具有挑战性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出在数据分布发生偏移时，使用自学习技术（如熵最小化和伪标签）可有效提升计算机视觉模型的性能。
AI.motivation: 现实场景中模型常面临领域偏移问题，传统方法依赖原始训练数据且复杂，而自学习方法无需原始数据且易于实施，具有实际应用价值。
AI.method: 通过大规模实验验证熵最小化和伪标签等自学习方法在不同模型架构、预训练方式及分布偏移类型下的普适性，并提出新数据集ImageNet-D。
AI.result: 在CIFAR10-C、ImageNet-C等数据集上取得SOTA结果（如ImageNet-C错误率22.0%），并证明方法对超参数鲁棒且实施简单。
AI.conclusion: 自学习技术为实际部署的机器学习模型应对领域偏移提供了高效、实用的解决方案，同时推动了相关理论研究和新数据集的构建。

search_text: If your data distribution shifts, use self-learning 如果您的数据分布发生变化，请使用自学习 We demonstrate that self-learning techniques like entropy minimization and pseudo-labeling are simple and effective at improving performance of a deployed computer vision model under systematic domain shifts. We conduct a wide range of large-scale experiments and show consistent improvements irrespective of the model architecture, the pre-training technique or the type of distribution shift. At the same time, self-learning is simple to use in practice because it does not require knowledge or access to the original training data or scheme, is robust to hyperparameter choices, is straight-forward to implement and requires only a few adaptation epochs. This makes self-learning techniques highly attractive for any practitioner who applies machine learning algorithms in the real world. We present state-of-the-art adaptation results on CIFAR10-C (8.5% error), ImageNet-C (22.0% mCE), ImageNet-R (17.4% error) and ImageNet-A (14.8% error), theoretically study the dynamics of self-supervised adaptation methods and propose a new classification dataset (ImageNet-D) which is challenging even with adaptation. 我们证明，熵最小化和伪标记等自学习技术可以简单有效地提高系统域转移下已部署的计算机视觉模型的性能。我们进行了广泛的大规模实验，并显示出一致的改进，无论模型架构、预训练技术或分布偏移的类型如何。同时，自学习在实践中使用起来很简单，因为它不需要知识或访问原始训练数据或方案，对超参数选择具有鲁棒性，易于实施，并且只需要几个适应时期。这使得自学习技术对于任何在现实世界中应用机器学习算法的从业者来说都极具吸引力。我们在 CIFAR10-C（8.5% 错误）、ImageNet-C（22.0% mCE）、ImageNet-R（17.4% 错误）和 ImageNet-A（14.8% 错误）上展示了最先进的适应结果，从理论上研究了自监督适应方法的动态，并提出了一个新的分类数据集（ImageNet-D），即使在适应情况下，该数据集也具有挑战性。 本文提出在数据分布发生偏移时，使用自学习技术（如熵最小化和伪标签）可有效提升计算机视觉模型的性能。 Evgenia Rusak,Steffen Schneider,George Pachitariu,Luisa Eck,Peter Gehler,Oliver Bringmann,Wieland Brendel,Matthias Bethge cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Rodolfo Migon Favaretto,Paulo Knob,Soraia Raupp Musse,Felipe Vilanova,Ângelo Brandelli Costa
title: Detecting Personality and Emotion Traits in Crowds from Video Sequences
title_zh: 从视频序列中检测人群的性格和情感特征
abstract: This paper presents a methodology to detect personality and basic emotion characteristics of crowds in video sequences. Firstly, individuals are detected and tracked, then groups are recognized and characterized. Such information is then mapped to OCEAN dimensions, used to find out personality and emotion in videos, based on OCC emotion models. Although it is a clear challenge to validate our results with real life experiments, we evaluate our method with the available literature information regarding OCEAN values of different Countries and also emergent Personal distance among people. Hence, such analysis refer to cultural differences of each country too. Our results indicate that this model generates coherent information when compared to data provided in available literature, as shown in qualitative and quantitative results.
summary: This paper presents a methodology to detect personality and basic emotion characteristics of crowds in video sequences. Firstly, individuals are detected and tracked, then groups are recognized and characterized. Such information is then mapped to OCEAN dimensions, used to find out personality and emotion in videos, based on OCC emotion models. Although it is a clear challenge to validate our results with real life experiments, we evaluate our method with the available literature information regarding OCEAN values of different Countries and also emergent Personal distance among people. Hence, such analysis refer to cultural differences of each country too. Our results indicate that this model generates coherent information when compared to data provided in available literature, as shown in qualitative and quantitative results.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种检测视频序列中人群的个性和基本情感特征的方法。首先，检测和跟踪个体，然后识别和表征群体。然后，这些信息被映射到 OCEAN 维度，用于基于 OCC 情感模型找出视频中的个性和情感。尽管通过现实生活实验验证我们的结果是一个明显的挑战，但我们利用有关不同国家海洋价值观以及人与人之间新兴个人距离的现有文献信息来评估我们的方法。因此，这样的分析也涉及到每个国家的文化差异。我们的结果表明，与现有文献中提供的数据相比，该模型生成了连贯的信息，如定性和定量结果所示。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种从视频序列中检测人群人格和情绪特征的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多关注个体情绪分析，而群体层面的人格与情绪特征分析可反映文化差异，具有重要研究价值。
AI.method: 通过个体检测跟踪与群体识别，将群体特征映射至OCEAN人格维度及OCC情绪模型进行分析。
AI.result: 模型输出结果与文献中不同国家OCEAN值及人群距离数据具有较高一致性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能有效分析视频中群体人格与情绪特征，并可揭示文化差异影响。

authors_text: Joseph Turian,Jordie Shier,George Tzanetakis,Kirk McNally,Max Henry
title: One Billion Audio Sounds from GPU-enabled Modular Synthesis
title_zh: 来自支持 GPU 的模块化合成的 10 亿种音频声音
abstract: We release synth1B1, a multi-modal audio corpus consisting of 1 billion 4-second synthesized sounds, paired with the synthesis parameters used to generate them. The dataset is 100x larger than any audio dataset in the literature. We also introduce torchsynth, an open source modular synthesizer that generates the synth1B1 samples on-the-fly at 16200x faster than real-time (714MHz) on a single GPU. Finally, we release two new audio datasets: FM synth timbre and subtractive synth pitch. Using these datasets, we demonstrate new rank-based evaluation criteria for existing audio representations. Finally, we propose a novel approach to synthesizer hyperparameter optimization.
summary: We release synth1B1, a multi-modal audio corpus consisting of 1 billion 4-second synthesized sounds, paired with the synthesis parameters used to generate them. The dataset is 100x larger than any audio dataset in the literature. We also introduce torchsynth, an open source modular synthesizer that generates the synth1B1 samples on-the-fly at 16200x faster than real-time (714MHz) on a single GPU. Finally, we release two new audio datasets: FM synth timbre and subtractive synth pitch. Using these datasets, we demonstrate new rank-based evaluation criteria for existing audio representations. Finally, we propose a novel approach to synthesizer hyperparameter optimization.
abstract_zh: 我们发布了 Synth1B1，这是一个多模态音频语料库，由 10 亿个 4 秒合成声音组成，并配有用于生成它们的合成参数。该数据集比文献中的任何音频数据集大 100 倍。我们还介绍了 torchsynth，这是一款开源模块化合成器，它可以在单个 GPU 上以比实时 (714MHz) 快 16200 倍的速度即时生成 Synth1B1 样本。最后，我们发布了两个新的音频数据集：FM 合成音色和减法合成音高。使用这些数据集，我们演示了针对现有音频表示的新的基于排名的评估标准。最后，我们提出了一种合成器超参数优化的新方法。

AI.tldr: 该论文介绍了通过GPU加速的模块化合成技术生成包含10亿个4秒合成声音的多模态音频数据集synth1B1，并开发了高效生成工具torchsynth。
AI.motivation: 现有音频数据集规模有限且缺乏合成参数配对，限制了音频表示学习和合成器优化研究。
AI.method: 基于GPU实现的模块化合成器torchsynth，以714MHz频率实时生成音频，结合参数记录构建数据集，并提出基于排序的评估标准与超参数优化方法。
AI.result: 发布100倍规模的synth1B1数据集、两个新合成数据集，验证了新型评估指标有效性，并提出合成器超参数优化方案。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为音频研究提供了大规模合成数据资源和高效生成工具，推动了音频表示学习与合成技术的发展。

title: Equity and Artificial Intelligence in Education: Will "AIEd" Amplify or Alleviate Inequities in Education?
title_zh: 教育公平与人工智能：“AIEd”会放大还是减轻教育不平等？
comment: The co-first authors contributed equally to this work
comments: The co-first authors contributed equally to this work
abstract: The development of educational AI (AIEd) systems has often been motivated by their potential to promote educational equity and reduce achievement gaps across different groups of learners -- for example, by scaling up the benefits of one-on-one human tutoring to a broader audience, or by filling gaps in existing educational services. Given these noble intentions, why might AIEd systems have inequitable impacts in practice? In this chapter, we discuss four lenses that can be used to examine how and why AIEd systems risk amplifying existing inequities. Building from these lenses, we then outline possible paths towards more equitable futures for AIEd, while highlighting debates surrounding each proposal. In doing so, we hope to provoke new conversations around the design of equitable AIEd, and to push ongoing conversations in the field forward.

In this chapter, we discuss four lenses that can be used to examine how and why AIEd systems risk amplifying existing inequities. Building from these lenses, we then outline possible paths towards more equitable futures for AIEd, while highlighting debates surrounding each proposal. In doing so, we hope to provoke new conversations around the design of equitable AIEd, and to push ongoing conversations in the field forward.
abstract_zh: 教育人工智能（AIEd）系统的发展往往是由于其促进教育公平和缩小不同学习者群体之间的成绩差距的潜力所推动的——例如，通过向更广泛的受众扩大一对一人工辅导的好处，或者填补现有教育服务的空白。鉴于这些崇高的意图，为什么 AIEd 系统在实践中可能会产生不公平的影响？在本章中，我们讨论了四个镜头，可用于检查 AIEd 系统如何以及为何有扩大现有不平等的风险。然后，我们以这些视角为基础，概述了 AIEd 走向更公平未来的可能路径，同时强调了围绕每项提案的辩论。在此过程中，我们希望围绕公平的 AIEd 设计引发新的对话，并推动该领域正在进行的对话向前发展。

AI.tldr: 探讨AIEd对教育公平的影响，分析其可能加剧或缓解不平等的原因，并提出实现更公平未来的路径。
AI.motivation: 尽管AIEd旨在促进教育公平，但实际应用中可能加剧不平等，需探讨其潜在风险并提出解决方案。
AI.method: 通过四个分析视角探讨AIEd可能加剧不平等的原因，并提出改进方向及相应争议。
AI.result: 提出四个分析框架，揭示AIEd可能加剧不平等的机制，并探讨实现更公平未来的路径及争议。
AI.conclusion: 呼吁设计更公平的AIEd系统，并推动教育公平与AI技术结合的持续讨论。

authors_text: Tobias Fischer,Wolf Vollprecht,Silvio Traversaro,Sean Yen,Carlos Herrero,Michael Milford
title: A RoboStack Tutorial: Using the Robot Operating System Alongside the Conda and Jupyter Data Science Ecosystems
title_zh: RoboStack 教程：将机器人操作系统与 Conda 和 Jupyter 数据科学生态系统一起使用
comment: IEEE Robotics & Automation Magazine
comments: IEEE Robotics & Automation Magazine
abstract: We argue that it is beneficial to tightly couple the widely-used Robot Operating System with Conda, a cross-platform, language-agnostic package manager, and Jupyter, a web-based interactive computational environment affording scientific computing. We provide new ROS packages for Conda, enabling the installation of ROS alongside data-science and machine-learning packages with ease. Multiple ROS versions (currently ROS1 Melodic and Noetic, as well as ROS2 Foxy and Galactic) can run simultaneously on one machine, with pre-compiled binaries available for Linux, Windows and OSX, and the ARM architecture (e.g. the Raspberry Pi and the new Apple Silicon). To deal with the large size of the ROS ecosystem, we significantly improved the speed of the Conda solver and build system by rewriting the crucial parts in C++. We further contribute a collection of JupyterLab extensions for ROS, including plugins for live plotting, debugging and robot control, as well as tight integration with Zethus, an RViz like visualization tool. Taken together, RoboStack combines the best of the data-science and robotics worlds to help researchers and developers to build custom solutions for their academic and industrial projects.
summary: We argue that it is beneficial to tightly couple the widely-used Robot Operating System with Conda, a cross-platform, language-agnostic package manager, and Jupyter, a web-based interactive computational environment affording scientific computing. We provide new ROS packages for Conda, enabling the installation of ROS alongside data-science and machine-learning packages with ease. Multiple ROS versions (currently ROS1 Melodic and Noetic, as well as ROS2 Foxy and Galactic) can run simultaneously on one machine, with pre-compiled binaries available for Linux, Windows and OSX, and the ARM architecture (e.g. the Raspberry Pi and the new Apple Silicon). To deal with the large size of the ROS ecosystem, we significantly improved the speed of the Conda solver and build system by rewriting the crucial parts in C++. We further contribute a collection of JupyterLab extensions for ROS, including plugins for live plotting, debugging and robot control, as well as tight integration with Zethus, an RViz like visualization tool. Taken together, RoboStack combines the best of the data-science and robotics worlds to help researchers and developers to build custom solutions for their academic and industrial projects.
abstract_zh: 我们认为，将广泛使用的机器人操作系统与跨平台、与语言无关的包管理器 Conda 和提供科学计算的基于 Web 的交互式计算环境 Jupyter 紧密结合是有益的。我们为 Conda 提供了新的 ROS 软件包，可以轻松安装 ROS 以及数据科学和机器学习软件包。多个 ROS 版本（目前为 ROS1 Melodic 和 Noetic，以及 ROS2 Foxy 和 Gactic）可以在一台机器上同时运行，预编译的二进制文件可用于 Linux、Windows 和 OSX 以及 ARM 架构（例如 Raspberry Pi 和新的 Apple Silicon）。为了应对ROS生态系统的庞大规模，我们通过用C++重写关键部分来显着提高Conda求解器和构建系统的速度。我们进一步为 ROS 贡献了一系列 JupyterLab 扩展，包括用于实时绘图、调试和机器人控制的插件，以及与 Zethus（类似 RViz 的可视化工具）的紧密集成。总而言之，RoboStack 结合了数据科学和机器人领域的精华，帮助研究人员和开发人员为其学术和工业项目构建定制解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一种将机器人操作系统（ROS）与Conda和Jupyter数据科学生态系统紧密结合的方法，并提供了相应的工具和扩展。
AI.motivation: ROS在机器人领域广泛应用，但其与数据科学工具（如Conda和Jupyter）的集成存在困难，限制了研究人员和开发者的效率。
AI.method: 开发了新的ROS Conda包，实现ROS与数据科学和机器学习工具的无缝安装；优化了Conda求解器和构建系统，提升性能；并为JupyterLab开发了ROS扩展插件。
AI.result: 实现了ROS1和ROS2多个版本在一台机器上的并行运行，提供了适用于多种平台和架构的预编译二进制文件，并增强了JupyterLab对ROS的功能支持。
AI.conclusion: RoboStack结合了数据科学和机器人技术的优势，为研究人员和开发者提供了构建自定义解决方案的强大工具。

authors_text: Fengpei Yuan,Joel G. Anderson,Tami Wyatt,Ruth Palan Lopez,Monica Crane,Austin Montgomery,Xiaopeng Zhao
title: Assessing the Acceptability of a Humanoid Robot for Alzheimer's Disease and Related Dementia Care Using an Online Survey
title_zh: 使用在线调查评估人形机器人对阿尔茨海默病和相关痴呆症护理的可接受性
abstract: In this work, an online survey was used to understand the acceptability of humanoid robots and users' needs in using these robots to assist with care among people with Alzheimer's disease and related dementias (ADRD), their family caregivers, health care professionals, and the general public. From November 12, 2020 to March 13, 2021, a total of 631 complete responses were collected, including 80 responses from people with mild cognitive impairment or ADRD, 245 responses from caregivers and health care professionals, and 306 responses from the general public. Overall, people with ADRD, caregivers, and the general public showed positive attitudes towards using the robot to assist with care for people with ADRD. The top three functions of robots required by the group of people with ADRD were reminders to take medicine, emergency call service, and helping contact medical services. Additional comments, suggestions, and concerns provided by caregivers and the general public are also discussed.
summary: In this work, an online survey was used to understand the acceptability of humanoid robots and users' needs in using these robots to assist with care among people with Alzheimer's disease and related dementias (ADRD), their family caregivers, health care professionals, and the general public. From November 12, 2020 to March 13, 2021, a total of 631 complete responses were collected, including 80 responses from people with mild cognitive impairment or ADRD, 245 responses from caregivers and health care professionals, and 306 responses from the general public. Overall, people with ADRD, caregivers, and the general public showed positive attitudes towards using the robot to assist with care for people with ADRD. The top three functions of robots required by the group of people with ADRD were reminders to take medicine, emergency call service, and helping contact medical services. Additional comments, suggestions, and concerns provided by caregivers and the general public are also discussed.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，通过一项在线调查来了解人形机器人的可接受性以及用户使用这些机器人协助阿尔茨海默病和相关痴呆症 (ADRD) 患者、其家庭护理人员、医疗保健专业人员和公众的护理需求。从2020年11月12日到2021年3月13日，共收集了631份完整回复，其中80份来自轻度认知障碍或ADRD患者的回复，245份来自护理人员和医疗保健专业人员的回复，以及306份来自公众的回复。总体而言，ADRD 患者、护理人员和公众对使用机器人协助护理 ADRD 患者表现出了积极的态度。 ADRD人群对机器人最需要的三大功能是提醒服药、紧急呼叫服务、帮助联系医疗服务。还讨论了护理人员和公众提供的其他意见、建议和担忧。

AI.tldr: 通过在线调查评估人形机器人在阿尔茨海默病及相关痴呆症护理中的可接受性及用户需求
AI.motivation: 随着人口老龄化，机器人辅助护理需求增加，但缺乏对不同群体接受度及需求的研究，需评估其可行性与改进方向
AI.method: 采用在线调查方法，收集ADRD患者、护理者、医疗专业人员及公众的反馈，分析其对机器人护理的接受度及功能需求
AI.result: 各群体普遍接受机器人护理，ADRD患者最需提醒服药、紧急呼叫及医疗联系功能，护理者和公众提出其他建议与担忧
AI.conclusion: 人形机器人在ADRD护理中具有潜力，但需根据用户需求优化功能设计，并关注伦理与隐私问题

motivation: 随着人口老龄化，机器人辅助护理需求增加，但缺乏对不同群体接受度及需求的研究，需评估其可行性与改进方向
method: 采用在线调查方法，收集ADRD患者、护理者、医疗专业人员及公众的反馈，分析其对机器人护理的接受度及功能需求
result: 各群体普遍接受机器人护理，ADRD患者最需提醒服药、紧急呼叫及医疗联系功能，护理者和公众提出其他建议与担忧
conclusion: 人形机器人在ADRD护理中具有潜力，但需根据用户需求优化功能设计，并关注伦理与隐私问题
search_text: Assessing the Acceptability of a Humanoid Robot for Alzheimer's Disease and Related Dementia Care Using an Online Survey 使用在线调查评估人形机器人对阿尔茨海默病和相关痴呆症护理的可接受性 In this work, an online survey was used to understand the acceptability of humanoid robots and users' needs in using these robots to assist with care among people with Alzheimer's disease and related dementias (ADRD), their family caregivers, health care professionals, and the general public. From November 12, 2020 to March 13, 2021, a total of 631 complete responses were collected, including 80 responses from people with mild cognitive impairment or ADRD, 245 responses from caregivers and health care professionals, and 306 responses from the general public. Overall, people with ADRD, caregivers, and the general public showed positive attitudes towards using the robot to assist with care for people with ADRD. The top three functions of robots required by the group of people with ADRD were reminders to take medicine, emergency call service, and helping contact medical services. Additional comments, suggestions, and concerns provided by caregivers and the general public are also discussed. 在这项工作中，通过一项在线调查来了解人形机器人的可接受性以及用户使用这些机器人协助阿尔茨海默病和相关痴呆症 (ADRD) 患者、其家庭护理人员、医疗保健专业人员和公众的护理需求。从2020年11月12日到2021年3月13日，共收集了631份完整回复，其中80份来自轻度认知障碍或ADRD患者的回复，245份来自护理人员和医疗保健专业人员的回复，以及306份来自公众的回复。总体而言，ADRD 患者、护理人员和公众对使用机器人协助护理 ADRD 患者表现出了积极的态度。 ADRD人群对机器人最需要的三大功能是提醒服药、紧急呼叫服务、帮助联系医疗服务。还讨论了护理人员和公众提供的其他意见、建议和担忧。 通过在线调查评估人形机器人在阿尔茨海默病及相关痴呆症护理中的可接受性及用户需求 Fengpei Yuan,Joel G. Anderson,Tami Wyatt,Ruth Palan Lopez,Monica Crane,Austin Montgomery,Xiaopeng Zhao cs.RO

authors_text: Kaidong Li,Nina Y. Wang,Yiju Yang,Guanghui Wang
title: SGNet: A Super-class Guided Network for Image Classification and Object Detection
title_zh: SGNet：用于图像分类和目标检测的超一流引导网络
abstract: Most classification models treat different object classes in parallel and the misclassifications between any two classes are treated equally. In contrast, human beings can exploit high-level information in making a prediction of an unknown object. Inspired by this observation, the paper proposes a super-class guided network (SGNet) to integrate the high-level semantic information into the network so as to increase its performance in inference. SGNet takes two-level class annotations that contain both super-class and finer class labels. The super-classes are higher-level semantic categories that consist of a certain amount of finer classes. A super-class branch (SCB), trained on super-class labels, is introduced to guide finer class prediction. At the inference time, we adopt two different strategies: Two-step inference (TSI) and direct inference (DI). TSI first predicts the super-class and then makes predictions of the corresponding finer class. On the other hand, DI directly generates predictions from the finer class branch (FCB). Extensive experiments have been performed on CIFAR-100 and MS COCO datasets. The experimental results validate the proposed approach and demonstrate its superior performance on image classification and object detection.
summary: Most classification models treat different object classes in parallel and the misclassifications between any two classes are treated equally. In contrast, human beings can exploit high-level information in making a prediction of an unknown object. Inspired by this observation, the paper proposes a super-class guided network (SGNet) to integrate the high-level semantic information into the network so as to increase its performance in inference. SGNet takes two-level class annotations that contain both super-class and finer class labels. The super-classes are higher-level semantic categories that consist of a certain amount of finer classes. A super-class branch (SCB), trained on super-class labels, is introduced to guide finer class prediction. At the inference time, we adopt two different strategies: Two-step inference (TSI) and direct inference (DI). TSI first predicts the super-class and then makes predictions of the corresponding finer class. On the other hand, DI directly generates predictions from the finer class branch (FCB). Extensive experiments have been performed on CIFAR-100 and MS COCO datasets. The experimental results validate the proposed approach and demonstrate its superior performance on image classification and object detection.
abstract_zh: 大多数分类模型并行处理不同的对象类别，并且同等对待任何两个类别之间的错误分类。相比之下，人类可以利用高级信息来预测未知物体。受这一观察的启发，论文提出了一种超类引导网络（SGNet），将高级语义信息集成到网络中，以提高其推理性能。 SGNet 采用两级类注释，其中包含超类标签和更精细的类标签。超类是由一定数量的更精细类组成的更高级别的语义类别。引入在超类标签上训练的超类分支（SCB）来指导更精细的类预测。在推理时，我们采用两种不同的策略：两步推理（TSI）和直接推理（DI）。 TSI首先预测超类，然后预测相应的更细类。另一方面，DI 直接从更精细的类分支 (FCB) 生成预测。在 CIFAR-100 和 MS COCO 数据集上进行了大量实验。实验结果验证了所提出的方法并展示了其在图像分类和目标检测方面的优越性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SGNet，通过引入超类指导机制提升图像分类和目标检测性能。
AI.motivation: 传统模型对不同类别误分类处理方式相同，而人类利用高层语义信息进行预测，因此需将超类语义整合到网络中以提升推理性能。
AI.method: 设计包含超类分支（SCB）和细粒度分支（FCB）的双分支网络，采用两阶段推理（TSI）和直接推理（DI）策略，利用超类标签指导细粒度分类。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-100和MS COCO数据集上实验验证，SGNet在分类和检测任务中均取得优于现有方法的性能。
AI.conclusion: 超类指导机制能有效提升模型性能，两种推理策略为不同场景提供灵活选择。

title: Computational Performance of Deep Reinforcement Learning to find Nash Equilibria
title_zh: 寻找纳什均衡的深度强化学习的计算性能
comment: 48 pages + 9 figures, comments welcome!
comments: 48 pages + 9 figures, comments welcome!
abstract: We test the performance of deep deterministic policy gradient (DDPG), a deep reinforcement learning algorithm, able to handle continuous state and action spaces, to learn Nash equilibria in a setting where firms compete in prices. These algorithms are typically considered model-free because they do not require transition probability functions (as in e.g., Markov games) or predefined functional forms. Despite being model-free, a large set of parameters are utilized in various steps of the algorithm. These are e.g., learning rates, memory buffers, state-space dimensioning, normalizations, or noise decay rates and the purpose of this work is to systematically test the effect of these parameter configurations on convergence to the analytically derived Bertrand equilibrium. We find parameter choices that can reach convergence rates of up to 99%. The reliable convergence may make the method a useful tool to study strategic behavior of firms even in more complex settings. Keywords: Bertrand Equilibrium, Competition in Uniform Price Auctions, Deep Deterministic Policy Gradient Algorithm, Parameter Sensitivity Analysis
summary: We test the performance of deep deterministic policy gradient (DDPG), a deep reinforcement learning algorithm, able to handle continuous state and action spaces, to learn Nash equilibria in a setting where firms compete in prices. These algorithms are typically considered model-free because they do not require transition probability functions (as in e.g., Markov games) or predefined functional forms. Despite being model-free, a large set of parameters are utilized in various steps of the algorithm. These are e.g., learning rates, memory buffers, state-space dimensioning, normalizations, or noise decay rates and the purpose of this work is to systematically test the effect of these parameter configurations on convergence to the analytically derived Bertrand equilibrium. We find parameter choices that can reach convergence rates of up to 99%. The reliable convergence may make the method a useful tool to study strategic behavior of firms even in more complex settings. Keywords: Bertrand Equilibrium, Competition in Uniform Price Auctions, Deep Deterministic Policy Gradient Algorithm, Parameter Sensitivity Analysis
abstract_zh: 我们测试深度确定性策略梯度（DDPG）的性能，DDPG是一种深度强化学习算法，能够处理连续状态和动作空间，以在企业进行价格竞争的环境中学习纳什均衡。这些算法通常被认为是无模型的，因为它们不需要转移概率函数（例如马尔可夫游戏）或预定义的函数形式。尽管没有模型，但在算法的各个步骤中使用了大量参数。例如，学习速率、内存缓冲区、状态空间尺寸、归一化或噪声衰减率，这项工作的目的是系统地测试这些参数配置对收敛到分析得出的伯特兰平衡的影响。我们发现参数选择可以达到高达 99% 的收敛率。可靠的收敛性可能使该方法成为研究企业战略行为的有用工具，即使在更复杂的环境中也是如此。关键词：伯特兰均衡、统一价格拍卖竞争、深度确定性政策梯度算法、参数敏感性分析

AI.tldr: 本文测试深度确定性策略梯度（DDPG）算法在连续状态和动作空间中学习纳什均衡的计算性能，特别是在企业价格竞争场景下的表现。
AI.motivation: 传统模型需要依赖转移概率函数或预定义形式，而DDPG作为模型无关方法在参数配置上存在敏感性，需系统分析其对收敛至伯特兰均衡的影响。
AI.method: 通过调整DDPG算法中的关键参数（如学习率、记忆缓冲区、归一化等），在价格竞争模型中进行系统性实验，评估参数配置对收敛效果的影响。
AI.result: 发现特定参数选择可使算法收敛率高达99%，表明DDPG在复杂场景中仍具备可靠收敛性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可能成为研究企业战略行为的有效工具，尤其在更复杂的竞争环境中具有应用潜力。

title: Leaving My Fingerprints: Motivations and Challenges of Contributing to OSS for Social Good
title_zh: 留下我的指纹：为社会公益贡献 OSS 的动机和挑战
comment: 13 pages, 6 tables
comments: 13 pages, 6 tables
abstract: When inspiring software developers to contribute to open source software, the act is often referenced as an opportunity to build tools to support the developer community. However, that is not the only charge that propels contributions -- growing interest in open source has also been attributed to software developers deciding to use their technical skills to benefit a common societal good. To understand how developers identify these projects, their motivations for contributing, and challenges they face, we conducted 21 semi-structured interviews with OSS for Social Good (OSS4SG) contributors. From our interview analysis, we identified themes of contribution styles that we wanted to understand at scale by deploying a survey to over 5765 OSS and Open Source Software for Social Good contributors. From our quantitative analysis of 517 responses, we find that the majority of contributors demonstrate a distinction between OSS4SG and OSS. Likewise, contributors described definitions based on what societal issue the project was to mitigate and who the outcomes of the project were going to benefit. In addition, we find that OSS4SG contributors focus less on benefiting themselves by padding their resume with new technology skills and are more interested in leaving their mark on society at statistically significant levels. We also find that OSS4SG contributors evaluate the owners of the project significantly more than OSS contributors. These findings inform implications to help contributors identify high societal impact projects, help project maintainers reduce barriers to entry, and help organizations understand why contributors are drawn to these projects to sustain active participation.
summary: When inspiring software developers to contribute to open source software, the act is often referenced as an opportunity to build tools to support the developer community. However, that is not the only charge that propels contributions -- growing interest in open source has also been attributed to software developers deciding to use their technical skills to benefit a common societal good. To understand how developers identify these projects, their motivations for contributing, and challenges they face, we conducted 21 semi-structured interviews with OSS for Social Good (OSS4SG) contributors. From our interview analysis, we identified themes of contribution styles that we wanted to understand at scale by deploying a survey to over 5765 OSS and Open Source Software for Social Good contributors. From our quantitative analysis of 517 responses, we find that the majority of contributors demonstrate a distinction between OSS4SG and OSS. Likewise, contributors described definitions based on what societal issue the project was to mitigate and who the outcomes of the project were going to benefit. In addition, we find that OSS4SG contributors focus less on benefiting themselves by padding their resume with new technology skills and are more interested in leaving their mark on society at statistically significant levels. We also find that OSS4SG contributors evaluate the owners of the project significantly more than OSS contributors. These findings inform implications to help contributors identify high societal impact projects, help project maintainers reduce barriers to entry, and help organizations understand why contributors are drawn to these projects to sustain active participation.
abstract_zh: 当激励软件开发人员为开源软件做出贡献时，该行为通常被视为构建工具来支持开发人员社区的机会。然而，这并不是推动贡献的唯一原因——对开源日益增长的兴趣也归因于软件开发人员决定利用他们的技术技能来造福共同的社会利益。为了了解开发人员如何识别这些项目、他们的贡献动机以及他们面临的挑战，我们对 OSS for Social Good (OSS4SG) 贡献者进行了 21 次半结构化访谈。根据我们的采访分析，我们通过对超过 5765 个开源软件和社会公益贡献者进行调查，确定了我们想要大规模了解的贡献风格主题。从我们对 517 个回复的定量分析中，我们发现大多数贡献者都表现出了 OSS4SG 和 OSS 之间的区别。同样，贡献者根据项目要缓解的社会问题以及项目的结果将使谁受益来描述定义。此外，我们发现 OSS4SG 贡献者较少关注通过在简历中添加新技术技能来使自己受益，而更感兴趣的是在统计显着水平上在社会上留下自己的印记。我们还发现，OSS4SG 贡献者对项目所有者的评价明显高于 OSS 贡献者。这些发现有助于帮助贡献者识别高社会影响项目，帮助项目维护者减少进入壁垒，并帮助组织了解为什么贡献者被吸引到这些项目以维持积极参与。

AI.tldr: 本文研究开发者参与开源软件用于社会公益（OSS4SG）的动机、挑战及项目识别方式。
AI.motivation: 尽管开源贡献常被视为社区工具建设，但开发者日益关注通过技术技能实现社会公益，需明确其动机与挑战。
AI.method: 通过21次半结构化访谈与5765名贡献者的调查问卷，定量分析517份回复数据。
AI.result: 贡献者明确区分OSS4SG与普通开源项目，更关注社会问题解决及受益群体，较少关注个人简历提升，且更重视项目维护者评估。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果为识别高社会影响力项目、降低参与门槛及维持贡献者活跃度提供实践指导。

search_text: Leaving My Fingerprints: Motivations and Challenges of Contributing to OSS for Social Good 留下我的指纹：为社会公益贡献 OSS 的动机和挑战 When inspiring software developers to contribute to open source software, the act is often referenced as an opportunity to build tools to support the developer community. However, that is not the only charge that propels contributions -- growing interest in open source has also been attributed to software developers deciding to use their technical skills to benefit a common societal good. To understand how developers identify these projects, their motivations for contributing, and challenges they face, we conducted 21 semi-structured interviews with OSS for Social Good (OSS4SG) contributors. From our interview analysis, we identified themes of contribution styles that we wanted to understand at scale by deploying a survey to over 5765 OSS and Open Source Software for Social Good contributors. From our quantitative analysis of 517 responses, we find that the majority of contributors demonstrate a distinction between OSS4SG and OSS. Likewise, contributors described definitions based on what societal issue the project was to mitigate and who the outcomes of the project were going to benefit. In addition, we find that OSS4SG contributors focus less on benefiting themselves by padding their resume with new technology skills and are more interested in leaving their mark on society at statistically significant levels. We also find that OSS4SG contributors evaluate the owners of the project significantly more than OSS contributors. These findings inform implications to help contributors identify high societal impact projects, help project maintainers reduce barriers to entry, and help organizations understand why contributors are drawn to these projects to sustain active participation. 当激励软件开发人员为开源软件做出贡献时，该行为通常被视为构建工具来支持开发人员社区的机会。然而，这并不是推动贡献的唯一原因——对开源日益增长的兴趣也归因于软件开发人员决定利用他们的技术技能来造福共同的社会利益。为了了解开发人员如何识别这些项目、他们的贡献动机以及他们面临的挑战，我们对 OSS for Social Good (OSS4SG) 贡献者进行了 21 次半结构化访谈。根据我们的采访分析，我们通过对超过 5765 个开源软件和社会公益贡献者进行调查，确定了我们想要大规模了解的贡献风格主题。从我们对 517 个回复的定量分析中，我们发现大多数贡献者都表现出了 OSS4SG 和 OSS 之间的区别。同样，贡献者根据项目要缓解的社会问题以及项目的结果将使谁受益来描述定义。此外，我们发现 OSS4SG 贡献者较少关注通过在简历中添加新技术技能来使自己受益，而更感兴趣的是在统计显着水平上在社会上留下自己的印记。我们还发现，OSS4SG 贡献者对项目所有者的评价明显高于 OSS 贡献者。这些发现有助于帮助贡献者识别高社会影响项目，帮助项目维护者减少进入壁垒，并帮助组织了解为什么贡献者被吸引到这些项目以维持积极参与。 本文研究开发者参与开源软件用于社会公益（OSS4SG）的动机、挑战及项目识别方式。 Yu Huang,Denae Ford,Thomas Zimmermann cs.SE,cs.CY,cs.HC

title: Why AI is Harder Than We Think
title_zh: 为什么人工智能比我们想象的更难
comment: 12 pages; typos corrected in newest version
comments: 12 pages; typos corrected in newest version
abstract: Since its beginning in the 1950s, the field of artificial intelligence has cycled several times between periods of optimistic predictions and massive investment ("AI spring") and periods of disappointment, loss of confidence, and reduced funding ("AI winter"). Even with today's seemingly fast pace of AI breakthroughs, the development of long-promised technologies such as self-driving cars, housekeeping robots, and conversational companions has turned out to be much harder than many people expected. One reason for these repeating cycles is our limited understanding of the nature and complexity of intelligence itself. In this paper I describe four fallacies in common assumptions made by AI researchers, which can lead to overconfident predictions about the field. I conclude by discussing the open questions spurred by these fallacies, including the age-old challenge of imbuing machines with humanlike common sense.
summary: Since its beginning in the 1950s, the field of artificial intelligence has cycled several times between periods of optimistic predictions and massive investment ("AI spring") and periods of disappointment, loss of confidence, and reduced funding ("AI winter"). Even with today's seemingly fast pace of AI breakthroughs, the development of long-promised technologies such as self-driving cars, housekeeping robots, and conversational companions has turned out to be much harder than many people expected. One reason for these repeating cycles is our limited understanding of the nature and complexity of intelligence itself. In this paper I describe four fallacies in common assumptions made by AI researchers, which can lead to overconfident predictions about the field. I conclude by discussing the open questions spurred by these fallacies, including the age-old challenge of imbuing machines with humanlike common sense.
abstract_zh: 自20世纪50年代开始以来，人工智能领域在乐观预测和大规模投资时期（“人工智能春天”）和失望、信心丧失和资金减少时期（“人工智能冬天”）之间多次循环。尽管当今人工智能的突破速度看似很快，但人们长期承诺的技术（例如自动驾驶汽车、家政机器人和对话伙伴）的开发却比许多人预期的要困难得多。这些重复循环的原因之一是我们对智能本身的性质和复杂性的理解有限。在本文中，我描述了人工智能研究人员做出的常见假设的四个谬误，这些谬误可能导致对该领域的过度自信的预测。最后，我讨论了这些谬论引发的悬而未决的问题，包括向机器灌输类似人类常识的古老挑战。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨人工智能发展为何比预期更困难，分析了研究者常见的四种错误假设。
AI.motivation: 人工智能领域长期存在过度乐观预测与现实落差的问题，需反思其根本原因。
AI.method: 通过识别并分析AI研究中普遍存在的四种谬误假设，揭示过度自信预测的根源。
AI.result: 指出四种错误假设导致的技术开发困境，并提出如机器常识等核心开放性问题。
AI.conclusion: 人工智能的复杂性源于对智能本质理解不足，需重新审视技术挑战与研究方向。

authors_text: David Qiu,Yanzhang He,Qiujia Li,Yu Zhang,Liangliang Cao,Ian McGraw
title: Multi-Task Learning for End-to-End ASR Word and Utterance Confidence with Deletion Prediction
title_zh: 通过删除预测实现端到端 ASR 单词和话语置信度的多任务学习
comment: Submitted to Interspeech 2021
comments: Submitted to Interspeech 2021
abstract: Confidence scores are very useful for downstream applications of automatic speech recognition (ASR) systems. Recent works have proposed using neural networks to learn word or utterance confidence scores for end-to-end ASR. In those studies, word confidence by itself does not model deletions, and utterance confidence does not take advantage of word-level training signals. This paper proposes to jointly learn word confidence, word deletion, and utterance confidence. Empirical results show that multi-task learning with all three objectives improves confidence metrics (NCE, AUC, RMSE) without the need for increasing the model size of the confidence estimation module. Using the utterance-level confidence for rescoring also decreases the word error rates on Google's Voice Search and Long-tail Maps datasets by 3-5% relative, without needing a dedicated neural rescorer.
summary: Confidence scores are very useful for downstream applications of automatic speech recognition (ASR) systems. Recent works have proposed using neural networks to learn word or utterance confidence scores for end-to-end ASR. In those studies, word confidence by itself does not model deletions, and utterance confidence does not take advantage of word-level training signals. This paper proposes to jointly learn word confidence, word deletion, and utterance confidence. Empirical results show that multi-task learning with all three objectives improves confidence metrics (NCE, AUC, RMSE) without the need for increasing the model size of the confidence estimation module. Using the utterance-level confidence for rescoring also decreases the word error rates on Google's Voice Search and Long-tail Maps datasets by 3-5% relative, without needing a dedicated neural rescorer.
abstract_zh: 置信度分数对于自动语音识别 (ASR) 系统的下游应用非常有用。最近的工作提出使用神经网络来学习端到端 ASR 的单词或话语置信度分数。在这些研究中，单词置信度本身不会对删除进行建模，并且话语置信度不会利用单词级训练信号。本文提出联合学习单词置信度、单词删除和话语置信度。实证结果表明，具有所有三个目标的多任务学习可以提高置信度指标（NCE、AUC、RMSE），而无需增加置信度估计模块的模型大小。使用话语级置信度进行重新评分还可以将 Google 语音搜索和长尾地图数据集上的单词错误率相对降低 3-5%，而无需专用的神经重新评分器。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多任务学习框架，联合预测端到端语音识别中的词置信度、词删除概率及话语级置信度。
AI.motivation: 现有方法单独建模词置信度或话语置信度时，未能有效建模删除操作或利用词级信号，限制了置信度估计性能。
AI.method: 设计多任务学习架构，同时优化词置信度、词删除预测和话语置信度三个目标，无需扩大置信度模块模型规模。
AI.result: 在Google数据集上，多任务学习使置信度指标（NCE/AUC/RMSE）提升，话语级置信度重打分使词错误率降低3-5%。
AI.conclusion: 联合建模多任务可有效提升置信度估计质量，同时增强语音识别系统整体性能，无需额外模型开销。

result: 在Google数据集上，多任务学习使置信度指标（NCE/AUC/RMSE）提升，话语级置信度重打分使词错误率降低3-5%。
conclusion: 联合建模多任务可有效提升置信度估计质量，同时增强语音识别系统整体性能，无需额外模型开销。
search_text: Multi-Task Learning for End-to-End ASR Word and Utterance Confidence with Deletion Prediction 通过删除预测实现端到端 ASR 单词和话语置信度的多任务学习 Confidence scores are very useful for downstream applications of automatic speech recognition (ASR) systems. Recent works have proposed using neural networks to learn word or utterance confidence scores for end-to-end ASR. In those studies, word confidence by itself does not model deletions, and utterance confidence does not take advantage of word-level training signals. This paper proposes to jointly learn word confidence, word deletion, and utterance confidence. Empirical results show that multi-task learning with all three objectives improves confidence metrics (NCE, AUC, RMSE) without the need for increasing the model size of the confidence estimation module. Using the utterance-level confidence for rescoring also decreases the word error rates on Google's Voice Search and Long-tail Maps datasets by 3-5% relative, without needing a dedicated neural rescorer. 置信度分数对于自动语音识别 (ASR) 系统的下游应用非常有用。最近的工作提出使用神经网络来学习端到端 ASR 的单词或话语置信度分数。在这些研究中，单词置信度本身不会对删除进行建模，并且话语置信度不会利用单词级训练信号。本文提出联合学习单词置信度、单词删除和话语置信度。实证结果表明，具有所有三个目标的多任务学习可以提高置信度指标（NCE、AUC、RMSE），而无需增加置信度估计模块的模型大小。使用话语级置信度进行重新评分还可以将 Google 语音搜索和长尾地图数据集上的单词错误率相对降低 3-5%，而无需专用的神经重新评分器。 本文提出一种多任务学习框架，联合预测端到端语音识别中的词置信度、词删除概率及话语级置信度。 David Qiu,Yanzhang He,Qiujia Li,Yu Zhang,Liangliang Cao,Ian McGraw eess.AS,cs.CL,cs.LG,cs.SD

authors_text: Ali Akbar Sadat Asl,Mohammad Mahdi Ershadi,Shahabeddin Sotudian,Xingyu Li,Scott Dick
title: Fuzzy Expert Systems for Prediction of ICU Admission in Patients with COVID-19
title_zh: 用于预测 COVID-19 患者入住 ICU 的模糊专家系统
abstract: The pandemic COVID-19 disease has had a dramatic impact on almost all countries around the world so that many hospitals have been overwhelmed with Covid-19 cases. As medical resources are limited, deciding on the proper allocation of these resources is a very crucial issue. Besides, uncertainty is a major factor that can affect decisions, especially in medical fields. To cope with this issue, we use fuzzy logic (FL) as one of the most suitable methods in modeling systems with high uncertainty and complexity. We intend to make use of the advantages of FL in decisions on cases that need to treat in ICU. In this study, an interval type-2 fuzzy expert system is proposed for prediction of ICU admission in COVID-19 patients. For this prediction task, we also developed an adaptive neuro-fuzzy inference system (ANFIS). Finally, the results of these fuzzy systems are compared to some well-known classification methods such as Naive Bayes (NB), Case-Based Reasoning (CBR), Decision Tree (DT), and K Nearest Neighbor (KNN). The results show that the type-2 fuzzy expert system and ANFIS models perform competitively in terms of accuracy and F-measure compared to the other system modeling techniques.
summary: The pandemic COVID-19 disease has had a dramatic impact on almost all countries around the world so that many hospitals have been overwhelmed with Covid-19 cases. As medical resources are limited, deciding on the proper allocation of these resources is a very crucial issue. Besides, uncertainty is a major factor that can affect decisions, especially in medical fields. To cope with this issue, we use fuzzy logic (FL) as one of the most suitable methods in modeling systems with high uncertainty and complexity. We intend to make use of the advantages of FL in decisions on cases that need to treat in ICU. In this study, an interval type-2 fuzzy expert system is proposed for prediction of ICU admission in COVID-19 patients. For this prediction task, we also developed an adaptive neuro-fuzzy inference system (ANFIS). Finally, the results of these fuzzy systems are compared to some well-known classification methods such as Naive Bayes (NB), Case-Based Reasoning (CBR), Decision Tree (DT), and K Nearest Neighbor (KNN). The results show that the type-2 fuzzy expert system and ANFIS models perform competitively in terms of accuracy and F-measure compared to the other system modeling techniques.
abstract_zh: 大流行的 COVID-19 疾病对世界上几乎所有国家都产生了巨大影响，许多医院因 Covid-19 病例而不堪重负。由于医疗资源是有限的，如何合理分配这些资源是一个非常关键的问题。此外，不确定性是影响决策的主要因素，尤其是在医疗领域。为了解决这个问题，我们使用模糊逻辑（FL）作为对具有高不确定性和复杂性的系统进行建模的最合适方法之一。我们打算利用 FL 的优势来决定需要在 ICU 治疗的病例。在本研究中，提出了一种区间2型模糊专家系统来预测COVID-19患者入住ICU的情况。对于这个预测任务，我们还开发了自适应神经模糊推理系统（ANFIS）。最后，将这些模糊系统的结果与一些著名的分类方法进行比较，例如朴素贝叶斯 (NB)、基于案例的推理 (CBR)、决策树 (DT) 和 K 最近邻 (KNN)。结果表明，与其他系统建模技术相比，2 类模糊专家系统和 AFIS 模型在精度和 F 度量方面具有竞争力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于模糊逻辑的专家系统和自适应神经模糊推理系统（ANFIS），用于预测新冠患者是否需要入住ICU。
AI.motivation: 新冠疫情导致医院资源紧张，需精准分配医疗资源。医疗决策中存在大量不确定性，传统方法难以有效处理此类复杂性。
AI.method: 开发区间类型-2模糊专家系统与ANFIS模型，并与朴素贝叶斯、案例推理、决策树和K近邻等传统分类方法进行对比实验。
AI.result: 模糊专家系统和ANFIS在准确率与F值指标上表现优于传统方法，显示出良好的预测性能。
AI.conclusion: 模糊逻辑方法能有效处理医疗决策中的不确定性，为新冠患者ICU资源分配提供可靠的技术支持。

title: Multi-Density Attention Network for Loop Filtering in Video Compression
title_zh: 用于视频压缩中环路过滤的多密度注意网络
abstract: Video compression is a basic requirement for consumer and professional video applications alike. Video coding standards such as H.264/AVC and H.265/HEVC are widely deployed in the market to enable efficient use of bandwidth and storage for many video applications. To reduce the coding artifacts and improve the compression efficiency, neural network based loop filtering of the reconstructed video has been developed in the literature. However, loop filtering is a challenging task due to the variation in video content and sampling densities. In this paper, we propose a on-line scaling based multi-density attention network for loop filtering in video compression. The core of our approach lies in several aspects: (a) parallel multi-resolution convolution streams for extracting multi-density features, (b) single attention branch to learn the sample correlations and generate mask maps, (c) a channel-mutual attention procedure to fuse the data from multiple branches, (d) on-line scaling technique to further optimize the output results of network according to the actual signal. The proposed multi-density attention network learns rich features from multiple sampling densities and performs robustly on video content of different resolutions. Moreover, the online scaling process enhances the signal adaptability of the off-line pre-trained model. Experimental results show that 10.18% bit-rate reduction at the same video quality can be achieved over the latest Versatile Video Coding (VVC) standard. The objective performance of the proposed algorithm outperforms the state-of-the-art methods and the subjective quality improvement is obvious in terms of detail preservation and artifact alleviation.
summary: Video compression is a basic requirement for consumer and professional video applications alike. Video coding standards such as H.264/AVC and H.265/HEVC are widely deployed in the market to enable efficient use of bandwidth and storage for many video applications. To reduce the coding artifacts and improve the compression efficiency, neural network based loop filtering of the reconstructed video has been developed in the literature. However, loop filtering is a challenging task due to the variation in video content and sampling densities. In this paper, we propose a on-line scaling based multi-density attention network for loop filtering in video compression. The core of our approach lies in several aspects: (a) parallel multi-resolution convolution streams for extracting multi-density features, (b) single attention branch to learn the sample correlations and generate mask maps, (c) a channel-mutual attention procedure to fuse the data from multiple branches, (d) on-line scaling technique to further optimize the output results of network according to the actual signal. The proposed multi-density attention network learns rich features from multiple sampling densities and performs robustly on video content of different resolutions. Moreover, the online scaling process enhances the signal adaptability of the off-line pre-trained model. Experimental results show that 10.18% bit-rate reduction at the same video quality can be achieved over the latest Versatile Video Coding (VVC) standard. The objective performance of the proposed algorithm outperforms the state-of-the-art methods and the subjective quality improvement is obvious in terms of detail preservation and artifact alleviation.
abstract_zh: 视频压缩是消费者和专业视频应用程序的基本要求。 H.264/AVC 和 H.265/HEVC 等视频编码标准在市场上得到广泛部署，以实现许多视频应用的带宽和存储的高效利用。为了减少编码伪影并提高压缩效率，文献中开发了基于神经网络的重构视频环路滤波。然而，由于视频内容和采样密度的变化，环路滤波是一项具有挑战性的任务。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于在线缩放的多密度注意力网络，用于视频压缩中的循环过滤。我们方法的核心在于几个方面：（a）用于提取多密度特征的并行多分辨率卷积流，（b）用于学习样本相关性并生成掩模图的单个注意分支，（c）用于融合来自多个分支的数据的通道相互注意程序，（d）在线缩放技术以根据实际信号进一步优化网络的输出结果。所提出的多密度注意力网络从多种采样密度中学习丰富的特征，并对不同分辨率的视频内容表现出鲁棒性。此外，在线缩放过程增强了离线预训练模型的信号适应性。实验结果表明，在相同视频质量的情况下，较最新的通用视频编码（VVC）标准可以实现10.18%的码率降低。所提出的算法的客观性能优于最先进的方法，并且在细节保留和伪影消除方面主观质量的改进是明显的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于在线缩放的多密度注意力网络，用于视频压缩中的环路滤波，以提升压缩效率并减少伪影。
AI.motivation: 现有视频编码标准在处理不同内容和采样密度的视频时，环路滤波效果有限，难以兼顾压缩效率与画质。需开发更适应复杂场景的神经网络方法。
AI.method: 采用多分辨率卷积流提取多密度特征，通过注意力分支生成掩码图并融合多分支数据，结合在线缩放技术优化输出结果，增强模型对实际信号的适应性。
AI.result: 在相同视频质量下，相比最新VVC标准实现10.18%的比特率降低，客观性能优于现有方法，主观画质在细节保留和伪影抑制方面显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 多密度注意力网络能有效处理不同分辨率视频内容，在线缩放技术进一步提升预训练模型的适应性，为视频压缩提供了高效且鲁棒的解决方案。

The objective performance of the proposed algorithm outperforms the state-of-the-art methods and the subjective quality improvement is obvious in terms of detail preservation and artifact alleviation. 视频压缩是消费者和专业视频应用程序的基本要求。 H.264/AVC 和 H.265/HEVC 等视频编码标准在市场上得到广泛部署，以实现许多视频应用的带宽和存储的高效利用。为了减少编码伪影并提高压缩效率，文献中开发了基于神经网络的重构视频环路滤波。然而，由于视频内容和采样密度的变化，环路滤波是一项具有挑战性的任务。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于在线缩放的多密度注意力网络，用于视频压缩中的循环过滤。我们方法的核心在于几个方面：（a）用于提取多密度特征的并行多分辨率卷积流，（b）用于学习样本相关性并生成掩模图的单个注意分支，（c）用于融合来自多个分支的数据的通道相互注意程序，（d）在线缩放技术以根据实际信号进一步优化网络的输出结果。所提出的多密度注意力网络从多种采样密度中学习丰富的特征，并对不同分辨率的视频内容表现出鲁棒性。此外，在线缩放过程增强了离线预训练模型的信号适应性。实验结果表明，在相同视频质量的情况下，较最新的通用视频编码（VVC）标准可以实现10.18%的码率降低。所提出的算法的客观性能优于最先进的方法，并且在细节保留和伪影消除方面主观质量的改进是明显的。 本文提出一种基于在线缩放的多密度注意力网络，用于视频压缩中的环路滤波，以提升压缩效率并减少伪影。 Zhao Wang,Changyue Ma,Yan Ye eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.MM

title: Advances on image interpolation based on ant colony algorithm
title_zh: 基于蚁群算法的图像插值研究进展
comment: 17 pages, 14 figures, 3 tables
comments: 17 pages, 14 figures, 3 tables
abstract: This paper presents an advance on image interpolation based on ant colony algorithm (AACA) for high-resolution image scaling. The difference between the proposed algorithm and the previously proposed optimization of bilinear interpolation based on ant colony algorithm (OBACA) is that AACA uses global weighting, whereas OBACA uses a local weighting scheme. The strength of the proposed global weighting of the AACA algorithm depends on employing solely the pheromone matrix information present on any group of four adjacent pixels to decide which case deserves a maximum global weight value or not. Experimental results are further provided to show the higher performance of the proposed AACA algorithm with reference to the algorithms mentioned in this paper.
summary: This paper presents an advance on image interpolation based on ant colony algorithm (AACA) for high-resolution image scaling. The difference between the proposed algorithm and the previously proposed optimization of bilinear interpolation based on ant colony algorithm (OBACA) is that AACA uses global weighting, whereas OBACA uses a local weighting scheme. The strength of the proposed global weighting of the AACA algorithm depends on employing solely the pheromone matrix information present on any group of four adjacent pixels to decide which case deserves a maximum global weight value or not. Experimental results are further provided to show the higher performance of the proposed AACA algorithm with reference to the algorithms mentioned in this paper.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了基于蚁群算法（AACA）的图像插值的进展，以实现高分辨率图像缩放。该算法与之前提出的基于蚁群算法的双线性插值优化（OBACA）的区别在于，AACA使用全局加权，而OBACA使用局部加权方案。所提出的 AACA 算法全局加权的强度取决于仅采用任何四个相邻像素组上存在的信息素矩阵信息来决定哪种情况值得最大全局权重值。实验结果进一步表明所提出的AACA算法相对于本文提到的算法具有更高的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于蚁群算法的图像插值改进方法（AACA），通过全局加权策略提升高分辨率图像缩放效果。
AI.motivation: 现有基于蚁群算法的双线性插值优化方法（OBACA）因局部加权策略存在局限性，难以有效提升图像质量。
AI.method: 采用全局加权方案，仅利用四个相邻像素的信息构建信息素矩阵，通过全局权重分配优化插值过程。
AI.result: 实验表明AACA算法在图像缩放任务中较其他算法具有更优的性能表现。
AI.conclusion: 全局加权策略能有效提升图像插值质量，验证了AACA算法在高分辨率图像处理中的优越性。

authors_text: Muhammad Shaban,Shan E Ahmed Raza,Mariam Hassan,Arif Jamshed,Sajid Mushtaq,Asif Loya,Nikolaos Batis,Jill Brooks,Paul Nankivell,Neil Sharma,Max Robinson,Hisham Mehanna,Syed Ali Khurram,Nasir Rajpoot
title: A digital score of tumour-associated stroma infiltrating lymphocytes predicts survival in head and neck squamous cell carcinoma
title_zh: 肿瘤相关基质浸润淋巴细胞的数字评分可预测头颈鳞状细胞癌的存活率
abstract: The infiltration of T-lymphocytes in the stroma and tumour is an indication of an effective immune response against the tumour, resulting in better survival. In this study, our aim is to explore the prognostic significance of tumour-associated stroma infiltrating lymphocytes (TASILs) in head and neck squamous cell carcinoma (HNSCC) through an AI based automated method. A deep learning based automated method was employed to segment tumour, stroma and lymphocytes in digitally scanned whole slide images of HNSCC tissue slides. The spatial patterns of lymphocytes and tumour-associated stroma were digitally quantified to compute the TASIL-score. Finally, prognostic significance of the TASIL-score for disease-specific and disease-free survival was investigated with the Cox proportional hazard analysis. Three different cohorts of Haematoxylin & Eosin (H&E) stained tissue slides of HNSCC cases (n=537 in total) were studied, including publicly available TCGA head and neck cancer cases. The TASIL-score carries prognostic significance (p=0.002) for disease-specific survival of HNSCC patients. The TASIL-score also shows a better separation between low- and high-risk patients as compared to the manual TIL scoring by pathologists for both disease-specific and disease-free survival. A positive correlation of TASIL-score with molecular estimates of CD8+ T cells was also found, which is in line with existing findings. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first study to automate the quantification of TASIL from routine H&E slides of head and neck cancer. Our TASIL-score based findings are aligned with the clinical knowledge with the added advantages of objectivity, reproducibility and strong prognostic value. A comprehensive evaluation on large multicentric cohorts is required before the proposed digital score can be adopted in clinical practice.
