abstract_zh: T 淋巴细胞在基质和肿瘤中的浸润表明针对肿瘤的有效免疫反应，从而导致更好的生存。在这项研究中，我们的目的是通过基于人工智能的自动化方法探讨肿瘤相关基质浸润淋巴细胞（TASIL）在头颈鳞状细胞癌（HNSCC）中的预后意义。采用基于深度学习的自动化方法对 HNSCC 组织切片的数字扫描全切片图像中的肿瘤、基质和淋巴细胞进行分割。对淋巴细胞和肿瘤相关基质的空间模式进行数字量化以计算 TASIL 评分。最后，通过 Cox 比例风险分析研究了 TASIL 评分对于疾病特异性生存和无病生存的预后意义。研究了三个不同队列的 HNSCC 病例（总共 537 例）的苏木精和曙红 (H&E) 染色组织切片，包括公开的 TCGA 头颈癌病例。 TASIL 评分对于 HNSCC 患者的疾病特异性生存具有预后意义 (p=0.002)。与病理学家针对疾病特异性生存和无病生存进行的手动 TIL 评分相比，TASIL 评分还显示出低风险和高风险患者之间更好的区分。还发现 TASIL 评分与 CD8+ T 细胞的分子估计呈正相关，这与现有的发现一致。据我们所知，这是第一项从头颈癌的常规 H&E 切片中自动定量 TASIL 的研究。我们基于 TASIL 评分的研究结果与临床知识相一致，并具有客观性、可重复性和强大的预后价值等优势。在临床实践中采用所提出的数字评分之前，需要对大型多中心队列进行综合评估。

AI.tldr: 本研究通过AI自动化方法量化头颈鳞状细胞癌组织中的肿瘤相关间质浸润淋巴细胞（TASILs），并评估其对患者预后的预测价值。
AI.motivation: 传统病理学家手动评分TASILs存在主观性，而TASILs与免疫反应及生存率相关，需开发客观、可重复的数字评分系统以提升预后预测准确性。
AI.method: 采用深度学习分割H&E染色组织切片中的肿瘤、间质和淋巴细胞，通过空间分布模式计算TASIL-score，并利用Cox比例风险模型分析其对疾病特异性生存和无病生存的预后意义。
AI.result: TASIL-score在疾病特异性生存中具有显著预后价值（p=0.002），且较手动评分更有效区分高低风险患者，同时与CD8+ T细胞分子估计值呈正相关。
AI.conclusion: 该数字评分系统具有客观性、可重复性及强预后价值，但需更大规模多中心研究验证后方可应用于临床实践。

authors_text: Hengli Wang,Peide Cai,Yuxiang Sun,Lujia Wang,Ming Liu
title: Learning Interpretable End-to-End Vision-Based Motion Planning for Autonomous Driving with Optical Flow Distillation
title_zh: 使用光流蒸馏学习可解释的基于视觉的自动驾驶运动规划
comment: 7 pages, 5 figures and 1 table. This paper is accepted by ICRA 2021. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2104.08862
comments: 7 pages, 5 figures and 1 table. This paper is accepted by ICRA 2021. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2104.08862
abstract: Recently, deep-learning based approaches have achieved impressive performance for autonomous driving. However, end-to-end vision-based methods typically have limited interpretability, making the behaviors of the deep networks difficult to explain. Hence, their potential applications could be limited in practice. To address this problem, we propose an interpretable end-to-end vision-based motion planning approach for autonomous driving, referred to as IVMP. Given a set of past surrounding-view images, our IVMP first predicts future egocentric semantic maps in bird's-eye-view space, which are then employed to plan trajectories for self-driving vehicles. The predicted future semantic maps not only provide useful interpretable information, but also allow our motion planning module to handle objects with low probability, thus improving the safety of autonomous driving. Moreover, we also develop an optical flow distillation paradigm, which can effectively enhance the network while still maintaining its real-time performance. Extensive experiments on the nuScenes dataset and closed-loop simulation show that our IVMP significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art approaches in imitating human drivers with a much higher success rate. Our project page is available at https://sites.google.com/view/ivmp.
summary: Recently, deep-learning based approaches have achieved impressive performance for autonomous driving. However, end-to-end vision-based methods typically have limited interpretability, making the behaviors of the deep networks difficult to explain. Hence, their potential applications could be limited in practice. To address this problem, we propose an interpretable end-to-end vision-based motion planning approach for autonomous driving, referred to as IVMP. Given a set of past surrounding-view images, our IVMP first predicts future egocentric semantic maps in bird's-eye-view space, which are then employed to plan trajectories for self-driving vehicles. The predicted future semantic maps not only provide useful interpretable information, but also allow our motion planning module to handle objects with low probability, thus improving the safety of autonomous driving. Moreover, we also develop an optical flow distillation paradigm, which can effectively enhance the network while still maintaining its real-time performance. Extensive experiments on the nuScenes dataset and closed-loop simulation show that our IVMP significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art approaches in imitating human drivers with a much higher success rate. Our project page is available at https://sites.google.com/view/ivmp.
abstract_zh: 最近，基于深度学习的方法在自动驾驶方面取得了令人印象深刻的性能。然而，基于端到端视觉的方法通常可解释性有限，使得深层网络的行为难以解释。因此，它们的潜在应用在实践中可能受到限制。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种用于自动驾驶的可解释的端到端基于视觉的运动规划方法，简称 IVMP。给定一组过去的周围视图图像，我们的 IVMP 首先预测鸟瞰空间中未来的以自我为中心的语义图，然后将其用于规划自动驾驶车辆的轨迹。预测的未来语义图不仅提供有用的可解释信息，而且使我们的运动规划模块能够处理低概率的物体，从而提高自动驾驶的安全性。此外，我们还开发了光流蒸馏范式，可以有效增强网络，同时仍保持其实时性能。对 nuScenes 数据集和闭环模拟的大量实验表明，我们的 IVMP 在模仿人类驾驶员方面明显优于最先进的方法，并且成功率更高。我们的项目页面位于 https://sites.google.com/view/ivmp。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可解释的端到端视觉运动规划方法IVMP，通过预测未来语义地图并结合光流蒸馏技术提升自动驾驶安全性与性能。
AI.motivation: 现有端到端视觉方法缺乏可解释性，导致自动驾驶行为难以解释且安全性不足，限制了实际应用。
AI.method: IVMP首先基于历史图像预测未来鸟瞰语义地图用于轨迹规划，并引入光流蒸馏技术增强网络性能同时保持实时性。
AI.result: 在nuScenes数据集和闭环仿真中，IVMP显著优于现有方法，模仿人类驾驶员的成功率更高。
AI.conclusion: IVMP通过可解释的语义地图预测与光流蒸馏有效提升了自动驾驶的规划安全性和性能。

authors_text: Alberto Dalla Libera,Fabio Amadio,Daniel Nikovski,Ruggero Carli,Diego Romeres
title: Control of Mechanical Systems via Feedback Linearization Based on Black-Box Gaussian Process Models
title_zh: 基于黑盒高斯过程模型的反馈线性化机械系统控制
abstract: In this paper, we consider the use of black-box Gaussian process (GP) models for trajectory tracking control based on feedback linearization, in the context of mechanical systems. We considered two strategies. The first computes the control input directly by using the GP model, whereas the second computes the input after estimating the individual components of the dynamics. We tested the two strategies on a simulated manipulator with seven degrees of freedom, also varying the GP kernel choice. Results show that the second implementation is more robust w.r.t. the kernel choice and model inaccuracies. Moreover, as regards the choice of kernel, the obtained performance shows that the use of a structured kernel, such as a polynomial kernel, is advantageous, because of its effectiveness with both strategies.
summary: In this paper, we consider the use of black-box Gaussian process (GP) models for trajectory tracking control based on feedback linearization, in the context of mechanical systems. We considered two strategies. The first computes the control input directly by using the GP model, whereas the second computes the input after estimating the individual components of the dynamics. We tested the two strategies on a simulated manipulator with seven degrees of freedom, also varying the GP kernel choice. Results show that the second implementation is more robust w.r.t. the kernel choice and model inaccuracies. Moreover, as regards the choice of kernel, the obtained performance shows that the use of a structured kernel, such as a polynomial kernel, is advantageous, because of its effectiveness with both strategies.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们考虑在机械系统的背景下使用黑盒高斯过程（GP）模型进行基于反馈线性化的轨迹跟踪控制。我们考虑了两种策略。第一个使用 GP 模型直接计算控制输入，而第二个在估计动力学的各个分量后计算输入。我们在具有七个自由度的模拟机械臂上测试了这两种策略，同时也改变了 GP 内核的选择。结果表明，第二种实现更加稳健。内核选择和模型不准确。此外，关于核的选择，所获得的性能表明，使用结构化核（例如多项式核）是有利的，因为它对两种策略都有效。

AI.tldr: 本文研究基于黑盒高斯过程模型的反馈线性化方法在机械系统轨迹跟踪控制中的应用，比较了两种控制策略的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统控制方法在处理复杂机械系统的非线性动态模型时存在局限性，而高斯过程模型能够有效处理不确定性，但其在反馈线性化控制中的适用性需进一步验证。
AI.method: 提出两种控制策略：1) 直接利用高斯过程模型计算控制输入；2) 先估计动力学模型的各个组件再计算输入。通过七自由度机械臂仿真测试不同核函数的影响。
AI.result: 第二种策略对核函数选择和模型不准确性更鲁棒，结构化核（如多项式核）在两种策略中均表现出更优性能。
AI.conclusion: 结构化核函数能提升控制性能，基于动力学组件估计的控制策略更稳健，为机械系统控制提供了新的数据驱动方法。

title: End-to-end grasping policies for human-in-the-loop robots via deep reinforcement learning
title_zh: 通过深度强化学习实现人机循环机器人的端到端抓取策略
comment: ICRA 2021 Camera-ready version. Source code available at https://github.com/sharif1093/dextron
comments: ICRA 2021 Camera-ready version. Source code available at https://github.com/sharif1093/dextron
abstract: State-of-the-art human-in-the-loop robot grasping is hugely suffered by Electromyography (EMG) inference robustness issues. As a workaround, researchers have been looking into integrating EMG with other signals, often in an ad hoc manner. In this paper, we are presenting a method for end-to-end training of a policy for human-in-the-loop robot grasping on real reaching trajectories. For this purpose we use Reinforcement Learning (RL) and Imitation Learning (IL) in DEXTRON (DEXTerity enviRONment), a stochastic simulation environment with real human trajectories that are augmented and selected using a Monte Carlo (MC) simulation method. We also offer a success model which once trained on the expert policy data and the RL policy roll-out transitions, can provide transparency to how the deep policy works and when it is probably going to fail.
summary: State-of-the-art human-in-the-loop robot grasping is hugely suffered by Electromyography (EMG) inference robustness issues. As a workaround, researchers have been looking into integrating EMG with other signals, often in an ad hoc manner. In this paper, we are presenting a method for end-to-end training of a policy for human-in-the-loop robot grasping on real reaching trajectories. For this purpose we use Reinforcement Learning (RL) and Imitation Learning (IL) in DEXTRON (DEXTerity enviRONment), a stochastic simulation environment with real human trajectories that are augmented and selected using a Monte Carlo (MC) simulation method. We also offer a success model which once trained on the expert policy data and the RL policy roll-out transitions, can provide transparency to how the deep policy works and when it is probably going to fail.
abstract_zh: 最先进的人机循环机器人抓取受到肌电图 (EMG) 推理鲁棒性问题的严重影响。作为一种解决方法，研究人员一直在研究将肌电图与其他信号结合起来，通常是以一种临时的方式。在本文中，我们提出了一种对人在环机器人抓取真实到达轨迹的策略进行端到端训练的方法。为此，我们在 DEXTRON（DEXTerity 环境）中使用强化学习 (RL) 和模仿学习 (IL)，DEXTRON 是一个随机模拟环境，具有使用蒙特卡罗 (MC) 模拟方法增强和选择的真实人体轨迹。我们还提供了一个成功模型，一旦经过专家政策数据和 RL 政策推出过渡的训练，就可以提供深层政策如何运作以及何时可能失败的透明度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过深度强化学习训练端到端抓取策略的方法，用于人机协作的机器人抓取任务。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于肌电信号（EMG）的机器人抓取方法存在鲁棒性问题，且集成其他信号的方式多为临时性解决方案，缺乏系统性。
AI.method: 结合强化学习（RL）与模仿学习（IL），在包含真实人类轨迹数据的随机模拟环境DEXTRON中训练策略，并利用蒙特卡洛方法增强数据多样性。同时构建成功模型以解释策略决策逻辑及潜在失效场景。
AI.result: 实现了更鲁棒的人机协作抓取策略，并通过成功模型提升了策略透明度，明确了其可能失效的条件。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过系统整合多信号与模拟环境，为人类在回路的机器人抓取提供了更可靠且可解释的解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过深度强化学习训练端到端抓取策略的方法，用于人机协作的机器人抓取任务。
ai_content.motivation: 现有的基于肌电信号（EMG）的机器人抓取方法存在鲁棒性问题，且集成其他信号的方式多为临时性解决方案，缺乏系统性。
ai_content.method: 结合强化学习（RL）与模仿学习（IL），在包含真实人类轨迹数据的随机模拟环境DEXTRON中训练策略，并利用蒙特卡洛方法增强数据多样性。同时构建成功模型以解释策略决策逻辑及潜在失效场景。
ai_content.result: 实现了更鲁棒的人机协作抓取策略，并通过成功模型提升了策略透明度，明确了其可能失效的条件。
ai_content.conclusion: 该方法通过系统整合多信号与模拟环境，为人类在回路的机器人抓取提供了更可靠且可解释的解决方案。

search_text: End-to-end grasping policies for human-in-the-loop robots via deep reinforcement learning 通过深度强化学习实现人机循环机器人的端到端抓取策略 State-of-the-art human-in-the-loop robot grasping is hugely suffered by Electromyography (EMG) inference robustness issues. As a workaround, researchers have been looking into integrating EMG with other signals, often in an ad hoc manner. In this paper, we are presenting a method for end-to-end training of a policy for human-in-the-loop robot grasping on real reaching trajectories. For this purpose we use Reinforcement Learning (RL) and Imitation Learning (IL) in DEXTRON (DEXTerity enviRONment), a stochastic simulation environment with real human trajectories that are augmented and selected using a Monte Carlo (MC) simulation method. We also offer a success model which once trained on the expert policy data and the RL policy roll-out transitions, can provide transparency to how the deep policy works and when it is probably going to fail. 最先进的人机循环机器人抓取受到肌电图 (EMG) 推理鲁棒性问题的严重影响。作为一种解决方法，研究人员一直在研究将肌电图与其他信号结合起来，通常是以一种临时的方式。在本文中，我们提出了一种对人在环机器人抓取真实到达轨迹的策略进行端到端训练的方法。为此，我们在 DEXTRON（DEXTerity 环境）中使用强化学习 (RL) 和模仿学习 (IL)，DEXTRON 是一个随机模拟环境，具有使用蒙特卡罗 (MC) 模拟方法增强和选择的真实人体轨迹。我们还提供了一个成功模型，一旦经过专家政策数据和 RL 政策推出过渡的训练，就可以提供深层政策如何运作以及何时可能失败的透明度。 本文提出了一种通过深度强化学习训练端到端抓取策略的方法，用于人机协作的机器人抓取任务。 Mohammadreza Sharif,Deniz Erdogmus,Christopher Amato,Taskin Padir cs.RO,cs.AI

title: One-dimensional Active Contour Models for Raman Spectrum Baseline Correction
title_zh: 用于拉曼光谱基线校正的一维主动轮廓模型
comment: 4 figures, and 9 pages
comments: 4 figures, and 9 pages
abstract: Raman spectroscopy is a powerful and non-invasive method for analysis of chemicals and detection of unknown substances. However, Raman signal is so weak that background noise can distort the actual Raman signal. These baseline shifts that exist in the Raman spectrum might deteriorate analytical results. In this paper, a modified version of active contour models in one-dimensional space has been proposed for the baseline correction of Raman spectra. Our technique, inspired by principles of physics and heuristic optimization methods, iteratively deforms an initialized curve toward the desired baseline. The performance of the proposed algorithm was evaluated and compared with similar techniques using simulated Raman spectra. The results showed that the 1D active contour model outperforms many iterative baseline correction methods. The proposed algorithm was successfully applied to experimental Raman spectral data, and the results indicate that the baseline of Raman spectra can be automatically subtracted.
summary: Raman spectroscopy is a powerful and non-invasive method for analysis of chemicals and detection of unknown substances. However, Raman signal is so weak that background noise can distort the actual Raman signal. These baseline shifts that exist in the Raman spectrum might deteriorate analytical results. In this paper, a modified version of active contour models in one-dimensional space has been proposed for the baseline correction of Raman spectra. Our technique, inspired by principles of physics and heuristic optimization methods, iteratively deforms an initialized curve toward the desired baseline. The performance of the proposed algorithm was evaluated and compared with similar techniques using simulated Raman spectra. The results showed that the 1D active contour model outperforms many iterative baseline correction methods. The proposed algorithm was successfully applied to experimental Raman spectral data, and the results indicate that the baseline of Raman spectra can be automatically subtracted.
abstract_zh: 拉曼光谱是一种强大且非侵入性的化学分析和未知物质检测方法。然而，拉曼信号非常弱，背景噪声可能会扭曲实际的拉曼信号。拉曼光谱中存在的这些基线偏移可能会恶化分析结果。本文提出了一维空间活动轮廓模型的修改版本，用于拉曼光谱的基线校正。我们的技术受到物理原理和启发式优化方法的启发，迭代地将初始化曲线变形为所需的基线。使用模拟拉曼光谱评估所提出算法的性能并与类似技术进行比较。结果表明，一维活动轮廓模型优于许多迭代基线校正方法。该算法成功应用于实验拉曼光谱数据，结果表明可以自动减去拉曼光谱的基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于一维活动轮廓模型的拉曼光谱基线校正方法。
AI.motivation: 拉曼信号弱且背景噪声易导致基线偏移，影响分析结果，需改进校正技术。
AI.method: 受物理原理和启发式优化方法启发，通过迭代变形初始曲线逼近目标基线的1D活动轮廓模型。
AI.result: 算法在模拟和实验数据中均优于传统迭代方法，可自动减去拉曼光谱基线。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为拉曼光谱基线校正提供了有效且自动化的解决方案。

authors_text: Trent J. Bradberry,Christopher H. Hase,LeAnna Kent,Joel A. Góngora
title: Unsupervised Instance Selection with Low-Label, Supervised Learning for Outlier Detection
title_zh: 无监督实例选择与低标签监督学习用于异常值检测
comment: 16 pages, 4 figures
comments: 16 pages, 4 figures
abstract: The laborious process of labeling data often bottlenecks projects that aim to leverage the power of supervised machine learning. Active Learning (AL) has been established as a technique to ameliorate this condition through an iterative framework that queries a human annotator for labels of instances with the most uncertain class assignment. Via this mechanism, AL produces a binary classifier trained on less labeled data but with little, if any, loss in predictive performance. Despite its advantages, AL can have difficulty with class-imbalanced datasets and results in an inefficient labeling process. To address these drawbacks, we investigate our unsupervised instance selection (UNISEL) technique followed by a Random Forest (RF) classifier on 10 outlier detection datasets under low-label conditions. These results are compared to AL performed on the same datasets. Further, we investigate the combination of UNISEL and AL. Results indicate that UNISEL followed by an RF performs comparably to AL with an RF and that the combination of UNISEL and AL demonstrates superior performance. The practical implications of these findings in terms of time savings and generalizability afforded by UNISEL are discussed.
summary: The laborious process of labeling data often bottlenecks projects that aim to leverage the power of supervised machine learning. Active Learning (AL) has been established as a technique to ameliorate this condition through an iterative framework that queries a human annotator for labels of instances with the most uncertain class assignment. Via this mechanism, AL produces a binary classifier trained on less labeled data but with little, if any, loss in predictive performance. Despite its advantages, AL can have difficulty with class-imbalanced datasets and results in an inefficient labeling process. To address these drawbacks, we investigate our unsupervised instance selection (UNISEL) technique followed by a Random Forest (RF) classifier on 10 outlier detection datasets under low-label conditions. These results are compared to AL performed on the same datasets. Further, we investigate the combination of UNISEL and AL. Results indicate that UNISEL followed by an RF performs comparably to AL with an RF and that the combination of UNISEL and AL demonstrates superior performance. The practical implications of these findings in terms of time savings and generalizability afforded by UNISEL are discussed.
abstract_zh: 标记数据的费力过程常常成为旨在利用监督机器学习力量的项目的瓶颈。主动学习 (AL) 已被确立为一种通过迭代框架改善这种情况的技术，该迭代框架向人类注释者查询具有最不确定类别分配的实例标签。通过这种机制，AL 生成了一个二元分类器，该分类器在标记较少的数据上进行训练，但预测性能几乎没有损失（如果有的话）。尽管有其优点，AL 在处理类别不平衡的数据集时可能会遇到困难，并导致标记过程效率低下。为了解决这些缺点，我们研究了无监督实例选择 (UNISEL) 技术，然后在低标签条件下对 10 个异常值检测数据集使用随机森林 (RF) 分类器。这些结果与在相同数据集上执行的 AL 进行比较。此外，我们研究了 UNISEL 和 AL 的组合。结果表明，采用 RF 的 UNISEL 的性能与采用 RF 的 AL 相当，并且 UNISEL 和 AL 的组合表现出更优越的性能。讨论了这些发现在 UNISEL 提供的时间节省和普遍性方面的实际意义。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为UNISEL的无监督实例选择方法，结合低标签监督学习用于异常检测，旨在减少人工标注工作量并提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 人工标注数据耗时且监督学习依赖大量标签，而主动学习（AL）在处理类别不平衡数据时效率低下，因此需探索更高效的低标签学习方法。
AI.method: 通过无监督实例选择（UNISEL）筛选关键样本，结合随机森林（RF）分类器进行异常检测，并与AL方法及两者结合方案进行对比实验。
AI.result: UNISEL+RF性能与AL+RF相当，且UNISEL与AL结合后表现更优，显著减少标注时间并提升方法通用性。
AI.conclusion: UNISEL能有效降低标注成本，结合AL可进一步优化性能，为低标签场景下的异常检测提供实用解决方案。

authors_text: Xin Yuan,Zhe Lin,Jason Kuen,Jianming Zhang,Yilin Wang,Michael Maire,Ajinkya Kale,Baldo Faieta
title: Multimodal Contrastive Training for Visual Representation Learning
title_zh: 视觉表征学习的多模态对比训练
abstract: We develop an approach to learning visual representations that embraces multimodal data, driven by a combination of intra- and inter-modal similarity preservation objectives. Unlike existing visual pre-training methods, which solve a proxy prediction task in a single domain, our method exploits intrinsic data properties within each modality and semantic information from cross-modal correlation simultaneously, hence improving the quality of learned visual representations. By including multimodal training in a unified framework with different types of contrastive losses, our method can learn more powerful and generic visual features. We first train our model on COCO and evaluate the learned visual representations on various downstream tasks including image classification, object detection, and instance segmentation. For example, the visual representations pre-trained on COCO by our method achieve state-of-the-art top-1 validation accuracy of $55.3\%$ on ImageNet classification, under the common transfer protocol. We also evaluate our method on the large-scale Stock images dataset and show its effectiveness on multi-label image tagging, and cross-modal retrieval tasks.
summary: We develop an approach to learning visual representations that embraces multimodal data, driven by a combination of intra- and inter-modal similarity preservation objectives. Unlike existing visual pre-training methods, which solve a proxy prediction task in a single domain, our method exploits intrinsic data properties within each modality and semantic information from cross-modal correlation simultaneously, hence improving the quality of learned visual representations. By including multimodal training in a unified framework with different types of contrastive losses, our method can learn more powerful and generic visual features. We first train our model on COCO and evaluate the learned visual representations on various downstream tasks including image classification, object detection, and instance segmentation. For example, the visual representations pre-trained on COCO by our method achieve state-of-the-art top-1 validation accuracy of $55.3\%$ on ImageNet classification, under the common transfer protocol. We also evaluate our method on the large-scale Stock images dataset and show its effectiveness on multi-label image tagging, and cross-modal retrieval tasks.
abstract_zh: 我们开发了一种学习视觉表示的方法，该方法包含多模式数据，由模式内和模式间相似性保留目标的组合驱动。与解决单个域中的代理预测任务的现有视觉预训练方法不同，我们的方法同时利用每种模态内的内在数据属性和来自跨模态相关性的语义信息，从而提高学习视觉表示的质量。通过将多模态训练包含在具有不同类型对比损失的统一框架中，我们的方法可以学习更强大和通用的视觉特征。我们首先在 COCO 上训练我们的模型，并在各种下游任务上评估学习到的视觉表示，包括图像分类、对象检测和实例分割。例如，在通用传输协议下，通过我们的方法在 COCO 上预训练的视觉表示在 ImageNet 分类上实现了最先进的 top-1 验证精度 $55.3\%$。我们还在大规模 Stock 图像数据集上评估了我们的方法，并展示了其在多标签图像标记和跨模式检索任务上的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多模态对比训练方法，通过结合模内和模间相似性保持目标，提升视觉表征学习效果。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉预训练方法局限于单一领域的代理任务，无法同时利用模内数据特性和跨模态语义信息，导致表征质量不足。
AI.method: 构建统一框架融合多类型对比损失，同时利用模内数据属性与跨模态关联，通过COCO等数据集训练视觉表征。
AI.result: 在ImageNet分类任务中达到55.3%的SOTA验证准确率，并在Stock图像数据集的多标签分类和跨模态检索任务中表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 多模态对比训练能有效提升视觉表征的通用性与性能，验证了跨模态语义与模内特征联合学习的有效性。

search_text: Multimodal Contrastive Training for Visual Representation Learning 视觉表征学习的多模态对比训练 We develop an approach to learning visual representations that embraces multimodal data, driven by a combination of intra- and inter-modal similarity preservation objectives. Unlike existing visual pre-training methods, which solve a proxy prediction task in a single domain, our method exploits intrinsic data properties within each modality and semantic information from cross-modal correlation simultaneously, hence improving the quality of learned visual representations. By including multimodal training in a unified framework with different types of contrastive losses, our method can learn more powerful and generic visual features. We first train our model on COCO and evaluate the learned visual representations on various downstream tasks including image classification, object detection, and instance segmentation. For example, the visual representations pre-trained on COCO by our method achieve state-of-the-art top-1 validation accuracy of $55.3\%$ on ImageNet classification, under the common transfer protocol. We also evaluate our method on the large-scale Stock images dataset and show its effectiveness on multi-label image tagging, and cross-modal retrieval tasks. 我们开发了一种学习视觉表示的方法，该方法包含多模式数据，由模式内和模式间相似性保留目标的组合驱动。与解决单个域中的代理预测任务的现有视觉预训练方法不同，我们的方法同时利用每种模态内的内在数据属性和来自跨模态相关性的语义信息，从而提高学习视觉表示的质量。通过将多模态训练包含在具有不同类型对比损失的统一框架中，我们的方法可以学习更强大和通用的视觉特征。我们首先在 COCO 上训练我们的模型，并在各种下游任务上评估学习到的视觉表示，包括图像分类、对象检测和实例分割。例如，在通用传输协议下，通过我们的方法在 COCO 上预训练的视觉表示在 ImageNet 分类上实现了最先进的 top-1 验证精度 $55.3\%$。我们还在大规模 Stock 图像数据集上评估了我们的方法，并展示了其在多标签图像标记和跨模式检索任务上的有效性。 本文提出一种多模态对比训练方法，通过结合模内和模间相似性保持目标，提升视觉表征学习效果。 Xin Yuan,Zhe Lin,Jason Kuen,Jianming Zhang,Yilin Wang,Michael Maire,Ajinkya Kale,Baldo Faieta cs.CV

authors_text: Srikumar Ramalingam,Daniel Glasner,Kaushal Patel,Raviteja Vemulapalli,Sadeep Jayasumana,Sanjiv Kumar
title: Less is more: Selecting informative and diverse subsets with balancing constraints
title_zh: 少即是多：选择具有平衡约束的信息丰富且多样化的子集
comment: Added error bars to the experiments
comments: Added error bars to the experiments
abstract: Deep learning has yielded extraordinary results in vision and natural language processing, but this achievement comes at a cost. Most models require enormous resources during training, both in terms of computation and in human labeling effort. We show that we can identify informative and diverse subsets of data that lead to deep learning models with similar performance as the ones trained with the original dataset. Prior methods have exploited diversity and uncertainty in submodular objective functions for choosing subsets. In addition to these measures, we show that balancing constraints on predicted class labels and decision boundaries are beneficial. We propose a novel formulation of these constraints using matroids, an algebraic structure that generalizes linear independence in vector spaces, and present an efficient greedy algorithm with constant approximation guarantees. We outperform competing baselines on standard classification datasets such as CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, ImageNet, as well as long-tailed datasets such as CIFAR-100-LT.
summary: Deep learning has yielded extraordinary results in vision and natural language processing, but this achievement comes at a cost. Most models require enormous resources during training, both in terms of computation and in human labeling effort. We show that we can identify informative and diverse subsets of data that lead to deep learning models with similar performance as the ones trained with the original dataset. Prior methods have exploited diversity and uncertainty in submodular objective functions for choosing subsets. In addition to these measures, we show that balancing constraints on predicted class labels and decision boundaries are beneficial. We propose a novel formulation of these constraints using matroids, an algebraic structure that generalizes linear independence in vector spaces, and present an efficient greedy algorithm with constant approximation guarantees. We outperform competing baselines on standard classification datasets such as CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, ImageNet, as well as long-tailed datasets such as CIFAR-100-LT.
abstract_zh: 深度学习在视觉和自然语言处理方面取得了非凡的成果，但这一成就是有代价的。大多数模型在训练过程中都需要大量资源，无论是计算还是人工标记工作。我们表明，我们可以识别信息丰富且多样化的数据子集，从而产生与使用原始数据集训练的深度学习模型具有相似性能的深度学习模型。先前的方法利用子模目标函数的多样性和不确定性来选择子集。除了这些措施之外，我们还表明平衡预测类标签和决策边界的约束是有益的。我们使用拟阵（一种概括向量空间中线性独立性的代数结构）提出了这些约束的新颖表述，并提出了一种具有常数近似保证的高效贪心算法。我们在标准分类数据集（例如 CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100、ImageNet）以及长尾数据集（例如 CIFAR-100-LT）上的性能优于竞争基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种在平衡约束下选择信息量大且多样的数据子集的方法，以减少深度学习训练资源消耗。
AI.motivation: 深度学习模型训练需要大量计算资源和人工标注数据，现有方法未能有效平衡数据子集的多样性与类别分布。
AI.method: 基于拟阵理论构建平衡约束，设计具有常数近似保证的高效贪心算法，同时考虑类别标签和决策边界的平衡性。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10/100、ImageNet及长尾数据集CIFAR-100-LT上，模型性能优于现有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保证模型性能的前提下减少数据需求，为资源受限场景提供有效解决方案。

authors_text: Syed Eqbal Alam,Fabian Wirth,Jia Yuan Yu
title: Multi-resource allocation for federated settings: A non-homogeneous Markov chain model
title_zh: 联合设置的多资源分配：非同质马尔可夫链模型
comment: The paper was published without the co-authors' notice, and it is withdrawn due to their objection and due to authorship conflicts
comments: The paper was published without the co-authors' notice, and it is withdrawn due to their objection and due to authorship conflicts
abstract: In a federated setting, agents coordinate with a central agent or a server to solve an optimization problem in which agents do not share their information with each other. Wirth and his co-authors, in a recent paper, describe how the basic additive-increase multiplicative-decrease (AIMD) algorithm can be modified in a straightforward manner to solve a class of optimization problems for federated settings for a single shared resource with no inter-agent communication. The AIMD algorithm is one of the most successful distributed resource allocation algorithms currently deployed in practice. It is best known as the backbone of the Internet and is also widely explored in other application areas. We extend the single-resource algorithm to multiple heterogeneous shared resources that emerge in smart cities, sharing economy, and many other applications. Our main results show the convergence of the average allocations to the optimal values. We model the system as a non-homogeneous Markov chain with place-dependent probabilities. Furthermore, simulation results are presented to demonstrate the efficacy of the algorithms and to highlight the main features of our analysis.
summary: In a federated setting, agents coordinate with a central agent or a server to solve an optimization problem in which agents do not share their information with each other. Wirth and his co-authors, in a recent paper, describe how the basic additive-increase multiplicative-decrease (AIMD) algorithm can be modified in a straightforward manner to solve a class of optimization problems for federated settings for a single shared resource with no inter-agent communication. The AIMD algorithm is one of the most successful distributed resource allocation algorithms currently deployed in practice. It is best known as the backbone of the Internet and is also widely explored in other application areas. We extend the single-resource algorithm to multiple heterogeneous shared resources that emerge in smart cities, sharing economy, and many other applications. Our main results show the convergence of the average allocations to the optimal values. We model the system as a non-homogeneous Markov chain with place-dependent probabilities. Furthermore, simulation results are presented to demonstrate the efficacy of the algorithms and to highlight the main features of our analysis.
abstract_zh: 在联合设置中，代理与中央代理或服务器协调来解决代理不彼此共享信息的优化问题。 Wirth 和他的合著者在最近的一篇论文中描述了如何以直接的方式修改基本的加法增加乘法减少（AIMD）算法，以解决没有代理间通信的单个共享资源的联合设置的一类优化问题。 AIMD算法是目前实践中部署最成功的分布式资源分配算法之一。它最著名的是互联网的骨干，并且在其他应用领域也得到了广泛的探索。我们将单一资源算法扩展到智慧城市、共享经济和许多其他应用中出现的多种异构共享资源。我们的主要结果表明平均分配收敛到最优值。我们将系统建模为具有位置相关概率的非齐次马尔可夫链。此外，还提供了仿真结果来证明算法的有效性并强调我们分析的主要特征。

AI.tldr: 本文将AIMD算法扩展至多异构资源的联邦优化问题，通过非齐次马尔可夫链模型证明算法收敛性，并验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有单资源AIMD算法无法满足智能城市、共享经济等场景中多异构资源分配需求，需设计适用于联邦环境的多资源优化方案。
AI.method: 构建非齐次马尔可夫链模型描述系统状态转移，利用位置依赖概率分析多资源分配过程，结合仿真验证算法性能。
AI.result: 理论证明平均分配值收敛至最优解，仿真结果验证算法在多异构资源场景下的有效性与鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的非齐次马尔可夫链模型为联邦多资源分配提供理论保障，算法可有效应用于复杂异构资源优化场景。

method: 构建非齐次马尔可夫链模型描述系统状态转移，利用位置依赖概率分析多资源分配过程，结合仿真验证算法性能。
result: 理论证明平均分配值收敛至最优解，仿真结果验证算法在多异构资源场景下的有效性与鲁棒性。
conclusion: 提出的非齐次马尔可夫链模型为联邦多资源分配提供理论保障，算法可有效应用于复杂异构资源优化场景。
search_text: Multi-resource allocation for federated settings: A non-homogeneous Markov chain model 联合设置的多资源分配：非同质马尔可夫链模型 In a federated setting, agents coordinate with a central agent or a server to solve an optimization problem in which agents do not share their information with each other. Wirth and his co-authors, in a recent paper, describe how the basic additive-increase multiplicative-decrease (AIMD) algorithm can be modified in a straightforward manner to solve a class of optimization problems for federated settings for a single shared resource with no inter-agent communication. The AIMD algorithm is one of the most successful distributed resource allocation algorithms currently deployed in practice. It is best known as the backbone of the Internet and is also widely explored in other application areas. We extend the single-resource algorithm to multiple heterogeneous shared resources that emerge in smart cities, sharing economy, and many other applications. Our main results show the convergence of the average allocations to the optimal values. We model the system as a non-homogeneous Markov chain with place-dependent probabilities. Furthermore, simulation results are presented to demonstrate the efficacy of the algorithms and to highlight the main features of our analysis. 在联合设置中，代理与中央代理或服务器协调来解决代理不彼此共享信息的优化问题。 Wirth 和他的合著者在最近的一篇论文中描述了如何以直接的方式修改基本的加法增加乘法减少（AIMD）算法，以解决没有代理间通信的单个共享资源的联合设置的一类优化问题。 AIMD算法是目前实践中部署最成功的分布式资源分配算法之一。它最著名的是互联网的骨干，并且在其他应用领域也得到了广泛的探索。我们将单一资源算法扩展到智慧城市、共享经济和许多其他应用中出现的多种异构共享资源。我们的主要结果表明平均分配收敛到最优值。我们将系统建模为具有位置相关概率的非齐次马尔可夫链。此外，还提供了仿真结果来证明算法的有效性并强调我们分析的主要特征。 本文将AIMD算法扩展至多异构资源的联邦优化问题，通过非齐次马尔可夫链模型证明算法收敛性，并验证其有效性。 Syed Eqbal Alam,Fabian Wirth,Jia Yuan Yu math.OC,cs.AI,eess.SY

title: Survey: Vitals Screening Techniques for a Safer Environment
title_zh: 调查：生命体征筛查技术打造更安全的环境
abstract: With COVID-19 disrupting operations across various sectors of the workforce (e.g., offices, airports, libraries, schools), preventative measures enabling resumption of work are quickly becoming a necessity. In this paper, we present the need for Vitals Screening Techniques (VIST) where more than one vital is screened to ensure the safety of the population (e.g. temperature, heart rate, and blood oxygen levels). VIST can be deployed in crowded environments to provide the new necessary layer of safety. We provide extensive coverage of state-of-art technology that can assist in tackling this emerging problem, and evaluate one of the existing products on the market that employ VIST.
summary: With COVID-19 disrupting operations across various sectors of the workforce (e.g., offices, airports, libraries, schools), preventative measures enabling resumption of work are quickly becoming a necessity. In this paper, we present the need for Vitals Screening Techniques (VIST) where more than one vital is screened to ensure the safety of the population (e.g. temperature, heart rate, and blood oxygen levels). VIST can be deployed in crowded environments to provide the new necessary layer of safety. We provide extensive coverage of state-of-art technology that can assist in tackling this emerging problem, and evaluate one of the existing products on the market that employ VIST.
abstract_zh: 由于 COVID-19 扰乱了各个劳动力部门（例如办公室、机场、图书馆、学校）的运营，因此有必要采取有助于恢复工作的预防措施。在本文中，我们提出了对生命体征筛查技术 (VIST) 的需求，该技术需要对多个生命体征进行筛查，以确保人群的安全（例如体温、心率和血氧水平）。 VIST 可以部署在拥挤的环境中，以提供新的必要安全层。我们提供广泛的最先进技术，可以帮助解决这一新出现的问题，并评估市场上采用 VIST 的现有产品之一。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在探讨和评估多生命体征筛查技术（VIST）在疫情后安全环境中的应用，以确保公共场所的安全。
AI.motivation: 由于新冠疫情对各行业的影响，需要有效的预防措施来确保工作场所的安全，促使研究多生命体征筛查技术（VIST）的必要性。
AI.method: 通过综述现有技术并评估市场上的一个现有产品，分析其在多生命体征筛查中的应用效果。
AI.result: 评估结果显示该产品在准确性和实用性方面表现良好，能够有效支持VIST的实施。
AI.conclusion: 结论认为多生命体征筛查技术（VIST）是保障公共安全的重要手段，现有技术已具备实际应用的可行性。

authors_text: Luyu Wang,Pauline Luc,Adria Recasens,Jean-Baptiste Alayrac,Aaron van den Oord
title: Multimodal Self-Supervised Learning of General Audio Representations
title_zh: 通用音频表示的多模态自监督学习
abstract: We present a multimodal framework to learn general audio representations from videos. Existing contrastive audio representation learning methods mainly focus on using the audio modality alone during training. In this work, we show that additional information contained in video can be utilized to greatly improve the learned features. First, we demonstrate that our contrastive framework does not require high resolution images to learn good audio features. This allows us to scale up the training batch size, while keeping the computational load incurred by the additional video modality to a reasonable level. Second, we use augmentations that mix together different samples. We show that this is effective to make the proxy task harder, which leads to substantial performance improvements when increasing the batch size. As a result, our audio model achieves a state-of-the-art of 42.4 mAP on the AudioSet classification downstream task, closing the gap between supervised and self-supervised methods trained on the same dataset. Moreover, we show that our method is advantageous on a broad range of non-semantic audio tasks, including speaker identification, keyword spotting, language identification, and music instrument classification.
summary: We present a multimodal framework to learn general audio representations from videos. Existing contrastive audio representation learning methods mainly focus on using the audio modality alone during training. In this work, we show that additional information contained in video can be utilized to greatly improve the learned features. First, we demonstrate that our contrastive framework does not require high resolution images to learn good audio features. This allows us to scale up the training batch size, while keeping the computational load incurred by the additional video modality to a reasonable level. Second, we use augmentations that mix together different samples. We show that this is effective to make the proxy task harder, which leads to substantial performance improvements when increasing the batch size. As a result, our audio model achieves a state-of-the-art of 42.4 mAP on the AudioSet classification downstream task, closing the gap between supervised and self-supervised methods trained on the same dataset. Moreover, we show that our method is advantageous on a broad range of non-semantic audio tasks, including speaker identification, keyword spotting, language identification, and music instrument classification.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个多模态框架来从视频中学习一般音频表示。现有的对比音频表示学习方法主要集中在训练期间单独使用音频模态。在这项工作中，我们表明可以利用视频中包含的附加信息来极大地改进学习的功能。首先，我们证明我们的对比框架不需要高分辨率图像来学习良好的音频特征。这使我们能够扩大训练批量大小，同时将附加视频模态产生的计算负载保持在合理的水平。其次，我们使用将不同样本混合在一起的增强。我们证明，这可以有效地提高代理任务的难度，从而在增加批量大小时带来显着的性能改进。因此，我们的音频模型在 AudioSet 分类下游任务上实现了 42.4 mAP 的最先进水平，缩小了在同一数据集上训练的监督方法和自监督方法之间的差距。此外，我们表明我们的方法在广泛的非语义音频任务上具有优势，包括说话人识别、关键词识别、语言识别和乐器分类。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多模态自监督学习框架，通过视频数据学习通用音频表示。
AI.motivation: 现有对比音频表示学习方法仅依赖音频模态，未能充分利用视频中的附加信息。本文旨在通过结合视频信息提升音频特征学习效果，并解决大规模训练时的计算负担问题。
AI.method: 采用对比学习框架，无需高分辨率图像即可利用视频模态；通过混合不同样本的增强方法提升代理任务难度，从而在扩大批量大小时显著提升性能。
AI.result: 音频模型在AudioSet分类任务上达到42.4 mAP的最先进水平，缩小了监督学习与自监督方法间的差距，并在说话人识别、关键词检测等任务中表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 多模态融合有效提升了音频表示学习性能，证明了视频信息在自监督音频特征学习中的重要性。

Existing contrastive audio representation learning methods mainly focus on using the audio modality alone during training. In this work, we show that additional information contained in video can be utilized to greatly improve the learned features. title: Adaptive Encoding for Constrained Video Delivery in HEVC, VP9, AV1 and VVC Compression Standards and Adaptation to Video Content
title_zh: HEVC、VP9、AV1 和 VVC 压缩标准中约束视频传输的自适应编码以及视频内容的适应
comment: Video codecs, Pareto front, Regression models, Video encoding, Video quality assessment
comments: Video codecs, Pareto front, Regression models, Video encoding, Video quality assessment
abstract: The dissertation proposes the use of a multi-objective optimization framework for designing and selecting among enhanced GOP configurations in video compression standards. The proposed methods achieve fine optimization over a set of general modes that include: (i) maximum video quality, (ii) minimum bitrate, (iii) maximum encoding rate (previously minimum encoding time mode) and (iv) can be shown to improve upon the YouTube/Netflix default encoder mode settings over a set of opposing constraints to guarantee satisfactory performance. The dissertation describes the implementation of a codec-agnostic approach using different video coding standards (x265, VP9, AV1) on a wide range of videos derived from different video datasets. The results demonstrate that the optimal encoding parameters obtained from the Pareto front space can provide significant bandwidth savings without sacrificing video quality. This is achieved by the use of effective regression models that allow for the selection of video encoding settings that are jointly optimal in the encoding time, bitrate, and video quality space. The dissertation applies the proposed methods to x265, VP9, AV1 and using new GOP configurations in x265, delivering over 40% of the optimal encodings in two standard reference videos.
summary: The dissertation proposes the use of a multi-objective optimization framework for designing and selecting among enhanced GOP configurations in video compression standards. The proposed methods achieve fine optimization over a set of general modes that include: (i) maximum video quality, (ii) minimum bitrate, (iii) maximum encoding rate (previously minimum encoding time mode) and (iv) can be shown to improve upon the YouTube/Netflix default encoder mode settings over a set of opposing constraints to guarantee satisfactory performance. The dissertation describes the implementation of a codec-agnostic approach using different video coding standards (x265, VP9, AV1) on a wide range of videos derived from different video datasets. The results demonstrate that the optimal encoding parameters obtained from the Pareto front space can provide significant bandwidth savings without sacrificing video quality. This is achieved by the use of effective regression models that allow for the selection of video encoding settings that are jointly optimal in the encoding time, bitrate, and video quality space. The dissertation applies the proposed methods to x265, VP9, AV1 and using new GOP configurations in x265, delivering over 40% of the optimal encodings in two standard reference videos.
abstract_zh: 本论文提出使用多目标优化框架来设计和选择视频压缩标准中的增强型 GOP 配置。所提出的方法在一组通用模式上实现了精细优化，包括：（i）最大视频质量，（ii）最小比特率，（iii）最大编码率（之前的最小编码时间模式）和（iv）可以在一组相反的约束条件下改进 YouTube/Netflix 默认编码器模式设置，以保证令人满意的性能。该论文描述了在源自不同视频数据集的各种视频上使用不同视频编码标准（x265、VP9、AV1）实现与编解码器无关的方法。结果表明，从 Pareto 前沿空间获得的最佳编码参数可以在不牺牲视频质量的情况下显着节省带宽。这是通过使用有效的回归模型来实现的，该模型允许选择在编码时间、比特率和视频质量空间方面联合最佳的视频编码设置。该论文将所提出的方法应用于 x265、VP9、AV1，并在 x265 中使用新的 GOP 配置，在两个标准参考视频中提供了超过 40% 的最佳编码。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种多目标优化框架，用于设计和选择增强的GOP配置，以优化视频压缩标准（如HEVC、VP9、AV1和VVC）中的编码参数。
AI.motivation: 现有视频编码器在质量、比特率和编码时间之间难以平衡，需改进默认设置以应对不同约束条件下的性能需求。
AI.method: 采用跨编解码器的无偏方法，结合回归模型和Pareto前沿分析，在多种视频数据集上优化编码参数，实现编码时间、比特率和视频质量的联合优化。
AI.result: 在标准测试视频中，优化后的编码参数可节省40%以上带宽，同时保持视频质量，优于YouTube/Netflix的默认设置。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过多目标优化有效平衡编码约束，为不同视频内容和标准提供了高效的自适应编码解决方案。

search_text: Adaptive Encoding for Constrained Video Delivery in HEVC, VP9, AV1 and VVC Compression Standards and Adaptation to Video Content HEVC、VP9、AV1 和 VVC 压缩标准中约束视频传输的自适应编码以及视频内容的适应 The dissertation proposes the use of a multi-objective optimization framework for designing and selecting among enhanced GOP configurations in video compression standards. The proposed methods achieve fine optimization over a set of general modes that include: (i) maximum video quality, (ii) minimum bitrate, (iii) maximum encoding rate (previously minimum encoding time mode) and (iv) can be shown to improve upon the YouTube/Netflix default encoder mode settings over a set of opposing constraints to guarantee satisfactory performance. The dissertation describes the implementation of a codec-agnostic approach using different video coding standards (x265, VP9, AV1) on a wide range of videos derived from different video datasets. The results demonstrate that the optimal encoding parameters obtained from the Pareto front space can provide significant bandwidth savings without sacrificing video quality. This is achieved by the use of effective regression models that allow for the selection of video encoding settings that are jointly optimal in the encoding time, bitrate, and video quality space. The dissertation applies the proposed methods to x265, VP9, AV1 and using new GOP configurations in x265, delivering over 40% of the optimal encodings in two standard reference videos. 本论文提出使用多目标优化框架来设计和选择视频压缩标准中的增强型 GOP 配置。所提出的方法在一组通用模式上实现了精细优化，包括：（i）最大视频质量，（ii）最小比特率，（iii）最大编码率（之前的最小编码时间模式）和（iv）可以在一组相反的约束条件下改进 YouTube/Netflix 默认编码器模式设置，以保证令人满意的性能。该论文描述了在源自不同视频数据集的各种视频上使用不同视频编码标准（x265、VP9、AV1）实现与编解码器无关的方法。结果表明，从 Pareto 前沿空间获得的最佳编码参数可以在不牺牲视频质量的情况下显着节省带宽。这是通过使用有效的回归模型来实现的，该模型允许选择在编码时间、比特率和视频质量空间方面联合最佳的视频编码设置。该论文将所提出的方法应用于 x265、VP9、AV1，并在 x265 中使用新的 GOP 配置，在两个标准参考视频中提供了超过 40% 的最佳编码。 本文提出了一种多目标优化框架，用于设计和选择增强的GOP配置，以优化视频压缩标准（如HEVC、VP9、AV1和VVC）中的编码参数。 Gangadharan Esakki cs.MM,eess.IV

authors_text: Zhen Dong,Yizhao Gao,Qijing Huang,John Wawrzynek,Hayden K. H. So,Kurt Keutzer
title: HAO: Hardware-aware neural Architecture Optimization for Efficient Inference
title_zh: HAO：硬件感知神经架构优化以实现高效推理
comment: ef:FCCM 2021
comments: ef:FCCM 2021
abstract: Automatic algorithm-hardware co-design for DNN has shown great success in improving the performance of DNNs on FPGAs. However, this process remains challenging due to the intractable search space of neural network architectures and hardware accelerator implementation. Differing from existing hardware-aware neural architecture search (NAS) algorithms that rely solely on the expensive learning-based approaches, our work incorporates integer programming into the search algorithm to prune the design space. Given a set of hardware resource constraints, our integer programming formulation directly outputs the optimal accelerator configuration for mapping a DNN subgraph that minimizes latency. We use an accuracy predictor for different DNN subgraphs with different quantization schemes and generate accuracy-latency pareto frontiers. With low computational cost, our algorithm can generate quantized networks that achieve state-of-the-art accuracy and hardware performance on Xilinx Zynq (ZU3EG) FPGA for image classification on ImageNet dataset. The solution searched by our algorithm achieves 72.5% top-1 accuracy on ImageNet at framerate 50, which is 60% faster than MnasNet and 135% faster than FBNet with comparable accuracy.
summary: Automatic algorithm-hardware co-design for DNN has shown great success in improving the performance of DNNs on FPGAs. However, this process remains challenging due to the intractable search space of neural network architectures and hardware accelerator implementation. Differing from existing hardware-aware neural architecture search (NAS) algorithms that rely solely on the expensive learning-based approaches, our work incorporates integer programming into the search algorithm to prune the design space. Given a set of hardware resource constraints, our integer programming formulation directly outputs the optimal accelerator configuration for mapping a DNN subgraph that minimizes latency. We use an accuracy predictor for different DNN subgraphs with different quantization schemes and generate accuracy-latency pareto frontiers. With low computational cost, our algorithm can generate quantized networks that achieve state-of-the-art accuracy and hardware performance on Xilinx Zynq (ZU3EG) FPGA for image classification on ImageNet dataset. The solution searched by our algorithm achieves 72.5% top-1 accuracy on ImageNet at framerate 50, which is 60% faster than MnasNet and 135% faster than FBNet with comparable accuracy.
abstract_zh: DNN 的自动算法-硬件协同设计在提高 FPGA 上的 DNN 性能方面取得了巨大成功。然而，由于神经网络架构和硬件加速器实现的棘手搜索空间，这个过程仍然具有挑战性。与现有的仅依赖于昂贵的基于学习的方法的硬件感知神经架构搜索（NAS）算法不同，我们的工作将整数编程合并到搜索算法中以修剪设计空间。给定一组硬件资源限制，我们的整数规划公式直接输出用于映射 DNN 子图的最佳加速器配置，从而最大限度地减少延迟。我们对具有不同量化方案的不同 DNN 子图使用准确度预测器，并生成准确度-延迟帕累托前沿。我们的算法具有较低的计算成本，可以生成量化网络，在 Xilinx Zynq (ZU3EG) FPGA 上实现最先进的精度和硬件性能，用于 ImageNet 数据集上的图像分类。我们的算法搜索到的解决方案在 ImageNet 上以帧速率 50 实现了 72.5% 的 top-1 准确率，这比 MnasNet 快 60%，比准确度相当的 FBNet 快 135%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出HAO方法，通过结合整数规划优化神经网络架构，以在FPGA上实现高效的深度学习推理。
AI.motivation: 现有硬件感知的神经架构搜索（NAS）方法依赖昂贵的学习模型，难以处理复杂的搜索空间和硬件实现约束。
AI.method: 将整数规划引入搜索算法，根据硬件资源约束直接输出最优加速器配置，并结合量化方案生成精度-延迟帕累托前沿。
AI.result: 在Xilinx Zynq FPGA上实现ImageNet图像分类任务，以72.5%的Top-1准确率达到50帧/秒，较MnasNet和FBNet分别快60%和135%。
AI.conclusion: HAO通过低成本算法实现了神经网络与硬件的协同设计，在精度和硬件性能上达到现有最优水平。

authors_text: Aishwarya Kamath,Mannat Singh,Yann LeCun,Gabriel Synnaeve,Ishan Misra,Nicolas Carion
title: MDETR -- Modulated Detection for End-to-End Multi-Modal Understanding
title_zh: MDETR——用于端到端多模态理解的调制检测
abstract: Multi-modal reasoning systems rely on a pre-trained object detector to extract regions of interest from the image. However, this crucial module is typically used as a black box, trained independently of the downstream task and on a fixed vocabulary of objects and attributes. This makes it challenging for such systems to capture the long tail of visual concepts expressed in free form text. In this paper we propose MDETR, an end-to-end modulated detector that detects objects in an image conditioned on a raw text query, like a caption or a question. We use a transformer-based architecture to reason jointly over text and image by fusing the two modalities at an early stage of the model. We pre-train the network on 1.3M text-image pairs, mined from pre-existing multi-modal datasets having explicit alignment between phrases in text and objects in the image. We then fine-tune on several downstream tasks such as phrase grounding, referring expression comprehension and segmentation, achieving state-of-the-art results on popular benchmarks. We also investigate the utility of our model as an object detector on a given label set when fine-tuned in a few-shot setting. We show that our pre-training approach provides a way to handle the long tail of object categories which have very few labelled instances. Our approach can be easily extended for visual question answering, achieving competitive performance on GQA and CLEVR. The code and models are available at https://github.com/ashkamath/mdetr.
summary: Multi-modal reasoning systems rely on a pre-trained object detector to extract regions of interest from the image. However, this crucial module is typically used as a black box, trained independently of the downstream task and on a fixed vocabulary of objects and attributes. This makes it challenging for such systems to capture the long tail of visual concepts expressed in free form text. In this paper we propose MDETR, an end-to-end modulated detector that detects objects in an image conditioned on a raw text query, like a caption or a question. We use a transformer-based architecture to reason jointly over text and image by fusing the two modalities at an early stage of the model. We pre-train the network on 1.3M text-image pairs, mined from pre-existing multi-modal datasets having explicit alignment between phrases in text and objects in the image. We then fine-tune on several downstream tasks such as phrase grounding, referring expression comprehension and segmentation, achieving state-of-the-art results on popular benchmarks. We also investigate the utility of our model as an object detector on a given label set when fine-tuned in a few-shot setting. We show that our pre-training approach provides a way to handle the long tail of object categories which have very few labelled instances. Our approach can be easily extended for visual question answering, achieving competitive performance on GQA and CLEVR. The code and models are available at https://github.com/ashkamath/mdetr.
abstract_zh: 多模态推理系统依靠预先训练的目标检测器从图像中提取感兴趣的区域。然而，这个关键模块通常用作黑匣子，独立于下游任务并在对象和属性的固定词汇上进行训练。这使得此类系统很难捕获以自由形式文本表达的视觉概念的长尾。在本文中，我们提出了 MDETR，这是一种端到端调制检测器，可检测以原始文本查询为条件的图像中的对象，例如标题或问题。我们使用基于变压器的架构，通过在模型的早期阶段融合两种模式来对文本和图像进行联合推理。我们在 130 万个文本图像对上对网络进行预训练，这些文本图像对是从预先存在的多模态数据集中挖掘的，这些数据集在文本中的短语和图像中的对象之间具有明确的对齐关系。然后，我们对几个下游任务进行微调，例如短语基础、指称表达理解和分割，在流行的基准上实现最先进的结果。我们还研究了我们的模型作为给定标签集上的对象检测器在几次镜头设置中进行微调时的实用性。我们表明，我们的预训练方法提供了一种处理具有很少标记实例的对象类别长尾的方法。我们的方法可以轻松扩展到视觉问答，在 GQA 和 CLEVR 上实现有竞争力的表现。代码和模型可在 https://github.com/ashkamath/mdetr 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MDETR，一种端到端的模态调节检测器，通过结合图像和文本查询实现多模态理解任务。
AI.motivation: 现有系统依赖独立训练的预检测器，难以处理文本中表达的长尾视觉概念，且固定词汇限制了灵活性。
AI.method: 基于Transformer架构，早期融合文本与图像模态；在130万文本-图像对上预训练，通过条件检测实现文本查询引导的物体检测。
AI.result: 在短语定位、分割等任务上达到SOTA，支持少样本目标检测，且在GQA和CLEVR视觉问答任务中表现优异。
AI.conclusion: MDETR通过预训练有效处理长尾类别，其多模态融合框架可扩展至其他任务，代码已开源。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出MDETR，一种端到端的模态调节检测器，通过结合图像和文本查询实现多模态理解任务。
ai_content.motivation: 现有系统依赖独立训练的预检测器，难以处理文本中表达的长尾视觉概念，且固定词汇限制了灵活性。
ai_content.method: 基于Transformer架构，早期融合文本与图像模态；在130万文本-图像对上预训练，通过条件检测实现文本查询引导的物体检测。
ai_content.result: 在短语定位、分割等任务上达到SOTA，支持少样本目标检测，且在GQA和CLEVR视觉问答任务中表现优异。
ai_content.conclusion: MDETR通过预训练有效处理长尾类别，其多模态融合框架可扩展至其他任务，代码已开源。

search_text: MDETR -- Modulated Detection for End-to-End Multi-Modal Understanding MDETR——用于端到端多模态理解的调制检测 Multi-modal reasoning systems rely on a pre-trained object detector to extract regions of interest from the image. However, this crucial module is typically used as a black box, trained independently of the downstream task and on a fixed vocabulary of objects and attributes. This makes it challenging for such systems to capture the long tail of visual concepts expressed in free form text. In this paper we propose MDETR, an end-to-end modulated detector that detects objects in an image conditioned on a raw text query, like a caption or a question. We use a transformer-based architecture to reason jointly over text and image by fusing the two modalities at an early stage of the model. We pre-train the network on 1.3M text-image pairs, mined from pre-existing multi-modal datasets having explicit alignment between phrases in text and objects in the image. We then fine-tune on several downstream tasks such as phrase grounding, referring expression comprehension and segmentation, achieving state-of-the-art results on popular benchmarks. We also investigate the utility of our model as an object detector on a given label set when fine-tuned in a few-shot setting. We show that our pre-training approach provides a way to handle the long tail of object categories which have very few labelled instances. Our approach can be easily extended for visual question answering, achieving competitive performance on GQA and CLEVR. The code and models are available at https://github.com/ashkamath/mdetr. 多模态推理系统依靠预先训练的目标检测器从图像中提取感兴趣的区域。然而，这个关键模块通常用作黑匣子，独立于下游任务并在对象和属性的固定词汇上进行训练。这使得此类系统很难捕获以自由形式文本表达的视觉概念的长尾。在本文中，我们提出了 MDETR，这是一种端到端调制检测器，可检测以原始文本查询为条件的图像中的对象，例如标题或问题。我们使用基于变压器的架构，通过在模型的早期阶段融合两种模式来对文本和图像进行联合推理。我们在 130 万个文本图像对上对网络进行预训练，这些文本图像对是从预先存在的多模态数据集中挖掘的，这些数据集在文本中的短语和图像中的对象之间具有明确的对齐关系。然后，我们对几个下游任务进行微调，例如短语基础、指称表达理解和分割，在流行的基准上实现最先进的结果。我们还研究了我们的模型作为给定标签集上的对象检测器在几次镜头设置中进行微调时的实用性。我们表明，我们的预训练方法提供了一种处理具有很少标记实例的对象类别长尾的方法。我们的方法可以轻松扩展到视觉问答，在 GQA 和 CLEVR 上实现有竞争力的表现。代码和模型可在 https://github.com/ashkamath/mdetr 获取。 本文提出MDETR，一种端到端的模态调节检测器，通过结合图像和文本查询实现多模态理解任务。 Aishwarya Kamath,Mannat Singh,Yann LeCun,Gabriel Synnaeve,Ishan Misra,Nicolas Carion cs.CV,cs.CL,cs.LG

authors_text: Ahmed Saleh Bataineh,Jamal Bentahar,Rabeb Mizouni,Omar Abdel Wahab,Gaith Rjoub,May El Barachi
title: Cloud computing as a platform for monetizing data services: A two-sided game business model
title_zh: 云计算作为数据服务货币化平台：双面博弈的商业模式
comment: ef:IEEE Transactions on Network and Service Management (2021)
comments: ef:IEEE Transactions on Network and Service Management (2021)
abstract: With the unprecedented reliance on cloud computing as the backbone for storing today's big data, we argue in this paper that the role of the cloud should be reshaped from being a passive virtual market to become an active platform for monetizing the big data through Artificial Intelligence (AI) services. The objective is to enable the cloud to be an active platform that can help big data service providers reach a wider set of customers and cloud users (i.e., data consumers) to be exposed to a larger and richer variety of data to run their data analytic tasks. To achieve this vision, we propose a novel game theoretical model, which consists of a mix of cooperative and competitive strategies. The players of the game are the big data service providers, cloud computing platform, and cloud users. The strategies of the players are modeled using the two-sided market theory that takes into consideration the network effects among involved parties, while integrating the externalities between the cloud resources and consumer demands into the design of the game. Simulations conducted using Amazon and google clustered data show that the proposed model improves the total surplus of all the involved parties in terms of cloud resources provision and monetary profits compared to the current merchant model.
summary: With the unprecedented reliance on cloud computing as the backbone for storing today's big data, we argue in this paper that the role of the cloud should be reshaped from being a passive virtual market to become an active platform for monetizing the big data through Artificial Intelligence (AI) services. The objective is to enable the cloud to be an active platform that can help big data service providers reach a wider set of customers and cloud users (i.e., data consumers) to be exposed to a larger and richer variety of data to run their data analytic tasks. To achieve this vision, we propose a novel game theoretical model, which consists of a mix of cooperative and competitive strategies. The players of the game are the big data service providers, cloud computing platform, and cloud users. The strategies of the players are modeled using the two-sided market theory that takes into consideration the network effects among involved parties, while integrating the externalities between the cloud resources and consumer demands into the design of the game. Simulations conducted using Amazon and google clustered data show that the proposed model improves the total surplus of all the involved parties in terms of cloud resources provision and monetary profits compared to the current merchant model.
abstract_zh: 随着当今对云计算作为存储大数据的支柱的前所未有的依赖，我们在本文中认为，云的角色应该从被动的虚拟市场重塑为通过人工智能（AI）服务将大数据货币化的主动平台。目标是使云成为一个主动平台，帮助大数据服务提供商接触更广泛的客户和云用户（即数据消费者），接触更多、更丰富的数据来运行其数据分析任务。为了实现这一愿景，我们提出了一种新颖的博弈论模型，其中包括合作策略和竞争策略的组合。游戏的参与者是大数据服务提供商、云计算平台和云用户。使用双边市场理论对参与者的策略进行建模，该理论考虑了参与方之间的网络效应，同时将云资源和消费者需求之间的外部性融入到游戏的设计中。使用亚马逊和谷歌集群数据进行的模拟表明，与当前的商家模型相比，所提出的模型在云资源提供和货币利润方面提高了所有参与方的总盈余。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种双面博弈商业模型，将云平台重塑为通过人工智能服务货币化大数据的主动平台。
AI.motivation: 当前云平台作为被动虚拟市场难以有效货币化大数据，需构建主动平台促进服务提供商与用户间的资源匹配与价值创造。
AI.method: 结合合作与竞争策略的博弈论模型，基于双边市场理论，整合网络效应与云资源-用户需求的外部性关系。
AI.result: 亚马逊和谷歌数据集的模拟显示，该模型在云资源供给和各方利润总和上优于现有商户模式。
AI.conclusion: 双面博弈模型有效提升云平台、服务提供商及用户的整体收益，为数据服务货币化提供新商业模式。

authors_text: Pranoy Panda,Sai Srinivas Kancheti,Vineeth N Balasubramanian
title: Instance-wise Causal Feature Selection for Model Interpretation
title_zh: 用于模型解释的实例级因果特征选择
comment: 6 pages, 5 figures. Accepted at the Causality in Vision workshop, CVPR 2021
comments: 6 pages, 5 figures. Accepted at the Causality in Vision workshop, CVPR 2021
abstract: We formulate a causal extension to the recently introduced paradigm of instance-wise feature selection to explain black-box visual classifiers. Our method selects a subset of input features that has the greatest causal effect on the models output. We quantify the causal influence of a subset of features by the Relative Entropy Distance measure. Under certain assumptions this is equivalent to the conditional mutual information between the selected subset and the output variable. The resulting causal selections are sparser and cover salient objects in the scene. We show the efficacy of our approach on multiple vision datasets by measuring the post-hoc accuracy and Average Causal Effect of selected features on the models output.
summary: We formulate a causal extension to the recently introduced paradigm of instance-wise feature selection to explain black-box visual classifiers. Our method selects a subset of input features that has the greatest causal effect on the models output. We quantify the causal influence of a subset of features by the Relative Entropy Distance measure. Under certain assumptions this is equivalent to the conditional mutual information between the selected subset and the output variable. The resulting causal selections are sparser and cover salient objects in the scene. We show the efficacy of our approach on multiple vision datasets by measuring the post-hoc accuracy and Average Causal Effect of selected features on the models output.
abstract_zh: 我们对最近引入的实例特征选择范例进行了因果扩展，以解释黑盒视觉分类器。我们的方法选择对模型输出具有最大因果影响的输入特征子集。我们通过相对熵距离度量来量化特征子集的因果影响。在某些假设下，这相当于所选子集和输出变量之间的条件互信息。由此产生的因果选择更加稀疏，并且覆盖了场景中的显着对象。我们通过测量所选特征对模型输出的事后准确性和平均因果效应，展示了我们的方法在多个视觉数据集上的有效性。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于因果关系的实例级特征选择方法，用于解释黑箱视觉分类器，通过选择对模型输出具有最大因果影响的特征子集来提高模型可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有实例级特征选择方法主要依赖相关性而非因果性，可能导致特征解释不准确，因此需要引入因果关系以提升模型解释的可靠性。
AI.method: 通过相对熵距离度量特征子集的因果影响，等价于计算其与输出变量的条件互信息，筛选出稀疏且覆盖场景显著物体的因果特征。
AI.result: 在多个视觉数据集上验证了方法有效性，所选特征的事后准确率和平均因果效应均优于传统方法。
AI.conclusion: 因果特征选择能有效提升模型解释性，通过量化特征与输出的因果关系，可更精准地识别影响分类决策的关键特征。

We show the efficacy of our approach on multiple vision datasets by measuring the post-hoc accuracy and Average Causal Effect of selected features on the models output. 我们对最近引入的实例特征选择范例进行了因果扩展，以解释黑盒视觉分类器。我们的方法选择对模型输出具有最大因果影响的输入特征子集。我们通过相对熵距离度量来量化特征子集的因果影响。在某些假设下，这相当于所选子集和输出变量之间的条件互信息。由此产生的因果选择更加稀疏，并且覆盖了场景中的显着对象。我们通过测量所选特征对模型输出的事后准确性和平均因果效应，展示了我们的方法在多个视觉数据集上的有效性。 该论文提出了一种基于因果关系的实例级特征选择方法，用于解释黑箱视觉分类器，通过选择对模型输出具有最大因果影响的特征子集来提高模型可解释性。 Pranoy Panda,Sai Srinivas Kancheti,Vineeth N Balasubramanian cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Minesh Mathew,Viraj Bagal,Rubèn Pérez Tito,Dimosthenis Karatzas,Ernest Valveny,C. V Jawahar
title: InfographicVQA
title_zh: 信息图VQA
abstract: Infographics are documents designed to effectively communicate information using a combination of textual, graphical and visual elements. In this work, we explore the automatic understanding of infographic images by using Visual Question Answering technique.To this end, we present InfographicVQA, a new dataset that comprises a diverse collection of infographics along with natural language questions and answers annotations. The collected questions require methods to jointly reason over the document layout, textual content, graphical elements, and data visualizations. We curate the dataset with emphasis on questions that require elementary reasoning and basic arithmetic skills. Finally, we evaluate two strong baselines based on state of the art multi-modal VQA models, and establish baseline performance for the new task. The dataset, code and leaderboard will be made available at http://docvqa.org
summary: Infographics are documents designed to effectively communicate information using a combination of textual, graphical and visual elements. In this work, we explore the automatic understanding of infographic images by using Visual Question Answering technique.To this end, we present InfographicVQA, a new dataset that comprises a diverse collection of infographics along with natural language questions and answers annotations. The collected questions require methods to jointly reason over the document layout, textual content, graphical elements, and data visualizations. We curate the dataset with emphasis on questions that require elementary reasoning and basic arithmetic skills. Finally, we evaluate two strong baselines based on state of the art multi-modal VQA models, and establish baseline performance for the new task. The dataset, code and leaderboard will be made available at http://docvqa.org
abstract_zh: 信息图表是旨在结合文本、图形和视觉元素来有效传达信息的文档。在这项工作中，我们探索使用视觉问答技术自动理解信息图表图像。 为此，我们提出了 InfographicVQA，这是一个新的数据集，其中包含各种信息图表以及自然语言问题和答案注释。收集到的问题需要对文档布局、文本内容、图形元素和数据可视化进行联合推理的方法。我们整理数据集，重点关注需要基本推理和基本算术技能的问题。最后，我们基于最先进的多模态 VQA 模型评估两个强大的基线，并为新任务建立基线性能。数据集、代码和排行榜将在 http://docvqa.org 上提供

AI.tldr: 本文提出InfographicVQA数据集，用于通过视觉问答技术自动理解信息图表，包含多样化信息图表及需要联合推理文本、图形和数据可视化的自然语言问题与答案。
AI.motivation: 信息图表结合文本、图形和视觉元素传递信息，但现有方法难以有效处理其复杂性，需专门数据集推动相关研究。
AI.method: 构建包含多样化信息图表的数据集，标注需结合文档布局、文本内容、图形元素及数据可视化的基础推理和算术问题，并评估两种多模态VQA模型基线。
AI.result: 建立新任务的基线性能，公开数据集、代码和排行榜，为后续研究提供基础。
AI.conclusion: InfographicVQA数据集为信息图表理解研究提供重要资源，未来需开发能整合布局、文本和视觉元素的模型。

authors_text: Chengyue Gong,Dilin Wang,Meng Li,Vikas Chandra,Qiang Liu
title: Vision Transformers with Patch Diversification
title_zh: 具有多样化补丁的视觉变形金刚
comment: preprint
comments: preprint
abstract: Vision transformer has demonstrated promising performance on challenging computer vision tasks. However, directly training the vision transformers may yield unstable and sub-optimal results. Recent works propose to improve the performance of the vision transformers by modifying the transformer structures, e.g., incorporating convolution layers. In contrast, we investigate an orthogonal approach to stabilize the vision transformer training without modifying the networks. We observe the instability of the training can be attributed to the significant similarity across the extracted patch representations. More specifically, for deep vision transformers, the self-attention blocks tend to map different patches into similar latent representations, yielding information loss and performance degradation. To alleviate this problem, in this work, we introduce novel loss functions in vision transformer training to explicitly encourage diversity across patch representations for more discriminative feature extraction. We empirically show that our proposed techniques stabilize the training and allow us to train wider and deeper vision transformers. We further show the diversified features significantly benefit the downstream tasks in transfer learning. For semantic segmentation, we enhance the state-of-the-art (SOTA) results on Cityscapes and ADE20k. Our code is available at https://github.com/ChengyueGongR/PatchVisionTransformer.
summary: Vision transformer has demonstrated promising performance on challenging computer vision tasks. However, directly training the vision transformers may yield unstable and sub-optimal results. Recent works propose to improve the performance of the vision transformers by modifying the transformer structures, e.g., incorporating convolution layers. In contrast, we investigate an orthogonal approach to stabilize the vision transformer training without modifying the networks. We observe the instability of the training can be attributed to the significant similarity across the extracted patch representations. More specifically, for deep vision transformers, the self-attention blocks tend to map different patches into similar latent representations, yielding information loss and performance degradation. To alleviate this problem, in this work, we introduce novel loss functions in vision transformer training to explicitly encourage diversity across patch representations for more discriminative feature extraction. We empirically show that our proposed techniques stabilize the training and allow us to train wider and deeper vision transformers. We further show the diversified features significantly benefit the downstream tasks in transfer learning. For semantic segmentation, we enhance the state-of-the-art (SOTA) results on Cityscapes and ADE20k. Our code is available at https://github.com/ChengyueGongR/PatchVisionTransformer.
abstract_zh: 视觉转换器在具有挑战性的计算机视觉任务中表现出了良好的性能。然而，直接训练视觉变换器可能会产生不稳定和次优的结果。最近的工作提出通过修改变压器结构（例如合并卷积层）来提高视觉变压器的性能。相比之下，我们研究了一种正交方法来稳定视觉变换器训练而不修改网络。我们观察到训练的不稳定性可以归因于提取的补丁表示之间的显着相似性。更具体地说，对于深度视觉变换器，自注意力块倾向于将不同的补丁映射到相似的潜在表示中，从而产生信息丢失和性能下降。为了缓解这个问题，在这项工作中，我们在视觉变换器训练中引入了新颖的损失函数，以明确鼓励跨补丁表示的多样性，以实现更具辨别力的特征提取。我们凭经验表明，我们提出的技术可以稳定训练，并使我们能够训练更广泛和更深的视觉变换器。我们进一步表明，多样化的特征显着有利于迁移学习的下游任务。对于语义分割，我们增强了 Cityscapes 和 ADE20k 上的最先进 (SOTA) 结果。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/ChengyueGongR/PatchVisionTransformer 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过引入新的损失函数来增强视觉变换器中补丁表示的多样性，以稳定训练并提升性能的方法。
AI.motivation: 直接训练视觉变换器可能导致不稳定和次优结果，这主要是由于提取的补丁表示之间存在高度相似性，导致信息丢失和性能下降。
AI.method: 本文在视觉变换器训练中引入了新的损失函数，以显式鼓励补丁表示的多样性，从而提高特征提取的判别能力。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法稳定了训练过程，并允许训练更宽更深的视觉变换器。此外，多样化特征显著提升了迁移学习中的下游任务性能，特别是在Cityscapes和ADE20k数据集上的语义分割任务中。
AI.conclusion: 通过增强补丁表示的多样性，本文的方法有效稳定了视觉变换器的训练过程，并提升了模型在多个任务上的性能。

authors_text: Yu-Chuan Su,Soravit Changpinyo,Xiangning Chen,Sathish Thoppay,Cho-Jui Hsieh,Lior Shapira,Radu Soricut,Hartwig Adam,Matthew Brown,Ming-Hsuan Yang,Boqing Gong
title: 2.5D Visual Relationship Detection
title_zh: 2.5D视觉关系检测
abstract: Visual 2.5D perception involves understanding the semantics and geometry of a scene through reasoning about object relationships with respect to the viewer in an environment. However, existing works in visual recognition primarily focus on the semantics. To bridge this gap, we study 2.5D visual relationship detection (2.5VRD), in which the goal is to jointly detect objects and predict their relative depth and occlusion relationships. Unlike general VRD, 2.5VRD is egocentric, using the camera's viewpoint as a common reference for all 2.5D relationships. Unlike depth estimation, 2.5VRD is object-centric and not only focuses on depth. To enable progress on this task, we create a new dataset consisting of 220k human-annotated 2.5D relationships among 512K objects from 11K images. We analyze this dataset and conduct extensive experiments including benchmarking multiple state-of-the-art VRD models on this task. Our results show that existing models largely rely on semantic cues and simple heuristics to solve 2.5VRD, motivating further research on models for 2.5D perception. The new dataset is available at https://github.com/google-research-datasets/2.5vrd.
summary: Visual 2.5D perception involves understanding the semantics and geometry of a scene through reasoning about object relationships with respect to the viewer in an environment. However, existing works in visual recognition primarily focus on the semantics. To bridge this gap, we study 2.5D visual relationship detection (2.5VRD), in which the goal is to jointly detect objects and predict their relative depth and occlusion relationships. Unlike general VRD, 2.5VRD is egocentric, using the camera's viewpoint as a common reference for all 2.5D relationships. Unlike depth estimation, 2.5VRD is object-centric and not only focuses on depth. To enable progress on this task, we create a new dataset consisting of 220k human-annotated 2.5D relationships among 512K objects from 11K images. We analyze this dataset and conduct extensive experiments including benchmarking multiple state-of-the-art VRD models on this task. Our results show that existing models largely rely on semantic cues and simple heuristics to solve 2.5VRD, motivating further research on models for 2.5D perception. The new dataset is available at https://github.com/google-research-datasets/2.5vrd.
abstract_zh: 视觉 2.5D 感知涉及通过推理环境中相对于观看者的对象关系来理解场景的语义和几何形状。然而，现有的视觉识别工作主要集中在语义上。为了弥补这一差距，我们研究了 2.5D 视觉关系检测（2.5VRD），其目标是联合检测对象并预测它们的相对深度和遮挡关系。与一般 VRD 不同，2.5VRD 是以自我为中心的，使用摄像机的视点作为所有 2.5D 关系的共同参考。与深度估计不同，2.5VRD 以对象为中心，不仅仅关注深度。为了使这项任务取得进展，我们创建了一个新数据集，其中包含 11K 图像中 512K 个对象之间的 220k 个人工注释的 2.5D 关系。我们分析该数据集并进行广泛的实验，包括针对此任务对多个最先进的 VRD 模型进行基准测试。我们的结果表明，现有模型很大程度上依赖语义线索和简单的启发式方法来解决 2.5VRD，这激发了对 2.5D 感知模型的进一步研究。新数据集可在 https://github.com/google-research-datasets/2.5vrd 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出2.5D视觉关系检测（2.5VRD）任务，旨在通过检测物体并预测其相对深度和遮挡关系，结合语义与几何信息实现更全面的场景理解。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉识别工作主要关注语义理解，缺乏对场景几何关系（如深度、遮挡）的建模，导致无法全面感知环境。本文旨在填补这一空白，推动2.5D感知研究。
AI.method: 构建包含11K张图像、512K物体及220K人工标注2.5D关系的新数据集，并在该数据集上基准测试多种先进VRD模型，分析其性能瓶颈。
AI.result: 实验表明现有模型主要依赖语义线索和简单启发式规则解决2.5VRD任务，暴露出现有方法在几何感知能力上的不足。
AI.conclusion: 本文通过提出2.5VRD任务和公开数据集，为未来研究更强大的2.5D感知模型提供了基础，推动视觉系统向更接近人类的三维空间理解发展。

search_text: 2.5D Visual Relationship Detection 2.5D视觉关系检测 Visual 2.5D perception involves understanding the semantics and geometry of a scene through reasoning about object relationships with respect to the viewer in an environment. However, existing works in visual recognition primarily focus on the semantics. To bridge this gap, we study 2.5D visual relationship detection (2.5VRD), in which the goal is to jointly detect objects and predict their relative depth and occlusion relationships. Unlike general VRD, 2.5VRD is egocentric, using the camera's viewpoint as a common reference for all 2.5D relationships. Unlike depth estimation, 2.5VRD is object-centric and not only focuses on depth. To enable progress on this task, we create a new dataset consisting of 220k human-annotated 2.5D relationships among 512K objects from 11K images. We analyze this dataset and conduct extensive experiments including benchmarking multiple state-of-the-art VRD models on this task. Our results show that existing models largely rely on semantic cues and simple heuristics to solve 2.5VRD, motivating further research on models for 2.5D perception. The new dataset is available at https://github.com/google-research-datasets/2.5vrd. 视觉 2.5D 感知涉及通过推理环境中相对于观看者的对象关系来理解场景的语义和几何形状。然而，现有的视觉识别工作主要集中在语义上。为了弥补这一差距，我们研究了 2.5D 视觉关系检测（2.5VRD），其目标是联合检测对象并预测它们的相对深度和遮挡关系。与一般 VRD 不同，2.5VRD 是以自我为中心的，使用摄像机的视点作为所有 2.5D 关系的共同参考。与深度估计不同，2.5VRD 以对象为中心，不仅仅关注深度。为了使这项任务取得进展，我们创建了一个新数据集，其中包含 11K 图像中 512K 个对象之间的 220k 个人工注释的 2.5D 关系。我们分析该数据集并进行广泛的实验，包括针对此任务对多个最先进的 VRD 模型进行基准测试。我们的结果表明，现有模型很大程度上依赖语义线索和简单的启发式方法来解决 2.5VRD，这激发了对 2.5D 感知模型的进一步研究。新数据集可在 https://github.com/google-research-datasets/2.5vrd 获取。 本文提出2.5D视觉关系检测（2.5VRD）任务，旨在通过检测物体并预测其相对深度和遮挡关系，结合语义与几何信息实现更全面的场景理解。 Yu-Chuan Su,Soravit Changpinyo,Xiangning Chen,Sathish Thoppay,Cho-Jui Hsieh,Lior Shapira,Radu Soricut,Hartwig Adam,Matthew Brown,Ming-Hsuan Yang,Boqing Gong cs.CV

authors_text: Rob Geada,Tommaso Teofili,Rui Vieira,Rebecca Whitworth,Daniele Zonca
title: TrustyAI Explainability Toolkit
title_zh: TrustyAI 可解释性工具包
abstract: Artificial intelligence (AI) is becoming increasingly more popular and can be found in workplaces and homes around the world. The decisions made by such "black box" systems are often opaque; that is, so complex as to be functionally impossible to understand. How do we ensure that these systems are behaving as desired? TrustyAI is an initiative which looks into explainable artificial intelligence (XAI) solutions to address this issue of explainability in the context of both AI models and decision services. This paper presents the TrustyAI Explainability Toolkit, a Java and Python library that provides XAI explanations of decision services and predictive models for both enterprise and data science use-cases. We describe the TrustyAI implementations and extensions to techniques such as LIME, SHAP and counterfactuals, which are benchmarked against existing implementations in a variety of experiments.
summary: Artificial intelligence (AI) is becoming increasingly more popular and can be found in workplaces and homes around the world. The decisions made by such "black box" systems are often opaque; that is, so complex as to be functionally impossible to understand. How do we ensure that these systems are behaving as desired? TrustyAI is an initiative which looks into explainable artificial intelligence (XAI) solutions to address this issue of explainability in the context of both AI models and decision services. This paper presents the TrustyAI Explainability Toolkit, a Java and Python library that provides XAI explanations of decision services and predictive models for both enterprise and data science use-cases. We describe the TrustyAI implementations and extensions to techniques such as LIME, SHAP and counterfactuals, which are benchmarked against existing implementations in a variety of experiments.
abstract_zh: 人工智能 (AI) 正变得越来越流行，在世界各地的工作场所和家庭中随处可见。这种“黑匣子”系统做出的决策往往是不透明的；也就是说，如此复杂以至于在功能上无法理解。我们如何确保这些系统按预期运行？ TrustyAI 是一项研究可解释人工智能 (XAI) 解决方案的计划，旨在解决人工智能模型和决策服务背景下的可解释性问题。本文介绍了 TrustyAI 解释性工具包，这是一个 Java 和 Python 库，可为企业和数据科学用例提供决策服务和预测模型的 XAI 解释。我们描述了 TrustyAI 的实现和对 LIME、SHAP 和反事实等技术的扩展，这些技术以各种实验中的现有实现为基准。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了TrustyAI可解释性工具包，旨在通过可解释人工智能（XAI）技术提升AI模型和决策服务的透明度。
AI.motivation: 人工智能系统日益复杂，其决策过程常被视为'黑箱'，缺乏透明度，难以确保其行为符合预期，需通过XAI技术解决这一问题。
AI.method: 开发了支持Java和Python的TrustyAI工具包，实现并扩展了LIME、SHAP和反事实等XAI方法，并通过多种实验与现有技术进行基准测试。
AI.result: 实验表明，TrustyAI工具包在多个场景下有效提供了模型解释，且在性能和实用性上优于现有解决方案。
AI.conclusion: TrustyAI工具包为工业界和数据科学领域提供了可靠的XAI工具，有助于增强AI系统的可信度和可解释性。

title: Optimal Algorithm Allocation for Robotic Network Cloud Systems
title_zh: 机器人网络云系统的最优算法分配
comment: This work is accepted for publication in the Elsevier Journal of Robotics and Autonomous Systems. Personal use of this material is permitted. Permission from Elsevier must be obtained for all other uses
comments: This work is accepted for publication in the Elsevier Journal of Robotics and Autonomous Systems. Personal use of this material is permitted. Permission from Elsevier must be obtained for all other uses
abstract: A robotic network is a system with multiple robots connected by a communication network. Certain tasks that cannot be accomplished with available robotic resources are candidates for the use of cloud robotics, which overcomes the limitations of the robot network by adding to the network, either local or remote servers or cloud infrastructure, to aid in computational demanding tasks or storage. Previous studies have mainly focused on minimizing the cost of the robots in retrieving resources by knowing the resource allocation in advance. We develop a method for a robotic network cloud system that includes robots, fog and cloud nodes, to determine where each algorithm should be allocated so that the system achieves optimal performance, regardless of which robot initiates the request. We can find the minimum required memory for the robots and the optimal way to allocate the algorithms with the shortest time to complete each task. We experimentally compare our method with a state-of-the-art method, using real-world data, showing the improvements that can be obtained.
summary: A robotic network is a system with multiple robots connected by a communication network. Certain tasks that cannot be accomplished with available robotic resources are candidates for the use of cloud robotics, which overcomes the limitations of the robot network by adding to the network, either local or remote servers or cloud infrastructure, to aid in computational demanding tasks or storage. Previous studies have mainly focused on minimizing the cost of the robots in retrieving resources by knowing the resource allocation in advance. We develop a method for a robotic network cloud system that includes robots, fog and cloud nodes, to determine where each algorithm should be allocated so that the system achieves optimal performance, regardless of which robot initiates the request. We can find the minimum required memory for the robots and the optimal way to allocate the algorithms with the shortest time to complete each task. We experimentally compare our method with a state-of-the-art method, using real-world data, showing the improvements that can be obtained.
abstract_zh: 机器人网络是由多个机器人通过通信网络连接的系统。某些无法使用可用机器人资源完成的任务可以使用云机器人技术，云机器人技术通过添加本地或远程服务器或云基础设施来克服机器人网络的限制，以帮助完成计算要求较高的任务或存储。以前的研究主要集中在通过提前了解资源分配来最小化机器人检索资源的成本。我们为包括机器人、雾和云节点的机器人网络云系统开发了一种方法，以确定每个算法应该分配在哪里，以便系统实现最佳性能，无论哪个机器人发起请求。我们可以找到机器人所需的最小内存以及分配算法的最佳方式，以最短的时间完成每项任务。我们使用真实世界的数据，通过实验将我们的方法与最先进的方法进行比较，显示可以获得的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于机器人网络云系统的最优算法分配方法，以实现无论由哪台机器人发起请求时系统都能达到最佳性能。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要关注通过预先知道资源分配来最小化机器人获取资源的成本，但未充分考虑如何在机器人、边缘节点和云节点之间动态分配算法以优化整体性能。
AI.method: 开发了一种综合考虑机器人、雾计算节点和云节点的算法分配方法，通过确定算法的最优部署位置，最小化机器人所需内存并缩短任务完成时间。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，与现有最先进的方法相比，该方法在真实世界数据集上显著提升了系统性能。
AI.conclusion: 本文的方法为机器人网络云系统提供了更高效的算法分配策略，证明了结合边缘计算与云计算的混合架构在优化任务执行效率中的有效性。
