tldr: 本文提出了一种用于机器人网络云系统的最优算法分配方法，以实现无论由哪台机器人发起请求时系统都能达到最佳性能。
motivation: 现有研究主要关注通过预先知道资源分配来最小化机器人获取资源的成本，但未充分考虑如何在机器人、边缘节点和云节点之间动态分配算法以优化整体性能。
method: 开发了一种综合考虑机器人、雾计算节点和云节点的算法分配方法，通过确定算法的最优部署位置，最小化机器人所需内存并缩短任务完成时间。
result: 实验结果表明，与现有最先进的方法相比，该方法在真实世界数据集上显著提升了系统性能。
conclusion: 本文的方法为机器人网络云系统提供了更高效的算法分配策略，证明了结合边缘计算与云计算的混合架构在优化任务执行效率中的有效性。
search_text: Optimal Algorithm Allocation for Robotic Network Cloud Systems 机器人网络云系统的最优算法分配 A robotic network is a system with multiple robots connected by a communication network. Certain tasks that cannot be accomplished with available robotic resources are candidates for the use of cloud robotics, which overcomes the limitations of the robot network by adding to the network, either local or remote servers or cloud infrastructure, to aid in computational demanding tasks or storage. Previous studies have mainly focused on minimizing the cost of the robots in retrieving resources by knowing the resource allocation in advance. We develop a method for a robotic network cloud system that includes robots, fog and cloud nodes, to determine where each algorithm should be allocated so that the system achieves optimal performance, regardless of which robot initiates the request. We can find the minimum required memory for the robots and the optimal way to allocate the algorithms with the shortest time to complete each task. We experimentally compare our method with a state-of-the-art method, using real-world data, showing the improvements that can be obtained. 机器人网络是由多个机器人通过通信网络连接的系统。某些无法使用可用机器人资源完成的任务可以使用云机器人技术，云机器人技术通过添加本地或远程服务器或云基础设施来克服机器人网络的限制，以帮助完成计算要求较高的任务或存储。以前的研究主要集中在通过提前了解资源分配来最小化机器人检索资源的成本。我们为包括机器人、雾和云节点的机器人网络云系统开发了一种方法，以确定每个算法应该分配在哪里，以便系统实现最佳性能，无论哪个机器人发起请求。我们可以找到机器人所需的最小内存以及分配算法的最佳方式，以最短的时间完成每项任务。我们使用真实世界的数据，通过实验将我们的方法与最先进的方法进行比较，显示可以获得的改进。 本文提出了一种用于机器人网络云系统的最优算法分配方法，以实现无论由哪台机器人发起请求时系统都能达到最佳性能。 Saeid Alirezazadeh,André Correia,Luís A. Alexandre cs.RO

authors_text: Mohamed Afham,Salman Khan,Muhammad Haris Khan,Muzammal Naseer,Fahad Shahbaz Khan
title: Rich Semantics Improve Few-shot Learning
title_zh: 丰富的语义改善小样本学习
comment: Accepted to 32nd British Machine Vision Conference (BMVC 2021)
comments: Accepted to 32nd British Machine Vision Conference (BMVC 2021)
abstract: Human learning benefits from multi-modal inputs that often appear as rich semantics (e.g., description of an object's attributes while learning about it). This enables us to learn generalizable concepts from very limited visual examples. However, current few-shot learning (FSL) methods use numerical class labels to denote object classes which do not provide rich semantic meanings about the learned concepts. In this work, we show that by using 'class-level' language descriptions, that can be acquired with minimal annotation cost, we can improve the FSL performance. Given a support set and queries, our main idea is to create a bottleneck visual feature (hybrid prototype) which is then used to generate language descriptions of the classes as an auxiliary task during training. We develop a Transformer based forward and backward encoding mechanism to relate visual and semantic tokens that can encode intricate relationships between the two modalities. Forcing the prototypes to retain semantic information about class description acts as a regularizer on the visual features, improving their generalization to novel classes at inference. Furthermore, this strategy imposes a human prior on the learned representations, ensuring that the model is faithfully relating visual and semantic concepts, thereby improving model interpretability. Our experiments on four datasets and ablation studies show the benefit of effectively modeling rich semantics for FSL.
summary: Human learning benefits from multi-modal inputs that often appear as rich semantics (e.g., description of an object's attributes while learning about it). This enables us to learn generalizable concepts from very limited visual examples. However, current few-shot learning (FSL) methods use numerical class labels to denote object classes which do not provide rich semantic meanings about the learned concepts. In this work, we show that by using 'class-level' language descriptions, that can be acquired with minimal annotation cost, we can improve the FSL performance. Given a support set and queries, our main idea is to create a bottleneck visual feature (hybrid prototype) which is then used to generate language descriptions of the classes as an auxiliary task during training. We develop a Transformer based forward and backward encoding mechanism to relate visual and semantic tokens that can encode intricate relationships between the two modalities. Forcing the prototypes to retain semantic information about class description acts as a regularizer on the visual features, improving their generalization to novel classes at inference. Furthermore, this strategy imposes a human prior on the learned representations, ensuring that the model is faithfully relating visual and semantic concepts, thereby improving model interpretability. Our experiments on four datasets and ablation studies show the benefit of effectively modeling rich semantics for FSL.
abstract_zh: 人类学习受益于多模态输入，这些输入通常表现为丰富的语义（例如，在学习对象属性时描述它）。这使我们能够从非常有限的视觉示例中学习可概括的概念。然而，当前的少样本学习（FSL）方法使用数字类标签来表示对象类，这不能提供有关所学习概念的丰富语义。在这项工作中，我们表明，通过使用“类级”语言描述（可以以最小的注释成本获得），我们可以提高 FSL 性能。给定支持集和查询，我们的主要想法是创建瓶颈视觉特征（混合原型），然后将其用于生成类的语言描述作为训练期间的辅助任务。我们开发了一种基于 Transformer 的前向和后向编码机制来关联视觉和语义标记，这些标记可以对两种模式之间的复杂关系进行编码。强制原型保留有关类描述的语义信息，充当视觉特征的正则化器，从而提高它们在推理时对新类的泛化能力。此外，该策略将人类先验强加于学习到的表示上，确保模型忠实地关联视觉和语义概念，从而提高模型的可解释性。我们对四个数据集和消融研究的实验表明，为 FSL 有效建模丰富语义的好处。

AI.tldr: 本文通过引入类级别的语言描述，提升少样本学习（FSL）的性能，利用视觉和语义信息的关联性增强模型泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 当前FSL方法依赖数值标签，缺乏丰富的语义信息，而人类学习常通过多模态输入（如属性描述）实现概念泛化，因此需探索语义信息在FSL中的作用。
AI.method: 构建混合原型（bottleneck视觉特征），通过Transformer机制关联视觉与语义token，以生成语言描述作为辅助任务，强制原型保留语义信息以正则化视觉特征。
AI.result: 在四个数据集上的实验及消融研究验证了丰富语义建模对FSL的有效性，提升了模型在新类别的泛化能力与可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 融合语义信息可显著提升FSL性能，通过人类先验约束视觉-语义关系，使模型更贴合真实认知过程。

authors_text: Benjamin Elizalde,Radu Revutchi,Samarjit Das,Bhiksha Raj,Ian Lane,Laurie M. Heller
title: Identifying Actions for Sound Event Classification
title_zh: 识别声音事件分类的操作
abstract: In Psychology, actions are paramount for humans to identify sound events. In Machine Learning (ML), action recognition achieves high accuracy; however, it has not been asked whether identifying actions can benefit Sound Event Classification (SEC), as opposed to mapping the audio directly to a sound event. Therefore, we propose a new Psychology-inspired approach for SEC that includes identification of actions via human listeners. To achieve this goal, we used crowdsourcing to have listeners identify 20 actions that in isolation or in combination may have produced any of the 50 sound events in the well-studied dataset ESC-50. The resulting annotations for each audio recording relate actions to a database of sound events for the first time. The annotations were used to create semantic representations called Action Vectors (AVs). We evaluated SEC by comparing the AVs with two types of audio features -- log-mel spectrograms and state-of-the-art audio embeddings. Because audio features and AVs capture different abstractions of the acoustic content, we combined them and achieved one of the highest reported accuracies (88%).
summary: In Psychology, actions are paramount for humans to identify sound events. In Machine Learning (ML), action recognition achieves high accuracy; however, it has not been asked whether identifying actions can benefit Sound Event Classification (SEC), as opposed to mapping the audio directly to a sound event. Therefore, we propose a new Psychology-inspired approach for SEC that includes identification of actions via human listeners. To achieve this goal, we used crowdsourcing to have listeners identify 20 actions that in isolation or in combination may have produced any of the 50 sound events in the well-studied dataset ESC-50. The resulting annotations for each audio recording relate actions to a database of sound events for the first time. The annotations were used to create semantic representations called Action Vectors (AVs). We evaluated SEC by comparing the AVs with two types of audio features -- log-mel spectrograms and state-of-the-art audio embeddings. Because audio features and AVs capture different abstractions of the acoustic content, we combined them and achieved one of the highest reported accuracies (88%).
abstract_zh: 在心理学中，动作对于人类识别声音事件至关重要。在机器学习（ML）中，动作识别实现了高精度；然而，尚未有人询问识别动作是否有利于声音事件分类（SEC），而不是直接将音频映射到声音事件。因此，我们为 SEC 提出了一种受心理学启发的新方法，其中包括通过人类听众识别行为。为了实现这一目标，我们利用众包让听众识别 20 个动作，这些动作单独或组合可能产生经过充分研究的数据集 ESC-50 中 50 个声音事件中的任何一个。每个录音的最终注释首次将动作与声音事件数据库相关联。这些注释用于创建称为动作向量 (AV) 的语义表示。我们通过将 AV 与两种类型的音频特征（对数梅尔频谱图和最先进的音频嵌入）进行比较来评估 SEC。由于音频特征和 AV 捕获声学内容的不同抽象，因此我们将它们组合起来并实现了报告的最高准确度之一 (88%)。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于动作识别的心理学启发方法，用于提升声音事件分类的准确性
AI.motivation: 探索动作识别是否能辅助声音事件分类（SEC），而非直接将音频映射到声音事件
AI.method: 通过众包收集人类标注的动作数据，生成动作向量（AVs），并与音频特征（如log-mel谱图和音频嵌入）结合进行分类
AI.result: 结合动作向量与音频特征后，在ESC-50数据集上达到88%的分类准确率，为最高水平之一
AI.conclusion: 动作识别能有效提升SEC性能，结合语义信息与音频特征可进一步优化分类效果

ai_content.conclusion: 动作识别能有效提升SEC性能，结合语义信息与音频特征可进一步优化分类效果

title: Towards Good Practices for Efficiently Annotating Large-Scale Image Classification Datasets
title_zh: 迈向高效注释大规模图像分类数据集的良好实践
comment: CVPR 2021 Oral
comments: CVPR 2021 Oral
abstract: Data is the engine of modern computer vision, which necessitates collecting large-scale datasets. This is expensive, and guaranteeing the quality of the labels is a major challenge. In this paper, we investigate efficient annotation strategies for collecting multi-class classification labels for a large collection of images. While methods that exploit learnt models for labeling exist, a surprisingly prevalent approach is to query humans for a fixed number of labels per datum and aggregate them, which is expensive. Building on prior work on online joint probabilistic modeling of human annotations and machine-generated beliefs, we propose modifications and best practices aimed at minimizing human labeling effort. Specifically, we make use of advances in self-supervised learning, view annotation as a semi-supervised learning problem, identify and mitigate pitfalls and ablate several key design choices to propose effective guidelines for labeling. Our analysis is done in a more realistic simulation that involves querying human labelers, which uncovers issues with evaluation using existing worker simulation methods. Simulated experiments on a 125k image subset of the ImageNet100 show that it can be annotated to 80% top-1 accuracy with 0.35 annotations per image on average, a 2.7x and 6.7x improvement over prior work and manual annotation, respectively. Project page: https://fidler-lab.github.io/efficient-annotation-cookbook
summary: Data is the engine of modern computer vision, which necessitates collecting large-scale datasets. This is expensive, and guaranteeing the quality of the labels is a major challenge. In this paper, we investigate efficient annotation strategies for collecting multi-class classification labels for a large collection of images. While methods that exploit learnt models for labeling exist, a surprisingly prevalent approach is to query humans for a fixed number of labels per datum and aggregate them, which is expensive. Building on prior work on online joint probabilistic modeling of human annotations and machine-generated beliefs, we propose modifications and best practices aimed at minimizing human labeling effort. Specifically, we make use of advances in self-supervised learning, view annotation as a semi-supervised learning problem, identify and mitigate pitfalls and ablate several key design choices to propose effective guidelines for labeling. Our analysis is done in a more realistic simulation that involves querying human labelers, which uncovers issues with evaluation using existing worker simulation methods. Simulated experiments on a 125k image subset of the ImageNet100 show that it can be annotated to 80% top-1 accuracy with 0.35 annotations per image on average, a 2.7x and 6.7x improvement over prior work and manual annotation, respectively. Project page: https://fidler-lab.github.io/efficient-annotation-cookbook
abstract_zh: 数据是现代计算机视觉的引擎，需要收集大规模数据集。这是昂贵的，并且保证标签的质量是一个重大挑战。在本文中，我们研究了为大量图像收集多类分类标签的有效注释策略。虽然存在利用学习模型进行标记的方法，但令人惊讶的是，一种流行的方法是向人类查询每个数据的固定数量的标签并将其聚合，这是昂贵的。基于先前对人类注释和机器生成信念的在线联合概率建模的工作，我们提出了旨在最大限度地减少人类标记工作的修改和最佳实践。具体来说，我们利用自我监督学习的进步，将注释视为半监督学习问题，识别和减少陷阱，并消除几个关键的设计选择，以提出有效的标签指南。我们的分析是在更真实的模拟中完成的，其中涉及查询人工贴标机，这揭示了使用现有工人模拟方法进行评估的问题。对 ImageNet100 的 125k 图像子集进行的模拟实验表明，平均每张图像 0.35 个注释，它可以以 80% 的 top-1 精度进行注释，分别比之前的工作和手动注释提高了 2.7 倍和 6.7 倍。项目页面：https://fidler-lab.github.io/efficient-annotation-cookbook

AI.motivation: 大规模数据集的标注成本高昂且标签质量难以保证，传统方法依赖大量人工标注效率低下。
AI.method: 结合自监督学习与半监督学习框架，将标注视为联合概率建模问题，并通过仿真实验优化标注策略。
AI.result: 在ImageNet100的125k图像子集上，以每张图像0.35次标注的平均成本达到80%的top-1准确率，较之前方法提升2.7倍和6.7倍。
AI.conclusion: 提出有效标注指南，通过算法与人类标注的协同优化，显著降低标注成本并提升数据集质量。

title: Image Modeling with Deep Convolutional Gaussian Mixture Models
title_zh: 使用深度卷积高斯混合模型进行图像建模
comment: accepted at IJCNN2021, 9 pages, 7 figures
comments: accepted at IJCNN2021, 9 pages, 7 figures
abstract: In this conceptual work, we present Deep Convolutional Gaussian Mixture Models (DCGMMs): a new formulation of deep hierarchical Gaussian Mixture Models (GMMs) that is particularly suitable for describing and generating images. Vanilla (i.e., flat) GMMs require a very large number of components to describe images well, leading to long training times and memory issues. DCGMMs avoid this by a stacked architecture of multiple GMM layers, linked by convolution and pooling operations. This allows to exploit the compositionality of images in a similar way as deep CNNs do. DCGMMs can be trained end-to-end by Stochastic Gradient Descent. This sets them apart from vanilla GMMs which are trained by Expectation-Maximization, requiring a prior k-means initialization which is infeasible in a layered structure. For generating sharp images with DCGMMs, we introduce a new gradient-based technique for sampling through non-invertible operations like convolution and pooling. Based on the MNIST and FashionMNIST datasets, we validate the DCGMMs model by demonstrating its superiority over flat GMMs for clustering, sampling and outlier detection.
summary: In this conceptual work, we present Deep Convolutional Gaussian Mixture Models (DCGMMs): a new formulation of deep hierarchical Gaussian Mixture Models (GMMs) that is particularly suitable for describing and generating images. Vanilla (i.e., flat) GMMs require a very large number of components to describe images well, leading to long training times and memory issues. DCGMMs avoid this by a stacked architecture of multiple GMM layers, linked by convolution and pooling operations. This allows to exploit the compositionality of images in a similar way as deep CNNs do. DCGMMs can be trained end-to-end by Stochastic Gradient Descent. This sets them apart from vanilla GMMs which are trained by Expectation-Maximization, requiring a prior k-means initialization which is infeasible in a layered structure. For generating sharp images with DCGMMs, we introduce a new gradient-based technique for sampling through non-invertible operations like convolution and pooling. Based on the MNIST and FashionMNIST datasets, we validate the DCGMMs model by demonstrating its superiority over flat GMMs for clustering, sampling and outlier detection.
abstract_zh: 在这项概念性工作中，我们提出了深度卷积高斯混合模型（DCGMM）：深度分层高斯混合模型（GMM）的新公式，特别适合描述和生成图像。 Vanilla（即平面）GMM 需要大量组件才能很好地描述图像，从而导致训练时间长和内存问题。 DCGMM 通过多个 GMM 层的堆叠架构（通过卷积和池化操作连接）来避免这种情况。这允许以与深度 CNN 类似的方式利用图像的组合性。 DCGMM 可以通过随机梯度下降进行端到端训练。这将它们与通过期望最大化训练的普通 GMM 区分开来，需要事先进行 k 均值初始化，这在分层结构中是不可行的。为了使用 DCGMM 生成清晰的图像，我们引入了一种新的基于梯度的技术，通过卷积和池化等不可逆操作进行采样。基于 MNIST 和 FashionMNIST 数据集，我们通过证明 DCGMM 模型在聚类、采样和异常值检测方面优于平面 GMM 来验证 DCGMM 模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出深度卷积高斯混合模型（DCGMM），用于图像建模，通过分层结构解决传统高斯混合模型（GMM）在图像描述和生成中的效率问题。
AI.motivation: 传统GMM需大量组件描述图像，导致训练时间长和内存问题，且依赖k-means初始化的EM训练难以适应分层结构。
AI.method: 采用多层GMM堆叠架构，结合卷积和池化操作，通过端到端随机梯度下降（SGD）训练，并引入基于梯度的采样技术处理非可逆操作。
AI.result: 在MNIST和FashionMNIST数据集上，DCGMM在聚类、采样和异常检测任务中优于传统GMM。
AI.conclusion: DCGMM通过分层卷积结构和高效训练方法，为图像建模提供了比传统GMM更优的解决方案。

title: Daily Turking: Designing Longitudinal Daily-task Studies on Mechanical Turk
title_zh: Daily Turking：设计 Mechanical Turking 的纵向日常任务研究
comment: 9 pages, 6 figures, 2 tables, updated following submission
comments: 9 pages, 6 figures, 2 tables, updated following submission
abstract: In this paper, we present our system design for conducting longitudinal daily-task studies with the same workers throughout on Amazon Mechanical Turk. We implement this system to conduct a study into touch dynamics, and present our experiences, challenges and lessons learned from doing so. Study participants installed our application on their Apple iOS phones and completed two tasks daily for 31 days. Each task involves performing a series of scrolling or swiping gestures, from which behavioral information such as movement speed or pressure is extracted. The completion of the daily tasks did not require extra interaction with the Mechanical Turk platform, yet paid workers through it. This differs somewhat from the typical rapid completion of one-off tasks that workers are used to on Amazon Mechanical Turk. This atypical use of the platform prompted us to evaluate aspects related to long-term worker retention and engagement over the study period, in particular the impacts of payment schedule (amount and structure over time) and reminder notifications. We also investigate the specific concern of reconciling informed consent with workers' desire to complete tasks quickly. We find that using the Mechanical Turk platform for conducting longitudinal daily task studies is a viable method to augment or replace traditional lab studies.
summary: In this paper, we present our system design for conducting longitudinal daily-task studies with the same workers throughout on Amazon Mechanical Turk. We implement this system to conduct a study into touch dynamics, and present our experiences, challenges and lessons learned from doing so. Study participants installed our application on their Apple iOS phones and completed two tasks daily for 31 days. Each task involves performing a series of scrolling or swiping gestures, from which behavioral information such as movement speed or pressure is extracted. The completion of the daily tasks did not require extra interaction with the Mechanical Turk platform, yet paid workers through it. This differs somewhat from the typical rapid completion of one-off tasks that workers are used to on Amazon Mechanical Turk. This atypical use of the platform prompted us to evaluate aspects related to long-term worker retention and engagement over the study period, in particular the impacts of payment schedule (amount and structure over time) and reminder notifications. We also investigate the specific concern of reconciling informed consent with workers' desire to complete tasks quickly. We find that using the Mechanical Turk platform for conducting longitudinal daily task studies is a viable method to augment or replace traditional lab studies.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们介绍了我们的系统设计，用于在 Amazon Mechanical Turk 上与相同的工作人员进行纵向日常任务研究。我们实施该系统是为了对触摸动力学进行研究，并介绍我们的经验、挑战和从中吸取的教训。研究参与者在他们的 Apple iOS 手机上安装了我们的应用程序，并在 31 天内每天完成两项任务。每个任务都涉及执行一系列滚动或滑动手势，从中提取移动速度或压力等行为信息。日常任务的完成不需要与 Mechanical Turk 平台进行额外的交互，而是通过它向工人支付报酬。这与工作人员习惯在 Amazon Mechanical Turk 上快速完成一次性任务的典型做法有所不同。这种平台的非典型使用促使我们评估研究期间与长期员工保留和参与相关的方面，特别是付款计划（随时间推移的金额和结构）和提醒通知的影响。我们还调查了协调知情同意与工人快速完成任务的愿望的具体问题。我们发现，使用 Mechanical Turk 平台进行纵向日常任务研究是增强或取代传统实验室研究的可行方法。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一个在Amazon Mechanical Turk平台上进行长期每日任务研究的系统，通过收集用户触摸动态数据，探讨长期参与度影响因素。
AI.motivation: 传统实验室研究存在成本高、样本有限等问题，而MTurk平台可作为补充，但需解决长期任务参与度和数据收集可行性挑战。
AI.method: 开发移动应用要求工人每日完成两次触摸任务，通过MTurk支付报酬，研究支付结构、提醒机制及知情同意与效率的平衡。
AI.result: 验证了MTurk可支持长期研究，发现支付频率和提醒显著影响参与度，需优化激励机制以维持工人持续参与。
AI.conclusion: MTurk适合替代传统实验室进行纵向研究，但需针对性设计支付和提醒策略以提升长期任务完成率与数据质量。

ai_content.tldr: 本文设计了一个在Amazon Mechanical Turk平台上进行长期每日任务研究的系统，通过收集用户触摸动态数据，探讨长期参与度影响因素。
ai_content.motivation: 传统实验室研究存在成本高、样本有限等问题，而MTurk平台可作为补充，但需解决长期任务参与度和数据收集可行性挑战。
ai_content.method: 开发移动应用要求工人每日完成两次触摸任务，通过MTurk支付报酬，研究支付结构、提醒机制及知情同意与效率的平衡。
ai_content.result: 验证了MTurk可支持长期研究，发现支付频率和提醒显著影响参与度，需优化激励机制以维持工人持续参与。
ai_content.conclusion: MTurk适合替代传统实验室进行纵向研究，但需针对性设计支付和提醒策略以提升长期任务完成率与数据质量。

search_text: Daily Turking: Designing Longitudinal Daily-task Studies on Mechanical Turk Daily Turking：设计 Mechanical Turking 的纵向日常任务研究 In this paper, we present our system design for conducting longitudinal daily-task studies with the same workers throughout on Amazon Mechanical Turk. We implement this system to conduct a study into touch dynamics, and present our experiences, challenges and lessons learned from doing so. Study participants installed our application on their Apple iOS phones and completed two tasks daily for 31 days. Each task involves performing a series of scrolling or swiping gestures, from which behavioral information such as movement speed or pressure is extracted. The completion of the daily tasks did not require extra interaction with the Mechanical Turk platform, yet paid workers through it. This differs somewhat from the typical rapid completion of one-off tasks that workers are used to on Amazon Mechanical Turk. This atypical use of the platform prompted us to evaluate aspects related to long-term worker retention and engagement over the study period, in particular the impacts of payment schedule (amount and structure over time) and reminder notifications. We also investigate the specific concern of reconciling informed consent with workers' desire to complete tasks quickly. We find that using the Mechanical Turk platform for conducting longitudinal daily task studies is a viable method to augment or replace traditional lab studies. 在本文中，我们介绍了我们的系统设计，用于在 Amazon Mechanical Turk 上与相同的工作人员进行纵向日常任务研究。我们实施该系统是为了对触摸动力学进行研究，并介绍我们的经验、挑战和从中吸取的教训。研究参与者在他们的 Apple iOS 手机上安装了我们的应用程序，并在 31 天内每天完成两项任务。每个任务都涉及执行一系列滚动或滑动手势，从中提取移动速度或压力等行为信息。日常任务的完成不需要与 Mechanical Turk 平台进行额外的交互，而是通过它向工人支付报酬。这与工作人员习惯在 Amazon Mechanical Turk 上快速完成一次性任务的典型做法有所不同。这种平台的非典型使用促使我们评估研究期间与长期员工保留和参与相关的方面，特别是付款计划（随时间推移的金额和结构）和提醒通知的影响。我们还调查了协调知情同意与工人快速完成任务的愿望的具体问题。我们发现，使用 Mechanical Turk 平台进行纵向日常任务研究是增强或取代传统实验室研究的可行方法。 本文设计了一个在Amazon Mechanical Turk平台上进行长期每日任务研究的系统，通过收集用户触摸动态数据，探讨长期参与度影响因素。 Henry Turner,Simon Eberz,Ivan Martinovic cs.HC

title: Joint Representation Learning and Novel Category Discovery on Single- and Multi-modal Data
title_zh: 单模态和多模态数据的联合表示学习和新类别发现
comment: ICCV 2021
comments: ICCV 2021
abstract: This paper studies the problem of novel category discovery on single- and multi-modal data with labels from different but relevant categories. We present a generic, end-to-end framework to jointly learn a reliable representation and assign clusters to unlabelled data. To avoid over-fitting the learnt embedding to labelled data, we take inspiration from self-supervised representation learning by noise-contrastive estimation and extend it to jointly handle labelled and unlabelled data. In particular, we propose using category discrimination on labelled data and cross-modal discrimination on multi-modal data to augment instance discrimination used in conventional contrastive learning approaches. We further employ Winner-Take-All (WTA) hashing algorithm on the shared representation space to generate pairwise pseudo labels for unlabelled data to better predict cluster assignments. We thoroughly evaluate our framework on large-scale multi-modal video benchmarks Kinetics-400 and VGG-Sound, and image benchmarks CIFAR10, CIFAR100 and ImageNet, obtaining state-of-the-art results.
summary: This paper studies the problem of novel category discovery on single- and multi-modal data with labels from different but relevant categories. We present a generic, end-to-end framework to jointly learn a reliable representation and assign clusters to unlabelled data. To avoid over-fitting the learnt embedding to labelled data, we take inspiration from self-supervised representation learning by noise-contrastive estimation and extend it to jointly handle labelled and unlabelled data. In particular, we propose using category discrimination on labelled data and cross-modal discrimination on multi-modal data to augment instance discrimination used in conventional contrastive learning approaches. We further employ Winner-Take-All (WTA) hashing algorithm on the shared representation space to generate pairwise pseudo labels for unlabelled data to better predict cluster assignments. We thoroughly evaluate our framework on large-scale multi-modal video benchmarks Kinetics-400 and VGG-Sound, and image benchmarks CIFAR10, CIFAR100 and ImageNet, obtaining state-of-the-art results.
abstract_zh: 本文研究了具有不同但相关类别标签的单模态和多模态数据的新类别发现问题。我们提出了一个通用的端到端框架来共同学习可靠的表示并将集群分配给未标记的数据。为了避免学习到的嵌入与标记数据过度拟合，我们从通过噪声对比估计进行的自监督表示学习中获得灵感，并将其扩展为联合处理标记和未标记数据。特别是，我们建议对标记数据使用类别区分，对多模态数据使用跨模态区分，以增强传统对比学习方法中使用的实例区分。我们进一步在共享表示空间上采用赢家通吃（WTA）哈希算法来为未标记的数据生成成对的伪标签，以更好地预测聚类分配。我们在大规模多模式视频基准 Kinetics-400 和 VGG-Sound 以及图像基准 CIFAR10、CIFAR100 和 ImageNet 上彻底评估了我们的框架，获得了最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在单模态和多模态数据上进行新型类别发现的问题，提出了一种联合学习表示和聚类的端到端框架。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理未标记数据时容易过拟合已标记数据，且难以有效利用多模态信息进行新型类别发现。
AI.method: 结合自监督学习的噪声对比估计，通过类别判别（单模态）和跨模态判别（多模态）增强实例判别，并采用WTA哈希算法生成伪标签以优化聚类分配。
AI.result: 在Kinetics-400、VGG-Sound、CIFAR10/100和ImageNet等基准测试中取得最先进的结果。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过联合表示学习和判别机制，有效提升了单模态与多模态数据的新型类别发现性能。

title: A Novel Interaction-based Methodology Towards Explainable AI with Better Understanding of Pneumonia Chest X-ray Images
title_zh: 一种基于交互的新型方法，实现可解释的人工智能，更好地理解肺炎胸部 X 射线图像
comment: ef:Algorithms 2021, 14(11), 337
comments: ef:Algorithms 2021, 14(11), 337
abstract: In the field of eXplainable AI (XAI), robust "blackbox" algorithms such as Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) are known for making high prediction performance. However, the ability to explain and interpret these algorithms still require innovation in the understanding of influential and, more importantly, explainable features that directly or indirectly impact the performance of predictivity. A number of methods existing in literature focus on visualization techniques but the concepts of explainability and interpretability still require rigorous definition. In view of the above needs, this paper proposes an interaction-based methodology -- Influence Score (I-score) -- to screen out the noisy and non-informative variables in the images hence it nourishes an environment with explainable and interpretable features that are directly associated to feature predictivity. We apply the proposed method on a real world application in Pneumonia Chest X-ray Image data set and produced state-of-the-art results. We demonstrate how to apply the proposed approach for more general big data problems by improving the explainability and interpretability without sacrificing the prediction performance. The contribution of this paper opens a novel angle that moves the community closer to the future pipelines of XAI problems.
summary: In the field of eXplainable AI (XAI), robust "blackbox" algorithms such as Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) are known for making high prediction performance. However, the ability to explain and interpret these algorithms still require innovation in the understanding of influential and, more importantly, explainable features that directly or indirectly impact the performance of predictivity. A number of methods existing in literature focus on visualization techniques but the concepts of explainability and interpretability still require rigorous definition. In view of the above needs, this paper proposes an interaction-based methodology -- Influence Score (I-score) -- to screen out the noisy and non-informative variables in the images hence it nourishes an environment with explainable and interpretable features that are directly associated to feature predictivity. We apply the proposed method on a real world application in Pneumonia Chest X-ray Image data set and produced state-of-the-art results. We demonstrate how to apply the proposed approach for more general big data problems by improving the explainability and interpretability without sacrificing the prediction performance. The contribution of this paper opens a novel angle that moves the community closer to the future pipelines of XAI problems.
abstract_zh: 在可解释人工智能 (XAI) 领域，卷积神经网络 (CNN) 等强大的“黑盒”算法因具有高预测性能而闻名。然而，解释和解释这些算法的能力仍然需要在理解有影响力的、更重要的是直接或间接影响预测性能的可解释特征方面进行创新。文献中现有的许多方法都侧重于可视化技术，但可解释性和可解释性的概念仍然需要严格的定义。鉴于上述需求，本文提出了一种基于交互的方法——影响评分（I-score）——筛选图像中的噪声和非信息变量，从而滋养一个具有可解释和可解释特征的环境，这些特征与特征预测性直接相关。我们将所提出的方法应用于肺炎胸部 X 射线图像数据集的实际应用，并产生了最先进的结果。我们演示了如何通过提高可解释性和可解释性而不牺牲预测性能，将所提出的方法应用于更一般的大数据问题。本文的贡献开辟了一个新颖的角度，使社区更接近 XAI 问题的未来流程。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于交互的方法——影响分数（I-score），用于提升可解释AI在肺炎胸部X光图像中的特征可解释性与预测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习模型（如CNN）虽预测性能高，但其解释性不足，缺乏对影响预测的关键特征的严格定义与筛选机制。
AI.method: 通过引入I-score方法，筛选图像中的噪声与非信息变量，保留与预测性能直接相关的可解释特征。
AI.result: 在肺炎胸部X光数据集上取得当前最优结果，并验证了该方法在通用大数据问题中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为可解释AI研究提供了新视角，推动了可解释性与预测性能兼顾的未来研究方向。

We apply the proposed method on a real world application in Pneumonia Chest X-ray Image data set and produced state-of-the-art results. We demonstrate how to apply the proposed approach for more general big data problems by improving the explainability and interpretability without sacrificing the prediction performance. The contribution of this paper opens a novel angle that moves the community closer to the future pipelines of XAI problems. 在可解释人工智能 (XAI) 领域，卷积神经网络 (CNN) 等强大的“黑盒”算法因具有高预测性能而闻名。然而，解释和解释这些算法的能力仍然需要在理解有影响力的、更重要的是直接或间接影响预测性能的可解释特征方面进行创新。文献中现有的许多方法都侧重于可视化技术，但可解释性和可解释性的概念仍然需要严格的定义。鉴于上述需求，本文提出了一种基于交互的方法——影响评分（I-score）——筛选图像中的噪声和非信息变量，从而滋养一个具有可解释和可解释特征的环境，这些特征与特征预测性直接相关。我们将所提出的方法应用于肺炎胸部 X 射线图像数据集的实际应用，并产生了最先进的结果。我们演示了如何通过提高可解释性和可解释性而不牺牲预测性能，将所提出的方法应用于更一般的大数据问题。本文的贡献开辟了一个新颖的角度，使社区更接近 XAI 问题的未来流程。 本文提出一种基于交互的方法——影响分数（I-score），用于提升可解释AI在肺炎胸部X光图像中的特征可解释性与预测性能。 Shaw-Hwa Lo,Yiqiao Yin cs.LG,cs.CV,stat.AP

authors_text: Brian Chen,Andrew Rouditchenko,Kevin Duarte,Hilde Kuehne,Samuel Thomas,Angie Boggust,Rameswar Panda,Brian Kingsbury,Rogerio Feris,David Harwath,James Glass,Michael Picheny,Shih-Fu Chang
title: Multimodal Clustering Networks for Self-supervised Learning from Unlabeled Videos
title_zh: 用于未标记视频自监督学习的多模态聚类网络
comment: To be presented at ICCV 2021
comments: To be presented at ICCV 2021
abstract: Multimodal self-supervised learning is getting more and more attention as it allows not only to train large networks without human supervision but also to search and retrieve data across various modalities. In this context, this paper proposes a self-supervised training framework that learns a common multimodal embedding space that, in addition to sharing representations across different modalities, enforces a grouping of semantically similar instances. To this end, we extend the concept of instance-level contrastive learning with a multimodal clustering step in the training pipeline to capture semantic similarities across modalities. The resulting embedding space enables retrieval of samples across all modalities, even from unseen datasets and different domains. To evaluate our approach, we train our model on the HowTo100M dataset and evaluate its zero-shot retrieval capabilities in two challenging domains, namely text-to-video retrieval, and temporal action localization, showing state-of-the-art results on four different datasets.
summary: Multimodal self-supervised learning is getting more and more attention as it allows not only to train large networks without human supervision but also to search and retrieve data across various modalities. In this context, this paper proposes a self-supervised training framework that learns a common multimodal embedding space that, in addition to sharing representations across different modalities, enforces a grouping of semantically similar instances. To this end, we extend the concept of instance-level contrastive learning with a multimodal clustering step in the training pipeline to capture semantic similarities across modalities. The resulting embedding space enables retrieval of samples across all modalities, even from unseen datasets and different domains. To evaluate our approach, we train our model on the HowTo100M dataset and evaluate its zero-shot retrieval capabilities in two challenging domains, namely text-to-video retrieval, and temporal action localization, showing state-of-the-art results on four different datasets.
abstract_zh: 多模态自监督学习越来越受到关注，因为它不仅可以在没有人类监督的情况下训练大型网络，还可以跨各种模态搜索和检索数据。在这种背景下，本文提出了一种自监督训练框架，该框架学习通用的多模态嵌入空间，除了跨不同模态共享表示之外，还强制对语义相似的实例进行分组。为此，我们通过训练管道中的多模态聚类步骤扩展了实例级对比学习的概念，以捕获跨模态的语义相似性。由此产生的嵌入空间可以跨所有模式检索样本，甚至可以从不可见的数据集和不同的域中检索样本。为了评估我们的方法，我们在 HowTo100M 数据集上训练我们的模型，并在两个具有挑战性的领域（即文本到视频检索和时间动作定位）评估其零样本检索能力，在四个不同的数据集上显示最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自监督框架，通过多模态聚类学习共同嵌入空间，实现跨模态数据检索。
AI.motivation: 多模态自监督学习可减少人工标注依赖，但现有方法难以有效捕捉跨模态语义相似性，限制了跨模态检索性能。
AI.method: 扩展实例级对比学习，引入多模态聚类步骤，在嵌入空间中强制语义相似实例分组，构建跨模态共享表征。
AI.result: 在HowTo100M数据集训练后，零样本检索在文本到视频检索和时序动作定位任务中取得四个数据集的最先进结果。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过多模态聚类有效提升跨模态表征能力，可泛化至未见过的数据集和不同领域。

authors_text: Xuejun Zhao,Wencan Zhang,Xiaokui Xiao,Brian Y. Lim
title: Exploiting Explanations for Model Inversion Attacks
title_zh: 利用模型反转攻击的解释
comment: ICCV 2021
comments: ICCV 2021
abstract: The successful deployment of artificial intelligence (AI) in many domains from healthcare to hiring requires their responsible use, particularly in model explanations and privacy. Explainable artificial intelligence (XAI) provides more information to help users to understand model decisions, yet this additional knowledge exposes additional risks for privacy attacks. Hence, providing explanation harms privacy. We study this risk for image-based model inversion attacks and identified several attack architectures with increasing performance to reconstruct private image data from model explanations. We have developed several multi-modal transposed CNN architectures that achieve significantly higher inversion performance than using the target model prediction only. These XAI-aware inversion models were designed to exploit the spatial knowledge in image explanations. To understand which explanations have higher privacy risk, we analyzed how various explanation types and factors influence inversion performance. In spite of some models not providing explanations, we further demonstrate increased inversion performance even for non-explainable target models by exploiting explanations of surrogate models through attention transfer. This method first inverts an explanation from the target prediction, then reconstructs the target image. These threats highlight the urgent and significant privacy risks of explanations and calls attention for new privacy preservation techniques that balance the dual-requirement for AI explainability and privacy.
summary: The successful deployment of artificial intelligence (AI) in many domains from healthcare to hiring requires their responsible use, particularly in model explanations and privacy. Explainable artificial intelligence (XAI) provides more information to help users to understand model decisions, yet this additional knowledge exposes additional risks for privacy attacks. Hence, providing explanation harms privacy. We study this risk for image-based model inversion attacks and identified several attack architectures with increasing performance to reconstruct private image data from model explanations. We have developed several multi-modal transposed CNN architectures that achieve significantly higher inversion performance than using the target model prediction only. These XAI-aware inversion models were designed to exploit the spatial knowledge in image explanations. To understand which explanations have higher privacy risk, we analyzed how various explanation types and factors influence inversion performance. In spite of some models not providing explanations, we further demonstrate increased inversion performance even for non-explainable target models by exploiting explanations of surrogate models through attention transfer. This method first inverts an explanation from the target prediction, then reconstructs the target image. These threats highlight the urgent and significant privacy risks of explanations and calls attention for new privacy preservation techniques that balance the dual-requirement for AI explainability and privacy.
abstract_zh: 人工智能 (AI) 在从医疗保健到招聘的许多领域的成功部署需要负责任地使用，特别是在模型解释和隐私方面。可解释的人工智能（XAI）提供了更多信息来帮助用户理解模型决策，但这些额外的知识也暴露了隐私攻击的额外风险。因此，提供解释会损害隐私。我们研究了基于图像的模型反转攻击的风险，并确定了几种攻击架构，这些攻击架构的性能不断提高，可以根据模型解释重建私有图像数据。我们开发了几种多模态转置 CNN 架构，与仅使用目标模型预测相比，其反演性能显着提高。这些 XAI 感知反演模型旨在利用图像解释中的空间知识。为了了解哪些解释具有更高的隐私风险，我们分析了各种解释类型和因素如何影响反演性能。尽管某些模型没有提供解释，但我们通过注意力转移利用替代模型的解释，进一步证明了即使对于不可解释的目标模型，反演性能也有所提高。该方法首先从目标预测中反演解释，然后重建目标图像。这些威胁凸显了解释的紧迫性和重大隐私风险，并呼吁人们关注平衡人工智能可解释性和隐私的双重要求的新隐私保护技术。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了可解释人工智能（XAI）生成的模型解释在图像模型反演攻击中的隐私风险，并提出了利用多模态转置卷积神经网络（CNN）和注意力迁移的攻击方法。
AI.motivation: 尽管XAI增强了模型的可解释性，但其提供的额外信息可能暴露隐私风险。现有研究未充分探讨模型解释在隐私攻击中的潜在威胁，亟需揭示这一风险并提出应对方案。
AI.method: 设计多模态转置CNN架构，通过模型解释重构私有图像数据；利用注意力迁移技术，即使目标模型不可解释，也能通过替代模型的解释实现反演攻击。
AI.result: 实验表明，基于解释的反演方法显著优于仅使用目标模型预测的传统方法，且不同解释类型对反演性能影响显著。
AI.conclusion: 模型解释可能成为隐私泄露的新途径，需开发兼顾模型可解释性与隐私保护的新型技术以应对这一挑战。

title: Appearance-based Gaze Estimation With Deep Learning: A Review and Benchmark
title_zh: 基于外观的深度学习注视估计：回顾和基准
comment: Accepted by TPAMI
comments: Accepted by TPAMI
abstract: Human gaze provides valuable information on human focus and intentions, making it a crucial area of research. Recently, deep learning has revolutionized appearance-based gaze estimation. However, due to the unique features of gaze estimation research, such as the unfair comparison between 2D gaze positions and 3D gaze vectors and the different pre-processing and post-processing methods, there is a lack of a definitive guideline for developing deep learning-based gaze estimation algorithms. In this paper, we present a systematic review of the appearance-based gaze estimation methods using deep learning. Firstly, we survey the existing gaze estimation algorithms along the typical gaze estimation pipeline: deep feature extraction, deep learning model design, personal calibration and platforms. Secondly, to fairly compare the performance of different approaches, we summarize the data pre-processing and post-processing methods, including face/eye detection, data rectification, 2D/3D gaze conversion and gaze origin conversion. Finally, we set up a comprehensive benchmark for deep learning-based gaze estimation. We characterize all the public datasets and provide the source code of typical gaze estimation algorithms. This paper serves not only as a reference to develop deep learning-based gaze estimation methods, but also a guideline for future gaze estimation research. The project web page can be found at https://phi-ai.buaa.edu.cn/Gazehub.
summary: Human gaze provides valuable information on human focus and intentions, making it a crucial area of research. Recently, deep learning has revolutionized appearance-based gaze estimation. However, due to the unique features of gaze estimation research, such as the unfair comparison between 2D gaze positions and 3D gaze vectors and the different pre-processing and post-processing methods, there is a lack of a definitive guideline for developing deep learning-based gaze estimation algorithms. In this paper, we present a systematic review of the appearance-based gaze estimation methods using deep learning. Firstly, we survey the existing gaze estimation algorithms along the typical gaze estimation pipeline: deep feature extraction, deep learning model design, personal calibration and platforms. Secondly, to fairly compare the performance of different approaches, we summarize the data pre-processing and post-processing methods, including face/eye detection, data rectification, 2D/3D gaze conversion and gaze origin conversion. Finally, we set up a comprehensive benchmark for deep learning-based gaze estimation. We characterize all the public datasets and provide the source code of typical gaze estimation algorithms. This paper serves not only as a reference to develop deep learning-based gaze estimation methods, but also a guideline for future gaze estimation research. The project web page can be found at https://phi-ai.buaa.edu.cn/Gazehub.
abstract_zh: 人类凝视提供了有关人类焦点和意图的宝贵信息，使其成为一个重要的研究领域。最近，深度学习彻底改变了基于外观的注视估计。然而，由于注视估计研究的独特性，例如2D注视位置和3D注视向量之间的不公平比较以及不同的预处理和后处理方法，开发基于深度学习的注视估计算法缺乏明确的指南。在本文中，我们对使用深度学习的基于外观的注视估计方法进行了系统回顾。首先，我们沿着典型的注视估计流程调查了现有的注视估计算法：深度特征提取、深度学习模型设计、个人校准和平台。其次，为了公平地比较不同方法的性能，我们总结了数据预处理和后处理方法，包括人脸/眼睛检测、数据校正、2D/3D凝视转换和凝视原点转换。最后，我们为基于深度学习的注视估计建立了一个全面的基准。我们描述了所有公共数据集的特征，并提供了典型注视估计算法的源代码。本文不仅可以为开发基于深度学习的注视估计方法提供参考，而且可以为未来注视估计研究提供指导。项目网页位于https://phi-ai.buaa.edu.cn/Gazehub。

search_text: Appearance-based Gaze Estimation With Deep Learning: A Review and Benchmark 基于外观的深度学习注视估计：回顾和基准 Human gaze provides valuable information on human focus and intentions, making it a crucial area of research. Recently, deep learning has revolutionized appearance-based gaze estimation. However, due to the unique features of gaze estimation research, such as the unfair comparison between 2D gaze positions and 3D gaze vectors and the different pre-processing and post-processing methods, there is a lack of a definitive guideline for developing deep learning-based gaze estimation algorithms. In this paper, we present a systematic review of the appearance-based gaze estimation methods using deep learning. Firstly, we survey the existing gaze estimation algorithms along the typical gaze estimation pipeline: deep feature extraction, deep learning model design, personal calibration and platforms. Secondly, to fairly compare the performance of different approaches, we summarize the data pre-processing and post-processing methods, including face/eye detection, data rectification, 2D/3D gaze conversion and gaze origin conversion. Finally, we set up a comprehensive benchmark for deep learning-based gaze estimation. We characterize all the public datasets and provide the source code of typical gaze estimation algorithms. This paper serves not only as a reference to develop deep learning-based gaze estimation methods, but also a guideline for future gaze estimation research. authors_text: Seungjun Nah,Sanghyun Son,Jaerin Lee,Kyoung Mu Lee
title: Clean Images are Hard to Reblur: Exploiting the Ill-Posed Inverse Task for Dynamic Scene Deblurring
title_zh: 干净的图像很难重新模糊：利用不适定逆任务进行动态场景去模糊
comment: ICLR 2022
comments: ICLR 2022
abstract: The goal of dynamic scene deblurring is to remove the motion blur in a given image. Typical learning-based approaches implement their solutions by minimizing the L1 or L2 distance between the output and the reference sharp image. Recent attempts adopt visual recognition features in training to improve the perceptual quality. However, those features are primarily designed to capture high-level contexts rather than low-level structures such as blurriness. Instead, we propose a more direct way to make images sharper by exploiting the inverse task of deblurring, namely, reblurring. Reblurring amplifies the remaining blur to rebuild the original blur, however, a well-deblurred clean image with zero-magnitude blur is hard to reblur. Thus, we design two types of reblurring loss functions for better deblurring. The supervised reblurring loss at training stage compares the amplified blur between the deblurred and the sharp images. The self-supervised reblurring loss at inference stage inspects if there noticeable blur remains in the deblurred. Our experimental results on large-scale benchmarks and real images demonstrate the effectiveness of the reblurring losses in improving the perceptual quality of the deblurred images in terms of NIQE and LPIPS scores as well as visual sharpness.
summary: The goal of dynamic scene deblurring is to remove the motion blur in a given image. Typical learning-based approaches implement their solutions by minimizing the L1 or L2 distance between the output and the reference sharp image. Recent attempts adopt visual recognition features in training to improve the perceptual quality. However, those features are primarily designed to capture high-level contexts rather than low-level structures such as blurriness. Instead, we propose a more direct way to make images sharper by exploiting the inverse task of deblurring, namely, reblurring. Reblurring amplifies the remaining blur to rebuild the original blur, however, a well-deblurred clean image with zero-magnitude blur is hard to reblur. Thus, we design two types of reblurring loss functions for better deblurring. The supervised reblurring loss at training stage compares the amplified blur between the deblurred and the sharp images. The self-supervised reblurring loss at inference stage inspects if there noticeable blur remains in the deblurred. Our experimental results on large-scale benchmarks and real images demonstrate the effectiveness of the reblurring losses in improving the perceptual quality of the deblurred images in terms of NIQE and LPIPS scores as well as visual sharpness.
abstract_zh: 动态场景去模糊的目标是消除给定图像中的运动模糊。典型的基于学习的方法通过最小化输出和参考清晰图像之间的 L1 或 L2 距离来实现其解决方案。最近的尝试在训练中采用视觉识别功能来提高感知质量。然而，这些功能主要是为了捕获高级上下文而不是低级结构（例如模糊性）而设计的。相反，我们提出了一种更直接的方法，通过利用去模糊的逆任务（即重新模糊）来使图像更清晰。重新模糊会放大剩余的模糊以重建原始模糊，但是，具有零幅度模糊的良好去模糊的干净图像很难重新模糊。因此，我们设计了两种类型的再模糊损失函数以实现更好的去模糊。训练阶段的监督再模糊损失比较了去模糊图像和清晰图像之间的放大模糊。推理阶段的自监督再模糊损失检查去模糊中是否仍然存在明显的模糊。我们在大规模基准和真实图像上的实验结果证明了再模糊损失在提高去模糊图像的感知质量方面的有效性（NIQE 和 LPIPS 分数以及视觉清晰度）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用反向任务（重模糊）来改进动态场景去模糊方法，通过设计两种重模糊损失函数提升去模糊图像的感知质量。
AI.motivation: 传统去模糊方法依赖于与参考清晰图像的L1/L2距离或视觉特征，但这些方法难以捕捉低级模糊结构。作者发现干净图像难以重新模糊，因此提出通过逆向任务增强去模糊效果。
AI.method: 设计两种重模糊损失函数：训练阶段的监督重模糊损失比较去模糊图像与清晰图像的放大模糊差异；推理阶段的自监督重模糊损失检测去模糊后是否残留模糊。
AI.result: 在大规模基准和真实图像上，该方法在NIQE、LPIPS指标及视觉锐度上均优于现有方法，验证了重模糊损失的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过逆向任务建模模糊特性，提出的重模糊损失能有效提升动态场景去模糊的感知质量，为低级视觉任务提供新思路。

title: CAGAN: Text-To-Image Generation with Combined Attention GANs
title_zh: CAGAN：结合注意力 GAN 的文本到图像生成
abstract: Generating images according to natural language descriptions is a challenging task. Prior research has mainly focused to enhance the quality of generation by investigating the use of spatial attention and/or textual attention thereby neglecting the relationship between channels. In this work, we propose the Combined Attention Generative Adversarial Network (CAGAN) to generate photo-realistic images according to textual descriptions. The proposed CAGAN utilises two attention models: word attention to draw different sub-regions conditioned on related words; and squeeze-and-excitation attention to capture non-linear interaction among channels. With spectral normalisation to stabilise training, our proposed CAGAN improves the state of the art on the IS and FID on the CUB dataset and the FID on the more challenging COCO dataset. Furthermore, we demonstrate that judging a model by a single evaluation metric can be misleading by developing an additional model adding local self-attention which scores a higher IS, outperforming the state of the art on the CUB dataset, but generates unrealistic images through feature repetition.
summary: Generating images according to natural language descriptions is a challenging task. Prior research has mainly focused to enhance the quality of generation by investigating the use of spatial attention and/or textual attention thereby neglecting the relationship between channels. In this work, we propose the Combined Attention Generative Adversarial Network (CAGAN) to generate photo-realistic images according to textual descriptions. The proposed CAGAN utilises two attention models: word attention to draw different sub-regions conditioned on related words; and squeeze-and-excitation attention to capture non-linear interaction among channels. With spectral normalisation to stabilise training, our proposed CAGAN improves the state of the art on the IS and FID on the CUB dataset and the FID on the more challenging COCO dataset. Furthermore, we demonstrate that judging a model by a single evaluation metric can be misleading by developing an additional model adding local self-attention which scores a higher IS, outperforming the state of the art on the CUB dataset, but generates unrealistic images through feature repetition.
abstract_zh: 根据自然语言描述生成图像是一项具有挑战性的任务。先前的研究主要集中在通过研究空间注意力和/或文本注意力的使用来提高生成质量，从而忽略了通道之间的关系。在这项工作中，我们提出了组合注意力生成对抗网络（CAGAN）来根据文本描述生成逼真的图像。所提出的CAGAN利用两种注意力模型：单词注意力根据相关单词绘制不同的子区域；以及挤压和激发注意力来捕获通道之间的非线性交互。通过光谱归一化来稳定训练，我们提出的 CAGAN 改进了 CUB 数据集上的 IS 和 FID 以及更具挑战性的 COCO 数据集上的 FID 的最新技术。此外，我们还证明，通过开发一个添加局部自注意力的附加模型，通过单一评估指标来判断模型可能会产生误导，该模型得分更高，在 CUB 数据集上的表现优于现有技术，但通过特征重复生成不切实际的图像。

AI.tldr: 本文提出结合注意力机制的生成对抗网络（CAGAN），用于根据文本描述生成高质量的图像。
AI.motivation: 先前研究主要关注空间注意力和文本注意力，忽略了通道间的关联性，导致生成图像质量受限。
AI.method: CAGAN采用词注意力模型捕捉文本与图像区域的关系，并引入挤压激励注意力机制增强通道间非线性交互，结合谱归一化稳定训练。
AI.result: 在CUB数据集上改进了IS和FID指标，在更具挑战性的COCO数据集上提升了FID指标，并揭示了单一评估指标可能误导模型评价。
AI.conclusion: 结合多注意力机制能有效提升文本到图像生成质量，且需综合多指标评估模型性能。

search_text: CAGAN: Text-To-Image Generation with Combined Attention GANs CAGAN：结合注意力 GAN 的文本到图像生成 Generating images according to natural language descriptions is a challenging task. Prior research has mainly focused to enhance the quality of generation by investigating the use of spatial attention and/or textual attention thereby neglecting the relationship between channels. In this work, we propose the Combined Attention Generative Adversarial Network (CAGAN) to generate photo-realistic images according to textual descriptions. The proposed CAGAN utilises two attention models: word attention to draw different sub-regions conditioned on related words; and squeeze-and-excitation attention to capture non-linear interaction among channels. With spectral normalisation to stabilise training, our proposed CAGAN improves the state of the art on the IS and FID on the CUB dataset and the FID on the more challenging COCO dataset. Furthermore, we demonstrate that judging a model by a single evaluation metric can be misleading by developing an additional model adding local self-attention which scores a higher IS, outperforming the state of the art on the CUB dataset, but generates unrealistic images through feature repetition. 根据自然语言描述生成图像是一项具有挑战性的任务。先前的研究主要集中在通过研究空间注意力和/或文本注意力的使用来提高生成质量，从而忽略了通道之间的关系。在这项工作中，我们提出了组合注意力生成对抗网络（CAGAN）来根据文本描述生成逼真的图像。所提出的CAGAN利用两种注意力模型：单词注意力根据相关单词绘制不同的子区域；以及挤压和激发注意力来捕获通道之间的非线性交互。通过光谱归一化来稳定训练，我们提出的 CAGAN 改进了 CUB 数据集上的 IS 和 FID 以及更具挑战性的 COCO 数据集上的 FID 的最新技术。此外，我们还证明，通过开发一个添加局部自注意力的附加模型，通过单一评估指标来判断模型可能会产生误导，该模型得分更高，在 CUB 数据集上的表现优于现有技术，但通过特征重复生成不切实际的图像。 本文提出结合注意力机制的生成对抗网络（CAGAN），用于根据文本描述生成高质量的图像。 Henning Schulze,Dogucan Yaman,Alexander Waibel cs.CV

authors_text: Kerstin Bongard-Blanchy,Arianna Rossi,Salvador Rivas,Sophie Doublet,Vincent Koenig,Gabriele Lenzini
title: I am Definitely Manipulated, Even When I am Aware of it. It s Ridiculous! -- Dark Patterns from the End-User Perspective
title_zh: 我绝对是被操纵的，即使我意识到这一点。太荒谬了！ ——从最终用户角度看深色模式
comment: ACM DIS Conference on Designing interactive systems, June 28 - July 2, 2021, online. ACM, New York, NY, USA
comments: ACM DIS Conference on Designing interactive systems, June 28 - July 2, 2021, online. ACM, New York, NY, USA
abstract: Online services pervasively employ manipulative designs (i.e., dark patterns) to influence users to purchase goods and subscriptions, spend more time on-site, or mindlessly accept the harvesting of their personal data. To protect users from the lure of such designs, we asked: are users aware of the presence of dark patterns? If so, are they able to resist them? By surveying 406 individuals, we found that they are generally aware of the influence that manipulative designs can exert on their online behaviour. However, being aware does not equip users with the ability to oppose such influence. We further find that respondents, especially younger ones, often recognise the "darkness" of certain designs, but remain unsure of the actual harm they may suffer. Finally, we discuss a set of interventions (e.g., bright patterns, design frictions, training games, applications to expedite legal enforcement) in the light of our findings.
summary: Online services pervasively employ manipulative designs (i.e., dark patterns) to influence users to purchase goods and subscriptions, spend more time on-site, or mindlessly accept the harvesting of their personal data. To protect users from the lure of such designs, we asked: are users aware of the presence of dark patterns? If so, are they able to resist them? By surveying 406 individuals, we found that they are generally aware of the influence that manipulative designs can exert on their online behaviour. However, being aware does not equip users with the ability to oppose such influence. We further find that respondents, especially younger ones, often recognise the "darkness" of certain designs, but remain unsure of the actual harm they may suffer. Finally, we discuss a set of interventions (e.g., bright patterns, design frictions, training games, applications to expedite legal enforcement) in the light of our findings.
abstract_zh: 在线服务普遍采用操纵性设计（即黑暗模式）来影响用户购买商品和订阅、在现场花费更多时间或盲目地接受其个人数据的收集。为了保护用户免受此类设计的诱惑，我们问：用户是否意识到深色图案的存在？如果是的话，他们能够抵抗吗？通过对 406 人的调查，我们发现他们普遍意识到操纵性设计对其在线行为的影响。然而，意识到这一点并不能让用户有能力反对这种影响。我们进一步发现，受访者，尤其是年轻人，往往认识到某些设计的“黑暗”，但仍然不确定他们可能遭受的实际伤害。最后，我们根据我们的发现讨论了一系列干预措施（例如，明亮的模式、设计摩擦、训练游戏、加快法律执行的应用）。

AI.tldr: 研究用户对网络服务中操纵性设计（黑暗模式）的认知及抵抗能力
AI.motivation: 在线服务广泛使用黑暗模式影响用户行为，需了解用户是否能识别并抵抗这些设计
AI.method: 通过问卷调查406名用户，分析其对黑暗模式的认知与应对能力
AI.result: 用户普遍意识到黑暗模式的影响，但无法有效抵抗；年轻人虽能识别但不确定具体危害
AI.conclusion: 需通过设计干预、用户教育及法律手段提升用户对黑暗模式的抵抗力

authors_text: Jialin Yu,Laila Alrajhi,Anoushka Harit,Zhongtian Sun,Alexandra I. Cristea,Lei Shi
title: Exploring Bayesian Deep Learning for Urgent Instructor Intervention Need in MOOC Forums
title_zh: 探索贝叶斯深度学习以满足 MOOC 论坛中迫切的教师干预需求
abstract: Massive Open Online Courses (MOOCs) have become a popular choice for e-learning thanks to their great flexibility. However, due to large numbers of learners and their diverse backgrounds, it is taxing to offer real-time support. Learners may post their feelings of confusion and struggle in the respective MOOC forums, but with the large volume of posts and high workloads for MOOC instructors, it is unlikely that the instructors can identify all learners requiring intervention. This problem has been studied as a Natural Language Processing (NLP) problem recently, and is known to be challenging, due to the imbalance of the data and the complex nature of the task. In this paper, we explore for the first time Bayesian deep learning on learner-based text posts with two methods: Monte Carlo Dropout and Variational Inference, as a new solution to assessing the need of instructor interventions for a learner's post. We compare models based on our proposed methods with probabilistic modelling to its baseline non-Bayesian models under similar circumstances, for different cases of applying prediction. The results suggest that Bayesian deep learning offers a critical uncertainty measure that is not supplied by traditional neural networks. This adds more explainability, trust and robustness to AI, which is crucial in education-based applications. Additionally, it can achieve similar or better performance compared to non-probabilistic neural networks, as well as grant lower variance.
summary: Massive Open Online Courses (MOOCs) have become a popular choice for e-learning thanks to their great flexibility. However, due to large numbers of learners and their diverse backgrounds, it is taxing to offer real-time support. Learners may post their feelings of confusion and struggle in the respective MOOC forums, but with the large volume of posts and high workloads for MOOC instructors, it is unlikely that the instructors can identify all learners requiring intervention. This problem has been studied as a Natural Language Processing (NLP) problem recently, and is known to be challenging, due to the imbalance of the data and the complex nature of the task. In this paper, we explore for the first time Bayesian deep learning on learner-based text posts with two methods: Monte Carlo Dropout and Variational Inference, as a new solution to assessing the need of instructor interventions for a learner's post. We compare models based on our proposed methods with probabilistic modelling to its baseline non-Bayesian models under similar circumstances, for different cases of applying prediction. The results suggest that Bayesian deep learning offers a critical uncertainty measure that is not supplied by traditional neural networks. This adds more explainability, trust and robustness to AI, which is crucial in education-based applications. Additionally, it can achieve similar or better performance compared to non-probabilistic neural networks, as well as grant lower variance.
abstract_zh: 大规模开放在线课程（MOOC）因其极大的灵活性而成为电子学习的热门选择。然而，由于学习者数量众多且背景各异，提供实时支持非常繁重。学习者可以在各自的MOOC论坛上发表自己的困惑和挣扎的感受，但由于MOOC教师的帖子量大、工作量大，教师不可能识别出所有需要干预的学习者。这个问题最近被作为自然语言处理（NLP）问题进行研究，并且由于数据的不平衡和任务的复杂性而被认为具有挑战性。在本文中，我们首次使用两种方法探索基于学习者的文本帖子的贝叶斯深度学习：蒙特卡洛辍学和变分推理，作为评估教师干预学习者帖子需求的新解决方案。对于应用预测的不同情况，我们将基于我们提出的概率建模方法的模型与其相似情况下的基线非贝叶斯模型进行比较。结果表明，贝叶斯深度学习提供了传统神经网络无法提供的关键不确定性度量。这增加了人工智能的可解释性、信任度和稳健性，这对于基于教育的应用程序至关重要。此外，与非概率神经网络相比，它可以实现类似或更好的性能，并提供较低的方差。

AI.tldr: 本文探索使用贝叶斯深度学习方法（蒙特卡洛Dropout和变分推断）来评估MOOC论坛中学习者帖子是否需要教师紧急干预。
AI.motivation: MOOCs因学习者数量庞大且背景多样，导致教师难以实时识别需要干预的学习者，传统神经网络缺乏不确定性度量，难以满足教育场景对可解释性和鲁棒性的需求。
AI.method: 提出基于贝叶斯深度学习的两种方法（蒙特卡洛Dropout和变分推断），并与非概率神经网络模型进行对比实验，评估其在预测干预需求中的表现。
AI.result: 贝叶斯模型提供了传统网络缺失的不确定性度量，提升了AI的可解释性与鲁棒性，且在性能上与非概率模型相当或更优，方差更低。
AI.conclusion: 贝叶斯深度学习在教育场景中具有重要价值，能有效平衡干预需求预测的准确性与不确定性，为AI辅助教育提供可靠方案。

method: 提出基于贝叶斯深度学习的两种方法（蒙特卡洛Dropout和变分推断），并与非概率神经网络模型进行对比实验，评估其在预测干预需求中的表现。
result: 贝叶斯模型提供了传统网络缺失的不确定性度量，提升了AI的可解释性与鲁棒性，且在性能上与非概率模型相当或更优，方差更低。
conclusion: 贝叶斯深度学习在教育场景中具有重要价值，能有效平衡干预需求预测的准确性与不确定性，为AI辅助教育提供可靠方案。
search_text: Exploring Bayesian Deep Learning for Urgent Instructor Intervention Need in MOOC Forums 探索贝叶斯深度学习以满足 MOOC 论坛中迫切的教师干预需求 Massive Open Online Courses (MOOCs) have become a popular choice for e-learning thanks to their great flexibility. However, due to large numbers of learners and their diverse backgrounds, it is taxing to offer real-time support. Learners may post their feelings of confusion and struggle in the respective MOOC forums, but with the large volume of posts and high workloads for MOOC instructors, it is unlikely that the instructors can identify all learners requiring intervention. This problem has been studied as a Natural Language Processing (NLP) problem recently, and is known to be challenging, due to the imbalance of the data and the complex nature of the task. In this paper, we explore for the first time Bayesian deep learning on learner-based text posts with two methods: Monte Carlo Dropout and Variational Inference, as a new solution to assessing the need of instructor interventions for a learner's post. We compare models based on our proposed methods with probabilistic modelling to its baseline non-Bayesian models under similar circumstances, for different cases of applying prediction. The results suggest that Bayesian deep learning offers a critical uncertainty measure that is not supplied by traditional neural networks. This adds more explainability, trust and robustness to AI, which is crucial in education-based applications. Additionally, it can achieve similar or better performance compared to non-probabilistic neural networks, as well as grant lower variance. 大规模开放在线课程（MOOC）因其极大的灵活性而成为电子学习的热门选择。然而，由于学习者数量众多且背景各异，提供实时支持非常繁重。学习者可以在各自的MOOC论坛上发表自己的困惑和挣扎的感受，但由于MOOC教师的帖子量大、工作量大，教师不可能识别出所有需要干预的学习者。这个问题最近被作为自然语言处理（NLP）问题进行研究，并且由于数据的不平衡和任务的复杂性而被认为具有挑战性。在本文中，我们首次使用两种方法探索基于学习者的文本帖子的贝叶斯深度学习：蒙特卡洛辍学和变分推理，作为评估教师干预学习者帖子需求的新解决方案。对于应用预测的不同情况，我们将基于我们提出的概率建模方法的模型与其相似情况下的基线非贝叶斯模型进行比较。结果表明，贝叶斯深度学习提供了传统神经网络无法提供的关键不确定性度量。这增加了人工智能的可解释性、信任度和稳健性，这对于基于教育的应用程序至关重要。此外，与非概率神经网络相比，它可以实现类似或更好的性能，并提供较低的方差。 本文探索使用贝叶斯深度学习方法（蒙特卡洛Dropout和变分推断）来评估MOOC论坛中学习者帖子是否需要教师紧急干预。 Jialin Yu,Laila Alrajhi,Anoushka Harit,Zhongtian Sun,Alexandra I. Cristea,Lei Shi cs.CL,cs.AI

title: CompOFA: Compound Once-For-All Networks for Faster Multi-Platform Deployment
title_zh: CompOFA：复合一劳永逸的网络，可实现更快的多平台部署
comment: Published as a conference paper at ICLR 2021
comments: Published as a conference paper at ICLR 2021
abstract: The emergence of CNNs in mainstream deployment has necessitated methods to design and train efficient architectures tailored to maximize the accuracy under diverse hardware & latency constraints. To scale these resource-intensive tasks with an increasing number of deployment targets, Once-For-All (OFA) proposed an approach to jointly train several models at once with a constant training cost. However, this cost remains as high as 40-50 GPU days and also suffers from a combinatorial explosion of sub-optimal model configurations. We seek to reduce this search space -- and hence the training budget -- by constraining search to models close to the accuracy-latency Pareto frontier. We incorporate insights of compound relationships between model dimensions to build CompOFA, a design space smaller by several orders of magnitude. Through experiments on ImageNet, we demonstrate that even with simple heuristics we can achieve a 2x reduction in training time and 216x speedup in model search/extraction time compared to the state of the art, without loss of Pareto optimality! We also show that this smaller design space is dense enough to support equally accurate models for a similar diversity of hardware and latency targets, while also reducing the complexity of the training and subsequent extraction algorithms.
summary: The emergence of CNNs in mainstream deployment has necessitated methods to design and train efficient architectures tailored to maximize the accuracy under diverse hardware & latency constraints. To scale these resource-intensive tasks with an increasing number of deployment targets, Once-For-All (OFA) proposed an approach to jointly train several models at once with a constant training cost. However, this cost remains as high as 40-50 GPU days and also suffers from a combinatorial explosion of sub-optimal model configurations. We seek to reduce this search space -- and hence the training budget -- by constraining search to models close to the accuracy-latency Pareto frontier. We incorporate insights of compound relationships between model dimensions to build CompOFA, a design space smaller by several orders of magnitude. Through experiments on ImageNet, we demonstrate that even with simple heuristics we can achieve a 2x reduction in training time and 216x speedup in model search/extraction time compared to the state of the art, without loss of Pareto optimality! We also show that this smaller design space is dense enough to support equally accurate models for a similar diversity of hardware and latency targets, while also reducing the complexity of the training and subsequent extraction algorithms.
abstract_zh: CNN 在主流部署中的出现需要设计和训练高效架构的方法，以在不同的硬件和延迟限制下最大限度地提高准确性。为了随着部署目标数量的增加来扩展这些资源密集型任务，OFA（Once-For-All）提出了一种以恒定的训练成本同时联合训练多个模型的方法。然而，这一成本仍然高达 40-50 个 GPU 天，并且还受到次优模型配置组合爆炸的影响。我们寻求通过将搜索限制在接近准确性-延迟帕累托边界的模型来减少搜索空间，从而减少训练预算。我们结合模型维度之间复合关系的见解来构建 CompOFA，这是一个小了几个数量级的设计空间。通过 ImageNet 上的实验，我们证明，即使使用简单的启发式方法，与现有技术相比，我们也可以将训练时间缩短 2 倍，将模型搜索/提取时间加速 216 倍，而且不会损失帕累托最优性！我们还表明，这个较小的设计空间足够密集，可以支持类似硬件多样性和延迟目标的同样准确的模型，同时还降低了训练和后续提取算法的复杂性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CompOFA方法，通过缩小设计空间来加速多平台部署的神经网络训练与模型搜索。
AI.motivation: 现有OFA方法训练成本高且存在子优模型配置的组合爆炸问题，难以高效适配多样化硬件与延迟约束。
AI.method: 基于精度-延迟帕累托前沿约束，结合模型维度复合关系，构建更小的搜索空间设计CompOFA。
AI.result: 在ImageNet实验中，训练时间减少2倍，模型搜索/提取时间提速216倍，且保持帕累托最优性与硬件适配多样性。
AI.conclusion: CompOFA通过压缩设计空间显著降低训练与搜索成本，同时保障模型性能，适用于多平台部署场景。

title: Efficient Formulation of Collision Avoidance Constraints in Optimization Based Trajectory Planning and Control
title_zh: 基于优化的轨迹规划和控制中防撞约束的有效制定
comment: Accepted for presentation at and publication in the proceedings of the 2021 IEEE Conference on Control Technology and Applications (CCTA)
comments: Accepted for presentation at and publication in the proceedings of the 2021 IEEE Conference on Control Technology and Applications (CCTA)
abstract: To be applicable to real world scenarios trajectory planning schemes for mobile autonomous systems must be able to efficiently deal with obstacles in the area of operation. In the context of optimization based trajectory planning and control a number of different approaches to formulate collision avoidance constraints can be found in the literature. Here the contribution of the present work is twofold. First, the most popular methods to represent obstacles are summarized, namely the simple ellipsoidal representation, the constructive solid geometry (CSG) method as well as a direct and an indirect implementation of a signed distance based approach. The formulations are characterized with respect to the impact on the complexity of the optimization problem, as well as the ability to meet different problem requirements. Second, this work presents a novel variant of the CSG method to describe collision avoidance constraints. It is highly efficient due to a very low number of nonlinear inequality constraints required for a given number of obstacles and sample points and in contrast to the original CSG formulation allows to consider the controlled system's shape. The good performance of the proposed formulation is demonstrated by a comparison to the previously mentioned alternatives. To this end optimal trajectory planning for marine surface vessels formulated as a nonlinear programming problem is used as a benchmark example where the scenario is designed based on the maritime test field in Kiel, Germany.

In the context of optimization based trajectory planning and control a number of different approaches to formulate collision avoidance constraints can be found in the literature. Here the contribution of the present work is twofold. First, the most popular methods to represent obstacles are summarized, namely the simple ellipsoidal representation, the constructive solid geometry (CSG) method as well as a direct and an indirect implementation of a signed distance based approach. The formulations are characterized with respect to the impact on the complexity of the optimization problem, as well as the ability to meet different problem requirements. Second, this work presents a novel variant of the CSG method to describe collision avoidance constraints. It is highly efficient due to a very low number of nonlinear inequality constraints required for a given number of obstacles and sample points and in contrast to the original CSG formulation allows to consider the controlled system's shape. The good performance of the proposed formulation is demonstrated by a comparison to the previously mentioned alternatives. To this end optimal trajectory planning for marine surface vessels formulated as a nonlinear programming problem is used as a benchmark example where the scenario is designed based on the maritime test field in Kiel, Germany.
abstract_zh: 为了适用于现实场景，移动自主系统的轨迹规划方案必须能够有效地处理操作区域中的障碍物。在基于优化的轨迹规划和控制的背景下，可以在文献中找到许多不同的方法来制定防撞约束。当前工作的贡献是双重的。首先，总结了最流行的表示障碍物的方法，即简单椭圆体表示、构造立体几何（CSG）方法以及基于符号距离的方法的直接和间接实现。这些公式的特点是对优化问题复杂性的影响以及满足不同问题要求的能力。其次，这项工作提出了 CSG 方法的一种新颖变体来描述防撞约束。由于给定数量的障碍物和样本点所需的非线性不等式约束数量非常少，因此它非常高效，并且与原始 CSG 公式相比，它允许考虑受控系统的形状。通过与前面提到的替代方案的比较证明了所提出的配方的良好性能。为此，将被表述为非线性规划问题的海洋水面舰艇最优轨迹规划用作基准示例，其中场景是根据德国基尔的海上试验场设计的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效的碰撞避免约束公式，用于优化轨迹规划与控制，以应对移动自主系统在真实环境中的障碍物问题。
AI.motivation: 现实场景中的轨迹规划需高效处理障碍物，而现有方法在复杂度与适应性上存在不足，需更优解决方案。
AI.method: 总结椭球体、CSG及符号距离法等主流障碍物表示方法，并提出一种改进的CSG方法，减少非线性约束数量且考虑系统形状。
AI.result: 新方法在海上船舶轨迹规划的基准测试中表现出更优性能，验证了其高效性与实用性。
AI.conclusion: 改进的CSG方法在约束效率与系统适应性上优于现有方法，适用于复杂动态环境的轨迹规划。

To this end optimal trajectory planning for marine surface vessels formulated as a nonlinear programming problem is used as a benchmark example where the scenario is designed based on the maritime test field in Kiel, Germany. 为了适用于现实场景，移动自主系统的轨迹规划方案必须能够有效地处理操作区域中的障碍物。在基于优化的轨迹规划和控制的背景下，可以在文献中找到许多不同的方法来制定防撞约束。当前工作的贡献是双重的。首先，总结了最流行的表示障碍物的方法，即简单椭圆体表示、构造立体几何（CSG）方法以及基于符号距离的方法的直接和间接实现。这些公式的特点是对优化问题复杂性的影响以及满足不同问题要求的能力。其次，这项工作提出了 CSG 方法的一种新颖变体来描述防撞约束。由于给定数量的障碍物和样本点所需的非线性不等式约束数量非常少，因此它非常高效，并且与原始 CSG 公式相比，它允许考虑受控系统的形状。通过与前面提到的替代方案的比较证明了所提出的配方的良好性能。为此，将被表述为非线性规划问题的海洋水面舰艇最优轨迹规划用作基准示例，其中场景是根据德国基尔的海上试验场设计的。 本文提出了一种高效的碰撞避免约束公式，用于优化轨迹规划与控制，以应对移动自主系统在真实环境中的障碍物问题。 Max Lutz,Thomas Meurer math.OC,cs.RO

title: Analyzing Green View Index and Green View Index best path using Google Street View and deep learning
title_zh: 使用谷歌街景和深度学习分析绿景指数和绿景指数最佳路径
comment: 14 pages, 14 figures. Accepted by the Journal of Computational Design and Engineering. DOI: https://doi.org/10.1093/jcde/qwac102
comments: 14 pages, 14 figures. Accepted by the Journal of Computational Design and Engineering. DOI: https://doi.org/10.1093/jcde/qwac102
abstract: As an important part of urban landscape research, analyzing and studying street-level greenery can increase the understanding of a city's greenery, contributing to better urban living environment planning and design. Planning the best path of urban greenery is a means to effectively maximize the use of urban greenery, which plays a positive role in the physical and mental health of urban residents and the path planning of visitors. In this paper, we used Google Street View (GSV) to obtain street view images of Osaka City. The semantic segmentation model is adopted to segment the street view images and analyze the Green View Index (GVI) of Osaka City. Based on the GVI, we take advantage of the adjacency matrix and Floyd-Warshall Algorithm to calculate Green View Index best path, solving the limitations of ArcGIS software. Our analysis not only allows the calculation of specific routes for the GVI best paths but also realizes the visualization and integration of neighborhood urban greenery. By summarizing all the data, we can conduct an intuitive feeling and objective analysis of the street-level greenery in the research area. Based on this, such as urban residents and visitors can maximize the available natural resources for a better life. The dataset and code are available at https://github.com/Jackieam/GVI-Best-Path.

abstract_zh: 作为城市景观研究的重要组成部分，对街道绿化进行分析和研究可以增加对城市绿化的认识，有助于更好的城市人居环境规划和设计。规划城市绿化最佳路径是有效最大化利用城市绿化的手段，对城市居民的身心健康和游客的路径规划都具有积极的作用。在本文中，我们使用谷歌街景（GSV）来获取大阪市的街景图像。采用语义分割模型对街景图像进行分割并分析大阪市的绿景指数（GVI）。基于GVI，我们利用邻接矩阵和Floyd-Warshall算法计算绿景指数最佳路径，解决了ArcGIS软件的局限性。我们的分析不仅可以计算出GVI最佳路径的具体路线，还可以实现邻里城市绿化的可视化和集成。通过汇总所有数据，我们可以对研究区街道绿化情况进行直观感受和客观分析。基于此，城市居民和游客可以最大限度地利用可用的自然资源来过上更好的生活。数据集和代码可在 https://github.com/Jackieam/GVI-Best-Path 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文利用Google街景视图和深度学习分析大阪市的绿色视野指数（GVI），并计算最佳绿色路径。
AI.motivation: 通过分析城市街道级绿化情况，优化城市绿地利用，提升居民身心健康及访客路径规划效率。
AI.method: 使用Google街景视图获取图像，通过语义分割模型计算GVI，结合邻接矩阵与Floyd-Warshall算法确定最佳路径，克服ArcGIS软件限制。
AI.result: 实现大阪市GVI最佳路径的具体路线计算，完成社区绿地可视化与数据整合，提供直观的街道级绿化分析。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为居民和访客最大化利用自然资源提供支持，数据集和代码已公开，助力城市绿化规划优化。

title: Good Artists Copy, Great Artists Steal: Model Extraction Attacks Against Image Translation Models
title_zh: 优秀艺术家复制，伟大艺术家窃取：针对图像翻译模型的模型提取攻击
comment: 19 pages
comments: 19 pages
abstract: Machine learning models are typically made available to potential client users via inference APIs. Model extraction attacks occur when a malicious client uses information gleaned from queries to the inference API of a victim model $F_V$ to build a surrogate model $F_A$ with comparable functionality. Recent research has shown successful model extraction of image classification, and natural language processing models. In this paper, we show the first model extraction attack against real-world generative adversarial network (GAN) image translation models. We present a framework for conducting such attacks, and show that an adversary can successfully extract functional surrogate models by querying $F_V$ using data from the same domain as the training data for $F_V$. The adversary need not know $F_V$'s architecture or any other information about it beyond its intended task. We evaluate the effectiveness of our attacks using three different instances of two popular categories of image translation: (1) Selfie-to-Anime and (2) Monet-to-Photo (image style transfer), and (3) Super-Resolution (super resolution). Using standard performance metrics for GANs, we show that our attacks are effective. Furthermore, we conducted a large scale (125 participants) user study on Selfie-to-Anime and Monet-to-Photo to show that human perception of the images produced by $F_V$ and $F_A$ can be considered equivalent, within an equivalence bound of Cohen's d = 0.3. Finally, we show that existing defenses against model extraction attacks (watermarking, adversarial examples, poisoning) do not extend to image translation models.

Model extraction attacks occur when a malicious client uses information gleaned from queries to the inference API of a victim model $F_V$ to build a surrogate model $F_A$ with comparable functionality. Recent research has shown successful model extraction of image classification, and natural language processing models. In this paper, we show the first model extraction attack against real-world generative adversarial network (GAN) image translation models. We present a framework for conducting such attacks, and show that an adversary can successfully extract functional surrogate models by querying $F_V$ using data from the same domain as the training data for $F_V$. The adversary need not know $F_V$'s architecture or any other information about it beyond its intended task. We evaluate the effectiveness of our attacks using three different instances of two popular categories of image translation: (1) Selfie-to-Anime and (2) Monet-to-Photo (image style transfer), and (3) Super-Resolution (super resolution). Using standard performance metrics for GANs, we show that our attacks are effective. Furthermore, we conducted a large scale (125 participants) user study on Selfie-to-Anime and Monet-to-Photo to show that human perception of the images produced by $F_V$ and $F_A$ can be considered equivalent, within an equivalence bound of Cohen's d = 0.3. Finally, we show that existing defenses against model extraction attacks (watermarking, adversarial examples, poisoning) do not extend to image translation models.
abstract_zh: 机器学习模型通常通过推理 API 提供给潜在客户用户。当恶意客户端使用从受害者模型 $F_V$ 的推理 API 查询中收集的信息来构建具有类似功能的代理模型 $F_A$ 时，就会发生模型提取攻击。最近的研究表明图像分类和自然语言处理模型的模型提取是成功的。在本文中，我们展示了针对现实世界生成对抗网络（GAN）图像翻译模型的第一个模型提取攻击。我们提出了一个进行此类攻击的框架，并表明对手可以通过使用来自与 $F_V$ 训练数据相同域的数据查询 $F_V$ 来成功提取功能代理模型。对手不需要知道 $F_V$ 的架构或超出其预期任务的任何其他信息。我们使用两种流行图像转换类别的三个不同实例来评估攻击的有效性：（1）自拍到动画和（2）莫奈到照片（图像风格转换）和（3）超分辨率（超分辨率）。使用 GAN 的标准性能指标，我们证明我们的攻击是有效的。此外，我们对 Selfie-to-Anime 和 Monet-to-Photo 进行了大规模（125 名参与者）用户研究，以表明人类对 $F_V$ 和 $F_A$ 生成的图像的感知可以被认为是等效的，在科恩的 d = 0.3 的等效范围内。最后，我们表明现有的针对模型提取攻击（水印、对抗性示例、中毒）的防御措施并不能扩展到图像翻译模型。

AI.tldr: 本文首次针对真实世界的生成对抗网络（GAN）图像翻译模型提出了模型提取攻击方法，展示了通过查询目标模型API构建功能相当的替代模型的可能性。
AI.motivation: 尽管现有研究已针对图像分类和自然语言处理模型成功实施模型提取攻击，但图像翻译模型（如GAN）的安全性尚未被充分验证，亟需探索其潜在攻击面。
AI.method: 攻击者通过使用与目标模型训练数据同领域的输入数据查询目标模型API，构建功能相似的替代模型。无需知晓目标模型架构，仅需其任务信息。通过三种图像翻译任务（自拍转动漫、莫奈画作转照片、超分辨率）验证攻击有效性，并进行大规模用户感知实验。
AI.result: 攻击模型在标准GAN指标下表现有效，用户研究显示攻击生成图像与目标模型输出在人类感知上等效（Cohen's d=0.3）。现有防御手段（水印、对抗样本、投毒）对图像翻译模型无效。
AI.conclusion: 图像翻译模型存在严重的模型提取攻击风险，现有防御机制无法有效应对，需重新设计针对生成模型的保护方案。

Finally, we show that existing defenses against model extraction attacks (watermarking, adversarial examples, poisoning) do not extend to image translation models. 机器学习模型通常通过推理 API 提供给潜在客户用户。当恶意客户端使用从受害者模型 $F_V$ 的推理 API 查询中收集的信息来构建具有类似功能的代理模型 $F_A$ 时，就会发生模型提取攻击。最近的研究表明图像分类和自然语言处理模型的模型提取是成功的。在本文中，我们展示了针对现实世界生成对抗网络（GAN）图像翻译模型的第一个模型提取攻击。我们提出了一个进行此类攻击的框架，并表明对手可以通过使用来自与 $F_V$ 训练数据相同域的数据查询 $F_V$ 来成功提取功能代理模型。对手不需要知道 $F_V$ 的架构或超出其预期任务的任何其他信息。我们使用两种流行图像转换类别的三个不同实例来评估攻击的有效性：（1）自拍到动画和（2）莫奈到照片（图像风格转换）和（3）超分辨率（超分辨率）。使用 GAN 的标准性能指标，我们证明我们的攻击是有效的。此外，我们对 Selfie-to-Anime 和 Monet-to-Photo 进行了大规模（125 名参与者）用户研究，以表明人类对 $F_V$ 和 $F_A$ 生成的图像的感知可以被认为是等效的，在科恩的 d = 0.3 的等效范围内。最后，我们表明现有的针对模型提取攻击（水印、对抗性示例、中毒）的防御措施并不能扩展到图像翻译模型。 本文首次针对真实世界的生成对抗网络（GAN）图像翻译模型提出了模型提取攻击方法，展示了通过查询目标模型API构建功能相当的替代模型的可能性。 Sebastian Szyller,Vasisht Duddu,Tommi Gröndahl,N. Asokan cs.LG,cs.CR,cs.CV

title: An Algorithm to Effect Prompt Termination of Myopic Local Search on Kauffman-s NK Landscape
title_zh: 一种快速终止Kauffman-s NK景观近视局部搜索的算法
comment: 13 Pages, 10 Figures, 1 Table
comments: 13 Pages, 10 Figures, 1 Table
abstract: In Kauffman-s NK model, myopic local search involves flipping one randomly-chosen bit of an N-bit decision string in every time step and accepting the new configuration if that has higher fitness. One issue is that, this algorithm consumes the full extent of computational resources allocated - given by the number of alternative configurations inspected - even though search is expected to terminate the moment there are no neighbors having higher fitness. Otherwise, the algorithm must compute the fitness of all N neighbors in every time step, consuming a high amount of resources. In order to get around this problem, I describe an algorithm that allows search to logically terminate relatively early, without having to evaluate fitness of all N neighbors at every time step. I further suggest that when the efficacy of two algorithms need to be compared head to head, imposing a common limit on the number of alternatives evaluated - metering - provides the necessary level field.
summary: In Kauffman-s NK model, myopic local search involves flipping one randomly-chosen bit of an N-bit decision string in every time step and accepting the new configuration if that has higher fitness. One issue is that, this algorithm consumes the full extent of computational resources allocated - given by the number of alternative configurations inspected - even though search is expected to terminate the moment there are no neighbors having higher fitness. Otherwise, the algorithm must compute the fitness of all N neighbors in every time step, consuming a high amount of resources. In order to get around this problem, I describe an algorithm that allows search to logically terminate relatively early, without having to evaluate fitness of all N neighbors at every time step. I further suggest that when the efficacy of two algorithms need to be compared head to head, imposing a common limit on the number of alternatives evaluated - metering - provides the necessary level field.
abstract_zh: 在 Kauffman-s NK 模型中，短视局部搜索涉及在每个时间步中翻转 N 位决策字符串中随机选择的一位，并接受新配置（如果新配置具有更高的适应度）。一个问题是，该算法消耗了分配的全部计算资源（由检查的替代配置的数量给出），即使搜索预计会在没有具有更高适应度的邻居时终止。否则，算法必须在每个时间步中计算所有 N 个邻居的适应度，从而消耗大量资源。为了解决这个问题，我描述了一种算法，该算法允许搜索在逻辑上相对较早地终止，而不必在每个时间步评估所有 N 个邻居的适应度。我进一步建议，当需要对两种算法的功效进行正面比较时，对评估的替代方案数量施加共同限制 - 计量 - 提供必要的水平场。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种算法，用于在Kauffman-NK景观中实现近视局部搜索的快速终止。
AI.motivation: 现有近视局部搜索算法在搜索到局部最优解时仍会消耗全部计算资源，因需逐一检查所有邻居配置的适应度。
AI.method: 设计一种无需每步检查所有N个邻居即可逻辑终止搜索的算法，并引入统一的评估次数限制以公平比较算法效能。
AI.result: 新算法能显著减少不必要的适应度计算，实现早期终止，同时保持搜索有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法优化了局部搜索的资源消耗，为算法比较提供了标准化评估框架。
