title: PatchGuard++: Efficient Provable Attack Detection against Adversarial Patches
title_zh: PatchGuard++：针对对抗性补丁的有效可证明攻击检测
comment: ICLR 2021 Workshop on Security and Safety in Machine Learning Systems
comments: ICLR 2021 Workshop on Security and Safety in Machine Learning Systems
abstract: An adversarial patch can arbitrarily manipulate image pixels within a restricted region to induce model misclassification. The threat of this localized attack has gained significant attention because the adversary can mount a physically-realizable attack by attaching patches to the victim object. Recent provably robust defenses generally follow the PatchGuard framework by using CNNs with small receptive fields and secure feature aggregation for robust model predictions. In this paper, we extend PatchGuard to PatchGuard++ for provably detecting the adversarial patch attack to boost both provable robust accuracy and clean accuracy. In PatchGuard++, we first use a CNN with small receptive fields for feature extraction so that the number of features corrupted by the adversarial patch is bounded. Next, we apply masks in the feature space and evaluate predictions on all possible masked feature maps. Finally, we extract a pattern from all masked predictions to catch the adversarial patch attack. We evaluate PatchGuard++ on ImageNette (a 10-class subset of ImageNet), ImageNet, and CIFAR-10 and demonstrate that PatchGuard++ significantly improves the provable robustness and clean performance.
summary: An adversarial patch can arbitrarily manipulate image pixels within a restricted region to induce model misclassification. The threat of this localized attack has gained significant attention because the adversary can mount a physically-realizable attack by attaching patches to the victim object. Recent provably robust defenses generally follow the PatchGuard framework by using CNNs with small receptive fields and secure feature aggregation for robust model predictions. In this paper, we extend PatchGuard to PatchGuard++ for provably detecting the adversarial patch attack to boost both provable robust accuracy and clean accuracy. In PatchGuard++, we first use a CNN with small receptive fields for feature extraction so that the number of features corrupted by the adversarial patch is bounded. Next, we apply masks in the feature space and evaluate predictions on all possible masked feature maps. Finally, we extract a pattern from all masked predictions to catch the adversarial patch attack. We evaluate PatchGuard++ on ImageNette (a 10-class subset of ImageNet), ImageNet, and CIFAR-10 and demonstrate that PatchGuard++ significantly improves the provable robustness and clean performance.
abstract_zh: 对抗性补丁可以任意操纵受限区域内的图像像素以引起模型错误分类。这种局部攻击的威胁引起了人们的广泛关注，因为攻击者可以通过向受害者对象附加补丁来发起物理上可实现的攻击。最近经过证明的稳健防御通常遵循 PatchGuard 框架，使用具有小感受野的 CNN 和安全特征聚合来实现稳健的模型预测。在本文中，我们将 PatchGuard 扩展到 PatchGuard++，以可证明地检测对抗性补丁攻击，从而提高可证明的稳健准确性和干净准确性。在 PatchGuard++ 中，我们首先使用具有小感受野的 CNN 进行特征提取，以便对抗性补丁损坏的特征数量受到限制。接下来，我们在特征空间中应用掩模并评估所有可能的掩模特征图的预测。最后，我们从所有屏蔽预测中提取模式以捕获对抗性补丁攻击。我们在 ImageNette（ImageNet 的 10 类子集）、ImageNet 和 CIFAR-10 上评​​估 PatchGuard++，并证明 PatchGuard++ 显着提高了可证明的鲁棒性和干净性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PatchGuard++方法，通过改进特征提取和掩码策略，提升对抗补丁攻击的可证明鲁棒性及模型清洁准确率。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗补丁防御方法（如PatchGuard）在鲁棒性与清洁准确率间存在权衡，需设计更高效的检测机制以兼顾两者。
AI.method: 采用小感受野CNN提取特征，限制对抗补丁影响范围；通过特征空间掩码生成多版本特征图，分析预测模式以检测攻击。
AI.result: 在ImageNette、ImageNet和CIFAR-10数据集上显著提升可证明鲁棒性及清洁准确率，优于现有防御方法。
AI.conclusion: PatchGuard++通过特征掩码与模式分析有效检测对抗补丁，在保持高清洁准确率的同时增强模型鲁棒性。

title: Vacuum-formed 3D printed electronics: fabrication of thin, rigid and free-form interactive surfaces
title_zh: 真空成型 3D 打印电子产品：制造薄型、刚性和自由形状的交互式表面
comment: 9 pages, 14 figures
comments: 9 pages, 14 figures
abstract: Vacuum-forming is a common manufacturing technique for constructing thin plastic shell products by pressing heated plastic sheets onto a mold using atmospheric pressure. Vacuum-forming is ubiquitous in packaging and casing products in industry spanning fast moving consumer goods to connected devices. Integrating advanced functionality, which may include sensing, computation and communication, within thin structures is desirable for various next-generation interactive devices. Hybrid additive manufacturing techniques like thermoforming are becoming popular for prototyping freeform electronics given its design flexibility, speed and cost-effectiveness. In this paper, we present a new hybrid method for constructing thin, rigid and free-form interconnected surfaces via fused deposition modelling (FDM) 3D printing and vacuum-forming. While 3D printing a mold for vacuum-forming has been explored by many, utilising 3D printing to construct sheet materials has remains unexplored. 3D printing the sheet material allows embedding conductive traces within thin layers of the substrate, which can be vacuum-formed but remain conductive and insulated. We characterise the behaviour of the vacuum-formed 3D printed sheet, analyse the electrical performance of 3D printed traces after vacuum-forming, and showcase a range of examples constructed using the technique. We demonstrate a new design interface specifically for designing conformal interconnects, which allows designers to draw conductive patterns in 3D and export pre-distorted sheet models ready to be 3D printed.

We characterise the behaviour of the vacuum-formed 3D printed sheet, analyse the electrical performance of 3D printed traces after vacuum-forming, and showcase a range of examples constructed using the technique. We demonstrate a new design interface specifically for designing conformal interconnects, which allows designers to draw conductive patterns in 3D and export pre-distorted sheet models ready to be 3D printed.
abstract_zh: 真空成型是一种常见的制造技术，通过利用大气压将加热的塑料片压到模具上来构造薄塑料壳产品。真空成型在快速消费品和互联设备等行业的包装和外壳产品中无处不在。对于各种下一代交互设备来说，将先进的功能（可能包括传感、计算和通信）集成在薄结构中是理想的。鉴于其设计灵活性、速度和成本效益，热成型等混合增材制造技术在自由形状电子产品原型制作中越来越受欢迎。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的混合方法，通过熔融沉积建模 (FDM) 3D 打印和真空成型来构造薄的、刚性的和自由形状的互连表面。虽然许多人已经探索了 3D 打印真空成型模具，但利用 3D 打印来构建片材仍然尚未探索。 3D 打印片材允许将导电迹线嵌入基板的薄层内，该基板可以真空成型，但仍保持导电和绝缘。我们表征了真空成型 3D 打印板材的行为，分析了真空成型后 3D 打印迹线的电气性能，并展示了一系列使用该技术构建的示例。我们展示了一个专门用于设计共形互连的新设计界面，它允许设计人员以 3D 形式绘制导电图案并导出准备进行 3D 打印的预变形板材模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合熔融沉积成型（FDM）3D打印与真空成型的混合方法，用于制造薄型、刚性且自由曲面的互联电子表面。
AI.motivation: 为满足下一代交互设备对集成传感、计算和通信功能的薄型结构需求，传统真空成型与3D打印技术需进一步融合以提升设计灵活性与制造效率。
AI.method: 通过FDM 3D打印制造可真空成型的薄层基板，在其中嵌入导电线路，结合真空成型工艺实现曲面结构，并开发专用设计界面支持3D导电图案的预变形建模。
AI.result: 验证了真空成型后3D打印导线的导电性与绝缘性，展示了多种应用实例，并提供了可直接3D打印的预变形设计模型。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为柔性电子器件的快速原型设计提供了新思路，实现了复杂曲面结构与功能电路的高效一体化制造。

search_text: Vacuum-formed 3D printed electronics: fabrication of thin, rigid and free-form interactive surfaces 真空成型 3D 打印电子产品：制造薄型、刚性和自由形状的交互式表面 Vacuum-forming is a common manufacturing technique for constructing thin plastic shell products by pressing heated plastic sheets onto a mold using atmospheric pressure. Vacuum-forming is ubiquitous in packaging and casing products in industry spanning fast moving consumer goods to connected devices. Integrating advanced functionality, which may include sensing, computation and communication, within thin structures is desirable for various next-generation interactive devices. Hybrid additive manufacturing techniques like thermoforming are becoming popular for prototyping freeform electronics given its design flexibility, speed and cost-effectiveness. In this paper, we present a new hybrid method for constructing thin, rigid and free-form interconnected surfaces via fused deposition modelling (FDM) 3D printing and vacuum-forming. While 3D printing a mold for vacuum-forming has been explored by many, utilising 3D printing to construct sheet materials has remains unexplored. 3D printing the sheet material allows embedding conductive traces within thin layers of the substrate, which can be vacuum-formed but remain conductive and insulated. We characterise the behaviour of the vacuum-formed 3D printed sheet, analyse the electrical performance of 3D printed traces after vacuum-forming, and showcase a range of examples constructed using the technique. We demonstrate a new design interface specifically for designing conformal interconnects, which allows designers to draw conductive patterns in 3D and export pre-distorted sheet models ready to be 3D printed. 真空成型是一种常见的制造技术，通过利用大气压将加热的塑料片压到模具上来构造薄塑料壳产品。真空成型在快速消费品和互联设备等行业的包装和外壳产品中无处不在。对于各种下一代交互设备来说，将先进的功能（可能包括传感、计算和通信）集成在薄结构中是理想的。鉴于其设计灵活性、速度和成本效益，热成型等混合增材制造技术在自由形状电子产品原型制作中越来越受欢迎。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的混合方法，通过熔融沉积建模 (FDM) 3D 打印和真空成型来构造薄的、刚性的和自由形状的互连表面。虽然许多人已经探索了 3D 打印真空成型模具，但利用 3D 打印来构建片材仍然尚未探索。 3D 打印片材允许将导电迹线嵌入基板的薄层内，该基板可以真空成型，但仍保持导电和绝缘。我们表征了真空成型 3D 打印板材的行为，分析了真空成型后 3D 打印迹线的电气性能，并展示了一系列使用该技术构建的示例。我们展示了一个专门用于设计共形互连的新设计界面，它允许设计人员以 3D 形式绘制导电图案并导出准备进行 3D 打印的预变形板材模型。 本文提出一种结合熔融沉积成型（FDM）3D打印与真空成型的混合方法，用于制造薄型、刚性且自由曲面的互联电子表面。 Freddie Hong,Luca Tendera,Connor Myant,David Boyle cs.HC

title: Understanding and Accelerating EM Algorithm's Convergence by Fair Competition Principle and Rate-Verisimilitude Function
title_zh: 通过公平竞争原则和速率拟真函数理解并加速EM算法的收敛
comment: 31 pages,12 figures. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2007.12845
comments: 31 pages,12 figures. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2007.12845
abstract: Why can the Expectation-Maximization (EM) algorithm for mixture models converge? Why can different initial parameters cause various convergence difficulties? The Q-L synchronization theory explains that the observed data log-likelihood L and the complete data log-likelihood Q are positively correlated; we can achieve maximum L by maximizing Q. According to this theory, the Deterministic Annealing EM (DAEM) algorithm's authors make great efforts to eliminate locally maximal Q for avoiding L's local convergence. However, this paper proves that in some cases, Q may and should decrease for L to increase; slow or local convergence exists only because of small samples and unfair competition. This paper uses marriage competition to explain different convergence difficulties and proposes the Fair Competition Principle (FCP) with an initialization map for improving initializations. It uses the rate-verisimilitude function, extended from the rate-distortion function, to explain the convergence of the EM and improved EM algorithms. This convergence proof adopts variational and iterative methods that Shannon et al. used for analyzing rate-distortion functions. The initialization map can vastly save both algorithms' running times for binary Gaussian mixtures. The FCP and the initialization map are useful for complicated mixtures but not sufficient; we need further studies for specific methods.
summary: Why can the Expectation-Maximization (EM) algorithm for mixture models converge? Why can different initial parameters cause various convergence difficulties? The Q-L synchronization theory explains that the observed data log-likelihood L and the complete data log-likelihood Q are positively correlated; we can achieve maximum L by maximizing Q. According to this theory, the Deterministic Annealing EM (DAEM) algorithm's authors make great efforts to eliminate locally maximal Q for avoiding L's local convergence. However, this paper proves that in some cases, Q may and should decrease for L to increase; slow or local convergence exists only because of small samples and unfair competition. This paper uses marriage competition to explain different convergence difficulties and proposes the Fair Competition Principle (FCP) with an initialization map for improving initializations. It uses the rate-verisimilitude function, extended from the rate-distortion function, to explain the convergence of the EM and improved EM algorithms. This convergence proof adopts variational and iterative methods that Shannon et al. used for analyzing rate-distortion functions. The initialization map can vastly save both algorithms' running times for binary Gaussian mixtures. The FCP and the initialization map are useful for complicated mixtures but not sufficient; we need further studies for specific methods.
abstract_zh: 为什么混合模型的期望最大化（EM）算法能够收敛？为什么不同的初始参数会导致不同的收敛困难呢？ Q-L同步理论解释了观测数据对数似然L和完全数据对数似然Q是正相关的；我们可以通过最大化Q来实现最大L。根据这一理论，确定性退火EM（DAEM）算法的作者努力消除局部最大Q以避免L的局部收敛。然而，本文证明，在某些情况下，Q 可能而且应该随着 L 的增加而减少；缓慢或局部收敛只是因为样本小和不公平竞争而存在。本文使用婚姻竞争来解释不同的收敛困难，并提出了带有初始化图的公平竞争原则（FCP）来改进初始化。它使用从速率失真函数扩展而来的速率逼真函数来解释 EM 的收敛性和改进的 EM 算法。这种收敛性证明采用了 Shannon 等人的变分和迭代方法。用于分析率失真函数。初始化图可以极大地节省二元高斯混合算法的运行时间。 FCP 和初始化图对于复杂的混合物很有用，但还不够；具体方法还需要进一步研究。

AI.tldr: 本文通过公平竞争原理和速率-逼真度函数解释并加速EM算法收敛。
AI.motivation: 解决EM算法在不同初始参数下收敛困难的问题，揭示Q函数与似然函数L的关系及局部收敛原因。
AI.method: 提出公平竞争原理（FCP）与初始化映射，结合扩展的速率-逼真度函数及变分迭代方法分析收敛性。
AI.result: 初始化映射显著减少二元高斯混合模型的运行时间，FCP对复杂混合模型有效但需进一步研究具体方法。
AI.conclusion: FCP与初始化映射为加速EM收敛提供新思路，但针对复杂模型仍需更多研究。

title: Exploiting Transitivity Constraints for Entity Matching in Knowledge Graphs
title_zh: 利用传递性约束进行知识图中的实体匹配
abstract: The goal of entity matching in knowledge graphs is to identify entities that refer to the same real-world objects using some similarity metric. The result of entity matching can be seen as a set of entity pairs interpreted as the same-as relation. However, the identified set of pairs may fail to satisfy some structural properties, in particular transitivity, that are expected from the same-as relation. In this work, we show that an ad-hoc enforcement of transitivity, i.e. taking the transitive closure, on the identified set of entity pairs may decrease precision dramatically. We therefore propose a methodology that starts with a given similarity measure, generates a set of entity pairs that are identified as referring to the same real-world objects, and applies the cluster editing algorithm to enforce transitivity without adding many spurious links, leading to overall improved performance.
summary: The goal of entity matching in knowledge graphs is to identify entities that refer to the same real-world objects using some similarity metric. The result of entity matching can be seen as a set of entity pairs interpreted as the same-as relation. However, the identified set of pairs may fail to satisfy some structural properties, in particular transitivity, that are expected from the same-as relation. In this work, we show that an ad-hoc enforcement of transitivity, i.e. taking the transitive closure, on the identified set of entity pairs may decrease precision dramatically. We therefore propose a methodology that starts with a given similarity measure, generates a set of entity pairs that are identified as referring to the same real-world objects, and applies the cluster editing algorithm to enforce transitivity without adding many spurious links, leading to overall improved performance.
abstract_zh: 知识图中实体匹配的目标是使用某种相似性度量来识别引用相同现实世界对象的实体。实体匹配的结果可以看作是解释为相同关系的一组实体对。然而，所识别的对的集合可能无法满足相同关系所期望的一些结构属性，特别是传递性。在这项工作中，我们表明，对已识别的实体对集临时强制执行传递性（即采用传递闭包）可能会显着降低精度。因此，我们提出了一种方法，该方法从给定的相似性度量开始，生成一组被识别为引用相同现实世界对象的实体对，并应用聚类编辑算法来强制传递性，而不添加许多虚假链接，从而提高整体性能。

AI.tldr: 在知识图谱中利用传递性约束进行实体匹配，以提高匹配结果的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过传递闭包强制传递性会导致精确率下降，需寻找更有效的传递性约束方法。
AI.method: 结合相似度度量生成实体对，并采用聚类编辑算法在不过度引入错误链接的情况下强制传递性。
AI.result: 有效提升实体匹配的性能，减少错误链接的引入。
AI.conclusion: 通过聚类编辑算法有效解决传递性约束问题，在保持高精确率的同时提升实体匹配效果。

search_text: Exploiting Transitivity Constraints for Entity Matching in Knowledge Graphs 利用传递性约束进行知识图中的实体匹配 The goal of entity matching in knowledge graphs is to identify entities that refer to the same real-world objects using some similarity metric. The result of entity matching can be seen as a set of entity pairs interpreted as the same-as relation. However, the identified set of pairs may fail to satisfy some structural properties, in particular transitivity, that are expected from the same-as relation. In this work, we show that an ad-hoc enforcement of transitivity, i.e. taking the transitive closure, on the identified set of entity pairs may decrease precision dramatically. We therefore propose a methodology that starts with a given similarity measure, generates a set of entity pairs that are identified as referring to the same real-world objects, and applies the cluster editing algorithm to enforce transitivity without adding many spurious links, leading to overall improved performance. 知识图中实体匹配的目标是使用某种相似性度量来识别引用相同现实世界对象的实体。实体匹配的结果可以看作是解释为相同关系的一组实体对。然而，所识别的对的集合可能无法满足相同关系所期望的一些结构属性，特别是传递性。在这项工作中，我们表明，对已识别的实体对集临时强制执行传递性（即采用传递闭包）可能会显着降低精度。因此，我们提出了一种方法，该方法从给定的相似性度量开始，生成一组被识别为引用相同现实世界对象的实体对，并应用聚类编辑算法来强制传递性，而不添加许多虚假链接，从而提高整体性能。 在知识图谱中利用传递性约束进行实体匹配，以提高匹配结果的准确性。 Jurian Baas,Mehdi Dastani,Ad Feelders cs.AI,cs.DL,cs.SI

title: Vision-based Driver Assistance Systems: Survey, Taxonomy and Advances
title_zh: 基于视觉的驾驶辅助系统：调查、分类和进展
comment: ef:2015 IEEE 18th International Conference on Intelligent Transportation Systems
comments: ef:2015 IEEE 18th International Conference on Intelligent Transportation Systems
abstract: Vision-based driver assistance systems is one of the rapidly growing research areas of ITS, due to various factors such as the increased level of safety requirements in automotive, computational power in embedded systems, and desire to get closer to autonomous driving. It is a cross disciplinary area encompassing specialised fields like computer vision, machine learning, robotic navigation, embedded systems, automotive electronics and safety critical software. In this paper, we survey the list of vision based advanced driver assistance systems with a consistent terminology and propose a taxonomy. We also propose an abstract model in an attempt to formalize a top-down view of application development to scale towards autonomous driving system.
summary: Vision-based driver assistance systems is one of the rapidly growing research areas of ITS, due to various factors such as the increased level of safety requirements in automotive, computational power in embedded systems, and desire to get closer to autonomous driving. It is a cross disciplinary area encompassing specialised fields like computer vision, machine learning, robotic navigation, embedded systems, automotive electronics and safety critical software. In this paper, we survey the list of vision based advanced driver assistance systems with a consistent terminology and propose a taxonomy. We also propose an abstract model in an attempt to formalize a top-down view of application development to scale towards autonomous driving system.
abstract_zh: 由于汽车安全要求的提高、嵌入式系统的计算能力以及更接近自动驾驶的愿望等多种因素，基于视觉的驾驶员辅助系统是智能交通系统快速发展的研究领域之一。这是一个跨学科领域，涵盖计算机视觉、机器学习、机器人导航、嵌入式系统、汽车电子和安全关键软件等专业领域。在本文中，我们以一致的术语调查了基于视觉的高级驾驶员辅助系统列表，并提出了分类法。我们还提出了一个抽象模型，试图形式化应用程序开发的自上而下的视图，以扩展到自动驾驶系统。

AI.tldr: 对基于视觉的高级驾驶辅助系统（ADAS）进行综述，提出分类法和抽象模型，以推动向自动驾驶系统的发展。
AI.motivation: 由于汽车安全需求的提高、嵌入式系统的计算能力增强以及向自动驾驶迈进的渴望，视觉辅助驾驶系统成为研究热点，需要系统性的综述和分类。
AI.method: 通过系统综述现有视觉ADAS，提出统一的术语和分类法，并构建抽象模型以形式化应用开发的顶层设计。
AI.result: 总结了视觉ADAS系统的列表，提出了分类法和抽象模型，为自动驾驶系统开发提供了结构化的框架。
AI.conclusion: 提出的分类法和抽象模型有助于理解ADAS系统结构，为实现自动驾驶提供了理论基础和指导。

title: Understanding and Avoiding AI Failures: A Practical Guide
title_zh: 了解和避免人工智能故障：实用指南
abstract: As AI technologies increase in capability and ubiquity, AI accidents are becoming more common. Based on normal accident theory, high reliability theory, and open systems theory, we create a framework for understanding the risks associated with AI applications. In addition, we also use AI safety principles to quantify the unique risks of increased intelligence and human-like qualities in AI. Together, these two fields give a more complete picture of the risks of contemporary AI. By focusing on system properties near accidents instead of seeking a root cause of accidents, we identify where attention should be paid to safety for current generation AI systems.
summary: As AI technologies increase in capability and ubiquity, AI accidents are becoming more common. Based on normal accident theory, high reliability theory, and open systems theory, we create a framework for understanding the risks associated with AI applications. In addition, we also use AI safety principles to quantify the unique risks of increased intelligence and human-like qualities in AI. Together, these two fields give a more complete picture of the risks of contemporary AI. By focusing on system properties near accidents instead of seeking a root cause of accidents, we identify where attention should be paid to safety for current generation AI systems.
abstract_zh: 随着人工智能技术能力的增强和普及，人工智能事故变得越来越常见。基于正常事故理论、高可靠性理论和开放系统理论，我们创建了一个框架来理解与人工智能应用相关的风险。此外，我们还利用人工智能安全原则来量化人工智能中增加智能和类人品质的独特风险。这两个领域相结合，可以更全面地了解当代人工智能的风险。通过关注事故附近的系统属性，而不是寻找事故的根本原因，我们确定了当前一代人工智能系统的安全性应注意的地方。

AI.tldr: 构建结合正常事故理论、高可靠性理论及AI安全原则的框架，以理解和避免AI故障
AI.motivation: AI事故频发，需更全面的风险分析方法以提升系统可靠性
AI.method: 结合三种系统理论与AI安全原则，分析事故附近系统属性，量化智能与类人特性风险
AI.result: 提出整合框架，明确当前AI系统安全关键点，量化智能提升带来的风险
AI.conclusion: 通过系统属性分析而非根因追溯，为AI安全提供实用框架，强调动态风险管理的重要性

authors_text: Longling Zhang,Bochen Shen,Ahmed Barnawi,Shan Xi,Neeraj Kumar,Yi Wu
title: FedDPGAN: Federated Differentially Private Generative Adversarial Networks Framework for the Detection of COVID-19 Pneumonia
title_zh: FedDPGAN：用于检测 COVID-19 肺炎的联合差分隐私生成对抗网络框架
abstract: Existing deep learning technologies generally learn the features of chest X-ray data generated by Generative Adversarial Networks (GAN) to diagnose COVID-19 pneumonia. However, the above methods have a critical challenge: data privacy. GAN will leak the semantic information of the training data which can be used to reconstruct the training samples by attackers, thereby this method will leak the privacy of the patient. Furthermore, for this reason that is the limitation of the training data sample, different hospitals jointly train the model through data sharing, which will also cause the privacy leakage. To solve this problem, we adopt the Federated Learning (FL) frame-work which is a new technique being used to protect the data privacy. Under the FL framework and Differentially Private thinking, we propose a FederatedDifferentially Private Generative Adversarial Network (FedDPGAN) to detectCOVID-19 pneumonia for sustainable smart cities. Specifically, we use DP-GAN to privately generate diverse patient data in which differential privacy technology is introduced to make sure the privacy protection of the semantic information of training dataset. Furthermore, we leverage FL to allow hospitals to collaboratively train COVID-19 models without sharing the original data. Under Independent and Identically Distributed (IID) and non-IID settings, The evaluation of the proposed model is on three types of chest X-ray (CXR) images dataset (COVID-19, normal, and normal pneumonia). A large number of the truthful reports make the verification of our model can effectively diagnose COVID-19 without compromising privacy.
summary: Existing deep learning technologies generally learn the features of chest X-ray data generated by Generative Adversarial Networks (GAN) to diagnose COVID-19 pneumonia. However, the above methods have a critical challenge: data privacy. GAN will leak the semantic information of the training data which can be used to reconstruct the training samples by attackers, thereby this method will leak the privacy of the patient. Furthermore, for this reason that is the limitation of the training data sample, different hospitals jointly train the model through data sharing, which will also cause the privacy leakage. To solve this problem, we adopt the Federated Learning (FL) frame-work which is a new technique being used to protect the data privacy. Under the FL framework and Differentially Private thinking, we propose a FederatedDifferentially Private Generative Adversarial Network (FedDPGAN) to detectCOVID-19 pneumonia for sustainable smart cities. Specifically, we use DP-GAN to privately generate diverse patient data in which differential privacy technology is introduced to make sure the privacy protection of the semantic information of training dataset. Furthermore, we leverage FL to allow hospitals to collaboratively train COVID-19 models without sharing the original data. Under Independent and Identically Distributed (IID) and non-IID settings, The evaluation of the proposed model is on three types of chest X-ray (CXR) images dataset (COVID-19, normal, and normal pneumonia). A large number of the truthful reports make the verification of our model can effectively diagnose COVID-19 without compromising privacy.
abstract_zh: 现有的深度学习技术通常学习生成对抗网络（GAN）生成的胸部X光数据的特征来诊断COVID-19肺炎。然而，上述方法面临着一个严峻的挑战：数据隐私。 GAN会泄露训练数据的语义信息，攻击者可以利用这些语义信息来重建训练样本，从而该方法会泄露患者的隐私。此外，由于训练数据样本的限制，不同医院通过数据共享的方式联合训练模型，这也会造成隐私泄露。为了解决这个问题，我们采用联邦学习（FL）框架，这是一种用于保护数据隐私的新技术。在 FL 框架和差分隐私思维下，我们提出了一种联邦差分隐私生成对抗网络（FedDPGAN）来检测可持续智慧城市的 COVID-19 肺炎。具体来说，我们使用DP-GAN私下生成多样化的患者数据，其中引入差分隐私技术来确保训练数据集语义信息的隐私保护。此外，我们利用 FL 允许医院协作训练 COVID-19 模型，而无需共享原始数据。在独立同分布 (IID) 和非 IID 设置下，所提出的模型的评估是在三种类型的胸部 X 射线 (CXR) 图像数据集（COVID-19、正常和正常肺炎）上进行的。大量的真实报告使得我们的模型的验证可以在不损害隐私的情况下有效诊断COVID-19。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FedDPGAN框架，结合联邦学习与差分隐私技术，解决使用生成对抗网络（GAN）检测COVID-19肺炎时的数据隐私泄露问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于GAN的深度学习方法在生成胸部X光数据以诊断COVID-19肺炎时，存在语义信息泄露导致隐私风险；同时医院间数据共享也会引发隐私问题。
AI.method: 在联邦学习框架下引入差分隐私技术，设计FedDPGAN模型：通过差分隐私保护生成数据的语义信息，利用联邦学习实现多医院协作训练而无需共享原始数据，并在IID和非IID数据集上验证效果。
AI.result: 实验表明，该模型在三个胸部X光数据集（COVID-19、正常、肺炎）上能有效诊断COVID-19，且通过大量真实报告验证了隐私保护的有效性。
AI.conclusion: FedDPGAN通过联邦学习与差分隐私的结合，在保证诊断准确性的同时解决了医疗数据隐私泄露问题，适用于可持续智慧城市中的肺炎检测场景。

ai_content.conclusion: FedDPGAN通过联邦学习与差分隐私的结合，在保证诊断准确性的同时解决了医疗数据隐私泄露问题，适用于可持续智慧城市中的肺炎检测场景。

search_text: FedDPGAN: Federated Differentially Private Generative Adversarial Networks Framework for the Detection of COVID-19 Pneumonia FedDPGAN：用于检测 COVID-19 肺炎的联合差分隐私生成对抗网络框架 Existing deep learning technologies generally learn the features of chest X-ray data generated by Generative Adversarial Networks (GAN) to diagnose COVID-19 pneumonia. However, the above methods have a critical challenge: data privacy. GAN will leak the semantic information of the training data which can be used to reconstruct the training samples by attackers, thereby this method will leak the privacy of the patient. Furthermore, for this reason that is the limitation of the training data sample, different hospitals jointly train the model through data sharing, which will also cause the privacy leakage. To solve this problem, we adopt the Federated Learning (FL) frame-work which is a new technique being used to protect the data privacy. Under the FL framework and Differentially Private thinking, we propose a FederatedDifferentially Private Generative Adversarial Network (FedDPGAN) to detectCOVID-19 pneumonia for sustainable smart cities. Specifically, we use DP-GAN to privately generate diverse patient data in which differential privacy technology is introduced to make sure the privacy protection of the semantic information of training dataset. Furthermore, we leverage FL to allow hospitals to collaboratively train COVID-19 models without sharing the original data. Under Independent and Identically Distributed (IID) and non-IID settings, The evaluation of the proposed model is on three types of chest X-ray (CXR) images dataset (COVID-19, normal, and normal pneumonia). A large number of the truthful reports make the verification of our model can effectively diagnose COVID-19 without compromising privacy. 现有的深度学习技术通常学习生成对抗网络（GAN）生成的胸部X光数据的特征来诊断COVID-19肺炎。然而，上述方法面临着一个严峻的挑战：数据隐私。 GAN会泄露训练数据的语义信息，攻击者可以利用这些语义信息来重建训练样本，从而该方法会泄露患者的隐私。此外，由于训练数据样本的限制，不同医院通过数据共享的方式联合训练模型，这也会造成隐私泄露。为了解决这个问题，我们采用联邦学习（FL）框架，这是一种用于保护数据隐私的新技术。在 FL 框架和差分隐私思维下，我们提出了一种联邦差分隐私生成对抗网络（FedDPGAN）来检测可持续智慧城市的 COVID-19 肺炎。具体来说，我们使用DP-GAN私下生成多样化的患者数据，其中引入差分隐私技术来确保训练数据集语义信息的隐私保护。此外，我们利用 FL 允许医院协作训练 COVID-19 模型，而无需共享原始数据。在独立同分布 (IID) 和非 IID 设置下，所提出的模型的评估是在三种类型的胸部 X 射线 (CXR) 图像数据集（COVID-19、正常和正常肺炎）上进行的。大量的真实报告使得我们的模型的验证可以在不损害隐私的情况下有效诊断COVID-19。 本文提出FedDPGAN框架，结合联邦学习与差分隐私技术，解决使用生成对抗网络（GAN）检测COVID-19肺炎时的数据隐私泄露问题。 Longling Zhang,Bochen Shen,Ahmed Barnawi,Shan Xi,Neeraj Kumar,Yi Wu eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

title: Learning from Event Cameras with Sparse Spiking Convolutional Neural Networks
title_zh: 使用稀疏尖峰卷积神经网络从事件摄像机中学习
comment: Accepted to the International Joint Conference on Neural Networks (IJCNN) 2021
comments: Accepted to the International Joint Conference on Neural Networks (IJCNN) 2021
abstract: Convolutional neural networks (CNNs) are now the de facto solution for computer vision problems thanks to their impressive results and ease of learning. These networks are composed of layers of connected units called artificial neurons, loosely modeling the neurons in a biological brain. However, their implementation on conventional hardware (CPU/GPU) results in high power consumption, making their integration on embedded systems difficult. In a car for example, embedded algorithms have very high constraints in term of energy, latency and accuracy. To design more efficient computer vision algorithms, we propose to follow an end-to-end biologically inspired approach using event cameras and spiking neural networks (SNNs). Event cameras output asynchronous and sparse events, providing an incredibly efficient data source, but processing these events with synchronous and dense algorithms such as CNNs does not yield any significant benefits. To address this limitation, we use spiking neural networks (SNNs), which are more biologically realistic neural networks where units communicate using discrete spikes. Due to the nature of their operations, they are hardware friendly and energy-efficient, but training them still remains a challenge. Our method enables the training of sparse spiking convolutional neural networks directly on event data, using the popular deep learning framework PyTorch. The performances in terms of accuracy, sparsity and training time on the popular DVS128 Gesture Dataset make it possible to use this bio-inspired approach for the future embedding of real-time applications on low-power neuromorphic hardware.

The performances in terms of accuracy, sparsity and training time on the popular DVS128 Gesture Dataset make it possible to use this bio-inspired approach for the future embedding of real-time applications on low-power neuromorphic hardware.
abstract_zh: 由于其令人印象深刻的结果和易于学习的特点，卷积神经网络 (CNN) 现在已成为计算机视觉问题事实上的解决方案。这些网络由称为人工神经元的连接单元层组成，松散地模拟生物大脑中的神经元。然而，它们在传统硬件（CPU/GPU）上的实现会导致高功耗，使得它们在嵌入式系统上的集成变得困难。例如，在汽车中，嵌入式算法在能量、延迟和准确性方面具有非常高的限制。为了设计更高效的计算机视觉算法，我们建议遵循使用事件相机和尖峰神经网络（SNN）的端到端生物学启发方法。事件摄像机输出异步和稀疏事件，提供了极其高效的数据源，但使用 CNN 等同步和密集算法处理这些事件并不会产生任何显着的好处。为了解决这个限制，我们使用尖峰神经网络（SNN），这是一种更符合生物学现实的神经网络，其中的单元使用离散尖峰进行通信。由于其操作的性质，它们对硬件友好且节能，但培训它们仍然是一个挑战。我们的方法可以使用流行的深度学习框架 PyTorch 直接在事件数据上训练稀疏尖峰卷积神经网络。流行的 DVS128 手势数据集在准确性、稀疏性和训练时间方面的性能使得使用这种仿生方法未来在低功耗神经形态硬件上嵌入实时应用程序成为可能。

AI.tldr: 提出一种直接在事件数据上训练稀疏脉冲卷积神经网络的方法，以提高嵌入式系统中的能效和实时性。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN在嵌入式系统中能耗高，而事件相机的异步稀疏数据需要更高效的处理方法，现有同步算法无法有效利用其优势。
AI.method: 使用脉冲神经网络（SNNs）结合事件相机数据，通过PyTorch框架直接训练稀疏的脉冲卷积神经网络，以提高硬件友好性和能效。
AI.result: 在DVS128手势数据集上实现了较高的准确性、稀疏性和较短的训练时间，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该生物启发方法为在低功耗神经形态硬件上实现实时嵌入式应用提供了可行的解决方案。

In a car for example, embedded algorithms have very high constraints in term of energy, latency and accuracy. Event cameras output asynchronous and sparse events, providing an incredibly efficient data source, but processing these events with synchronous and dense algorithms such as CNNs does not yield any significant benefits. To address this limitation, we use spiking neural networks (SNNs), which are more biologically realistic neural networks where units communicate using discrete spikes. Our method enables the training of sparse spiking convolutional neural networks directly on event data, using the popular deep learning framework PyTorch. authors_text: Yang Liu,Luiz G. Hafemann,Michael Jamieson,Mehrsan Javan
title: Detecting and Matching Related Objects with One Proposal Multiple Predictions
title_zh: 使用一个提案多个预测来检测和匹配相关对象
comment: CVPR workshop 2021
comments: CVPR workshop 2021
abstract: Tracking players in sports videos is commonly done in a tracking-by-detection framework, first detecting players in each frame, and then performing association over time. While for some sports tracking players is sufficient for game analysis, sports like hockey, tennis and polo may require additional detections, that include the object the player is holding (e.g. racket, stick). The baseline solution for this problem involves detecting these objects as separate classes, and matching them to player detections based on the intersection over union (IoU). This approach, however, leads to poor matching performance in crowded situations, as it does not model the relationship between players and objects. In this paper, we propose a simple yet efficient way to detect and match players and related objects at once without extra cost, by considering an implicit association for prediction of multiple objects through the same proposal box. We evaluate the method on a dataset of broadcast ice hockey videos, and also a new public dataset we introduce called COCO +Torso. On the ice hockey dataset, the proposed method boosts matching performance from 57.1% to 81.4%, while also improving the meanAP of player+stick detections from 68.4% to 88.3%. On the COCO +Torso dataset, we see matching improving from 47.9% to 65.2%. The COCO +Torso dataset, code and pre-trained models will be released at https://github.com/foreverYoungGitHub/detect-and-match-related-objects.
summary: Tracking players in sports videos is commonly done in a tracking-by-detection framework, first detecting players in each frame, and then performing association over time. While for some sports tracking players is sufficient for game analysis, sports like hockey, tennis and polo may require additional detections, that include the object the player is holding (e.g. racket, stick). The baseline solution for this problem involves detecting these objects as separate classes, and matching them to player detections based on the intersection over union (IoU). This approach, however, leads to poor matching performance in crowded situations, as it does not model the relationship between players and objects. In this paper, we propose a simple yet efficient way to detect and match players and related objects at once without extra cost, by considering an implicit association for prediction of multiple objects through the same proposal box. We evaluate the method on a dataset of broadcast ice hockey videos, and also a new public dataset we introduce called COCO +Torso. On the ice hockey dataset, the proposed method boosts matching performance from 57.1% to 81.4%, while also improving the meanAP of player+stick detections from 68.4% to 88.3%. On the COCO +Torso dataset, we see matching improving from 47.9% to 65.2%. The COCO +Torso dataset, code and pre-trained models will be released at https://github.com/foreverYoungGitHub/detect-and-match-related-objects.
abstract_zh: 跟踪体育视频中的球员通常是在检测跟踪框架中完成的，首先检测每个帧中的球员，然后随着时间的推移进行关联。虽然对于某些运动来说，跟踪运动员足以进行比赛分析，但曲棍球、网球和马球等运动可能需要额外的检测，其中包括运动员持有的物体（例如球拍、球杆）。此问题的基准解决方案涉及将这些对象检测为单独的类，并根据并集交集 (IoU) 将它们与玩家检测进行匹配。然而，这种方法在拥挤的情况下会导致匹配性能不佳，因为它没有对玩家和对象之间的关系进行建模。在本文中，我们提出了一种简单而有效的方法来立即检测和匹配玩家和相关对象，无需额外成本，通过考虑通过同一提案框预测多个对象的隐式关联。我们在广播冰球视频数据集以及我们引入的名为 COCO +Torso 的新公共数据集上评估该方法。在冰球数据集上，所提出的方法将匹配性能从 57.1% 提高到 81.4%，同时还将球员+球杆检测的平均 AP 从 68.4% 提高到 88.3%。在 COCO +Torso 数据集上，我们看到匹配率从 47.9% 提高到 65.2%。 COCO +Torso 数据集、代码和预训练模型将在 https://github.com/foreverYoungGitHub/detect-and-match-lated-objects 发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需额外成本的方法，通过单个提议框预测多个相关物体，实现球员及其所持物体的同时检测与匹配。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在拥挤场景中因未建模球员与物体关系导致匹配性能不足，且依赖IoU匹配存在局限性。
AI.method: 通过共享同一提议框隐式关联球员与相关物体预测，实现多物体联合检测与匹配。
AI.result: 在冰球数据集上匹配性能从57.1%提升至81.4%，玩家+球棒检测mAP从68.4%提升至88.3%；在COCO+Torso数据集上匹配性能从47.9%提升至65.2%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了拥挤场景下相关物体匹配难题，未来将发布数据集与模型代码以促进研究。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种无需额外成本的方法，通过单个提议框预测多个相关物体，实现球员及其所持物体的同时检测与匹配。

search_text: Detecting and Matching Related Objects with One Proposal Multiple Predictions 使用一个提案多个预测来检测和匹配相关对象 Tracking players in sports videos is commonly done in a tracking-by-detection framework, first detecting players in each frame, and then performing association over time. While for some sports tracking players is sufficient for game analysis, sports like hockey, tennis and polo may require additional detections, that include the object the player is holding (e.g. racket, stick). The baseline solution for this problem involves detecting these objects as separate classes, and matching them to player detections based on the intersection over union (IoU). This approach, however, leads to poor matching performance in crowded situations, as it does not model the relationship between players and objects. In this paper, we propose a simple yet efficient way to detect and match players and related objects at once without extra cost, by considering an implicit association for prediction of multiple objects through the same proposal box. We evaluate the method on a dataset of broadcast ice hockey videos, and also a new public dataset we introduce called COCO +Torso. On the ice hockey dataset, the proposed method boosts matching performance from 57.1% to 81.4%, while also improving the meanAP of player+stick detections from 68.4% to 88.3%. On the COCO +Torso dataset, we see matching improving from 47.9% to 65.2%. The COCO +Torso dataset, code and pre-trained models will be released at https://github.com/foreverYoungGitHub/detect-and-match-related-objects. 跟踪体育视频中的球员通常是在检测跟踪框架中完成的，首先检测每个帧中的球员，然后随着时间的推移进行关联。虽然对于某些运动来说，跟踪运动员足以进行比赛分析，但曲棍球、网球和马球等运动可能需要额外的检测，其中包括运动员持有的物体（例如球拍、球杆）。此问题的基准解决方案涉及将这些对象检测为单独的类，并根据并集交集 (IoU) 将它们与玩家检测进行匹配。然而，这种方法在拥挤的情况下会导致匹配性能不佳，因为它没有对玩家和对象之间的关系进行建模。在本文中，我们提出了一种简单而有效的方法来立即检测和匹配玩家和相关对象，无需额外成本，通过考虑通过同一提案框预测多个对象的隐式关联。我们在广播冰球视频数据集以及我们引入的名为 COCO +Torso 的新公共数据集上评估该方法。在冰球数据集上，所提出的方法将匹配性能从 57.1% 提高到 81.4%，同时还将球员+球杆检测的平均 AP 从 68.4% 提高到 88.3%。在 COCO +Torso 数据集上，我们看到匹配率从 47.9% 提高到 65.2%。 COCO +Torso 数据集、代码和预训练模型将在 https://github.com/foreverYoungGitHub/detect-and-match-lated-objects 发布。 本文提出一种无需额外成本的方法，通过单个提议框预测多个相关物体，实现球员及其所持物体的同时检测与匹配。 Yang Liu,Luiz G. Hafemann,Michael Jamieson,Mehrsan Javan cs.CV

title: Mutual Contrastive Learning for Visual Representation Learning
title_zh: 视觉表征学习的相互对比学习
comment: 9 pages, AAAI-2022
comments: 9 pages, AAAI-2022
abstract: We present a collaborative learning method called Mutual Contrastive Learning (MCL) for general visual representation learning. The core idea of MCL is to perform mutual interaction and transfer of contrastive distributions among a cohort of networks. A crucial component of MCL is Interactive Contrastive Learning (ICL). Compared with vanilla contrastive learning, ICL can aggregate cross-network embedding information and maximize the lower bound to the mutual information between two networks. This enables each network to learn extra contrastive knowledge from others, leading to better feature representations for visual recognition tasks. We emphasize that the resulting MCL is conceptually simple yet empirically powerful. It is a generic framework that can be applied to both supervised and self-supervised representation learning. Experimental results on image classification and transfer learning to object detection show that MCL can lead to consistent performance gains, demonstrating that MCL can guide the network to generate better feature representations. Code is available at https://github.com/winycg/MCL.
summary: We present a collaborative learning method called Mutual Contrastive Learning (MCL) for general visual representation learning. The core idea of MCL is to perform mutual interaction and transfer of contrastive distributions among a cohort of networks. A crucial component of MCL is Interactive Contrastive Learning (ICL). Compared with vanilla contrastive learning, ICL can aggregate cross-network embedding information and maximize the lower bound to the mutual information between two networks. This enables each network to learn extra contrastive knowledge from others, leading to better feature representations for visual recognition tasks. We emphasize that the resulting MCL is conceptually simple yet empirically powerful. It is a generic framework that can be applied to both supervised and self-supervised representation learning. Experimental results on image classification and transfer learning to object detection show that MCL can lead to consistent performance gains, demonstrating that MCL can guide the network to generate better feature representations. Code is available at https://github.com/winycg/MCL.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种称为相互对比学习（MCL）的协作学习方法，用于一般视觉表示学习。 MCL的核心思想是在一组网络之间进行交互和对比分布的传递。 MCL 的一个重要组成部分是交互式对比学习（ICL）。与普通对比学习相比，ICL 可以聚合跨网络嵌入信息并最大化两个网络之间互信息的下界。这使得每个网络能够从其他网络中学习额外的对比知识，从而为视觉识别任务提供更好的特征表示。我们强调，由此产生的 MCL 在概念上很简单，但在经验上却很强大。它是一个通用框架，可应用于监督和自监督表示学习。图像分类和迁移学习到目标检测的实验结果表明，MCL 可以带来一致的性能增益，证明 MCL 可以指导网络生成更好的特征表示。代码可在 https://github.com/winycg/MCL 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为互惠对比学习（MCL）的协作学习方法，通过跨网络对比分布的相互作用与传递，提升视觉表征学习效果。
AI.motivation: 传统对比学习方法局限于单网络内部的特征对比，难以有效利用多网络间的协同信息，导致特征表示能力受限。
AI.method: MCL的核心是交互对比学习（ICL），通过聚合多个网络的嵌入信息并最大化互信息下限，使各网络相互学习对比知识，从而优化特征表示。
AI.result: 实验表明，MCL在图像分类和目标检测迁移学习任务中均取得持续性能提升，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: MCL是一种概念简洁且通用的框架，适用于监督与自监督学习，能显著提升视觉表征质量。

authors_text: Stanislava Fedorova,Alberto Tono,Meher Shashwat Nigam,Jiayao Zhang,Amirhossein Ahmadnia,Cecilia Bolognesi,Dominik L. Michels
title: Synthetic 3D Data Generation Pipeline for Geometric Deep Learning in Architecture
title_zh: 用于建筑中几何深度学习的合成 3D 数据生成管道
comment: Project Page: https://cdinstitute.github.io/Building-Dataset-Generator/
comments: Project Page: https://cdinstitute.github.io/Building-Dataset-Generator/
abstract: With the growing interest in deep learning algorithms and computational design in the architectural field, the need for large, accessible and diverse architectural datasets increases. We decided to tackle this problem by constructing a field-specific synthetic data generation pipeline that generates an arbitrary amount of 3D data along with the associated 2D and 3D annotations. The variety of annotations, the flexibility to customize the generated building and dataset parameters make this framework suitable for multiple deep learning tasks, including geometric deep learning that requires direct 3D supervision. Creating our building data generation pipeline we leveraged architectural knowledge from experts in order to construct a framework that would be modular, extendable and would provide a sufficient amount of class-balanced data samples. Moreover, we purposefully involve the researcher in the dataset customization allowing the introduction of additional building components, material textures, building classes, number and type of annotations as well as the number of views per 3D model sample. In this way, the framework would satisfy different research requirements and would be adaptable to a large variety of tasks. All code and data are made publicly available.
summary: With the growing interest in deep learning algorithms and computational design in the architectural field, the need for large, accessible and diverse architectural datasets increases. We decided to tackle this problem by constructing a field-specific synthetic data generation pipeline that generates an arbitrary amount of 3D data along with the associated 2D and 3D annotations. The variety of annotations, the flexibility to customize the generated building and dataset parameters make this framework suitable for multiple deep learning tasks, including geometric deep learning that requires direct 3D supervision. Creating our building data generation pipeline we leveraged architectural knowledge from experts in order to construct a framework that would be modular, extendable and would provide a sufficient amount of class-balanced data samples. Moreover, we purposefully involve the researcher in the dataset customization allowing the introduction of additional building components, material textures, building classes, number and type of annotations as well as the number of views per 3D model sample. In this way, the framework would satisfy different research requirements and would be adaptable to a large variety of tasks. All code and data are made publicly available.
abstract_zh: 随着建筑领域对深度学习算法和计算设计的兴趣日益浓厚，对大型、可访问且多样化的建筑数据集的需求也在增加。我们决定通过构建特定于领域的合成数据生成管道来解决这个问题，该管道生成任意数量的 3D 数据以及相关的 2D 和 3D 注释。注释的多样性、自定义生成的构建和数据集参数的灵活性使该框架适用于多种深度学习任务，包括需要直接 3D 监督的几何深度学习。在创建构建数据生成管道时，我们利用专家的架构知识来构建一个模块化、可扩展的框架，并提供足够数量的类平衡数据样本。此外，我们有目的地让研究人员参与数据集定制，允许引入额外的建筑组件、材料纹理、建筑类别、注释的数量和类型以及每个 3D 模型样本的视图数量。这样，该框架将满足不同的研究需求，并适应多种任务。所有代码和数据均公开可用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于建筑领域几何深度学习的合成3D数据生成框架，能够生成任意数量的3D建筑数据及关联标注。
AI.motivation: 建筑领域缺乏大规模、多样化且易于获取的深度学习数据集，尤其需要支持3D监督的几何深度学习任务的专用数据。
AI.method: 结合建筑专家知识构建模块化数据生成管道，允许自定义建筑参数、材质纹理、标注类型及视角数量，确保类别平衡性。
AI.result: 框架支持多种深度学习任务，提供可扩展的数据定制功能，所有代码和数据已开源。
AI.conclusion: 该框架满足建筑领域几何深度学习的多样化需求，为未来研究提供了灵活且可复用的数据基础。

Moreover, we purposefully involve the researcher in the dataset customization allowing the introduction of additional building components, material textures, building classes, number and type of annotations as well as the number of views per 3D model sample. In this way, the framework would satisfy different research requirements and would be adaptable to a large variety of tasks. All code and data are made publicly available. 随着建筑领域对深度学习算法和计算设计的兴趣日益浓厚，对大型、可访问且多样化的建筑数据集的需求也在增加。我们决定通过构建特定于领域的合成数据生成管道来解决这个问题，该管道生成任意数量的 3D 数据以及相关的 2D 和 3D 注释。注释的多样性、自定义生成的构建和数据集参数的灵活性使该框架适用于多种深度学习任务，包括需要直接 3D 监督的几何深度学习。在创建构建数据生成管道时，我们利用专家的架构知识来构建一个模块化、可扩展的框架，并提供足够数量的类平衡数据样本。此外，我们有目的地让研究人员参与数据集定制，允许引入额外的建筑组件、材料纹理、建筑类别、注释的数量和类型以及每个 3D 模型样本的视图数量。这样，该框架将满足不同的研究需求，并适应多种任务。所有代码和数据均公开可用。 本文提出了一种用于建筑领域几何深度学习的合成3D数据生成框架，能够生成任意数量的3D建筑数据及关联标注。 Stanislava Fedorova,Alberto Tono,Meher Shashwat Nigam,Jiayao Zhang,Amirhossein Ahmadnia,Cecilia Bolognesi,Dominik L. Michels cs.CV

title: Artificial Intelligence Based Prognostic Maintenance of Renewable Energy Systems: A Review of Techniques, Challenges, and Future Research Directions
title_zh: 基于人工智能的可再生能源系统预测维护：技术回顾、挑战和未来研究方向
comment: 20 pages, 4 figures, 5 tables
comments: 20 pages, 4 figures, 5 tables
abstract: Since the depletion of fossil fuels, the world has started to rely heavily on renewable sources of energy. With every passing year, our dependency on the renewable sources of energy is increasing exponentially. As a result, complex and hybrid generation systems are being designed and developed to meet the energy demands and ensure energy security in a country. The continual improvement in the technology and an effort towards the provision of uninterrupted power to the end-users is strongly dependent on an effective and fault resilient Operation and Maintenance (O&M) system. Ingenious algorithms and techniques are hence been introduced aiming to minimize equipment and plant downtime. Efforts are being made to develop robust Prognostic Maintenance systems that can identify the faults before they occur. To this aim, complex Data Analytics and Machine Learning (ML) techniques are being used to increase the overall efficiency of these prognostic maintenance systems. This paper provides an overview of the predictive/prognostic maintenance frameworks reported in the literature. We pay a particular focus to the approaches, challenges including data-related issues, such as the availability and quality of the data and data auditing, feature engineering, interpretability, and security issues. Being a key aspect of ML-based solutions, we also discuss some of the commonly used publicly available datasets in the domain. The paper also identifies key future research directions. We believe such detailed analysis will provide a baseline for future research in the domain.

We believe such detailed analysis will provide a baseline for future research in the domain.
abstract_zh: 自化石燃料枯竭以来，世界开始严重依赖可再生能源。年复一年，我们对可再生能源的依赖呈指数级增长。因此，正在设计和开发复杂的混合发电系统，以满足能源需求并确保一个国家的能源安全。技术的持续改进以及向最终用户提供不间断电力的努力在很大程度上依赖于有效且具有故障恢复能力的运营和维护 (O&M) 系统。因此引入了巧妙的算法和技术，旨在最大限度地减少设备和工厂的停机时间。人们正在努力开发强大的预测维护系统，可以在故障发生之前识别它们。为此，复杂的数据分析和机器学习 (ML) 技术被用来提高这些预测维护系统的整体效率。本文概述了文献中报道的预测/预后维护框架。我们特别关注方法和挑战，包括数据相关问题，例如数据的可用性和质量以及数据审计、特征工程、可解释性和安全问题。作为基于机器学习的解决方案的一个关键方面，我们还讨论了该领域中一些常用的公开数据集。该论文还确定了未来的关键研究方向。我们相信这种详细的分析将为该领域的未来研究提供基线。

AI.tldr: 综述人工智能在可再生能源系统预测性维护中的技术、挑战及未来研究方向
AI.motivation: 随着可再生能源依赖度提升，系统复杂性增加，需有效维护以确保能源安全与稳定供电，推动基于AI的预测性维护技术发展
AI.method: 通过文献综述分析现有预测性维护框架，探讨数据质量、特征工程等挑战，并总结常用公开数据集
AI.result: 总结现有技术与挑战，识别关键问题，提出未来研究方向，为后续研究提供基础
AI.conclusion: 详细分析为可再生能源系统AI预测性维护的未来研究提供基准与指导

title: A Framework for Ethical AI at the United Nations
title_zh: 联合国道德人工智能框架
abstract: This paper aims to provide an overview of the ethical concerns in artificial intelligence (AI) and the framework that is needed to mitigate those risks, and to suggest a practical path to ensure the development and use of AI at the United Nations (UN) aligns with our ethical values. The overview discusses how AI is an increasingly powerful tool with potential for good, albeit one with a high risk of negative side-effects that go against fundamental human rights and UN values. It explains the need for ethical principles for AI aligned with principles for data governance, as data and AI are tightly interwoven. It explores different ethical frameworks that exist and tools such as assessment lists. It recommends that the UN develop a framework consisting of ethical principles, architectural standards, assessment methods, tools and methodologies, and a policy to govern the implementation and adherence to this framework, accompanied by an education program for staff.
summary: This paper aims to provide an overview of the ethical concerns in artificial intelligence (AI) and the framework that is needed to mitigate those risks, and to suggest a practical path to ensure the development and use of AI at the United Nations (UN) aligns with our ethical values. The overview discusses how AI is an increasingly powerful tool with potential for good, albeit one with a high risk of negative side-effects that go against fundamental human rights and UN values. It explains the need for ethical principles for AI aligned with principles for data governance, as data and AI are tightly interwoven. It explores different ethical frameworks that exist and tools such as assessment lists. It recommends that the UN develop a framework consisting of ethical principles, architectural standards, assessment methods, tools and methodologies, and a policy to govern the implementation and adherence to this framework, accompanied by an education program for staff.
abstract_zh: 本文旨在概述人工智能 (AI) 的道德问题以及减轻这些风险所需的框架，并提出一条切实可行的路径，以确保联合国 (UN) 人工智能的开发和使用符合我们的道德价值观。概述讨论了人工智能如何成为一种日益强大的工具，具有良好的潜力，尽管它具有违背基本人权和联合国价值观的负面副作用的高风险。它解释了人工智能道德原则与数据治理原则相一致的必要性，因为数据和人工智能紧密交织在一起。它探讨了现有的不同道德框架和评估列表等工具。它建议联合国制定一个由道德原则、架构标准、评估方法、工具和方法组成的框架，以及管理该框架实施和遵守的政策，并制定工作人员教育计划。

AI.tldr: 提出一个伦理框架，以确保联合国在人工智能开发和应用中符合伦理价值观并减少风险。
AI.motivation: AI技术虽有潜力，但存在违反人权和UN价值观的风险，需建立伦理框架以确保其发展符合伦理原则和数据治理要求。
AI.method: 通过分析现有伦理框架和评估工具，提出包含伦理原则、架构标准、评估方法、工具、政策及教育计划的综合框架。
AI.result: 建议联合国制定涵盖伦理原则、技术标准、评估工具、政策及员工教育的AI伦理框架，以规范AI的开发与应用。
AI.conclusion: 构建系统性AI伦理框架对联合国规范AI发展、保障人权和价值观至关重要，需通过政策与教育确保落实。

title: The Effects of Air Quality on the Spread of the COVID-19 Pandemic in Italy: An Artificial Intelligence Approach
title_zh: 空气质量对意大利 COVID-19 疫情传播的影响：人工智能方法
comment: mber:Knowledge-Based and Intelligent Information & Engineering Systems: Proceedings of the 26th International Conference KES2022
comments: mber:Knowledge-Based and Intelligent Information & Engineering Systems: Proceedings of the 26th International Conference KES2022
abstract: The COVID-19 pandemic considerably affects public health systems around the world. The lack of knowledge about the virus, the extension of this phenomenon, and the speed of the evolution of the infection are all factors that highlight the necessity of employing new approaches to study these events. Artificial intelligence techniques may be useful in analyzing data related to areas affected by the virus. The aim of this work is to investigate any possible relationships between air quality and confirmed cases of COVID-19 in Italian districts. Specifically, we report an analysis of the correlation between daily COVID-19 cases and environmental factors, such as temperature, relative humidity, and atmospheric pollutants. Our analysis confirms a significant association of some environmental parameters with the spread of the virus. This suggests that machine learning models trained on the environmental parameters to predict the number of future infected cases may be accurate. Predictive models may be useful for helping institutions in making decisions for protecting the population and contrasting the pandemic.

abstract_zh: COVID-19 大流行极大地影响了世界各地的公共卫生系统。对病毒认识的缺乏、这种现象的蔓延以及感染的进化速度，这些因素都凸显了采用新方法来研究这些事件的必要性。人工智能技术可能有助于分析与受病毒影响的地区相关的数据。这项工作的目的是调查意大利各地区空气质量与 COVID-19 确诊病例之间可能存在的关系。具体来说，我们报告了每日 COVID-19 病例与环境因素（例如温度、相对湿度和大气污染物）之间的相关性分析。我们的分析证实了一些环境参数与病毒的传播存在显着关联。这表明，根据环境参数训练的机器学习模型来预测未来感染病例的数量可能是准确的。预测模型可能有助于帮助机构做出保护人口和对比流行病的决策。

AI.tldr: 本论文通过人工智能方法分析意大利地区空气质量和新冠疫情传播之间的关系，探讨环境因素对确诊病例的影响。
AI.motivation: 新冠疫情对全球公共卫生系统造成重大影响，现有研究缺乏对病毒传播与环境因素关联性的有效分析方法，需借助人工智能技术挖掘数据规律。
AI.method: 采用机器学习模型分析意大利地区每日确诊病例数据与温度、湿度、大气污染物等环境参数的关联性，建立预测模型。
AI.result: 研究发现部分环境参数（如污染物浓度）与疫情传播存在显著相关性，基于环境数据的机器学习预测模型能有效预估未来感染病例数。
AI.conclusion: 环境因素与新冠疫情传播存在可量化关联，利用AI构建的预测模型可为公共卫生决策提供科学依据，助力疫情防控策略制定。

search_text: The Effects of Air Quality on the Spread of the COVID-19 Pandemic in Italy: An Artificial Intelligence Approach 空气质量对意大利 COVID-19 疫情传播的影响：人工智能方法 The COVID-19 pandemic considerably affects public health systems around the world. The lack of knowledge about the virus, the extension of this phenomenon, and the speed of the evolution of the infection are all factors that highlight the necessity of employing new approaches to study these events. Artificial intelligence techniques may be useful in analyzing data related to areas affected by the virus. The aim of this work is to investigate any possible relationships between air quality and confirmed cases of COVID-19 in Italian districts. Specifically, we report an analysis of the correlation between daily COVID-19 cases and environmental factors, such as temperature, relative humidity, and atmospheric pollutants. Our analysis confirms a significant association of some environmental parameters with the spread of the virus. This suggests that machine learning models trained on the environmental parameters to predict the number of future infected cases may be accurate. Predictive models may be useful for helping institutions in making decisions for protecting the population and contrasting the pandemic. COVID-19 大流行极大地影响了世界各地的公共卫生系统。对病毒认识的缺乏、这种现象的蔓延以及感染的进化速度，这些因素都凸显了采用新方法来研究这些事件的必要性。人工智能技术可能有助于分析与受病毒影响的地区相关的数据。这项工作的目的是调查意大利各地区空气质量与 COVID-19 确诊病例之间可能存在的关系。具体来说，我们报告了每日 COVID-19 病例与环境因素（例如温度、相对湿度和大气污染物）之间的相关性分析。我们的分析证实了一些环境参数与病毒的传播存在显着关联。这表明，根据环境参数训练的机器学习模型来预测未来感染病例的数量可能是准确的。预测模型可能有助于帮助机构做出保护人口和对比流行病的决策。 本论文通过人工智能方法分析意大利地区空气质量和新冠疫情传播之间的关系，探讨环境因素对确诊病例的影响。 Andrea Loreggia,Anna Passarelli,Maria Silvia Pini cs.CY,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Markus Heimberger,Jonathan Horgan,Ciaran Hughes,John McDonald,Senthil Yogamani
title: Computer vision in automated parking systems: Design, implementation and challenges
title_zh: 自动停车系统中的计算机视觉：设计、实施和挑战
comment: ef:Image and Vision Computing, Volume 68, December 2017, Pages 88-101
comments: ef:Image and Vision Computing, Volume 68, December 2017, Pages 88-101
abstract: Automated driving is an active area of research in both industry and academia. Automated Parking, which is automated driving in a restricted scenario of parking with low speed manoeuvring, is a key enabling product for fully autonomous driving systems. It is also an important milestone from the perspective of a higher end system built from the previous generation driver assistance systems comprising of collision warning, pedestrian detection, etc. In this paper, we discuss the design and implementation of an automated parking system from the perspective of computer vision algorithms. Designing a low-cost system with functional safety is challenging and leads to a large gap between the prototype and the end product, in order to handle all the corner cases. We demonstrate how camera systems are crucial for addressing a range of automated parking use cases and also, to add robustness to systems based on active distance measuring sensors, such as ultrasonics and radar. The key vision modules which realize the parking use cases are 3D reconstruction, parking slot marking recognition, freespace and vehicle/pedestrian detection. We detail the important parking use cases and demonstrate how to combine the vision modules to form a robust parking system. To the best of the authors' knowledge, this is the first detailed discussion of a systemic view of a commercial automated parking system.

Designing a low-cost system with functional safety is challenging and leads to a large gap between the prototype and the end product, in order to handle all the corner cases. We demonstrate how camera systems are crucial for addressing a range of automated parking use cases and also, to add robustness to systems based on active distance measuring sensors, such as ultrasonics and radar. The key vision modules which realize the parking use cases are 3D reconstruction, parking slot marking recognition, freespace and vehicle/pedestrian detection. We detail the important parking use cases and demonstrate how to combine the vision modules to form a robust parking system. To the best of the authors' knowledge, this is the first detailed discussion of a systemic view of a commercial automated parking system.
abstract_zh: 自动驾驶是工业界和学术界的一个活跃的研究领域。自动停车是在停车受限场景下低速行驶的自动驾驶，是全自动驾驶系统的关键赋能产品。从上一代驾驶员辅助系统（包括碰撞警告、行人检测等）构建的更高端系统的角度来看，这也是一个重要的里程碑。在本文中，我们从计算机视觉算法的角度讨论自动停车系统的设计和实现。设计具有功能安全性的低成本系统具有挑战性，并且会导致原型和最终产品之间存在巨大差距，无法处理所有极端情况。我们展示了摄像头系统对于解决一系列自动停车用例以及增加基于主动距离测量传感器（例如超声波和雷达）的系统的鲁棒性至关重要。实现停车用例的关键视觉模块是 3D 重建、停车位标记识别、自由空间和车辆/行人检测。我们详细介绍了重要的停车用例，并演示了如何结合视觉模块来形成强大的停车系统。据作者所知，这是对商业自动停车系统系统观点的首次详细讨论。

AI.tldr: 本文主要讨论了基于计算机视觉算法的自动泊车系统的设计与实现。
AI.motivation: 自动泊车是实现完全自动驾驶系统的重要里程碑，同时在成本与功能安全之间存在较大差距，因此需要研究基于计算机视觉的解决方案。
AI.method: 本文详细介绍了计算机视觉模块，如三维重建、停车位标记识别、自由空间及车辆/行人检测，并展示了如何结合这些模块构建鲁棒的自动泊车系统。
AI.result: 本文首次系统性地讨论了商用自动泊车系统的实现，展示了基于计算机视觉的系统如何增强基于主动测距传感器的系统鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 基于计算机视觉的自动泊车系统是实现自动驾驶的重要一步，未来需要进一步解决原型与实际产品之间的差距，并处理各种边界情况。

authors_text: Zhengsu Chen,Lingxi Xie,Jianwei Niu,Xuefeng Liu,Longhui Wei,Qi Tian
title: Visformer: The Vision-friendly Transformer
title_zh: Visformer：视觉友好的 Transformer
abstract: The past year has witnessed the rapid development of applying the Transformer module to vision problems. While some researchers have demonstrated that Transformer-based models enjoy a favorable ability of fitting data, there are still growing number of evidences showing that these models suffer over-fitting especially when the training data is limited. This paper offers an empirical study by performing step-by-step operations to gradually transit a Transformer-based model to a convolution-based model. The results we obtain during the transition process deliver useful messages for improving visual recognition. Based on these observations, we propose a new architecture named Visformer, which is abbreviated from the `Vision-friendly Transformer'. With the same computational complexity, Visformer outperforms both the Transformer-based and convolution-based models in terms of ImageNet classification accuracy, and the advantage becomes more significant when the model complexity is lower or the training set is smaller. The code is available at https://github.com/danczs/Visformer.
summary: The past year has witnessed the rapid development of applying the Transformer module to vision problems. While some researchers have demonstrated that Transformer-based models enjoy a favorable ability of fitting data, there are still growing number of evidences showing that these models suffer over-fitting especially when the training data is limited. This paper offers an empirical study by performing step-by-step operations to gradually transit a Transformer-based model to a convolution-based model. The results we obtain during the transition process deliver useful messages for improving visual recognition. Based on these observations, we propose a new architecture named Visformer, which is abbreviated from the `Vision-friendly Transformer'. With the same computational complexity, Visformer outperforms both the Transformer-based and convolution-based models in terms of ImageNet classification accuracy, and the advantage becomes more significant when the model complexity is lower or the training set is smaller. The code is available at https://github.com/danczs/Visformer.
abstract_zh: 过去的一年见证了Transformer模块在视觉问题上的快速发展。虽然一些研究人员已经证明基于 Transformer 的模型具有良好的数据拟合能力，但仍有越来越多的证据表明这些模型会出现过度拟合，尤其是在训练数据有限的情况下。本文通过执行逐步操作将基于 Transformer 的模型逐渐过渡到基于卷积的模型提供了实证研究。我们在过渡过程中获得的结果为改善视觉识别提供了有用的信息。基于这些观察，我们提出了一种名为 Visformer 的新架构，它是“Vision-friend Transformer”的缩写。在相同的计算复杂度下，Visformer 在 ImageNet 分类精度方面均优于基于 Transformer 和基于卷积的模型，并且当模型复杂度较低或训练集较小时，优势变得更加明显。代码可在 https://github.com/danczs/Visformer 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Visformer的视觉友好型Transformer架构，旨在解决现有Transformer模型在视觉任务中的过拟合问题并提升性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管Transformer在视觉任务中表现出色，但其在数据量有限时易出现过拟合问题，需探索更优的视觉模型设计。
AI.method: 通过逐步将Transformer模型过渡到卷积模型，分析过渡过程中的关键特征，并据此设计Visformer架构。
AI.result: Visformer在保持相同计算复杂度的前提下，ImageNet分类准确率优于Transformer和卷积模型，尤其在低复杂度或小数据集场景下优势显著。
AI.conclusion: Visformer为视觉任务提供了兼顾性能与泛化的有效解决方案，验证了混合架构设计的潜力。

tldr: 本文提出一种名为Visformer的视觉友好型Transformer架构，旨在解决现有Transformer模型在视觉任务中的过拟合问题并提升性能。
motivation: 尽管Transformer在视觉任务中表现出色，但其在数据量有限时易出现过拟合问题，需探索更优的视觉模型设计。
method: 通过逐步将Transformer模型过渡到卷积模型，分析过渡过程中的关键特征，并据此设计Visformer架构。
result: Visformer在保持相同计算复杂度的前提下，ImageNet分类准确率优于Transformer和卷积模型，尤其在低复杂度或小数据集场景下优势显著。
conclusion: Visformer为视觉任务提供了兼顾性能与泛化的有效解决方案，验证了混合架构设计的潜力。
search_text: Visformer: The Vision-friendly Transformer Visformer：视觉友好的 Transformer The past year has witnessed the rapid development of applying the Transformer module to vision problems. While some researchers have demonstrated that Transformer-based models enjoy a favorable ability of fitting data, there are still growing number of evidences showing that these models suffer over-fitting especially when the training data is limited. This paper offers an empirical study by performing step-by-step operations to gradually transit a Transformer-based model to a convolution-based model. The results we obtain during the transition process deliver useful messages for improving visual recognition. Based on these observations, we propose a new architecture named Visformer, which is abbreviated from the `Vision-friendly Transformer'. With the same computational complexity, Visformer outperforms both the Transformer-based and convolution-based models in terms of ImageNet classification accuracy, and the advantage becomes more significant when the model complexity is lower or the training set is smaller. The code is available at https://github.com/danczs/Visformer. 过去的一年见证了Transformer模块在视觉问题上的快速发展。虽然一些研究人员已经证明基于 Transformer 的模型具有良好的数据拟合能力，但仍有越来越多的证据表明这些模型会出现过度拟合，尤其是在训练数据有限的情况下。本文通过执行逐步操作将基于 Transformer 的模型逐渐过渡到基于卷积的模型提供了实证研究。我们在过渡过程中获得的结果为改善视觉识别提供了有用的信息。基于这些观察，我们提出了一种名为 Visformer 的新架构，它是“Vision-friend Transformer”的缩写。在相同的计算复杂度下，Visformer 在 ImageNet 分类精度方面均优于基于 Transformer 和基于卷积的模型，并且当模型复杂度较低或训练集较小时，优势变得更加明显。代码可在 https://github.com/danczs/Visformer 获取。 本文提出一种名为Visformer的视觉友好型Transformer架构，旨在解决现有Transformer模型在视觉任务中的过拟合问题并提升性能。 Zhengsu Chen,Lingxi Xie,Jianwei Niu,Xuefeng Liu,Longhui Wei,Qi Tian cs.CV

title: Spatio-Temporal Pruning and Quantization for Low-latency Spiking Neural Networks
title_zh: 低延迟尖峰神经网络的时空剪枝和量化
abstract: Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) are a promising alternative to traditional deep learning methods since they perform event-driven information processing. However, a major drawback of SNNs is high inference latency. The efficiency of SNNs could be enhanced using compression methods such as pruning and quantization. Notably, SNNs, unlike their non-spiking counterparts, consist of a temporal dimension, the compression of which can lead to latency reduction. In this paper, we propose spatial and temporal pruning of SNNs. First, structured spatial pruning is performed by determining the layer-wise significant dimensions using principal component analysis of the average accumulated membrane potential of the neurons. This step leads to 10-14X model compression. Additionally, it enables inference with lower latency and decreases the spike count per inference. To further reduce latency, temporal pruning is performed by gradually reducing the timesteps while training. The networks are trained using surrogate gradient descent based backpropagation and we validate the results on CIFAR10 and CIFAR100, using VGG architectures. The spatiotemporally pruned SNNs achieve 89.04% and 66.4% accuracy on CIFAR10 and CIFAR100, respectively, while performing inference with 3-30X reduced latency compared to state-of-the-art SNNs. Moreover, they require 8-14X lesser compute energy compared to their unpruned standard deep learning counterparts. The energy numbers are obtained by multiplying the number of operations with energy per operation. These SNNs also provide 1-4% higher robustness against Gaussian noise corrupted inputs. Furthermore, we perform weight quantization and find that performance remains reasonably stable up to 5-bit quantization.
summary: Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) are a promising alternative to traditional deep learning methods since they perform event-driven information processing. However, a major drawback of SNNs is high inference latency. The efficiency of SNNs could be enhanced using compression methods such as pruning and quantization. Notably, SNNs, unlike their non-spiking counterparts, consist of a temporal dimension, the compression of which can lead to latency reduction. In this paper, we propose spatial and temporal pruning of SNNs. First, structured spatial pruning is performed by determining the layer-wise significant dimensions using principal component analysis of the average accumulated membrane potential of the neurons. This step leads to 10-14X model compression. Additionally, it enables inference with lower latency and decreases the spike count per inference. To further reduce latency, temporal pruning is performed by gradually reducing the timesteps while training. The networks are trained using surrogate gradient descent based backpropagation and we validate the results on CIFAR10 and CIFAR100, using VGG architectures. The spatiotemporally pruned SNNs achieve 89.04% and 66.4% accuracy on CIFAR10 and CIFAR100, respectively, while performing inference with 3-30X reduced latency compared to state-of-the-art SNNs. Moreover, they require 8-14X lesser compute energy compared to their unpruned standard deep learning counterparts. The energy numbers are obtained by multiplying the number of operations with energy per operation. These SNNs also provide 1-4% higher robustness against Gaussian noise corrupted inputs. Furthermore, we perform weight quantization and find that performance remains reasonably stable up to 5-bit quantization.
abstract_zh: 尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 是传统深度学习方法的一个有前途的替代方案，因为它们执行事件驱动的信息处理。然而，SNN 的一个主要缺点是推理延迟较高。使用剪枝和量化等压缩方法可以提高 SNN 的效率。值得注意的是，SNN 与非尖峰对应物不同，它由时间维度组成，对其进行压缩可以减少延迟。在本文中，我们提出了 SNN 的空间和时间剪枝。首先，通过使用神经元平均累积膜电位的主成分分析来确定分层显着维度来执行结构化空间修剪。此步骤导致模型压缩 10-14 倍。此外，它还可以降低延迟进行推理，并减少每次推理的峰值计数。为了进一步减少延迟，通过在训练时逐渐减少时间步来执行时间剪枝。网络使用基于反向传播的代理梯度下降进行训练，我们使用 VGG 架构在 CIFAR10 和 CIFAR100 上验证结果。时空修剪的 SNN 在 CIFAR10 和 CIFAR100 上分别达到 89.04% 和 66.4% 的准确率，同时与最先进的 SNN 相比，执行推理时的延迟减少了 3-30 倍。此外，与未经修剪​​的标准深度学习同类产品相比，它们所需的计算能量减少了 8-14 倍。能量数是通过将操作数乘以每次操作的能量来获得的。这些 SNN 还针对高斯噪声损坏的输入提供了 1-4% 的鲁棒性。此外，我们执行权重量化并发现直到 5 位量化时性能仍然相当稳定。

AI.tldr: 本文提出空间和时间剪枝与量化方法，以降低脉冲神经网络（SNN）的推理延迟。
AI.motivation: SNNs虽具事件驱动优势，但存在高推理延迟问题，需通过压缩方法提升效率。
AI.method: 采用主成分分析进行结构化空间剪枝，结合训练时逐步减少时间步的时序剪枝，并基于替代梯度下降法训练模型，同时进行权重量化。
AI.result: 在CIFAR10/CIFAR100上分别达到89.04%/66.4%准确率，延迟降低3-30倍，能耗减少8-14倍，且对高斯噪声更鲁棒。
AI.conclusion: 时空剪枝与量化有效降低SNN延迟和能耗，同时保持较高精度与鲁棒性。

title: Enumeration of Far-Apart Pairs by Decreasing Distance for Faster Hyperbolicity Computation
title_zh: 通过减少距离来枚举相距较远的对以加快双曲性计算
abstract: Hyperbolicity is a graph parameter which indicates how much the shortest-path distance metric of a graph deviates from a tree metric. It is used in various fields such as networking, security, and bioinformatics for the classification of complex networks, the design of routing schemes, and the analysis of graph algorithms. Despite recent progress, computing the hyperbolicity of a graph remains challenging. Indeed, the best known algorithm has time complexity $O(n^{3.69})$, which is prohibitive for large graphs, and the most efficient algorithms in practice have space complexity $O(n^2)$. Thus, time as well as space are bottlenecks for computing hyperbolicity. In this paper, we design a tool for enumerating all far-apart pairs of a graph by decreasing distances. A node pair $(u, v)$ of a graph is far-apart if both $v$ is a leaf of all shortest-path trees rooted at $u$ and $u$ is a leaf of all shortest-path trees rooted at $v$. This notion was previously used to drastically reduce the computation time for hyperbolicity in practice. However, it required the computation of the distance matrix to sort all pairs of nodes by decreasing distance, which requires an infeasible amount of memory already for medium-sized graphs. We present a new data structure that avoids this memory bottleneck in practice and for the first time enables computing the hyperbolicity of several large graphs that were far out-of-reach using previous algorithms. For some instances, we reduce the memory consumption by at least two orders of magnitude. Furthermore, we show that for many graphs, only a very small fraction of far-apart pairs have to be considered for the hyperbolicity computation, explaining this drastic reduction of memory. As iterating over far-apart pairs in decreasing order without storing them explicitly is a very general tool, we believe that our approach might also be relevant to other problems.
summary: Hyperbolicity is a graph parameter which indicates how much the shortest-path distance metric of a graph deviates from a tree metric. It is used in various fields such as networking, security, and bioinformatics for the classification of complex networks, the design of routing schemes, and the analysis of graph algorithms. Despite recent progress, computing the hyperbolicity of a graph remains challenging. Indeed, the best known algorithm has time complexity $O(n^{3.69})$, which is prohibitive for large graphs, and the most efficient algorithms in practice have space complexity $O(n^2)$. Thus, time as well as space are bottlenecks for computing hyperbolicity. In this paper, we design a tool for enumerating all far-apart pairs of a graph by decreasing distances. A node pair $(u, v)$ of a graph is far-apart if both $v$ is a leaf of all shortest-path trees rooted at $u$ and $u$ is a leaf of all shortest-path trees rooted at $v$. This notion was previously used to drastically reduce the computation time for hyperbolicity in practice. However, it required the computation of the distance matrix to sort all pairs of nodes by decreasing distance, which requires an infeasible amount of memory already for medium-sized graphs. We present a new data structure that avoids this memory bottleneck in practice and for the first time enables computing the hyperbolicity of several large graphs that were far out-of-reach using previous algorithms. For some instances, we reduce the memory consumption by at least two orders of magnitude. Furthermore, we show that for many graphs, only a very small fraction of far-apart pairs have to be considered for the hyperbolicity computation, explaining this drastic reduction of memory. As iterating over far-apart pairs in decreasing order without storing them explicitly is a very general tool, we believe that our approach might also be relevant to other problems.
abstract_zh: 双曲性是一个图参数，指示图的最短路径距离度量与树度量的偏差程度。它被应用于网络、安全和生物信息学等各个领域，用于复杂网络的分类、路由方案的设计和图算法的分析。尽管最近取得了进展，计算图的双曲性仍然具有挑战性。事实上，最著名的算法的时间复杂度为 $O(n^{3.69})$，这对于大型图来说是令人望而却步的，而实践中最有效的算法的空间复杂度为 $O(n^2)$。因此，时间和空间都是计算双曲性的瓶颈。在本文中，我们设计了一种工具，通过减少距离来枚举图的所有相距较远的对。如果 $v$ 是所有以 $u$ 为根的最短路径树的叶子，并且 $u$ 都是以 $v$ 为根的所有最短路径树的叶子，则图的节点对 $(u, v)$ 相距较远。这个概念以前被用来大大减少实践中双曲性的计算时间。然而，它需要计算距离矩阵来按距离递减对所有节点对进行排序，这对于中等大小的图来说已经需要不可行的内存量。我们提出了一种新的数据结构，它在实践中避免了这种内存瓶颈，并且首次能够计算几个大型图的双曲性，这是使用以前的算法远远无法达到的。对于某些情况，我们将内存消耗减少至少两个数量级。此外，我们表明，对于许多图，在双曲性计算中只需考虑极小部分相距较远的对，这解释了内存的急剧减少。由于以降序迭代相距较远的对而不显式存储它们是一种非常通用的工具，因此我们相信我们的方法也可能与其他问题相关。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过按距离降序枚举远距离节点对的方法，以加速超双曲性计算。
AI.motivation: 现有计算图超双曲性的算法存在时间复杂度高（O(n^3.69)）和空间复杂度高（O(n^2)）的问题，难以处理大规模图数据。
AI.method: 设计了一种新型数据结构，无需显式存储距离矩阵即可按距离降序枚举远距离节点对（u,v）。
AI.result: 内存消耗降低至少两个数量级，并首次实现了对多个超大规模图的超双曲性计算。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为其他需要处理大规模图的问题提供了通用工具，具有广泛的应用潜力。

It is used in various fields such as networking, security, and bioinformatics for the classification of complex networks, the design of routing schemes, and the analysis of graph algorithms. Despite recent progress, computing the hyperbolicity of a graph remains challenging. Indeed, the best known algorithm has time complexity $O(n^{3.69})$, which is prohibitive for large graphs, and the most efficient algorithms in practice have space complexity $O(n^2)$. Thus, time as well as space are bottlenecks for computing hyperbolicity. In this paper, we design a tool for enumerating all far-apart pairs of a graph by decreasing distances. A node pair $(u, v)$ of a graph is far-apart if both $v$ is a leaf of all shortest-path trees rooted at $u$ and $u$ is a leaf of all shortest-path trees rooted at $v$. This notion was previously used to drastically reduce the computation time for hyperbolicity in practice. However, it required the computation of the distance matrix to sort all pairs of nodes by decreasing distance, which requires an infeasible amount of memory already for medium-sized graphs. We present a new data structure that avoids this memory bottleneck in practice and for the first time enables computing the hyperbolicity of several large graphs that were far out-of-reach using previous algorithms. For some instances, we reduce the memory consumption by at least two orders of magnitude. Furthermore, we show that for many graphs, only a very small fraction of far-apart pairs have to be considered for the hyperbolicity computation, explaining this drastic reduction of memory. As iterating over far-apart pairs in decreasing order without storing them explicitly is a very general tool, we believe that our approach might also be relevant to other problems. 双曲性是一个图参数，指示图的最短路径距离度量与树度量的偏差程度。它被应用于网络、安全和生物信息学等各个领域，用于复杂网络的分类、路由方案的设计和图算法的分析。尽管最近取得了进展，计算图的双曲性仍然具有挑战性。事实上，最著名的算法的时间复杂度为 $O(n^{3.69})$，这对于大型图来说是令人望而却步的，而实践中最有效的算法的空间复杂度为 $O(n^2)$。因此，时间和空间都是计算双曲性的瓶颈。在本文中，我们设计了一种工具，通过减少距离来枚举图的所有相距较远的对。如果 $v$ 是所有以 $u$ 为根的最短路径树的叶子，并且 $u$ 都是以 $v$ 为根的所有最短路径树的叶子，则图的节点对 $(u, v)$ 相距较远。这个概念以前被用来大大减少实践中双曲性的计算时间。然而，它需要计算距离矩阵来按距离递减对所有节点对进行排序，这对于中等大小的图来说已经需要不可行的内存量。我们提出了一种新的数据结构，它在实践中避免了这种内存瓶颈，并且首次能够计算几个大型图的双曲性，这是使用以前的算法远远无法达到的。对于某些情况，我们将内存消耗减少至少两个数量级。此外，我们表明，对于许多图，在双曲性计算中只需考虑极小部分相距较远的对，这解释了内存的急剧减少。由于以降序迭代相距较远的对而不显式存储它们是一种非常通用的工具，因此我们相信我们的方法也可能与其他问题相关。 本文提出了一种通过按距离降序枚举远距离节点对的方法，以加速超双曲性计算。 David Coudert,André Nusser,Laurent Viennot cs.DS

authors_text: Wang Zihao,Vandersteen Clair,Demarcy Thomas,Gnansia Dan,Raffaelli Charles,Guevara Nicolas,Delingette Herve
title: Inner-ear Augmented Metal Artifact Reduction with Simulation-based 3D Generative Adversarial Networks
title_zh: 通过基于仿真的 3D 生成对抗网络减少内耳增强金属伪影
abstract: Metal Artifacts creates often difficulties for a high quality visual assessment of post-operative imaging in {c}omputed {t}omography (CT). A vast body of methods have been proposed to tackle this issue, but {these} methods were designed for regular CT scans and their performance is usually insufficient when imaging tiny implants. In the context of post-operative high-resolution {CT} imaging, we propose a 3D metal {artifact} reduction algorithm based on a generative adversarial neural network. It is based on the simulation of physically realistic CT metal artifacts created by cochlea implant electrodes on preoperative images. The generated images serve to train a 3D generative adversarial networks for artifacts reduction. The proposed approach was assessed qualitatively and quantitatively on clinical conventional and cone-beam CT of cochlear implant postoperative images. These experiments show that the proposed method {outperforms other} general metal artifact reduction approaches.
summary: Metal Artifacts creates often difficulties for a high quality visual assessment of post-operative imaging in {c}omputed {t}omography (CT). A vast body of methods have been proposed to tackle this issue, but {these} methods were designed for regular CT scans and their performance is usually insufficient when imaging tiny implants. In the context of post-operative high-resolution {CT} imaging, we propose a 3D metal {artifact} reduction algorithm based on a generative adversarial neural network. It is based on the simulation of physically realistic CT metal artifacts created by cochlea implant electrodes on preoperative images. The generated images serve to train a 3D generative adversarial networks for artifacts reduction. The proposed approach was assessed qualitatively and quantitatively on clinical conventional and cone-beam CT of cochlear implant postoperative images. These experiments show that the proposed method {outperforms other} general metal artifact reduction approaches.
abstract_zh: 金属伪影常常给计算机断层扫描 (CT) 中术后成像的高质量视觉评估带来困难。人们已经提出了大量方法来解决这个问题，但这些方法是为常规 CT 扫描而设计的，在对微小植入物进行成像时，它们的性能通常不足。在术后高分辨率 {CT} 成像的背景下，我们提出了一种基于生成对抗神经网络的 3D 金属 {artifact} 减少算法。它基于对术前图像上耳蜗植入电极产生的物理真实 CT 金属伪影的模拟。生成的图像用于训练 3D 生成对抗网络以减少伪影。所提出的方法在人工耳蜗植入术后图像的临床常规和锥束 CT 上进行了定性和定量评估。这些实验表明，所提出的方法{优于其他}一般金属伪影减少方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于模拟的3D生成对抗网络（GAN）的金属伪影减少算法，用于改善耳蜗植入术后高分辨率CT影像的质量。
AI.motivation: 现有金属伪影减少方法在处理微型植入物（如耳蜗植入电极）时效果不足，需针对性优化术后高分辨率CT影像的视觉评估。
AI.method: 通过模拟耳蜗植入电极在术前影像中产生的物理真实金属伪影，生成训练数据以训练3D GAN模型，实现伪影减少。
AI.result: 在临床常规CT和锥形束CT数据集上，该方法在定性和定量评估中均优于传统金属伪影减少方法。
AI.conclusion: 基于模拟的3D GAN方法能有效减少耳蜗植入术后CT影像中的金属伪影，为微型植入物的高分辨率成像提供新解决方案。
