authors_text: Jiaoyang Yin,Yiling Xu,Hao Chen,Yunfei Zhang,Steve Appleby,Zhan Ma
title: ANT: Learning Accurate Network Throughput for Better Adaptive Video Streaming
title_zh: ANT：学习准确的网络吞吐量以实现更好的自适应视频流
abstract: Adaptive Bit Rate (ABR) decision plays a crucial role for ensuring satisfactory Quality of Experience (QoE) in video streaming applications, in which past network statistics are mainly leveraged for future network bandwidth prediction. However, most algorithms, either rules-based or learning-driven approaches, feed throughput traces or classified traces based on traditional statistics (i.e., mean/standard deviation) to drive ABR decision, leading to compromised performances in specific scenarios. Given the diverse network connections (e.g., WiFi, cellular and wired link) from time to time, this paper thus proposes to learn the ANT (a.k.a., Accurate Network Throughput) model to characterize the full spectrum of network throughput dynamics in the past for deriving the proper network condition associated with a specific cluster of network throughput segments (NTS). Each cluster of NTS is then used to generate a dedicated ABR model, by which we wish to better capture the network dynamics for diverse connections. We have integrated the ANT model with existing reinforcement learning (RL)-based ABR decision engine, where different ABR models are applied to respond to the accurate network sensing for better rate decision. Extensive experiment results show that our approach can significantly improve the user QoE by 65.5% and 31.3% respectively, compared with the state-of-the-art Pensive and Oboe, across a wide range of network scenarios.
summary: Adaptive Bit Rate (ABR) decision plays a crucial role for ensuring satisfactory Quality of Experience (QoE) in video streaming applications, in which past network statistics are mainly leveraged for future network bandwidth prediction. However, most algorithms, either rules-based or learning-driven approaches, feed throughput traces or classified traces based on traditional statistics (i.e., mean/standard deviation) to drive ABR decision, leading to compromised performances in specific scenarios. Given the diverse network connections (e.g., WiFi, cellular and wired link) from time to time, this paper thus proposes to learn the ANT (a.k.a., Accurate Network Throughput) model to characterize the full spectrum of network throughput dynamics in the past for deriving the proper network condition associated with a specific cluster of network throughput segments (NTS). Each cluster of NTS is then used to generate a dedicated ABR model, by which we wish to better capture the network dynamics for diverse connections. We have integrated the ANT model with existing reinforcement learning (RL)-based ABR decision engine, where different ABR models are applied to respond to the accurate network sensing for better rate decision. Extensive experiment results show that our approach can significantly improve the user QoE by 65.5% and 31.3% respectively, compared with the state-of-the-art Pensive and Oboe, across a wide range of network scenarios.
abstract_zh: 自适应比特率 (ABR) 决策对于确保视频流应用中令人满意的体验质量 (QoE) 起着至关重要的作用，其中过去的网络统计数据主要用于未来的网络带宽预测。然而，大多数算法，无论是基于规则的还是学习驱动的方法，都会根据传统统计数据（即平均值/标准差）进行馈送吞吐量跟踪或分类跟踪来驱动 ABR 决策，从而导致特定场景中的性能受到影响。考虑到时不时出现的各种网络连接（例如 WiFi、蜂窝和有线链路），本文建议学习 ANT（又名精确网络吞吐量）模型来表征过去网络吞吐量动态的全谱，从而导出与特定网络吞吐量段 (NTS) 集群相关的正确网络条件。然后，每个 NTS 集群都用于生成专用的 ABR 模型，我们希望通过该模型更好地捕获不同连接的网络动态。我们将 ANT 模型与现有的基于强化学习 (RL) 的 ABR 决策引擎集成，其中应用不同的 ABR 模型来响应准确的网络感知，以实现更好的速率决策。大量的实验结果表明，与最先进的 Pitive 和 Oboe 相比，我们的方法在各种网络场景下可以将用户 QoE 分别显着提高 65.5% 和 31.3%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ANT模型，通过学习准确的网络吞吐量动态，优化自适应视频流媒体的ABR决策以提升用户体验。
AI.motivation: 传统ABR算法依赖简单统计特征（如均值/标准差）分类网络吞吐量，导致在复杂网络场景下性能下降，无法适应WiFi、蜂窝等多样化的网络连接。
AI.method: 通过聚类历史网络吞吐量片段（NTS）生成专用ABR模型，并与强化学习决策引擎结合，基于准确的网络感知动态调整传输速率。
AI.result: 实验表明，在多种网络场景下，ANT模型相比Pensive和Oboe分别提升用户QoE 65.5%和31.3%。
AI.conclusion: ANT模型通过精准捕捉网络动态特性，显著提升了自适应视频流媒体的用户体验，适用于多样化网络环境。

Each cluster of NTS is then used to generate a dedicated ABR model, by which we wish to better capture the network dynamics for diverse connections. We have integrated the ANT model with existing reinforcement learning (RL)-based ABR decision engine, where different ABR models are applied to respond to the accurate network sensing for better rate decision. Extensive experiment results show that our approach can significantly improve the user QoE by 65.5% and 31.3% respectively, compared with the state-of-the-art Pensive and Oboe, across a wide range of network scenarios. 自适应比特率 (ABR) 决策对于确保视频流应用中令人满意的体验质量 (QoE) 起着至关重要的作用，其中过去的网络统计数据主要用于未来的网络带宽预测。然而，大多数算法，无论是基于规则的还是学习驱动的方法，都会根据传统统计数据（即平均值/标准差）进行馈送吞吐量跟踪或分类跟踪来驱动 ABR 决策，从而导致特定场景中的性能受到影响。考虑到时不时出现的各种网络连接（例如 WiFi、蜂窝和有线链路），本文建议学习 ANT（又名精确网络吞吐量）模型来表征过去网络吞吐量动态的全谱，从而导出与特定网络吞吐量段 (NTS) 集群相关的正确网络条件。然后，每个 NTS 集群都用于生成专用的 ABR 模型，我们希望通过该模型更好地捕获不同连接的网络动态。我们将 ANT 模型与现有的基于强化学习 (RL) 的 ABR 决策引擎集成，其中应用不同的 ABR 模型来响应准确的网络感知，以实现更好的速率决策。大量的实验结果表明，与最先进的 Pitive 和 Oboe 相比，我们的方法在各种网络场景下可以将用户 QoE 分别显着提高 65.5% 和 31.3%。 本文提出ANT模型，通过学习准确的网络吞吐量动态，优化自适应视频流媒体的ABR决策以提升用户体验。 Jiaoyang Yin,Yiling Xu,Hao Chen,Yunfei Zhang,Steve Appleby,Zhan Ma cs.MM,cs.AI

title: Dense Point Prediction: A Simple Baseline for Crowd Counting and Localization
title_zh: 密集点预测：人群计数和定位的简单基线
comment: 6 pages. Accepted at ICME Workshop 2021
comments: 6 pages. Accepted at ICME Workshop 2021
abstract: In this paper, we propose a simple yet effective crowd counting and localization network named SCALNet. Unlike most existing works that separate the counting and localization tasks, we consider those tasks as a pixel-wise dense prediction problem and integrate them into an end-to-end framework. Specifically, for crowd counting, we adopt a counting head supervised by the Mean Square Error (MSE) loss. For crowd localization, the key insight is to recognize the keypoint of people, i.e., the center point of heads. We propose a localization head to distinguish dense crowds trained by two loss functions, i.e., Negative-Suppressed Focal (NSF) loss and False-Positive (FP) loss, which balances the positive/negative examples and handles the false-positive predictions. Experiments on the recent and large-scale benchmark, NWPU-Crowd, show that our approach outperforms the state-of-the-art methods by more than 5% and 10% improvement in crowd localization and counting tasks, respectively. The code is publicly available at https://github.com/WangyiNTU/SCALNet.
summary: In this paper, we propose a simple yet effective crowd counting and localization network named SCALNet. Unlike most existing works that separate the counting and localization tasks, we consider those tasks as a pixel-wise dense prediction problem and integrate them into an end-to-end framework. Specifically, for crowd counting, we adopt a counting head supervised by the Mean Square Error (MSE) loss. For crowd localization, the key insight is to recognize the keypoint of people, i.e., the center point of heads. We propose a localization head to distinguish dense crowds trained by two loss functions, i.e., Negative-Suppressed Focal (NSF) loss and False-Positive (FP) loss, which balances the positive/negative examples and handles the false-positive predictions. Experiments on the recent and large-scale benchmark, NWPU-Crowd, show that our approach outperforms the state-of-the-art methods by more than 5% and 10% improvement in crowd localization and counting tasks, respectively. The code is publicly available at https://github.com/WangyiNTU/SCALNet.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种简单而有效的人群计数和定位网络，名为 SCALNet。与大多数将计数和定位任务分开的现有工作不同，我们将这些任务视为像素密集预测问题并将它们集成到端到端框架中。具体来说，对于人群计数，我们采用由均方误差（MSE）损失监督的计数头。对于人群定位，关键的洞察是识别人的关键点，即头部的中心点。我们提出了一个定位头来区分由两个损失函数训练的密集人群，即负抑制焦点（NSF）损失和假阳性（FP）损失，它平衡正/负示例并处理假阳性预测。在最近的大规模基准 NWPU-Crowd 上进行的实验表明，我们的方法在人群定位和计数任务方面分别比最先进的方法提高了 5% 和 10% 以上。该代码可在 https://github.com/WangyiNTU/SCALNet 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SCALNet的简单而有效的网络，用于人群计数和定位任务。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通常将计数和定位任务分开处理，而本文认为应将其整合为像素级密集预测问题，以提升整体性能。
AI.method: 采用均方误差（MSE）损失的计数头和结合负样本抑制焦点（NSF）损失与误检（FP）损失的定位头，通过端到端框架同时预测人群密度和头部中心点。
AI.result: 在NWPU-Crowd基准测试中，定位任务提升超5%，计数任务提升超10%，优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 整合计数与定位任务的密集预测框架能有效提升性能，代码已开源。

authors_text: Yinjiang Cai,Zeyu Cui,Shu Wu,Zhen Lei,Xibo Ma
title: Represent Items by Items: An Enhanced Representation of the Target Item for Recommendation
title_zh: 按项目表示项目：推荐目标项目的增强表示
comment: 10 pages,7 figures
comments: 10 pages,7 figures
abstract: Item-based collaborative filtering (ICF) has been widely used in industrial applications such as recommender system and online advertising. It models users' preference on target items by the items they have interacted with. Recent models use methods such as attention mechanism and deep neural network to learn the user representation and scoring function more accurately. However, despite their effectiveness, such models still overlook a problem that performance of ICF methods heavily depends on the quality of item representation especially the target item representation. In fact, due to the long-tail distribution in the recommendation, most item embeddings can not represent the semantics of items accurately and thus degrade the performance of current ICF methods. In this paper, we propose an enhanced representation of the target item which distills relevant information from the co-occurrence items. We design sampling strategies to sample fix number of co-occurrence items for the sake of noise reduction and computational cost. Considering the different importance of sampled items to the target item, we apply attention mechanism to selectively adopt the semantic information of the sampled items. Our proposed Co-occurrence based Enhanced Representation model (CER) learns the scoring function by a deep neural network with the attentive user representation and fusion of raw representation and enhanced representation of target item as input. With the enhanced representation, CER has stronger representation power for the tail items compared to the state-of-the-art ICF methods. Extensive experiments on two public benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness of CER.
summary: Item-based collaborative filtering (ICF) has been widely used in industrial applications such as recommender system and online advertising. It models users' preference on target items by the items they have interacted with. Recent models use methods such as attention mechanism and deep neural network to learn the user representation and scoring function more accurately. However, despite their effectiveness, such models still overlook a problem that performance of ICF methods heavily depends on the quality of item representation especially the target item representation. In fact, due to the long-tail distribution in the recommendation, most item embeddings can not represent the semantics of items accurately and thus degrade the performance of current ICF methods. In this paper, we propose an enhanced representation of the target item which distills relevant information from the co-occurrence items. We design sampling strategies to sample fix number of co-occurrence items for the sake of noise reduction and computational cost. Our proposed Co-occurrence based Enhanced Representation model (CER) learns the scoring function by a deep neural network with the attentive user representation and fusion of raw representation and enhanced representation of target item as input. With the enhanced representation, CER has stronger representation power for the tail items compared to the state-of-the-art ICF methods. Extensive experiments on two public benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness of CER.
abstract_zh: 基于项目的协同过滤（ICF）已广泛应用于推荐系统和在线广告等工业应用中。它通过用户与之交互的项目来模拟用户对目标项目的偏好。最近的模型使用注意力机制和深度神经网络等方法来更准确地学习用户表示和评分函数。然而，尽管它们很有效，但此类模型仍然忽视了一个问题，即 ICF 方法的性能很大程度上取决于项目表示的质量，尤其是目标项目表示的质量。事实上，由于推荐中的长尾分布，大多数项目嵌入不能准确地表示项目的语义，从而降低了当前 ICF 方法的性能。在本文中，我们提出了目标项目的增强表示，它从共现项目中提取相关信息。为了降低噪声和计算成本，我们设计了采样策略来对固定数量的共现项进行采样。考虑到采样项对目标项的重要性不同，我们应用注意力机制来选择性地采用采样项的语义信息。我们提出的基于共现的增强表示模型（CER）通过深度神经网络学习评分函数，以细心的用户表示以及目标项目的原始表示和增强表示的融合作为输入。通过增强的表示，与最先进的 ICF 方法相比，CER 对尾项具有更强的表示能力。对两个公共基准的广泛实验证明了 CER 的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于共现物品的增强表示模型（CER），通过优化目标物品的表示来提升基于物品的协同过滤（ICF）推荐效果。
AI.motivation: 现有ICF方法因物品表示质量（尤其是长尾物品）不足导致性能下降，需改进目标物品的语义表示以增强推荐效果。
AI.method: 通过采样共现物品并结合注意力机制筛选关键信息，融合原始表示与增强表示，利用深度神经网络学习评分函数。
AI.result: 在两个公开数据集上实验表明，CER在长尾物品推荐中优于现有ICF方法，验证了增强表示的有效性。
AI.conclusion: CER通过优化目标物品表示显著提升了推荐性能，尤其在处理长尾物品时表现突出，为ICF方法提供了新思路。

title: A deep learning model for gastric diffuse-type adenocarcinoma classification in whole slide images
title_zh: 全切片图像中胃弥漫型腺癌分类的深度学习模型
abstract: Gastric diffuse-type adenocarcinoma represents a disproportionately high percentage of cases of gastric cancers occurring in the young, and its relative incidence seems to be on the rise. Usually it affects the body of the stomach, and presents shorter duration and worse prognosis compared with the differentiated (intestinal) type adenocarcinoma. The main difficulty encountered in the differential diagnosis of gastric adenocarcinomas occurs with the diffuse-type. As the cancer cells of diffuse-type adenocarcinoma are often single and inconspicuous in a background desmoplaia and inflammation, it can often be mistaken for a wide variety of non-neoplastic lesions including gastritis or reactive endothelial cells seen in granulation tissue. In this study we trained deep learning models to classify gastric diffuse-type adenocarcinoma from WSIs. We evaluated the models on five test sets obtained from distinct sources, achieving receiver operator curve (ROC) area under the curves (AUCs) in the range of 0.95-0.99. The highly promising results demonstrate the potential of AI-based computational pathology for aiding pathologists in their diagnostic workflow system.
summary: Gastric diffuse-type adenocarcinoma represents a disproportionately high percentage of cases of gastric cancers occurring in the young, and its relative incidence seems to be on the rise. We evaluated the models on five test sets obtained from distinct sources, achieving receiver operator curve (ROC) area under the curves (AUCs) in the range of 0.95-0.99. The highly promising results demonstrate the potential of AI-based computational pathology for aiding pathologists in their diagnostic workflow system.
abstract_zh: 胃弥漫型腺癌在年轻人胃癌病例中所占比例极高，而且其相对发病率似乎正在上升。通常它会影响胃体，与分化型（肠）型腺癌相比，病程较短，预后较差。胃腺癌鉴别诊断遇到的主要困难是弥漫型。由于弥漫型腺癌的癌细胞在结缔组织增生和炎症背景中通常是单一且不明显的，因此常常被误认为是多种非肿瘤性病变，包括胃炎或肉芽组织中看到的反应性内皮细胞。在这项研究中，我们训练了深度学习模型来对 WSI 中的胃弥漫型腺癌进行分类。我们在从不同来源获得的五个测试集上评估了模型，实现了 0.95-0.99 范围内的受试者工作曲线 (ROC) 曲线下面积 (AUC)。这些极具前景的结果证明了基于人工智能的计算病理学在帮助病理学家诊断工作流程系统方面的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种深度学习模型，用于在全切片图像（WSI）中分类胃弥漫型腺癌。
AI.motivation: 胃弥漫型腺癌在年轻患者中占比高且诊断困难，因其癌细胞常被背景纤维化和炎症掩盖，易误诊为非肿瘤病变，亟需辅助诊断工具。
AI.method: 训练深度学习模型对全切片图像进行分类，并在五个不同来源的测试集上评估模型性能。
AI.result: 模型在五个独立测试集上达到0.95-0.99的ROC曲线下面积（AUC），显示出高度准确的分类能力。
AI.conclusion: 基于AI的计算病理学在胃弥漫型腺癌诊断中具有巨大潜力，可有效辅助病理医生提高诊断效率和准确性。

search_text: A deep learning model for gastric diffuse-type adenocarcinoma classification in whole slide images 全切片图像中胃弥漫型腺癌分类的深度学习模型 Gastric diffuse-type adenocarcinoma represents a disproportionately high percentage of cases of gastric cancers occurring in the young, and its relative incidence seems to be on the rise. Usually it affects the body of the stomach, and presents shorter duration and worse prognosis compared with the differentiated (intestinal) type adenocarcinoma. The main difficulty encountered in the differential diagnosis of gastric adenocarcinomas occurs with the diffuse-type. As the cancer cells of diffuse-type adenocarcinoma are often single and inconspicuous in a background desmoplaia and inflammation, it can often be mistaken for a wide variety of non-neoplastic lesions including gastritis or reactive endothelial cells seen in granulation tissue. In this study we trained deep learning models to classify gastric diffuse-type adenocarcinoma from WSIs. We evaluated the models on five test sets obtained from distinct sources, achieving receiver operator curve (ROC) area under the curves (AUCs) in the range of 0.95-0.99. The highly promising results demonstrate the potential of AI-based computational pathology for aiding pathologists in their diagnostic workflow system. 胃弥漫型腺癌在年轻人胃癌病例中所占比例极高，而且其相对发病率似乎正在上升。通常它会影响胃体，与分化型（肠）型腺癌相比，病程较短，预后较差。胃腺癌鉴别诊断遇到的主要困难是弥漫型。由于弥漫型腺癌的癌细胞在结缔组织增生和炎症背景中通常是单一且不明显的，因此常常被误认为是多种非肿瘤性病变，包括胃炎或肉芽组织中看到的反应性内皮细胞。在这项研究中，我们训练了深度学习模型来对 WSI 中的胃弥漫型腺癌进行分类。我们在从不同来源获得的五个测试集上评估了模型，实现了 0.95-0.99 范围内的受试者工作曲线 (ROC) 曲线下面积 (AUC)。这些极具前景的结果证明了基于人工智能的计算病理学在帮助病理学家诊断工作流程系统方面的潜力。 本文提出了一种深度学习模型，用于在全切片图像（WSI）中分类胃弥漫型腺癌。 Fahdi Kanavati,Masayuki Tsuneki eess.IV,cs.CV

title: EigenGAN: Layer-Wise Eigen-Learning for GANs
title_zh: EigenGAN：GAN 的分层特征学习
comment: ICCV 2021. Code: https://github.com/LynnHo/EigenGAN-Tensorflow
comments: ICCV 2021. Code: https://github.com/LynnHo/EigenGAN-Tensorflow
abstract: Recent studies on Generative Adversarial Network (GAN) reveal that different layers of a generative CNN hold different semantics of the synthesized images. However, few GAN models have explicit dimensions to control the semantic attributes represented in a specific layer. This paper proposes EigenGAN which is able to unsupervisedly mine interpretable and controllable dimensions from different generator layers. Specifically, EigenGAN embeds one linear subspace with orthogonal basis into each generator layer. Via generative adversarial training to learn a target distribution, these layer-wise subspaces automatically discover a set of "eigen-dimensions" at each layer corresponding to a set of semantic attributes or interpretable variations. By traversing the coefficient of a specific eigen-dimension, the generator can produce samples with continuous changes corresponding to a specific semantic attribute. Taking the human face for example, EigenGAN can discover controllable dimensions for high-level concepts such as pose and gender in the subspace of deep layers, as well as low-level concepts such as hue and color in the subspace of shallow layers. Moreover, in the linear case, we theoretically prove that our algorithm derives the principal components as PCA does. Codes can be found in https://github.com/LynnHo/EigenGAN-Tensorflow.
summary: Recent studies on Generative Adversarial Network (GAN) reveal that different layers of a generative CNN hold different semantics of the synthesized images. However, few GAN models have explicit dimensions to control the semantic attributes represented in a specific layer. This paper proposes EigenGAN which is able to unsupervisedly mine interpretable and controllable dimensions from different generator layers. Specifically, EigenGAN embeds one linear subspace with orthogonal basis into each generator layer. Via generative adversarial training to learn a target distribution, these layer-wise subspaces automatically discover a set of "eigen-dimensions" at each layer corresponding to a set of semantic attributes or interpretable variations. By traversing the coefficient of a specific eigen-dimension, the generator can produce samples with continuous changes corresponding to a specific semantic attribute. Taking the human face for example, EigenGAN can discover controllable dimensions for high-level concepts such as pose and gender in the subspace of deep layers, as well as low-level concepts such as hue and color in the subspace of shallow layers. Moreover, in the linear case, we theoretically prove that our algorithm derives the principal components as PCA does. Codes can be found in https://github.com/LynnHo/EigenGAN-Tensorflow.
abstract_zh: 最近对生成对抗网络 (GAN) 的研究表明，生成 CNN 的不同层持有合成图像的不同语义。然而，很少有 GAN 模型具有明确的维度来控制特定层中表示的语义属性。本文提出了 EigenGAN，它能够无监督地从不同的生成器层中挖掘可解释和可控的维度。具体来说，EigenGAN 将一个具有正交基的线性子空间嵌入到每个生成器层中。通过生成对抗训练来学习目标分布，这些分层子空间自动发现每一层的一组“特征维度”，对应于一组语义属性或可解释的变化。通过遍历特定特征维度的系数，生成器可以产生与特定语义属性相对应的连续变化的样本。以人脸为例，EigenGAN 可以在深层子空间中发现姿势、性别等高层概念的可控维度，也可以在浅层子空间中发现色调、颜色等低层概念的可控维度。此外，在线性情况下，我们从理论上证明我们的算法可以像 PCA 一样导出主成分。代码可以在 https://github.com/LynnHo/EigenGAN-Tensorflow 中找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出EigenGAN，通过在生成器各层嵌入线性子空间，实现对生成图像语义属性的可解释和可控控制。
AI.motivation: 现有生成对抗网络（GAN）缺乏对不同生成层语义属性的显式控制维度，难以实现对图像语义的精细操控。
AI.method: 在生成器每一层嵌入正交基的线性子空间，通过对抗训练学习目标分布，自动挖掘各层对应的语义属性维度。
AI.result: 在人脸生成任务中，深层子空间可控制姿态、性别等高层语义，浅层子空间可控制色调、颜色等低层属性，理论证明线性情况下等价于PCA。
AI.conclusion: EigenGAN通过分层特征学习实现了GAN生成过程的语义可解释性与可控性，为生成模型的精细控制提供了新方法。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出EigenGAN，通过在生成器各层嵌入线性子空间，实现对生成图像语义属性的可解释和可控控制。

title: Particle Swarms Reformulated towards a Unified and Flexible Framework
title_zh: 粒子群重新制定为统一且灵活的框架
comment: Preprint The final authenticated article will be published by Springer-Nature in the Lecture Notes in Computer Science series. This research will be presented at the Twelfth International Conference on Swarm Intelligence (ICSI 2021)
comments: Preprint The final authenticated article will be published by Springer-Nature in the Lecture Notes in Computer Science series. This research will be presented at the Twelfth International Conference on Swarm Intelligence (ICSI 2021)
abstract: The Particle Swarm Optimisation (PSO) algorithm has undergone countless modifications and adaptations since its original formulation in 1995. Some of these have become mainstream whereas many others have not been adopted and faded away. Thus, a myriad of alternative formulations have been proposed to the extent that the question arises as to what the basic features of an algorithm must be to belong in the PSO family. The aim of this paper is to establish what defines a PSO algorithm and to attempt to formulate it in such a way that it encompasses many existing variants. Therefore, different versions of the method may be posed as settings within the proposed unified framework. In addition, the proposed formulation generalises, decouples and incorporates features to the method providing more flexibility to the behaviour of each particle. The closed forms of the trajectory difference equation are obtained, different types of behaviour are identified, stochasticity is decoupled, and traditionally global features such as sociometries and constraint-handling are re-defined as particle's attributes.
summary: The Particle Swarm Optimisation (PSO) algorithm has undergone countless modifications and adaptations since its original formulation in 1995. Some of these have become mainstream whereas many others have not been adopted and faded away. Thus, a myriad of alternative formulations have been proposed to the extent that the question arises as to what the basic features of an algorithm must be to belong in the PSO family. The aim of this paper is to establish what defines a PSO algorithm and to attempt to formulate it in such a way that it encompasses many existing variants. Therefore, different versions of the method may be posed as settings within the proposed unified framework. In addition, the proposed formulation generalises, decouples and incorporates features to the method providing more flexibility to the behaviour of each particle. The closed forms of the trajectory difference equation are obtained, different types of behaviour are identified, stochasticity is decoupled, and traditionally global features such as sociometries and constraint-handling are re-defined as particle's attributes.
abstract_zh: 粒子群优化（PSO）算法自 1995 年最初提出以来经历了无数次修改和适应。其中一些已经成为主流，而另一些则没有被采用并逐渐消失。因此，人们提出了无数的替代公式，以至于出现了一个问题：算法必须具有哪些基本特征才能属于 PSO 系列。本文的目的是确定 PSO 算法的定义，并尝试以包含许多现有变体的方式来制定它。因此，该方法的不同版本可以作为所提出的统一框架内的设置。此外，所提出的公式概括、解耦和合并了该方法的特征，为每个粒子的行为提供了更大的灵活性。获得轨迹差分方程的闭合形式，识别不同类型的行为，解耦随机性，并将传统的全局特征（例如社会计量学和约束处理）重新定义为粒子的属性。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在建立粒子群优化算法（PSO）的核心特征，并提出一个统一且灵活的框架以涵盖现有变体。
AI.motivation: 自1995年以来，PSO算法经历了大量修改和适应，但许多变体未被采用，缺乏统一框架导致特征定义模糊。
AI.method: 通过重新公式化PSO，解耦随机性，推导轨迹差分方程的闭合形式，并将传统全局特性（如社会结构）重新定义为粒子属性。
AI.result: 提出统一框架可涵盖多种PSO变体，解耦随机性并增强粒子行为灵活性，同时识别出不同行为类型。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为PSO家族提供了灵活且统一的表述，有助于理解现有变体并指导未来算法设计。

motivation: 自1995年以来，PSO算法经历了大量修改和适应，但许多变体未被采用，缺乏统一框架导致特征定义模糊。
method: 通过重新公式化PSO，解耦随机性，推导轨迹差分方程的闭合形式，并将传统全局特性（如社会结构）重新定义为粒子属性。
result: 提出统一框架可涵盖多种PSO变体，解耦随机性并增强粒子行为灵活性，同时识别出不同行为类型。
conclusion: 该框架为PSO家族提供了灵活且统一的表述，有助于理解现有变体并指导未来算法设计。
search_text: Particle Swarms Reformulated towards a Unified and Flexible Framework 粒子群重新制定为统一且灵活的框架 The Particle Swarm Optimisation (PSO) algorithm has undergone countless modifications and adaptations since its original formulation in 1995. Some of these have become mainstream whereas many others have not been adopted and faded away. Thus, a myriad of alternative formulations have been proposed to the extent that the question arises as to what the basic features of an algorithm must be to belong in the PSO family. The aim of this paper is to establish what defines a PSO algorithm and to attempt to formulate it in such a way that it encompasses many existing variants. Therefore, different versions of the method may be posed as settings within the proposed unified framework. In addition, the proposed formulation generalises, decouples and incorporates features to the method providing more flexibility to the behaviour of each particle. The closed forms of the trajectory difference equation are obtained, different types of behaviour are identified, stochasticity is decoupled, and traditionally global features such as sociometries and constraint-handling are re-defined as particle's attributes. 粒子群优化（PSO）算法自 1995 年最初提出以来经历了无数次修改和适应。其中一些已经成为主流，而另一些则没有被采用并逐渐消失。因此，人们提出了无数的替代公式，以至于出现了一个问题：算法必须具有哪些基本特征才能属于 PSO 系列。本文的目的是确定 PSO 算法的定义，并尝试以包含许多现有变体的方式来制定它。因此，该方法的不同版本可以作为所提出的统一框架内的设置。此外，所提出的公式概括、解耦和合并了该方法的特征，为每个粒子的行为提供了更大的灵活性。获得轨迹差分方程的闭合形式，识别不同类型的行为，解耦随机性，并将传统的全局特征（例如社会计量学和约束处理）重新定义为粒子的属性。 本文旨在建立粒子群优化算法（PSO）的核心特征，并提出一个统一且灵活的框架以涵盖现有变体。 Mauro Sebastián Innocente cs.NE

title: Contextualized Keyword Representations for Multi-modal Retinal Image Captioning
title_zh: 多模态视网膜图像描述的上下文关键字表示
comment: This paper is accepted by ACM International Conference on Multimedia Retrieval (ICMR), 2021
comments: This paper is accepted by ACM International Conference on Multimedia Retrieval (ICMR), 2021
abstract: Medical image captioning automatically generates a medical description to describe the content of a given medical image. A traditional medical image captioning model creates a medical description only based on a single medical image input. Hence, an abstract medical description or concept is hard to be generated based on the traditional approach. Such a method limits the effectiveness of medical image captioning. Multi-modal medical image captioning is one of the approaches utilized to address this problem. In multi-modal medical image captioning, textual input, e.g., expert-defined keywords, is considered as one of the main drivers of medical description generation. Thus, encoding the textual input and the medical image effectively are both important for the task of multi-modal medical image captioning. In this work, a new end-to-end deep multi-modal medical image captioning model is proposed. Contextualized keyword representations, textual feature reinforcement, and masked self-attention are used to develop the proposed approach. Based on the evaluation of the existing multi-modal medical image captioning dataset, experimental results show that the proposed model is effective with the increase of +53.2% in BLEU-avg and +18.6% in CIDEr, compared with the state-of-the-art method.

abstract_zh: 医学图像字幕自动生成医学描述来描述给定医学图像的内容。传统的医学图像字幕模型仅基于单个医学图像输入创建医学描述。因此，基于传统方法很难生成抽象的医学描述或概念。这种方法限制了医学图像字幕的有效性。多模态医学图像字幕是用于解决该问题的方法之一。在多模态医学图像字幕中，文本输入（例如专家定义的关键字）被认为是医学描述生成的主要驱动因素之一。因此，有效地编码文本输入和医学图像对于多模态医学图像描述任务都很重要。在这项工作中，提出了一种新的端到端深度多模态医学图像字幕模型。上下文化关键字表示、文本特征强化和屏蔽自注意力用于开发所提出的方法。基于对现有多模态医学图像字幕数据集的评估，实验结果表明，与最先进的方法相比，所提出的模型是有效的，BLEU-avg 提高了+53.2%，CIDEr 提高了+18.6%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于上下文化关键词表示的多模态视网膜图像字幕生成模型，通过结合文本和图像信息提升医学描述生成效果。
AI.motivation: 传统单模态医学图像字幕生成难以生成抽象描述，而现有多模态方法在文本与图像信息融合方面存在不足，需探索更有效的跨模态表示学习方式。
AI.method: 设计端到端模型，融合上下文化关键词表示、文本特征强化模块和掩码自注意力机制，实现文本与图像特征的协同建模。
AI.result: 在标准数据集上，BLEU-avg指标提升53.2%，CIDEr指标提升18.6%，显著优于现有最佳方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过有效整合文本关键词与图像特征，所提模型显著提升了多模态医学图像字幕生成质量，验证了上下文化表示与跨模态交互机制的有效性。

authors_text: Konstantin Klemmer,Sudipan Saha,Matthias Kahl,Tianlin Xu,Xiao Xiang Zhu
title: Generative modeling of spatio-temporal weather patterns with extreme event conditioning
title_zh: 极端事件调节的时空天气模式生成模型
comment: ICLR'21 Workshop AI: Modeling Oceans and Climate Change (AIMOCC)
comments: ICLR'21 Workshop AI: Modeling Oceans and Climate Change (AIMOCC)
abstract: Deep generative models are increasingly used to gain insights in the geospatial data domain, e.g., for climate data. However, most existing approaches work with temporal snapshots or assume 1D time-series; few are able to capture spatio-temporal processes simultaneously. Beyond this, Earth-systems data often exhibit highly irregular and complex patterns, for example caused by extreme weather events. Because of climate change, these phenomena are only increasing in frequency. Here, we proposed a novel GAN-based approach for generating spatio-temporal weather patterns conditioned on detected extreme events. Our approach augments GAN generator and discriminator with an encoded extreme weather event segmentation mask. These segmentation masks can be created from raw input using existing event detection frameworks. As such, our approach is highly modular and can be combined with custom GAN architectures. We highlight the applicability of our proposed approach in experiments with real-world surface radiation and zonal wind data.
summary: Deep generative models are increasingly used to gain insights in the geospatial data domain, e.g., for climate data. However, most existing approaches work with temporal snapshots or assume 1D time-series; few are able to capture spatio-temporal processes simultaneously. Beyond this, Earth-systems data often exhibit highly irregular and complex patterns, for example caused by extreme weather events. Because of climate change, these phenomena are only increasing in frequency. Here, we proposed a novel GAN-based approach for generating spatio-temporal weather patterns conditioned on detected extreme events. Our approach augments GAN generator and discriminator with an encoded extreme weather event segmentation mask. These segmentation masks can be created from raw input using existing event detection frameworks. As such, our approach is highly modular and can be combined with custom GAN architectures. We highlight the applicability of our proposed approach in experiments with real-world surface radiation and zonal wind data.
abstract_zh: 深度生成模型越来越多地用于获取地理空间数据领域的见解，例如气候数据。然而，大多数现有方法都使用时间快照或假设一维时间序列；很少有人能够同时捕捉时空过程。除此之外，地球系统数据通常表现出高度不规则和复杂的模式，例如由极端天气事件引起的。由于气候变化，这些现象的频率只会增加。在这里，我们提出了一种基于 GAN 的新颖方法，用于根据检测到的极端事件生成时空天气模式。我们的方法通过编码的极端天气事件分割掩模增强了 GAN 生成器和鉴别器。这些分段掩码可以使用现有的事件检测框架从原始输入创建。因此，我们的方法是高度模块化的，可以与自定义 GAN 架构相结合。我们强调了我们提出的方法在真实世界表面辐射和纬向风数据实验中的适用性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于GAN的生成模型，用于在极端天气事件条件下生成时空天气模式。
AI.motivation: 现有生成模型难以同时捕捉时空数据的复杂性，且极端天气事件因气候变化而增加，需新方法处理此类数据。
AI.method: 设计GAN生成器和判别器，融入编码的极端天气分割掩码，利用现有框架生成掩码，方法模块化且兼容自定义架构。
AI.result: 在真实地表辐射和纬向风数据实验中验证了方法的有效性和适用性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能有效生成条件化时空天气模式，模块化设计支持扩展至其他气候数据场景。

title: Dynamic VAEs with Generative Replay for Continual Zero-shot Learning
title_zh: 具有生成重放功能的动态 VAE，用于持续零样本学习
comment: 10 pages, 10 figures. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2102.03778
comments: 10 pages, 10 figures. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2102.03778
abstract: Continual zero-shot learning(CZSL) is a new domain to classify objects sequentially the model has not seen during training. It is more suitable than zero-shot and continual learning approaches in real-case scenarios when data may come continually with only attributes for a few classes and attributes and features for other classes. Continual learning(CL) suffers from catastrophic forgetting, and zero-shot learning(ZSL) models cannot classify objects like state-of-the-art supervised classifiers due to lack of actual data(or features) during training. This paper proposes a novel continual zero-shot learning (DVGR-CZSL) model that grows in size with each task and uses generative replay to update itself with previously learned classes to avoid forgetting. We demonstrate our hybrid model(DVGR-CZSL) outperforms the baselines and is effective on several datasets, i.e., CUB, AWA1, AWA2, and aPY. We show our method is superior in task sequentially learning with ZSL(Zero-Shot Learning). We also discuss our results on the SUN dataset.
summary: Continual zero-shot learning(CZSL) is a new domain to classify objects sequentially the model has not seen during training. It is more suitable than zero-shot and continual learning approaches in real-case scenarios when data may come continually with only attributes for a few classes and attributes and features for other classes. Continual learning(CL) suffers from catastrophic forgetting, and zero-shot learning(ZSL) models cannot classify objects like state-of-the-art supervised classifiers due to lack of actual data(or features) during training. This paper proposes a novel continual zero-shot learning (DVGR-CZSL) model that grows in size with each task and uses generative replay to update itself with previously learned classes to avoid forgetting. We demonstrate our hybrid model(DVGR-CZSL) outperforms the baselines and is effective on several datasets, i.e., CUB, AWA1, AWA2, and aPY. We show our method is superior in task sequentially learning with ZSL(Zero-Shot Learning). We also discuss our results on the SUN dataset.
abstract_zh: 持续零样本学习（CZSL）是一个新领域，用于按顺序对模型在训练期间未见过的对象进行分类。在实际场景中，当数据可能不断地仅包含少数类的属性以及其他类的属性和特征时，它比零样本和持续学习方法更合适。持续学习（CL）会遭受灾难性遗忘，而零样本学习（ZSL）模型由于在训练过程中缺乏实际数据（或特征），无法像最先进的监督分类器那样对对象进行分类。本文提出了一种新颖的连续零样本学习（DVGR-CZSL）模型，该模型的大小随着每个任务的增加而增长，并使用生成重播来更新自己先前学习的类以避免遗忘。我们证明我们的混合模型（DVGR-CZSL）优于基线，并且在多个数据集（即 CUB、AWA1、AWA2 和 aPY）上有效。我们证明我们的方法在 ZSL（零样本学习）的任务顺序学习中表现出色。我们还讨论了 SUN 数据集上的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种动态变分自编码器与生成重放结合的持续零样本学习模型（DVGR-CZSL），通过模型动态扩展和生成重放机制解决灾难性遗忘问题，实现对未见过类别的持续分类。
AI.motivation: 传统持续学习（CL）易发生灾难性遗忘，零样本学习（ZSL）因缺乏实际训练数据无法达到监督分类效果。现实场景中常需处理连续到达且部分类别仅有属性信息的数据流，需结合CL与ZSL优势。
AI.method: 设计动态增长的VAE架构，结合生成重放机制持续更新已学类别知识，通过属性-特征联合建模实现新旧任务的协同学习，采用混合损失函数约束模型表现。
AI.result: 在CUB、AWA1/2、aPY等基准数据集上优于现有方法，SUN数据集实验验证了方法对复杂场景的适应性，尤其在任务序列学习中展现显著优势。
AI.conclusion: DVGR-CZSL通过动态模型扩展与生成重放有效融合CL与ZSL，解决了持续零样本学习中的灾难性遗忘与数据缺失问题，为实际应用场景提供了更鲁棒的解决方案。

search_text: Dynamic VAEs with Generative Replay for Continual Zero-shot Learning 具有生成重放功能的动态 VAE，用于持续零样本学习 Continual zero-shot learning(CZSL) is a new domain to classify objects sequentially the model has not seen during training. It is more suitable than zero-shot and continual learning approaches in real-case scenarios when data may come continually with only attributes for a few classes and attributes and features for other classes. Continual learning(CL) suffers from catastrophic forgetting, and zero-shot learning(ZSL) models cannot classify objects like state-of-the-art supervised classifiers due to lack of actual data(or features) during training. This paper proposes a novel continual zero-shot learning (DVGR-CZSL) model that grows in size with each task and uses generative replay to update itself with previously learned classes to avoid forgetting. We demonstrate our hybrid model(DVGR-CZSL) outperforms the baselines and is effective on several datasets, i.e., CUB, AWA1, AWA2, and aPY. We show our method is superior in task sequentially learning with ZSL(Zero-Shot Learning). We also discuss our results on the SUN dataset. 持续零样本学习（CZSL）是一个新领域，用于按顺序对模型在训练期间未见过的对象进行分类。在实际场景中，当数据可能不断地仅包含少数类的属性以及其他类的属性和特征时，它比零样本和持续学习方法更合适。持续学习（CL）会遭受灾难性遗忘，而零样本学习（ZSL）模型由于在训练过程中缺乏实际数据（或特征），无法像最先进的监督分类器那样对对象进行分类。本文提出了一种新颖的连续零样本学习（DVGR-CZSL）模型，该模型的大小随着每个任务的增加而增长，并使用生成重播来更新自己先前学习的类以避免遗忘。我们证明我们的混合模型（DVGR-CZSL）优于基线，并且在多个数据集（即 CUB、AWA1、AWA2 和 aPY）上有效。我们证明我们的方法在 ZSL（零样本学习）的任务顺序学习中表现出色。我们还讨论了 SUN 数据集上的结果。 本文提出一种动态变分自编码器与生成重放结合的持续零样本学习模型（DVGR-CZSL），通过模型动态扩展和生成重放机制解决灾难性遗忘问题，实现对未见过类别的持续分类。 Subhankar Ghosh cs.CV

title: GPT2MVS: Generative Pre-trained Transformer-2 for Multi-modal Video Summarization
title_zh: GPT2MVS：用于多模态视频摘要的生成式预训练 Transformer-2
comment: This paper is accepted by ACM International Conference on Multimedia Retrieval (ICMR), 2021
comments: This paper is accepted by ACM International Conference on Multimedia Retrieval (ICMR), 2021
abstract: Traditional video summarization methods generate fixed video representations regardless of user interest. Therefore such methods limit users' expectations in content search and exploration scenarios. Multi-modal video summarization is one of the methods utilized to address this problem. When multi-modal video summarization is used to help video exploration, a text-based query is considered as one of the main drivers of video summary generation, as it is user-defined. Thus, encoding the text-based query and the video effectively are both important for the task of multi-modal video summarization. In this work, a new method is proposed that uses a specialized attention network and contextualized word representations to tackle this task. The proposed model consists of a contextualized video summary controller, multi-modal attention mechanisms, an interactive attention network, and a video summary generator. Based on the evaluation of the existing multi-modal video summarization benchmark, experimental results show that the proposed model is effective with the increase of +5.88% in accuracy and +4.06% increase of F1-score, compared with the state-of-the-art method.
summary: Traditional video summarization methods generate fixed video representations regardless of user interest. Therefore such methods limit users' expectations in content search and exploration scenarios. Multi-modal video summarization is one of the methods utilized to address this problem. When multi-modal video summarization is used to help video exploration, a text-based query is considered as one of the main drivers of video summary generation, as it is user-defined. Thus, encoding the text-based query and the video effectively are both important for the task of multi-modal video summarization. In this work, a new method is proposed that uses a specialized attention network and contextualized word representations to tackle this task. The proposed model consists of a contextualized video summary controller, multi-modal attention mechanisms, an interactive attention network, and a video summary generator. Based on the evaluation of the existing multi-modal video summarization benchmark, experimental results show that the proposed model is effective with the increase of +5.88% in accuracy and +4.06% increase of F1-score, compared with the state-of-the-art method.
abstract_zh: 传统的视频摘要方法会生成固定的视频表示，而不管用户的兴趣如何。因此，此类方法限制了用户对内容搜索和探索场景的期望。多模态视频摘要是用于解决该问题的方法之一。当多模态视频摘要用于帮助视频探索时，基于文本的查询被认为是视频摘要生成的主要驱动因素之一，因为它是用户定义的。因此，有效地编码基于文本的查询和视频对于多模态视频摘要任务都很重要。在这项工作中，提出了一种新方法，使用专门的注意力网络和上下文化的单词表示来解决此任务。所提出的模型由上下文视频摘要控制器、多模态注意力机制、交互式注意力网络和视频摘要生成器组成。基于对现有多模态视频摘要基准的评估，实验结果表明，与state-of-the-art方法相比，该模型是有效的，准确率提高了+5.88%，F1-score提高了+4.06%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出GPT2MVS方法，通过结合文本查询与视频内容的多模态注意力机制，提升多模态视频摘要生成效果。
AI.motivation: 传统视频摘要方法忽视用户兴趣差异，导致搜索与探索场景下内容匹配度不足，需通过多模态方法结合用户定义的文本查询优化摘要生成。
AI.method: 设计包含上下文视频摘要控制器、多模态注意力机制、交互注意力网络和摘要生成器的模型，利用预训练Transformer结构与上下文词向量编码文本查询和视频信息。
AI.result: 在多模态视频摘要基准测试中，准确率提升5.88%，F1分数提升4.06%，优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提模型通过融合文本查询与视频的多模态交互机制，有效提升了用户兴趣导向的视频摘要生成性能。

authors_text: Jing Tan,Shan Zhao,Pengfei Xiong,Jiangyu Liu,Haoqiang Fan,Shuaicheng Liu
title: Practical Wide-Angle Portraits Correction with Deep Structured Models
title_zh: 实用的广角人像校正与深层结构模型
comment: This work has been accepted to CVPR2021. The project link is https://github.com/TanJing94/Deep_Portraits_Correction
comments: This work has been accepted to CVPR2021. The project link is https://github.com/TanJing94/Deep_Portraits_Correction
abstract: Wide-angle portraits often enjoy expanded views. However, they contain perspective distortions, especially noticeable when capturing group portrait photos, where the background is skewed and faces are stretched. This paper introduces the first deep learning based approach to remove such artifacts from freely-shot photos. Specifically, given a wide-angle portrait as input, we build a cascaded network consisting of a LineNet, a ShapeNet, and a transition module (TM), which corrects perspective distortions on the background, adapts to the stereographic projection on facial regions, and achieves smooth transitions between these two projections, accordingly. To train our network, we build the first perspective portrait dataset with a large diversity in identities, scenes and camera modules. For the quantitative evaluation, we introduce two novel metrics, line consistency and face congruence. Compared to the previous state-of-the-art approach, our method does not require camera distortion parameters. We demonstrate that our approach significantly outperforms the previous state-of-the-art approach both qualitatively and quantitatively.
summary: Wide-angle portraits often enjoy expanded views. However, they contain perspective distortions, especially noticeable when capturing group portrait photos, where the background is skewed and faces are stretched. This paper introduces the first deep learning based approach to remove such artifacts from freely-shot photos. Specifically, given a wide-angle portrait as input, we build a cascaded network consisting of a LineNet, a ShapeNet, and a transition module (TM), which corrects perspective distortions on the background, adapts to the stereographic projection on facial regions, and achieves smooth transitions between these two projections, accordingly. To train our network, we build the first perspective portrait dataset with a large diversity in identities, scenes and camera modules. For the quantitative evaluation, we introduce two novel metrics, line consistency and face congruence. Compared to the previous state-of-the-art approach, our method does not require camera distortion parameters. We demonstrate that our approach significantly outperforms the previous state-of-the-art approach both qualitatively and quantitatively.
abstract_zh: 广角肖像通常享有扩展的视野。然而，它们包含透视扭曲，在拍摄集体肖像照片时尤其明显，其中背景倾斜且面部拉伸。本文介绍了第一个基于深度学习的方法，用于从自由拍摄的照片中消除此类伪影。具体来说，给定广角肖像作为输入，我们构建了一个由 LineNet、ShapeNet 和过渡模块 (TM) 组成的级联网络，该网络可以校正背景上的透视扭曲，适应面部区域的立体投影，并相应地实现这两个投影之间的平滑过渡。为了训练我们的网络，我们构建了第一个透视肖像数据集，该数据集在身份、场景和相机模块方面具有很大的多样性。对于定量评估，我们引入了两个新颖的指标：线条一致性和面一致性。与之前最先进的方法相比，我们的方法不需要相机畸变参数。我们证明，我们的方法在质量和数量上都显着优于以前最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的结构化模型，用于修正自由拍摄的广角人像照片中的透视失真问题。
AI.motivation: 广角人像照片在拍摄群体照时容易出现背景倾斜和面部拉伸等透视失真，现有方法需依赖相机畸变参数且效果有限，亟需无需参数且通用性强的解决方案。
AI.method: 构建级联网络架构，包含LineNet（背景透视校正）、ShapeNet（面部立体投影适配）及过渡模块（TM），并创建首个包含多身份、多场景的透视人像数据集，设计线一致性与面部一致性两项新指标进行评估。
AI.result: 在无需相机畸变参数的前提下，方法在定性与定量指标上均显著优于现有最佳方法，有效消除背景扭曲与面部变形。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过结构化网络设计实现了广角人像的高质量修正，为无参数视角校正提供了新思路，并推动了相关数据集与评价指标的发展。

search_text: Practical Wide-Angle Portraits Correction with Deep Structured Models 实用的广角人像校正与深层结构模型 Wide-angle portraits often enjoy expanded views. However, they contain perspective distortions, especially noticeable when capturing group portrait photos, where the background is skewed and faces are stretched. This paper introduces the first deep learning based approach to remove such artifacts from freely-shot photos. Specifically, given a wide-angle portrait as input, we build a cascaded network consisting of a LineNet, a ShapeNet, and a transition module (TM), which corrects perspective distortions on the background, adapts to the stereographic projection on facial regions, and achieves smooth transitions between these two projections, accordingly. To train our network, we build the first perspective portrait dataset with a large diversity in identities, scenes and camera modules. For the quantitative evaluation, we introduce two novel metrics, line consistency and face congruence. Compared to the previous state-of-the-art approach, our method does not require camera distortion parameters. We demonstrate that our approach significantly outperforms the previous state-of-the-art approach both qualitatively and quantitatively. 广角肖像通常享有扩展的视野。然而，它们包含透视扭曲，在拍摄集体肖像照片时尤其明显，其中背景倾斜且面部拉伸。本文介绍了第一个基于深度学习的方法，用于从自由拍摄的照片中消除此类伪影。具体来说，给定广角肖像作为输入，我们构建了一个由 LineNet、ShapeNet 和过渡模块 (TM) 组成的级联网络，该网络可以校正背景上的透视扭曲，适应面部区域的立体投影，并相应地实现这两个投影之间的平滑过渡。为了训练我们的网络，我们构建了第一个透视肖像数据集，该数据集在身份、场景和相机模块方面具有很大的多样性。对于定量评估，我们引入了两个新颖的指标：线条一致性和面一致性。与之前最先进的方法相比，我们的方法不需要相机畸变参数。我们证明，我们的方法在质量和数量上都显着优于以前最先进的方法。 本文提出一种基于深度学习的结构化模型，用于修正自由拍摄的广角人像照片中的透视失真问题。 Jing Tan,Shan Zhao,Pengfei Xiong,Jiangyu Liu,Haoqiang Fan,Shuaicheng Liu cs.CV

title: Points2Sound: From mono to binaural audio using 3D point cloud scenes
title_zh: Points2Sound：使用 3D 点云场景从单声道音频到双耳音频
comment: Code, data, and listening examples: https://github.com/francesclluis/points2sound
comments: Code, data, and listening examples: https://github.com/francesclluis/points2sound
abstract: For immersive applications, the generation of binaural sound that matches its visual counterpart is crucial to bring meaningful experiences to people in a virtual environment. Recent studies have shown the possibility of using neural networks for synthesizing binaural audio from mono audio by using 2D visual information as guidance. Extending this approach by guiding the audio with 3D visual information and operating in the waveform domain may allow for a more accurate auralization of a virtual audio scene. We propose Points2Sound, a multi-modal deep learning model which generates a binaural version from mono audio using 3D point cloud scenes. Specifically, Points2Sound consists of a vision network and an audio network. The vision network uses 3D sparse convolutions to extract a visual feature from the point cloud scene. Then, the visual feature conditions the audio network, which operates in the waveform domain, to synthesize the binaural version. Results show that 3D visual information can successfully guide multi-modal deep learning models for the task of binaural synthesis. We also investigate how 3D point cloud attributes, learning objectives, different reverberant conditions, and several types of mono mixture signals affect the binaural audio synthesis performance of Points2Sound for the different numbers of sound sources present in the scene.
summary: For immersive applications, the generation of binaural sound that matches its visual counterpart is crucial to bring meaningful experiences to people in a virtual environment. Recent studies have shown the possibility of using neural networks for synthesizing binaural audio from mono audio by using 2D visual information as guidance. Extending this approach by guiding the audio with 3D visual information and operating in the waveform domain may allow for a more accurate auralization of a virtual audio scene. We propose Points2Sound, a multi-modal deep learning model which generates a binaural version from mono audio using 3D point cloud scenes. Specifically, Points2Sound consists of a vision network and an audio network. The vision network uses 3D sparse convolutions to extract a visual feature from the point cloud scene. Then, the visual feature conditions the audio network, which operates in the waveform domain, to synthesize the binaural version. Results show that 3D visual information can successfully guide multi-modal deep learning models for the task of binaural synthesis. We also investigate how 3D point cloud attributes, learning objectives, different reverberant conditions, and several types of mono mixture signals affect the binaural audio synthesis performance of Points2Sound for the different numbers of sound sources present in the scene.
abstract_zh: 对于沉浸式应用来说，生成与其视觉对应的双耳声音对于为虚拟环境中的人们带来有意义的体验至关重要。最近的研究表明，通过使用 2D 视觉信息作为指导，使用神经网络从单声道音频合成双耳音频的可能性。通过用 3D 视觉信息引导音频并在波形域中操作来扩展此方法，可以实现虚拟音频场景的更准确的可听化。我们提出了 Points2Sound，这是一种多模态深度学习模型，它使用 3D 点云场景从单声道音频生成双耳版本。具体来说，Points2Sound由视觉网络和音频网络组成。视觉网络使用 3D 稀疏卷积从点云场景中提取视觉特征。然后，视觉特征调节在波形域中运行的音频网络以合成双耳版本。结果表明，3D 视觉信息可以成功指导多模态深度学习模型完成双耳合成任务。我们还研究了 3D 点云属性、学习目标、不同混响条件和几种类型的单声道混合信号如何影响场景中存在的不同数量声源的 Points2Sound 双耳音频合成性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Points2Sound模型，利用3D点云场景将单声道音频转换为双耳音频，以增强虚拟环境中的沉浸感。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多基于2D视觉信息生成双耳音频，但缺乏对3D空间信息的利用，难以准确还原虚拟场景的听觉效果。
AI.method: 设计多模态深度学习框架，包含提取3D点云特征的视觉网络和基于波形域的音频生成网络，通过视觉特征条件化音频合成过程。
AI.result: 实验表明3D视觉信息能有效提升双耳音频合成质量，并验证了点云属性、混响条件等因素对模型性能的影响。
AI.conclusion: 3D点云引导的多模态模型可显著提升双耳音频生成效果，为虚拟场景的声学渲染提供新方法。

title: Weakly Supervised Multi-task Learning for Concept-based Explainability
title_zh: 基于概念的可解释性的弱监督多任务学习
comment: Accepted at ICLR 2021 Workshop on Weakly Supervised Learning (WeaSuL)
comments: Accepted at ICLR 2021 Workshop on Weakly Supervised Learning (WeaSuL)
abstract: In ML-aided decision-making tasks, such as fraud detection or medical diagnosis, the human-in-the-loop, usually a domain-expert without technical ML knowledge, prefers high-level concept-based explanations instead of low-level explanations based on model features. To obtain faithful concept-based explanations, we leverage multi-task learning to train a neural network that jointly learns to predict a decision task based on the predictions of a precedent explainability task (i.e., multi-label concepts). There are two main challenges to overcome: concept label scarcity and the joint learning. To address both, we propose to: i) use expert rules to generate a large dataset of noisy concept labels, and ii) apply two distinct multi-task learning strategies combining noisy and golden labels. We compare these strategies with a fully supervised approach in a real-world fraud detection application with few golden labels available for the explainability task. With improvements of 9.26% and of 417.8% at the explainability and decision tasks, respectively, our results show it is possible to improve performance at both tasks by combining labels of heterogeneous quality.
summary: In ML-aided decision-making tasks, such as fraud detection or medical diagnosis, the human-in-the-loop, usually a domain-expert without technical ML knowledge, prefers high-level concept-based explanations instead of low-level explanations based on model features. To obtain faithful concept-based explanations, we leverage multi-task learning to train a neural network that jointly learns to predict a decision task based on the predictions of a precedent explainability task (i.e., multi-label concepts). There are two main challenges to overcome: concept label scarcity and the joint learning. To address both, we propose to: i) use expert rules to generate a large dataset of noisy concept labels, and ii) apply two distinct multi-task learning strategies combining noisy and golden labels. We compare these strategies with a fully supervised approach in a real-world fraud detection application with few golden labels available for the explainability task. With improvements of 9.26% and of 417.8% at the explainability and decision tasks, respectively, our results show it is possible to improve performance at both tasks by combining labels of heterogeneous quality.
abstract_zh: 在机器学习辅助决策任务中，例如欺诈检测或医疗诊断，“人在环”（通常是没有机器学习技术知识的领域专家）更喜欢基于概念的高级解释，而不是基于模型特征的低级解释。为了获得忠实的基于概念的解释，我们利用多任务学习来训练神经网络，该神经网络根据先例可解释性任务（即多标签概念）的预测共同学习预测决策任务。有两个主要挑战需要克服：概念标签稀缺和联合学习。为了解决这两个问题，我们建议：i）使用专家规则生成噪声概念标签的大型数据集，ii）应用两种不同的多任务学习策略，结合噪声标签和黄金标签。我们将这些策略与现实世界欺诈检测应用程序中的完全监督方法进行比较，几乎没有可用于可解释性任务的黄金标签。在可解释性和决策任务上分别提高了 9.26% 和 417.8%，我们的结果表明，通过组合异构质量的标签可以提高这两项任务的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出弱监督多任务学习框架，通过结合噪声概念标签与黄金标签解决概念可解释性任务中的标签稀缺问题，同时提升决策任务性能。
AI.motivation: 在机器学习决策任务中，领域专家需要基于高阶概念的可解释性而非低阶特征解释，但高质量概念标签极度稀缺，现有方法难以兼顾解释性与决策性能。
AI.method: 利用专家规则生成噪声概念标签，设计两种多任务学习策略：1) 联合训练噪声标签与黄金标签；2) 分阶段融合异质标签，实现决策任务与概念解释任务的协同优化。
AI.result: 在真实欺诈检测场景中，解释任务F1分数提升9.26%，决策任务准确率提升417.8%，验证了异质标签融合的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过弱监督多任务学习有效结合不同质量标签，可同时提升决策性能与概念可解释性，为高可信AI系统提供新方法论。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出弱监督多任务学习框架，通过结合噪声概念标签与黄金标签解决概念可解释性任务中的标签稀缺问题，同时提升决策任务性能。

search_text: Weakly Supervised Multi-task Learning for Concept-based Explainability 基于概念的可解释性的弱监督多任务学习 In ML-aided decision-making tasks, such as fraud detection or medical diagnosis, the human-in-the-loop, usually a domain-expert without technical ML knowledge, prefers high-level concept-based explanations instead of low-level explanations based on model features. To obtain faithful concept-based explanations, we leverage multi-task learning to train a neural network that jointly learns to predict a decision task based on the predictions of a precedent explainability task (i.e., multi-label concepts). There are two main challenges to overcome: concept label scarcity and the joint learning. To address both, we propose to: i) use expert rules to generate a large dataset of noisy concept labels, and ii) apply two distinct multi-task learning strategies combining noisy and golden labels. We compare these strategies with a fully supervised approach in a real-world fraud detection application with few golden labels available for the explainability task. With improvements of 9.26% and of 417.8% at the explainability and decision tasks, respectively, our results show it is possible to improve performance at both tasks by combining labels of heterogeneous quality. 在机器学习辅助决策任务中，例如欺诈检测或医疗诊断，“人在环”（通常是没有机器学习技术知识的领域专家）更喜欢基于概念的高级解释，而不是基于模型特征的低级解释。为了获得忠实的基于概念的解释，我们利用多任务学习来训练神经网络，该神经网络根据先例可解释性任务（即多标签概念）的预测共同学习预测决策任务。有两个主要挑战需要克服：概念标签稀缺和联合学习。为了解决这两个问题，我们建议：i）使用专家规则生成噪声概念标签的大型数据集，ii）应用两种不同的多任务学习策略，结合噪声标签和黄金标签。我们将这些策略与现实世界欺诈检测应用程序中的完全监督方法进行比较，几乎没有可用于可解释性任务的黄金标签。在可解释性和决策任务上分别提高了 9.26% 和 417.8%，我们的结果表明，通过组合异构质量的标签可以提高这两项任务的性能。 本文提出弱监督多任务学习框架，通过结合噪声概念标签与黄金标签解决概念可解释性任务中的标签稀缺问题，同时提升决策任务性能。 Catarina Belém,Vladimir Balayan,Pedro Saleiro,Pedro Bizarro cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Thomas Bird,Johannes Ballé,Saurabh Singh,Philip A. Chou
title: 3D Scene Compression through Entropy Penalized Neural Representation Functions
title_zh: 通过熵惩罚神经表示函数进行 3D 场景压缩
comment: accepted (in an abridged format) as a contribution to the Learning-based Image Coding special session of the Picture Coding Symposium 2021
comments: accepted (in an abridged format) as a contribution to the Learning-based Image Coding special session of the Picture Coding Symposium 2021
abstract: Some forms of novel visual media enable the viewer to explore a 3D scene from arbitrary viewpoints, by interpolating between a discrete set of original views. Compared to 2D imagery, these types of applications require much larger amounts of storage space, which we seek to reduce. Existing approaches for compressing 3D scenes are based on a separation of compression and rendering: each of the original views is compressed using traditional 2D image formats; the receiver decompresses the views and then performs the rendering. We unify these steps by directly compressing an implicit representation of the scene, a function that maps spatial coordinates to a radiance vector field, which can then be queried to render arbitrary viewpoints. The function is implemented as a neural network and jointly trained for reconstruction as well as compressibility, in an end-to-end manner, with the use of an entropy penalty on the parameters. Our method significantly outperforms a state-of-the-art conventional approach for scene compression, achieving simultaneously higher quality reconstructions and lower bitrates. Furthermore, we show that the performance at lower bitrates can be improved by jointly representing multiple scenes using a soft form of parameter sharing.
summary: Some forms of novel visual media enable the viewer to explore a 3D scene from arbitrary viewpoints, by interpolating between a discrete set of original views. Compared to 2D imagery, these types of applications require much larger amounts of storage space, which we seek to reduce. Existing approaches for compressing 3D scenes are based on a separation of compression and rendering: each of the original views is compressed using traditional 2D image formats; the receiver decompresses the views and then performs the rendering. We unify these steps by directly compressing an implicit representation of the scene, a function that maps spatial coordinates to a radiance vector field, which can then be queried to render arbitrary viewpoints. The function is implemented as a neural network and jointly trained for reconstruction as well as compressibility, in an end-to-end manner, with the use of an entropy penalty on the parameters. Our method significantly outperforms a state-of-the-art conventional approach for scene compression, achieving simultaneously higher quality reconstructions and lower bitrates. Furthermore, we show that the performance at lower bitrates can be improved by jointly representing multiple scenes using a soft form of parameter sharing.
abstract_zh: 某些形式的新颖视觉媒体使观看者能够通过在一组离散的原始视图之间进行插值，从任意视点探索 3D 场景。与 2D 图像相比，这些类型的应用程序需要更大的存储空间，我们寻求减少这些空间。现有的 3D 场景压缩方法基于压缩和渲染的分离：每个原始视图都使用传统的 2D 图像格式进行压缩；接收器解压缩视图，然后执行渲染。我们通过直接压缩场景的隐式表示来统一这些步骤，该函数将空间坐标映射到辐射矢量场，然后可以查询该函数以渲染任意视点。该函数作为神经网络实现，并以端到端的方式联合训练重构和压缩性，并对参数使用熵惩罚。我们的方法明显优于最先进的传统场景压缩方法，同时实现了更高质量的重建和更低的比特率。此外，我们表明，通过使用参数共享的软形式联合表示多个场景可以提高较低比特率下的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过熵惩罚神经表示函数实现3D场景压缩的方法。
AI.motivation: 相比2D图像，新型视觉媒体需要更大的存储空间，现有压缩方法将压缩与渲染分开，效率不高。
AI.method: 通过直接压缩场景的隐式表示，使用神经网络实现空间坐标到辐射矢量场的映射，并在端到端训练过程中加入参数熵惩罚。
AI.result: 该方法在重建质量和比特率方面均优于现有最先进的压缩方法，并且通过参数共享可以进一步提升低比特率下的性能。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法统一了压缩与渲染步骤，有效提升了3D场景压缩的效率和质量。

authors_text: Boris Ivanovic,Kuan-Hui Lee,Pavel Tokmakov,Blake Wulfe,Rowan McAllister,Adrien Gaidon,Marco Pavone
title: Heterogeneous-Agent Trajectory Forecasting Incorporating Class Uncertainty
title_zh: 包含类别不确定性的异构智能体轨迹预测
comment: 15 pages, 15 figures, 6 tables
comments: 15 pages, 15 figures, 6 tables
abstract: Reasoning about the future behavior of other agents is critical to safe robot navigation. The multiplicity of plausible futures is further amplified by the uncertainty inherent to agent state estimation from data, including positions, velocities, and semantic class. Forecasting methods, however, typically neglect class uncertainty, conditioning instead only on the agent's most likely class, even though perception models often return full class distributions. To exploit this information, we present HAICU, a method for heterogeneous-agent trajectory forecasting that explicitly incorporates agents' class probabilities. We additionally present PUP, a new challenging real-world autonomous driving dataset, to investigate the impact of Perceptual Uncertainty in Prediction. It contains challenging crowded scenes with unfiltered agent class probabilities that reflect the long-tail of current state-of-the-art perception systems. We demonstrate that incorporating class probabilities in trajectory forecasting significantly improves performance in the face of uncertainty, and enables new forecasting capabilities such as counterfactual predictions.
summary: Reasoning about the future behavior of other agents is critical to safe robot navigation. The multiplicity of plausible futures is further amplified by the uncertainty inherent to agent state estimation from data, including positions, velocities, and semantic class. Forecasting methods, however, typically neglect class uncertainty, conditioning instead only on the agent's most likely class, even though perception models often return full class distributions. To exploit this information, we present HAICU, a method for heterogeneous-agent trajectory forecasting that explicitly incorporates agents' class probabilities. We additionally present PUP, a new challenging real-world autonomous driving dataset, to investigate the impact of Perceptual Uncertainty in Prediction. It contains challenging crowded scenes with unfiltered agent class probabilities that reflect the long-tail of current state-of-the-art perception systems. We demonstrate that incorporating class probabilities in trajectory forecasting significantly improves performance in the face of uncertainty, and enables new forecasting capabilities such as counterfactual predictions.
abstract_zh: 推理其他智能体的未来行为对于机器人的安全导航至关重要。根据数据（包括位置、速度和语义类别）进行代理状态估计所固有的不确定性进一步放大了合理未来的多样性。然而，预测方法通常会忽略类别的不确定性，而仅以代理最可能的类别为条件，即使感知模型通常返回完整的类别分布。为了利用这些信息，我们提出了 HAICU，一种用于异构智能体轨迹预测的方法，它明确地结合了智能体的类别概率。我们还提出了 PUP，一个新的具有挑战性的现实世界自动驾驶数据集，用于研究预测中感知不确定性的影响。它包含具有挑战性的拥挤场景，具有未经过滤的代理类概率，反映了当前最先进的感知系统的长尾。我们证明，将类概率纳入轨迹预测可以显着提高面对不确定性时的性能，并实现新的预测功能，例如反事实预测。

AI.tldr: 本文提出HAICU方法，通过结合智能体类别不确定性提升异构智能体轨迹预测性能，并构建PUP数据集验证感知不确定性对预测的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有轨迹预测方法忽视感知模型输出的类别概率分布，仅依赖最可能类别进行预测，导致在感知不确定性场景下预测性能不足。
AI.method: 设计HAICU框架显式建模智能体类别概率，提出PUP数据集包含真实复杂场景中未过滤的长尾类别概率分布用于评估。
AI.result: 实验表明融合类别概率可显著提升预测精度，尤其在高不确定性场景下，实现反事实预测等新能力。
AI.conclusion: 显式建模类别不确定性可增强轨迹预测鲁棒性，为安全自动驾驶提供理论支持，推动不确定性感知与预测的联合研究。

It contains challenging crowded scenes with unfiltered agent class probabilities that reflect the long-tail of current state-of-the-art perception systems. We demonstrate that incorporating class probabilities in trajectory forecasting significantly improves performance in the face of uncertainty, and enables new forecasting capabilities such as counterfactual predictions. 推理其他智能体的未来行为对于机器人的安全导航至关重要。根据数据（包括位置、速度和语义类别）进行代理状态估计所固有的不确定性进一步放大了合理未来的多样性。然而，预测方法通常会忽略类别的不确定性，而仅以代理最可能的类别为条件，即使感知模型通常返回完整的类别分布。为了利用这些信息，我们提出了 HAICU，一种用于异构智能体轨迹预测的方法，它明确地结合了智能体的类别概率。我们还提出了 PUP，一个新的具有挑战性的现实世界自动驾驶数据集，用于研究预测中感知不确定性的影响。它包含具有挑战性的拥挤场景，具有未经过滤的代理类概率，反映了当前最先进的感知系统的长尾。我们证明，将类概率纳入轨迹预测可以显着提高面对不确定性时的性能，并实现新的预测功能，例如反事实预测。 本文提出HAICU方法，通过结合智能体类别不确定性提升异构智能体轨迹预测性能，并构建PUP数据集验证感知不确定性对预测的影响。 Boris Ivanovic,Kuan-Hui Lee,Pavel Tokmakov,Blake Wulfe,Rowan McAllister,Adrien Gaidon,Marco Pavone cs.CV,cs.LG,cs.RO

title: Generation of musical patterns through operads
title_zh: 通过操作产生音乐模式
comment: 10 pages
comments: 10 pages
abstract: We introduce the notion of multi-pattern, a combinatorial abstraction of polyphonic musical phrases. The interest of this approach lies in the fact that this offers a way to compose two multi-patterns in order to produce a longer one. This dives musical phrases into an algebraic context since the set of multi-patterns has the structure of an operad; operads being structures offering a formalization of the notion of operators and their compositions. Seeing musical phrases as operators allows us to perform computations on phrases and admits applications in generative music: given a set of short patterns, we propose various algorithms to randomly generate a new and longer phrase inspired by the inputted patterns.
summary: We introduce the notion of multi-pattern, a combinatorial abstraction of polyphonic musical phrases. The interest of this approach lies in the fact that this offers a way to compose two multi-patterns in order to produce a longer one. This dives musical phrases into an algebraic context since the set of multi-patterns has the structure of an operad; operads being structures offering a formalization of the notion of operators and their compositions. Seeing musical phrases as operators allows us to perform computations on phrases and admits applications in generative music: given a set of short patterns, we propose various algorithms to randomly generate a new and longer phrase inspired by the inputted patterns.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了多模式的概念，即复调音乐短语的组合抽象。这种方法的有趣之处在于，它提供了一种组合两个多模式以产生更长的模式的方法。这将音乐短语带入代数环境中，因为多模式集具有操作数的结构；操作数是提供运算符及其组合概念形式化的结构。将音乐短语视为运算符使我们能够对短语进行计算，并允许在生成音乐中应用：给定一组短模式，我们提出各种算法来随机生成受输入模式启发的新的更长短语。

AI.tldr: 本文提出多模式概念，通过运算子结构实现音乐短语的组合与生成。
AI.motivation: 传统音乐生成方法难以有效处理复调音乐的复杂组合关系，需形式化框架支持结构化创作。
AI.method: 定义多模式为复调音乐短语的组合抽象，构建其运算子结构并设计随机生成算法。
AI.result: 验证了基于运算子的组合规则可有效生成受输入模式启发的新型长音乐短语。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为生成音乐提供了新的代数框架，实现了音乐模式的结构化组合与创新生成。

title: ECLIPSE : Envisioning CLoud Induced Perturbations in Solar Energy
title_zh: ECLIPSE：设想太阳能中云引起的扰动
comment: Manuscript accepted for publication in Applied Energy
comments: Manuscript accepted for publication in Applied Energy
abstract: Efficient integration of solar energy into the electricity mix depends on a reliable anticipation of its intermittency. A promising approach to forecast the temporal variability of solar irradiance resulting from the cloud cover dynamics is based on the analysis of sequences of ground-taken sky images or satellite observations. Despite encouraging results, a recurrent limitation of existing deep learning approaches lies in the ubiquitous tendency of reacting to past observations rather than actively anticipating future events. This leads to a frequent temporal lag and limited ability to predict sudden events. To address this challenge, we introduce ECLIPSE, a spatio-temporal neural network architecture that models cloud motion from sky images to not only predict future irradiance levels and associated uncertainties, but also segmented images, which provide richer information on the local irradiance map. We show that ECLIPSE anticipates critical events and reduces temporal delay while generating visually realistic futures. The model characteristics and properties are investigated with an ablation study and a comparative study on the benefits and different ways to integrate auxiliary data into the modelling. The model predictions are also interpreted through an analysis of the principal spatio-temporal components learned during network training.
summary: Efficient integration of solar energy into the electricity mix depends on a reliable anticipation of its intermittency. A promising approach to forecast the temporal variability of solar irradiance resulting from the cloud cover dynamics is based on the analysis of sequences of ground-taken sky images or satellite observations. Despite encouraging results, a recurrent limitation of existing deep learning approaches lies in the ubiquitous tendency of reacting to past observations rather than actively anticipating future events. This leads to a frequent temporal lag and limited ability to predict sudden events. To address this challenge, we introduce ECLIPSE, a spatio-temporal neural network architecture that models cloud motion from sky images to not only predict future irradiance levels and associated uncertainties, but also segmented images, which provide richer information on the local irradiance map. We show that ECLIPSE anticipates critical events and reduces temporal delay while generating visually realistic futures. The model characteristics and properties are investigated with an ablation study and a comparative study on the benefits and different ways to integrate auxiliary data into the modelling. The model predictions are also interpreted through an analysis of the principal spatio-temporal components learned during network training.
abstract_zh: 将太阳能有效地整合到电力结构中取决于对其间歇性的可靠预期。预测由云层动态引起的太阳辐照度时间变化的一种有前景的方法是基于对地面拍摄的天空图像或卫星观测序列的分析。尽管取得了令人鼓舞的结果，但现有深度学习方法的一个反复出现的局限性在于普遍倾向于对过去的观察做出反应，而不是积极预测未来的事件。这导致频繁的时间滞后和预测突发事件的能力有限。为了应对这一挑战，我们引入了 ECLIPSE，这是一种时空神经网络架构，它可以根据天空图像对云运动进行建模，不仅可以预测未来的辐照度水平和相关的不确定性，还可以预测分段图像，从而提供有关局部辐照度图的更丰富的信息。我们证明，ECLIPSE 可以预测关键事件并减少时间延迟，同时生成视觉上逼真的未来。通过消融研究和对将辅助数据集成到建模中的好处和不同方法的比较研究，研究了模型的特征和属性。模型预测还可以通过分析网络训练期间学到的主要时空成分来解释。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ECLIPSE模型，通过分析天空图像和卫星数据预测太阳能辐照度波动，解决现有深度学习方法在预测延迟和突发事件处理上的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖历史数据导致预测滞后，难以应对云层动态变化引发的辐照度突变，需开发主动预测未来事件的模型以提高太阳能整合效率。
AI.method: 设计时空神经网络ECLIPSE，建模云层运动以预测辐照度及分割图像，结合辅助数据并进行消融实验与对比分析。
AI.result: 模型有效减少预测延迟，生成视觉逼真的未来场景，通过实验验证其对关键事件的预测能力及辅助数据整合优势。
AI.conclusion: ECLIPSE提升了太阳能辐照度预测的准确性与前瞻性，为云层动态建模和能源管理提供了新方法。

authors_text: Moumita Das,Rajarshi Ray,Swarup Kumar Mohalik,Ansuman Banerjee
title: Fast Falsification of Neural Networks using Property Directed Testing
title_zh: 使用属性定向测试快速伪造神经网络
comment: 10 pages, 3 figures, 4 tables
comments: 10 pages, 3 figures, 4 tables
abstract: Neural networks are now extensively used in perception, prediction and control of autonomous systems. Their deployment in safety-critical systems brings forth the need for verification techniques for such networks. As an alternative to exhaustive and costly verification algorithms, lightweight falsification algorithms have been heavily used to search for an input to the system that produces an unsafe output, i.e., a counterexample to the safety of the system. In this work, we propose a falsification algorithm for neural networks that directs the search for a counterexample, guided by a safety property specification. Our algorithm uses a derivative-free sampling-based optimization method. We evaluate our algorithm on 45 trained neural network benchmarks of the ACAS Xu system against 10 safety properties. We show that our falsification procedure detects all the unsafe instances that other verification tools also report as unsafe. Moreover, in terms of performance, our falsification procedure identifies most of the unsafe instances faster, in comparison to the state-of-the-art verification tools for feed-forward neural networks such as NNENUM and Neurify and in many instances, by orders of magnitude.
summary: Neural networks are now extensively used in perception, prediction and control of autonomous systems. Their deployment in safety-critical systems brings forth the need for verification techniques for such networks. As an alternative to exhaustive and costly verification algorithms, lightweight falsification algorithms have been heavily used to search for an input to the system that produces an unsafe output, i.e., a counterexample to the safety of the system. In this work, we propose a falsification algorithm for neural networks that directs the search for a counterexample, guided by a safety property specification. Our algorithm uses a derivative-free sampling-based optimization method. We evaluate our algorithm on 45 trained neural network benchmarks of the ACAS Xu system against 10 safety properties. We show that our falsification procedure detects all the unsafe instances that other verification tools also report as unsafe. Moreover, in terms of performance, our falsification procedure identifies most of the unsafe instances faster, in comparison to the state-of-the-art verification tools for feed-forward neural networks such as NNENUM and Neurify and in many instances, by orders of magnitude.
abstract_zh: 神经网络现在广泛应用于自主系统的感知、预测和控制。它们在安全关键系统中的部署提出了对此类网络验证技术的需求。作为详尽且昂贵的验证算法的替代方案，轻量级伪造算法已被大量用于搜索产生不安全输出的系统输入，即系统安全性的反例。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种神经网络的证伪算法，该算法在安全属性规范的指导下指导反例的搜索。我们的算法使用基于无导数采样的优化方法。我们根据 ACAS Xu 系统的 45 个经过训练的神经网络基准测试，针对 10 个安全属性来评估我们的算法。我们表明，我们的伪造程序可以检测到其他验证工具也报告为不安全的所有不安全实例。此外，在性能方面，与 NNENUM 和 Neurify 等最先进的前馈神经网络验证工具相比，我们的伪造程序可以更快地识别大多数不安全实例，并且在许多情况下，识别速度快了几个数量级。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于属性引导的神经网络快速反例生成算法，用于验证安全关键系统中的神经网络。
AI.motivation: 神经网络在自动驾驶等安全关键系统中广泛应用，但传统验证方法成本高且效率低，需开发更高效的反例搜索算法。
AI.method: 采用无导数的基于采样优化方法，结合安全属性规范指导反例搜索过程。
AI.result: 在45个ACAS Xu神经网络基准测试中，该方法检测出所有已知不安全实例，且速度较NNENUM和Neurify等工具提升多个数量级。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法在保证检测准确率的同时显著提升验证效率，适用于安全关键系统的神经网络验证需求。

search_text: Fast Falsification of Neural Networks using Property Directed Testing 使用属性定向测试快速伪造神经网络 Neural networks are now extensively used in perception, prediction and control of autonomous systems. Their deployment in safety-critical systems brings forth the need for verification techniques for such networks. As an alternative to exhaustive and costly verification algorithms, lightweight falsification algorithms have been heavily used to search for an input to the system that produces an unsafe output, i.e., a counterexample to the safety of the system. In this work, we propose a falsification algorithm for neural networks that directs the search for a counterexample, guided by a safety property specification. Our algorithm uses a derivative-free sampling-based optimization method. We evaluate our algorithm on 45 trained neural network benchmarks of the ACAS Xu system against 10 safety properties. We show that our falsification procedure detects all the unsafe instances that other verification tools also report as unsafe. Moreover, in terms of performance, our falsification procedure identifies most of the unsafe instances faster, in comparison to the state-of-the-art verification tools for feed-forward neural networks such as NNENUM and Neurify and in many instances, by orders of magnitude. 神经网络现在广泛应用于自主系统的感知、预测和控制。它们在安全关键系统中的部署提出了对此类网络验证技术的需求。作为详尽且昂贵的验证算法的替代方案，轻量级伪造算法已被大量用于搜索产生不安全输出的系统输入，即系统安全性的反例。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种神经网络的证伪算法，该算法在安全属性规范的指导下指导反例的搜索。我们的算法使用基于无导数采样的优化方法。我们根据 ACAS Xu 系统的 45 个经过训练的神经网络基准测试，针对 10 个安全属性来评估我们的算法。我们表明，我们的伪造程序可以检测到其他验证工具也报告为不安全的所有不安全实例。此外，在性能方面，与 NNENUM 和 Neurify 等最先进的前馈神经网络验证工具相比，我们的伪造程序可以更快地识别大多数不安全实例，并且在许多情况下，识别速度快了几个数量级。 本文提出一种基于属性引导的神经网络快速反例生成算法，用于验证安全关键系统中的神经网络。 Moumita Das,Rajarshi Ray,Swarup Kumar Mohalik,Ansuman Banerjee cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Augusto Luis Ballardini,Álvaro Hernández,Miguel Ángel Sotelo
title: Model Guided Road Intersection Classification
title_zh: 模型引导道路交叉口分类
comment: To be presented at the 2021 32nd IEEE Intelligent Vehicles Symposium (IV) (IV 2021)
comments: To be presented at the 2021 32nd IEEE Intelligent Vehicles Symposium (IV) (IV 2021)
abstract: Understanding complex scenarios from in-vehicle cameras is essential for safely operating autonomous driving systems in densely populated areas. Among these, intersection areas are one of the most critical as they concentrate a considerable number of traffic accidents and fatalities. Detecting and understanding the scene configuration of these usually crowded areas is then of extreme importance for both autonomous vehicles and modern ADAS aimed at preventing road crashes and increasing the safety of vulnerable road users. This work investigates inter-section classification from RGB images using well-consolidate neural network approaches along with a method to enhance the results based on the teacher/student training paradigm. An extensive experimental activity aimed at identifying the best input configuration and evaluating different network parameters on both the well-known KITTI dataset and the new KITTI-360 sequences shows that our method outperforms current state-of-the-art approaches on a per-frame basis and prove the effectiveness of the proposed learning scheme.
summary: Understanding complex scenarios from in-vehicle cameras is essential for safely operating autonomous driving systems in densely populated areas. Among these, intersection areas are one of the most critical as they concentrate a considerable number of traffic accidents and fatalities. Detecting and understanding the scene configuration of these usually crowded areas is then of extreme importance for both autonomous vehicles and modern ADAS aimed at preventing road crashes and increasing the safety of vulnerable road users. This work investigates inter-section classification from RGB images using well-consolidate neural network approaches along with a method to enhance the results based on the teacher/student training paradigm. An extensive experimental activity aimed at identifying the best input configuration and evaluating different network parameters on both the well-known KITTI dataset and the new KITTI-360 sequences shows that our method outperforms current state-of-the-art approaches on a per-frame basis and prove the effectiveness of the proposed learning scheme.
abstract_zh: 从车载摄像头了解复杂场景对于在人口稠密地区安全运行自动驾驶系统至关重要。其中，交叉口区域是最关键的区域之一，因为这里集中了相当多的交通事故和死亡事故。检测和了解这些通常拥挤区域的场景配置对于自动驾驶汽车和旨在防止道路碰撞并提高弱势道路使用者安全的现代 ADAS 都极其重要。这项工作使用巩固的神经网络方法以及基于教师/学生训练范例的增强结果的方法来研究 RGB 图像的截面间分类。旨在识别最佳输入配置并在著名的 KITTI 数据集和新的 KITTI-360 序列上评估不同网络参数的广泛实验活动表明，我们的方法在每帧的基础上优于当前最先进的方法，并证明了所提出的学习方案的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于神经网络和教师/学生训练范式的道路交叉口分类方法，旨在提升自动驾驶系统对复杂场景的理解能力。
AI.motivation: 道路交叉口是交通事故高发区域，准确分类对自动驾驶安全和ADAS系统优化具有重要意义。
AI.method: 结合成熟神经网络架构与教师/学生训练机制，通过KITTI和KITTI-360数据集实验优化输入配置和网络参数。
AI.result: 在帧级分类任务中优于现有最先进的方法，验证了所提学习方案的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的模型指导分类方法能有效提升交叉口场景的识别性能，为自动驾驶安全提供技术支撑。

title: Spherical formulation of geometric motion segmentation constraints in fisheye cameras
title_zh: 鱼眼相机中几何运动分割约束的球面公式
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2003.03262
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2003.03262
abstract: We introduce a visual motion segmentation method employing spherical geometry for fisheye cameras and automoated driving. Three commonly used geometric constraints in pin-hole imagery (the positive height, positive depth and epipolar constraints) are reformulated to spherical coordinates, making them invariant to specific camera configurations as long as the camera calibration is known. A fourth constraint, known as the anti-parallel constraint, is added to resolve motion-parallax ambiguity, to support the detection of moving objects undergoing parallel or near-parallel motion with respect to the host vehicle. A final constraint constraint is described, known as the spherical three-view constraint, is described though not employed in our proposed algorithm. Results are presented and analyzed that demonstrate that the proposal is an effective motion segmentation approach for direct employment on fisheye imagery.
summary: We introduce a visual motion segmentation method employing spherical geometry for fisheye cameras and automoated driving. Three commonly used geometric constraints in pin-hole imagery (the positive height, positive depth and epipolar constraints) are reformulated to spherical coordinates, making them invariant to specific camera configurations as long as the camera calibration is known. A fourth constraint, known as the anti-parallel constraint, is added to resolve motion-parallax ambiguity, to support the detection of moving objects undergoing parallel or near-parallel motion with respect to the host vehicle. A final constraint constraint is described, known as the spherical three-view constraint, is described though not employed in our proposed algorithm. Results are presented and analyzed that demonstrate that the proposal is an effective motion segmentation approach for direct employment on fisheye imagery.
abstract_zh: 我们介绍了一种采用球面几何结构的视觉运动分割方法，用于鱼眼相机和自动驾驶。针孔图像中三种常用的几何约束（正高度、正深度和极线约束）被重新表述为球坐标，只要相机校准已知，它们就不会随特定相机配置变化。添加第四个约束（称为反平行约束）来解决运动视差模糊性，以支持检测相对于主车辆进行平行或接近平行运动的移动物体。描述了最终的约束约束，称为球面三视图约束，尽管在我们提出的算法中没有采用，但仍进行了描述。结果的呈现和分析表明，该提案是一种有效的运动分割方法，可直接应用于鱼眼图像。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对鱼眼相机的运动分割方法，通过球面几何重新表述传统几何约束，并引入反平行约束以提高分割效果。
AI.motivation: 传统针孔相机的几何约束在鱼眼相机大视角和畸变场景下失效，需设计适应鱼眼成像特性的运动分割方法以支持自动驾驶中的移动物体检测。
AI.method: 将正高度、正深度和极线约束转换为球面坐标系表示，增加反平行约束消除运动视差歧义，并提出未采用的球面三视图约束作为补充。
AI.result: 实验验证该方法在鱼眼图像上能有效分割运动物体，尤其对平行运动目标检测具有优势。
AI.conclusion: 基于球面几何的约束重构为鱼眼相机运动分割提供了新思路，所提方法在自动驾驶场景中具有应用潜力。
