title: Phrase break prediction with bidirectional encoder representations in Japanese text-to-speech synthesis
title_zh: 日语文本到语音合成中使用双向编码器表示的断句预测
comment: Submitted to INTERSPEECH 2021
comments: Submitted to INTERSPEECH 2021
abstract: We propose a novel phrase break prediction method that combines implicit features extracted from a pre-trained large language model, a.k.a BERT, and explicit features extracted from BiLSTM with linguistic features. In conventional BiLSTM based methods, word representations and/or sentence representations are used as independent components. The proposed method takes account of both representations to extract the latent semantics, which cannot be captured by previous methods. The objective evaluation results show that the proposed method obtains an absolute improvement of 3.2 points for the F1 score compared with BiLSTM-based conventional methods using linguistic features. Moreover, the perceptual listening test results verify that a TTS system that applied our proposed method achieved a mean opinion score of 4.39 in prosody naturalness, which is highly competitive with the score of 4.37 for synthesized speech with ground-truth phrase breaks.
summary: We propose a novel phrase break prediction method that combines implicit features extracted from a pre-trained large language model, a.k.a BERT, and explicit features extracted from BiLSTM with linguistic features. In conventional BiLSTM based methods, word representations and/or sentence representations are used as independent components. The proposed method takes account of both representations to extract the latent semantics, which cannot be captured by previous methods. The objective evaluation results show that the proposed method obtains an absolute improvement of 3.2 points for the F1 score compared with BiLSTM-based conventional methods using linguistic features. Moreover, the perceptual listening test results verify that a TTS system that applied our proposed method achieved a mean opinion score of 4.39 in prosody naturalness, which is highly competitive with the score of 4.37 for synthesized speech with ground-truth phrase breaks.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新颖的断句预测方法，该方法将从预训练的大型语言模型（又称 BERT）中提取的隐式特征和从 BiLSTM 中提取的显式特征与语言特征相结合。在传统的基于 BiLSTM 的方法中，单词表示和/或句子表示被用作独立组件。所提出的方法考虑了两种表示来提取潜在语义，这是以前的方法无法捕获的。客观评估结果表明，与基于 BiLSTM 的使用语言特征的传统方法相比，该方法在 F1 分数上获得了 3.2 分的绝对提升。此外，感知听力测试结果验证了应用我们提出的方法的 TTS 系统在韵律自然度方面取得了 4.39 的平均意见得分，这与具有真实短语中断的合成语音的 4.37 得分具有很强的竞争力。

AI.tldr: 提出结合BERT隐式特征与BiLSTM显式特征的短语中断预测方法，提升日语TTS的韵律自然度。
AI.motivation: 传统BiLSTM方法依赖独立词/句表示，难以捕捉潜在语义，影响预测效果。
AI.method: 融合BERT隐式特征与BiLSTM-语言特征显式特征，联合提取潜在语义。
AI.result: F1分数提升3.2点，韵律自然度达4.39，接近真实短语中断的4.37。
AI.conclusion: 结合隐式与显式特征可有效提升短语中断预测，优化TTS韵律自然度。

search_text: Phrase break prediction with bidirectional encoder representations in Japanese text-to-speech synthesis 日语文本到语音合成中使用双向编码器表示的断句预测 We propose a novel phrase break prediction method that combines implicit features extracted from a pre-trained large language model, a.k.a BERT, and explicit features extracted from BiLSTM with linguistic features. In conventional BiLSTM based methods, word representations and/or sentence representations are used as independent components. The proposed method takes account of both representations to extract the latent semantics, which cannot be captured by previous methods. The objective evaluation results show that the proposed method obtains an absolute improvement of 3.2 points for the F1 score compared with BiLSTM-based conventional methods using linguistic features. Moreover, the perceptual listening test results verify that a TTS system that applied our proposed method achieved a mean opinion score of 4.39 in prosody naturalness, which is highly competitive with the score of 4.37 for synthesized speech with ground-truth phrase breaks. 我们提出了一种新颖的断句预测方法，该方法将从预训练的大型语言模型（又称 BERT）中提取的隐式特征和从 BiLSTM 中提取的显式特征与语言特征相结合。在传统的基于 BiLSTM 的方法中，单词表示和/或句子表示被用作独立组件。所提出的方法考虑了两种表示来提取潜在语义，这是以前的方法无法捕获的。客观评估结果表明，与基于 BiLSTM 的使用语言特征的传统方法相比，该方法在 F1 分数上获得了 3.2 分的绝对提升。此外，感知听力测试结果验证了应用我们提出的方法的 TTS 系统在韵律自然度方面取得了 4.39 的平均意见得分，这与具有真实短语中断的合成语音的 4.37 得分具有很强的竞争力。 提出结合BERT隐式特征与BiLSTM显式特征的短语中断预测方法，提升日语TTS的韵律自然度。 Kosuke Futamata,Byeongseon Park,Ryuichi Yamamoto,Kentaro Tachibana eess.AS,cs.CL,cs.LG

authors_text: Yuang Zhang,Huanyu He,Jianguo Li,Yuxi Li,John See,Weiyao Lin
title: Variational Pedestrian Detection
title_zh: 变分行人检测
abstract: Pedestrian detection in a crowd is a challenging task due to a high number of mutually-occluding human instances, which brings ambiguity and optimization difficulties to the current IoU-based ground truth assignment procedure in classical object detection methods. In this paper, we develop a unique perspective of pedestrian detection as a variational inference problem. We formulate a novel and efficient algorithm for pedestrian detection by modeling the dense proposals as a latent variable while proposing a customized Auto Encoding Variational Bayes (AEVB) algorithm. Through the optimization of our proposed algorithm, a classical detector can be fashioned into a variational pedestrian detector. Experiments conducted on CrowdHuman and CityPersons datasets show that the proposed algorithm serves as an efficient solution to handle the dense pedestrian detection problem for the case of single-stage detectors. Our method can also be flexibly applied to two-stage detectors, achieving notable performance enhancement.
summary: Pedestrian detection in a crowd is a challenging task due to a high number of mutually-occluding human instances, which brings ambiguity and optimization difficulties to the current IoU-based ground truth assignment procedure in classical object detection methods. In this paper, we develop a unique perspective of pedestrian detection as a variational inference problem. We formulate a novel and efficient algorithm for pedestrian detection by modeling the dense proposals as a latent variable while proposing a customized Auto Encoding Variational Bayes (AEVB) algorithm. Through the optimization of our proposed algorithm, a classical detector can be fashioned into a variational pedestrian detector. Experiments conducted on CrowdHuman and CityPersons datasets show that the proposed algorithm serves as an efficient solution to handle the dense pedestrian detection problem for the case of single-stage detectors. Our method can also be flexibly applied to two-stage detectors, achieving notable performance enhancement.
abstract_zh: 由于存在大量相互遮挡的人体实例，人群中的行人检测是一项具有挑战性的任务，这给经典目标检测方法中当前基于 IoU 的地面实况分配过程带来了模糊性和优化困难。在本文中，我们将行人检测作为变分推理问题提出了独特的视角。我们通过将密集提案建模为潜在变量，同时提出定制的自动编码变分贝叶斯（AEVB）算法，制定了一种新颖有效的行人检测算法。通过我们提出的算法的优化，可以将经典检测器转变为变分行人检测器。在 CrowdHuman 和 CityPersons 数据集上进行的实验表明，所提出的算法可以有效解决单级检测器情况下的密集行人检测问题。我们的方法还可以灵活地应用于两级检测器，实现显着的性能提升。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于变分推断的行人检测方法，解决密集人群中的遮挡与检测效率问题。
AI.motivation: 传统IoU-based真值分配在密集人群中存在歧义和优化困难，需新方法处理遮挡与密集实例检测。
AI.method: 将密集候选框建模为潜在变量，设计定制AEVB算法，优化经典检测器为变分行人检测框架。
AI.result: 在CrowdHuman和CityPersons数据集上验证，单阶段检测器效率提升，且适用于两阶段检测器并增强性能。
AI.conclusion: 变分方法有效解决密集行人检测难题，兼具灵活性与性能提升，适用于不同检测框架。

title: Relational Argumentation Semantics
title_zh: 关系论证语义
abstract: In this paper, we propose a fresh perspective on argumentation semantics, to view them as a relational database. It offers encapsulation of the underlying argumentation graph, and allows us to understand argumentation semantics under a single, relational perspective, leading to the concept of relational argumentation semantics. This is a direction to understand argumentation semantics through a common formal language. We show that many existing semantics such as explanation semantics, multi-agent semantics, and more typical semantics, that have been proposed for specific purposes, are understood in the relational perspective.
summary: In this paper, we propose a fresh perspective on argumentation semantics, to view them as a relational database. It offers encapsulation of the underlying argumentation graph, and allows us to understand argumentation semantics under a single, relational perspective, leading to the concept of relational argumentation semantics. This is a direction to understand argumentation semantics through a common formal language. We show that many existing semantics such as explanation semantics, multi-agent semantics, and more typical semantics, that have been proposed for specific purposes, are understood in the relational perspective.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了论证语义的新视角，将其视为关系数据库。它提供了底层论证图的封装，使我们能够在单一的关系视角下理解论证语义，从而产生关系论证语义的概念。这是通过通用形式语言来理解论证语义的方向。我们表明，许多现有的语义，如解释语义、多主体语义和更典型的语义，都是为了特定目的而提出的，都是从关系的角度来理解的。

AI.tldr: 提出一种新的关系论证语义框架，将多种现有论证语义统一到关系数据库视角，提供统一的形式化语言进行分析。
AI.motivation: 现有论证语义多为特定目的设计，缺乏统一框架，难以系统理解和比较，需建立通用形式化语言。
AI.method: 将论证语义建模为关系数据库结构，封装底层论证图，通过关系视角统一不同语义，构建共同形式化语言。
AI.result: 证明多种现有语义（如解释语义、多智能体语义等）可被统一到关系视角，实现不同语义的系统化分析。
AI.conclusion: 关系论证语义为统一不同论证语义提供新方向，推动构建通用形式化语言，促进理论整合与应用。

title: Towards Visual Semantics
title_zh: 走向视觉语义
abstract: Lexical Semantics is concerned with how words encode mental representations of the world, i.e., concepts . We call this type of concepts, classification concepts . In this paper, we focus on Visual Semantics , namely on how humans build concepts representing what they perceive visually. We call this second type of concepts, substance concepts . As shown in the paper, these two types of concepts are different and, furthermore, the mapping between them is many-to-many. In this paper we provide a theory and an algorithm for how to build substance concepts which are in a one-to-one correspondence with classifications concepts, thus paving the way to the seamless integration between natural language descriptions and visual perception. This work builds upon three main intuitions: (i) substance concepts are modeled as visual objects , namely sequences of similar frames, as perceived in multiple encounters ; (ii) substance concepts are organized into a visual subsumption hierarchy based on the notions of Genus and Differentia ; (iii) the human feedback is exploited not to name objects, but, rather, to align the hierarchy of substance concepts with that of classification concepts. The learning algorithm is implemented for the base case of a hierarchy of depth two. The experiments, though preliminary, show that the algorithm manages to acquire the notions of Genus and Differentia with reasonable accuracy, this despite seeing a small number of examples and receiving supervision on a fraction of them.

The learning algorithm is implemented for the base case of a hierarchy of depth two. The experiments, though preliminary, show that the algorithm manages to acquire the notions of Genus and Differentia with reasonable accuracy, this despite seeing a small number of examples and receiving supervision on a fraction of them.
abstract_zh: 词汇语义学关注单词如何编码世界的心理表征，即概念。我们把这类概念称为分类概念。在本文中，我们关注视觉语义，即人类如何构建代表他们视觉感知的概念。我们称第二类概念为实体概念。正如论文所示，这两类概念是不同的，而且它们之间的映射是多对多的。在本文中，我们提供了如何构建与分类概念一一对应的实体概念的理论和算法，从而为自然语言描述和视觉感知之间的无缝集成铺平了道路。这项工作建立在三个主要直觉的基础上：（i）物质概念被建模为视觉对象，即在多次遭遇中感知到的相似框架的序列； (ii) 物质概念根据属和异的概念被组织成视觉包含层次结构； (iii) 利用人类反馈不是为了命名对象，而是为了使物质概念的层次结构与分类概念的层次结构保持一致。该学习算法是针对深度为二的层次结构的基本情况实现的。这些实验虽然是初步的，但表明该算法能够以合理的准确度获取属和异的概念，尽管看到了少量的例子并接受了其中一小部分的监督。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种理论和算法，用于建立与分类概念一一对应的物质概念，以实现自然语言描述与视觉感知的无缝整合。
AI.motivation: 现有分类概念（词汇语义）与物质概念（视觉语义）存在多对多映射关系，阻碍了语言与视觉信息的直接关联，需建立一一对应关系以促进整合。
AI.method: 基于三个核心假设：（1）物质概念建模为多次感知的相似帧序列；（2）构建基于属与差的视觉从属层次结构；（3）利用人类反馈对齐物质概念与分类概念的层次结构。算法实现深度为二的层次结构。
AI.result: 初步实验表明，算法在少量样本和部分监督下，能合理准确地学习属与差概念。
AI.conclusion: 该理论和算法为自然语言与视觉感知的整合奠定基础，未来可扩展至更复杂的层次结构。

search_text: Towards Visual Semantics 走向视觉语义 Lexical Semantics is concerned with how words encode mental representations of the world, i.e., concepts . We call this type of concepts, classification concepts . In this paper, we focus on Visual Semantics , namely on how humans build concepts representing what they perceive visually. We call this second type of concepts, substance concepts . As shown in the paper, these two types of concepts are different and, furthermore, the mapping between them is many-to-many. In this paper we provide a theory and an algorithm for how to build substance concepts which are in a one-to-one correspondence with classifications concepts, thus paving the way to the seamless integration between natural language descriptions and visual perception. This work builds upon three main intuitions: (i) substance concepts are modeled as visual objects , namely sequences of similar frames, as perceived in multiple encounters ; (ii) substance concepts are organized into a visual subsumption hierarchy based on the notions of Genus and Differentia ; (iii) the human feedback is exploited not to name objects, but, rather, to align the hierarchy of substance concepts with that of classification concepts. The learning algorithm is implemented for the base case of a hierarchy of depth two. The experiments, though preliminary, show that the algorithm manages to acquire the notions of Genus and Differentia with reasonable accuracy, this despite seeing a small number of examples and receiving supervision on a fraction of them. 词汇语义学关注单词如何编码世界的心理表征，即概念。我们把这类概念称为分类概念。在本文中，我们关注视觉语义，即人类如何构建代表他们视觉感知的概念。我们称第二类概念为实体概念。正如论文所示，这两类概念是不同的，而且它们之间的映射是多对多的。在本文中，我们提供了如何构建与分类概念一一对应的实体概念的理论和算法，从而为自然语言描述和视觉感知之间的无缝集成铺平了道路。这项工作建立在三个主要直觉的基础上：（i）物质概念被建模为视觉对象，即在多次遭遇中感知到的相似框架的序列； (ii) 物质概念根据属和异的概念被组织成视觉包含层次结构； (iii) 利用人类反馈不是为了命名对象，而是为了使物质概念的层次结构与分类概念的层次结构保持一致。该学习算法是针对深度为二的层次结构的基本情况实现的。这些实验虽然是初步的，但表明该算法能够以合理的准确度获取属和异的概念，尽管看到了少量的例子并接受了其中一小部分的监督。 本文提出一种理论和算法，用于建立与分类概念一一对应的物质概念，以实现自然语言描述与视觉感知的无缝整合。 Fausto Giunchiglia,Luca Erculiani,Andrea Passerini cs.AI

authors_text: Wenxuan Wang,Bangjie Yin,Taiping Yao,Li Zhang,Yanwei Fu,Shouhong Ding,Jilin Li,Feiyue Huang,Xiangyang Xue
title: Delving into Data: Effectively Substitute Training for Black-box Attack
title_zh: 深入研究数据：有效替代黑盒攻击的训练
comment: 10 pages, 6 figures, 6 tables, 1 algorithm, To appear in CVPR 2021 as a poster paper
comments: 10 pages, 6 figures, 6 tables, 1 algorithm, To appear in CVPR 2021 as a poster paper
abstract: Deep models have shown their vulnerability when processing adversarial samples. As for the black-box attack, without access to the architecture and weights of the attacked model, training a substitute model for adversarial attacks has attracted wide attention. Previous substitute training approaches focus on stealing the knowledge of the target model based on real training data or synthetic data, without exploring what kind of data can further improve the transferability between the substitute and target models. In this paper, we propose a novel perspective substitute training that focuses on designing the distribution of data used in the knowledge stealing process. More specifically, a diverse data generation module is proposed to synthesize large-scale data with wide distribution. And adversarial substitute training strategy is introduced to focus on the data distributed near the decision boundary. The combination of these two modules can further boost the consistency of the substitute model and target model, which greatly improves the effectiveness of adversarial attack. Extensive experiments demonstrate the efficacy of our method against state-of-the-art competitors under non-target and target attack settings. Detailed visualization and analysis are also provided to help understand the advantage of our method.
summary: Deep models have shown their vulnerability when processing adversarial samples. As for the black-box attack, without access to the architecture and weights of the attacked model, training a substitute model for adversarial attacks has attracted wide attention. Previous substitute training approaches focus on stealing the knowledge of the target model based on real training data or synthetic data, without exploring what kind of data can further improve the transferability between the substitute and target models. In this paper, we propose a novel perspective substitute training that focuses on designing the distribution of data used in the knowledge stealing process. More specifically, a diverse data generation module is proposed to synthesize large-scale data with wide distribution. And adversarial substitute training strategy is introduced to focus on the data distributed near the decision boundary. The combination of these two modules can further boost the consistency of the substitute model and target model, which greatly improves the effectiveness of adversarial attack. Extensive experiments demonstrate the efficacy of our method against state-of-the-art competitors under non-target and target attack settings. Detailed visualization and analysis are also provided to help understand the advantage of our method.
abstract_zh: 深度模型在处理对抗性样本时已显示出其脆弱性。对于黑盒攻击，在无法获取被攻击模型的架构和权重的情况下，训练对抗性攻击的替代模型引起了广泛的关注。以前的替代训练方法侧重于基于真实训练数据或合成数据窃取目标模型的知识，而没有探索什么样的数据可以进一步提高替代模型和目标模型之间的可迁移性。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的视角替代训练，其重点是设计知识窃取过程中使用的数据分布。更具体地说，提出了一种多样化的数据生成模块来合成广泛分布的大规模数据。并引入对抗性替代训练策略来关注分布在决策边界附近的数据。这两个模块的结合可以进一步提高替代模型和目标模型的一致性，从而大大提高对抗攻击的有效性。大量的实验证明了我们的方法在非目标和目标攻击设置下对抗最先进的竞争对手的有效性。还提供了详细的可视化和分析，以帮助理解我们方法的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型替代训练方法，通过优化数据分布提升黑盒攻击中替代模型与目标模型的一致性，从而增强对抗攻击效果。
AI.motivation: 现有替代训练方法未充分探索数据分布对模型可迁移性的影响，导致攻击效果受限。本文旨在通过设计更优的数据分布策略提升替代模型与目标模型的匹配度。
AI.method: 提出多样化数据生成模块合成广域分布数据，并引入对抗性替代训练策略聚焦决策边界数据，双模块协同提升模型一致性。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在非目标攻击和目标攻击场景下均优于现有先进方法，可视化分析验证了数据分布优化的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过数据分布优化显著提升黑盒攻击效果，为对抗样本生成提供了新的研究视角和实践方案。

authors_text: Max-Heinrich Laves,Sontje Ihler,Jacob F. Fast,Lüder A. Kahrs,Tobias Ortmaier
title: Recalibration of Aleatoric and Epistemic Regression Uncertainty in Medical Imaging
title_zh: 医学成像中任意和认知回归不确定性的重新校准
comment: Accepted for publication at the Journal of Machine Learning for Biomedical Imaging (MELBA) https://melba-journal.org
comments: Accepted for publication at the Journal of Machine Learning for Biomedical Imaging (MELBA) https://melba-journal.org
abstract: The consideration of predictive uncertainty in medical imaging with deep learning is of utmost importance. We apply estimation of both aleatoric and epistemic uncertainty by variational Bayesian inference with Monte Carlo dropout to regression tasks and show that predictive uncertainty is systematically underestimated. We apply $ σ$ scaling with a single scalar value; a simple, yet effective calibration method for both types of uncertainty. The performance of our approach is evaluated on a variety of common medical regression data sets using different state-of-the-art convolutional network architectures. In our experiments, $ σ$ scaling is able to reliably recalibrate predictive uncertainty. It is easy to implement and maintains the accuracy. Well-calibrated uncertainty in regression allows robust rejection of unreliable predictions or detection of out-of-distribution samples. Our source code is available at https://github.com/mlaves/well-calibrated-regression-uncertainty
summary: The consideration of predictive uncertainty in medical imaging with deep learning is of utmost importance. We apply estimation of both aleatoric and epistemic uncertainty by variational Bayesian inference with Monte Carlo dropout to regression tasks and show that predictive uncertainty is systematically underestimated. We apply $ σ$ scaling with a single scalar value; a simple, yet effective calibration method for both types of uncertainty. The performance of our approach is evaluated on a variety of common medical regression data sets using different state-of-the-art convolutional network architectures. In our experiments, $ σ$ scaling is able to reliably recalibrate predictive uncertainty. It is easy to implement and maintains the accuracy. Well-calibrated uncertainty in regression allows robust rejection of unreliable predictions or detection of out-of-distribution samples. Our source code is available at https://github.com/mlaves/well-calibrated-regression-uncertainty
abstract_zh: 利用深度学习来考虑医学成像中的预测不确定性至关重要。我们将通过蒙特卡洛退出的变分贝叶斯推理对任意和认知不确定性的估计应用于回归任务，并表明预测不确定性被系统性地低估。我们使用单个标量值应用$σ$缩放；针对两种类型的不确定性的简单而有效的校准方法。我们的方法的性能是使用不同的最先进的卷积网络架构在各种常见的医学回归数据集上进行评估的。在我们的实验中，$σ$ 缩放能够可靠地重新校准预测不确定性。它易于实现并保持准确性。回归中经过良好校准的不确定性可以稳健地拒绝不可靠的预测或检测分布外的样本。我们的源代码可在 https://github.com/mlaves/well-calibrate-regression-uncertainty 获取

AI.tldr: 该论文旨在通过变分贝叶斯推断和蒙特卡洛dropout方法，重新校准医学影像回归任务中的偶然不确定性和认识不确定性。
AI.motivation: 在医学影像中使用深度学习时，预测不确定性非常重要，但现有方法往往低估了不确定性，因此需要一种简单有效的校准方法。
AI.method: 论文采用变分贝叶斯推断和蒙特卡洛dropout方法来估计两种不确定性，并通过σ缩放方法进行重新校准。
AI.result: 实验表明，σ缩放方法能够可靠地重新校准预测不确定性，且易于实现且保持准确性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为医学影像回归任务提供了可靠的不确定性校准，有助于检测不可靠预测和分布外样本。

search_text: Recalibration of Aleatoric and Epistemic Regression Uncertainty in Medical Imaging 医学成像中任意和认知回归不确定性的重新校准 The consideration of predictive uncertainty in medical imaging with deep learning is of utmost importance. We apply estimation of both aleatoric and epistemic uncertainty by variational Bayesian inference with Monte Carlo dropout to regression tasks and show that predictive uncertainty is systematically underestimated. We apply $ σ$ scaling with a single scalar value; a simple, yet effective calibration method for both types of uncertainty. The performance of our approach is evaluated on a variety of common medical regression data sets using different state-of-the-art convolutional network architectures. In our experiments, $ σ$ scaling is able to reliably recalibrate predictive uncertainty. It is easy to implement and maintains the accuracy. Well-calibrated uncertainty in regression allows robust rejection of unreliable predictions or detection of out-of-distribution samples. Our source code is available at https://github.com/mlaves/well-calibrated-regression-uncertainty 利用深度学习来考虑医学成像中的预测不确定性至关重要。我们将通过蒙特卡洛退出的变分贝叶斯推理对任意和认知不确定性的估计应用于回归任务，并表明预测不确定性被系统性地低估。我们使用单个标量值应用$σ$缩放；针对两种类型的不确定性的简单而有效的校准方法。我们的方法的性能是使用不同的最先进的卷积网络架构在各种常见的医学回归数据集上进行评估的。在我们的实验中，$σ$ 缩放能够可靠地重新校准预测不确定性。它易于实现并保持准确性。回归中经过良好校准的不确定性可以稳健地拒绝不可靠的预测或检测分布外的样本。我们的源代码可在 https://github.com/mlaves/well-calibrate-regression-uncertainty 获取 该论文旨在通过变分贝叶斯推断和蒙特卡洛dropout方法，重新校准医学影像回归任务中的偶然不确定性和认识不确定性。 Max-Heinrich Laves,Sontje Ihler,Jacob F. Fast,Lüder A. Kahrs,Tobias Ortmaier eess.IV,cs.CV

title: Efficient Hyperparameter Optimization for Physics-based Character Animation
title_zh: 基于物理的角色动画的高效超参数优化
comment: published in ACM SIGGRAPH Symposium on Interactive 3D Graphics and Games 2021
comments: published in ACM SIGGRAPH Symposium on Interactive 3D Graphics and Games 2021
abstract: Physics-based character animation has seen significant advances in recent years with the adoption of Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL). However, DRL-based learning methods are usually computationally expensive and their performance crucially depends on the choice of hyperparameters. Tuning hyperparameters for these methods often requires repetitive training of control policies, which is even more computationally prohibitive. In this work, we propose a novel Curriculum-based Multi-Fidelity Bayesian Optimization framework (CMFBO) for efficient hyperparameter optimization of DRL-based character control systems. Using curriculum-based task difficulty as fidelity criterion, our method improves searching efficiency by gradually pruning search space through evaluation on easier motor skill tasks. We evaluate our method on two physics-based character control tasks: character morphology optimization and hyperparameter tuning of DeepMimic. Our algorithm significantly outperforms state-of-the-art hyperparameter optimization methods applicable for physics-based character animation. In particular, we show that hyperparameters optimized through our algorithm result in at least 5x efficiency gain comparing to author-released settings in DeepMimic.
summary: Physics-based character animation has seen significant advances in recent years with the adoption of Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL). However, DRL-based learning methods are usually computationally expensive and their performance crucially depends on the choice of hyperparameters. Tuning hyperparameters for these methods often requires repetitive training of control policies, which is even more computationally prohibitive. In this work, we propose a novel Curriculum-based Multi-Fidelity Bayesian Optimization framework (CMFBO) for efficient hyperparameter optimization of DRL-based character control systems. Using curriculum-based task difficulty as fidelity criterion, our method improves searching efficiency by gradually pruning search space through evaluation on easier motor skill tasks. We evaluate our method on two physics-based character control tasks: character morphology optimization and hyperparameter tuning of DeepMimic. Our algorithm significantly outperforms state-of-the-art hyperparameter optimization methods applicable for physics-based character animation. In particular, we show that hyperparameters optimized through our algorithm result in at least 5x efficiency gain comparing to author-released settings in DeepMimic.
abstract_zh: 近年来，随着深度强化学习 (DRL) 的采用，基于物理的角色动画取得了重大进展。然而，基于 DRL 的学习方法通​​常计算成本昂贵，并且其性能很大程度上取决于超参数的选择。调整这些方法的超参数通常需要对控制策略进行重复训练，这在计算上更加令人望而却步。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于课程的多保真贝叶斯优化框架（CMFBO），用于基于 DRL 的角色控制系统的高效超参数优化。我们的方法使用基于课程的任务难度作为保真度标准，通过评估更容易的运动技能任务来逐步修剪搜索空间，从而提高搜索效率。我们在两个基于物理的角色控制任务上评估我们的方法：角色形态优化和 DeepMimic 的超参数调整。我们的算法显着优于适用于基于物理的角色动画的最先进的超参数优化方法。特别是，我们表明，与 DeepMimic 中作者发布的设置相比，通过我们的算法优化的超参数可实现至少 5 倍的效率增益。

AI.tldr: 提出一种高效的超参数优化方法，用于基于物理的角色动画控制系统的深度强化学习（DRL）。
AI.motivation: DRL方法在物理角色动画中应用广泛，但其超参数调优过程计算成本高，传统方法需反复训练策略，效率低下，亟需更高效优化方法。
AI.method: 基于课程的多保真度贝叶斯优化框架（CMFBO），通过课程任务难度作为保真度指标，逐步修剪搜索空间，提升搜索效率。
AI.result: 在角色形态优化和DeepMimic超参数调整任务中，算法效率较现有方法提升至少5倍，优于作者发布的默认设置。
AI.conclusion: CMFBO框架有效解决了DRL超参数优化的计算瓶颈，为物理基础角色动画提供了高效调参方案。

title: Complex Neural Spatial Filter: Enhancing Multi-channel Target Speech Separation in Complex Domain
title_zh: 复杂神经空间滤波器：增强复杂域中的多通道目标语音分离
comment: 5 pages, 3 figures
comments: 5 pages, 3 figures
abstract: To date, mainstream target speech separation (TSS) approaches are formulated to estimate the complex ratio mask (cRM) of the target speech in time-frequency domain under supervised deep learning framework. However, the existing deep models for estimating cRM are designed in the way that the real and imaginary parts of the cRM are separately modeled using real-valued training data pairs. The research motivation of this study is to design a deep model that fully exploits the temporal-spectral-spatial information of multi-channel signals for estimating cRM directly and efficiently in complex domain. As a result, a novel TSS network is designed consisting of two modules, a complex neural spatial filter (cNSF) and an MVDR. Essentially, cNSF is a cRM estimation model and an MVDR module is cascaded to the cNSF module to reduce the nonlinear speech distortions introduced by neural network. Specifically, to fit the cRM target, all input features of cNSF are reformulated into complex-valued representations following the supervised learning paradigm. Then, to achieve good hierarchical feature abstraction, a complex deep neural network (cDNN) is delicately designed with U-Net structure. Experiments conducted on simulated multi-channel speech data demonstrate the proposed cNSF outperforms the baseline NSF by 12.1% scale-invariant signal-to-distortion ratio and 33.1% word error rate.
summary: To date, mainstream target speech separation (TSS) approaches are formulated to estimate the complex ratio mask (cRM) of the target speech in time-frequency domain under supervised deep learning framework. However, the existing deep models for estimating cRM are designed in the way that the real and imaginary parts of the cRM are separately modeled using real-valued training data pairs. The research motivation of this study is to design a deep model that fully exploits the temporal-spectral-spatial information of multi-channel signals for estimating cRM directly and efficiently in complex domain. As a result, a novel TSS network is designed consisting of two modules, a complex neural spatial filter (cNSF) and an MVDR. Essentially, cNSF is a cRM estimation model and an MVDR module is cascaded to the cNSF module to reduce the nonlinear speech distortions introduced by neural network. Specifically, to fit the cRM target, all input features of cNSF are reformulated into complex-valued representations following the supervised learning paradigm. Then, to achieve good hierarchical feature abstraction, a complex deep neural network (cDNN) is delicately designed with U-Net structure. Experiments conducted on simulated multi-channel speech data demonstrate the proposed cNSF outperforms the baseline NSF by 12.1% scale-invariant signal-to-distortion ratio and 33.1% word error rate.
abstract_zh: 迄今为止，主流的目标语音分离（TSS）方法被制定为在监督深度学习框架下估计目标语音在时频域的复杂比率掩模（cRM）。然而，现有的用于估计 cRM 的深度模型的设计方式是使用实值训练数据对分别对 cRM 的实部和虚部进行建模。本研究的研究动机是设计一种深度模型，充分利用多通道信号的时谱空间信息，在复杂域中直接有效地估计 cRM。因此，设计了一种新颖的 TSS 网络，由两个模块组成：复杂神经空间滤波器（cNSF）和 MVDR。本质上，cNSF是一个cRM估计模型，MVDR模块级联到cNSF模块以减少神经网络引入的非线性语音失真。具体来说，为了适应 cRM 目标，cNSF 的所有输入特征都按照监督学习范式重新表述为复值表示。然后，为了实现良好的层次特征抽象，采用U-Net结构精心设计了复杂的深度神经网络（cDNN）。对模拟多通道语音数据进行的实验表明，所提出的 cNSF 比基线 NSF 的尺度不变信号失真比高出 12.1%，字错误率高出 33.1%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种复杂神经空间滤波器（cNSF），通过直接在复数域估计复比掩码（cRM）来提升多通道目标语音分离性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过实值训练数据分别建模cRM的实部和虚部，未能充分利用复数域的时频空信息，导致效率不足。
AI.method: 设计包含复杂神经空间滤波器（cNSF）和MVDR模块的网络：cNSF采用复值表示和U-Net结构的复数DNN直接估计cRM，MVDR模块用于抑制神经网络引入的非线性失真。
AI.result: 在模拟多通道语音数据实验中，cNSF较基线NSF提升12.1%的尺度不变信噪比和33.1%的词错误率。
AI.conclusion: 复数域直接建模结合MVDR后处理有效提升了多通道目标语音分离性能，验证了复数神经网络在时频空信息利用上的优势。

Essentially, cNSF is a cRM estimation model and an MVDR module is cascaded to the cNSF module to reduce the nonlinear speech distortions introduced by neural network. Specifically, to fit the cRM target, all input features of cNSF are reformulated into complex-valued representations following the supervised learning paradigm. Then, to achieve good hierarchical feature abstraction, a complex deep neural network (cDNN) is delicately designed with U-Net structure. Experiments conducted on simulated multi-channel speech data demonstrate the proposed cNSF outperforms the baseline NSF by 12.1% scale-invariant signal-to-distortion ratio and 33.1% word error rate. 迄今为止，主流的目标语音分离（TSS）方法被制定为在监督深度学习框架下估计目标语音在时频域的复杂比率掩模（cRM）。然而，现有的用于估计 cRM 的深度模型的设计方式是使用实值训练数据对分别对 cRM 的实部和虚部进行建模。本研究的研究动机是设计一种深度模型，充分利用多通道信号的时谱空间信息，在复杂域中直接有效地估计 cRM。因此，设计了一种新颖的 TSS 网络，由两个模块组成：复杂神经空间滤波器（cNSF）和 MVDR。本质上，cNSF是一个cRM估计模型，MVDR模块级联到cNSF模块以减少神经网络引入的非线性语音失真。具体来说，为了适应 cRM 目标，cNSF 的所有输入特征都按照监督学习范式重新表述为复值表示。然后，为了实现良好的层次特征抽象，采用U-Net结构精心设计了复杂的深度神经网络（cDNN）。对模拟多通道语音数据进行的实验表明，所提出的 cNSF 比基线 NSF 的尺度不变信号失真比高出 12.1%，字错误率高出 33.1%。 本文提出一种复杂神经空间滤波器（cNSF），通过直接在复数域估计复比掩码（cRM）来提升多通道目标语音分离性能。 Rongzhi Gu,Shi-Xiong Zhang,Yuexian Zou,Dong Yu cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Yuzhi Zhao,Lai-Man Po,Wing-Yin Yu,Yasar Abbas Ur Rehman,Mengyang Liu,Yujia Zhang,Weifeng Ou
title: VCGAN: Video Colorization with Hybrid Generative Adversarial Network
title_zh: VCGAN：使用混合生成对抗网络的视频着色
comment: accepted by IEEE Transactions on Multimedia (TMM)
comments: accepted by IEEE Transactions on Multimedia (TMM)
abstract: We propose a hybrid recurrent Video Colorization with Hybrid Generative Adversarial Network (VCGAN), an improved approach to video colorization using end-to-end learning. The VCGAN addresses two prevalent issues in the video colorization domain: Temporal consistency and unification of colorization network and refinement network into a single architecture. To enhance colorization quality and spatiotemporal consistency, the mainstream of generator in VCGAN is assisted by two additional networks, i.e., global feature extractor and placeholder feature extractor, respectively. The global feature extractor encodes the global semantics of grayscale input to enhance colorization quality, whereas the placeholder feature extractor acts as a feedback connection to encode the semantics of the previous colorized frame in order to maintain spatiotemporal consistency. If changing the input for placeholder feature extractor as grayscale input, the hybrid VCGAN also has the potential to perform image colorization. To improve the consistency of far frames, we propose a dense long-term loss that smooths the temporal disparity of every two remote frames. Trained with colorization and temporal losses jointly, VCGAN strikes a good balance between color vividness and video continuity. Experimental results demonstrate that VCGAN produces higher-quality and temporally more consistent colorful videos than existing approaches.
summary: We propose a hybrid recurrent Video Colorization with Hybrid Generative Adversarial Network (VCGAN), an improved approach to video colorization using end-to-end learning. The VCGAN addresses two prevalent issues in the video colorization domain: Temporal consistency and unification of colorization network and refinement network into a single architecture. To enhance colorization quality and spatiotemporal consistency, the mainstream of generator in VCGAN is assisted by two additional networks, i.e., global feature extractor and placeholder feature extractor, respectively. The global feature extractor encodes the global semantics of grayscale input to enhance colorization quality, whereas the placeholder feature extractor acts as a feedback connection to encode the semantics of the previous colorized frame in order to maintain spatiotemporal consistency. If changing the input for placeholder feature extractor as grayscale input, the hybrid VCGAN also has the potential to perform image colorization. To improve the consistency of far frames, we propose a dense long-term loss that smooths the temporal disparity of every two remote frames. Trained with colorization and temporal losses jointly, VCGAN strikes a good balance between color vividness and video continuity. Experimental results demonstrate that VCGAN produces higher-quality and temporally more consistent colorful videos than existing approaches.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种使用混合生成对抗网络（VCGAN）的混合循环视频着色，这是一种使用端到端学习的视频着色改进方法。 VCGAN 解决了​​视频着色领域中的两个普遍问题：时间一致性以及将着色网络和细化网络统一到单一架构中。为了提高着色质量和时空一致性，VCGAN 中的主流生成器由两个附加网络辅助，分别是全局特征提取器和占位符特征提取器。全局特征提取器对灰度输入的全局语义进行编码，以增强着色质量，而占位符特征提取器充当反馈连接，对先前着色帧的语义进行编码，以保持时空一致性。如果将占位符特征提取器的输入更改为灰度输入，则混合 VCGAN 还具有执行图像着色的潜力。为了提高远帧的一致性，我们提出了一种密集的长期损失，可以平滑每两个远程帧的时间差异。通过彩色化和时间损失的联合训练，VCGAN 在色彩鲜艳度和视频连续性之间取得了良好的平衡。实验结果表明，与现有方法相比，VCGAN 可以生成更高质量、时间上更一致的彩色视频。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于混合生成对抗网络（VCGAN）的视频着色方法，旨在解决视频着色中的时间一致性问题并统一着色网络与优化网络架构。
AI.motivation: 现有视频着色方法存在时间一致性不足及网络结构分离的问题，导致着色质量与连续性难以兼顾。本文旨在通过混合架构提升着色质量与时空一致性。
AI.method: VCGAN采用混合生成器，结合全局特征提取器（增强语义理解）与占位符特征提取器（维持时空一致性），并引入密集长期损失函数优化远帧一致性，联合训练色度与时间损失。
AI.result: 实验表明，VCGAN在着色质量与时间一致性上优于现有方法，且可扩展至图像着色任务。
AI.conclusion: VCGAN通过混合架构与联合损失函数有效平衡了色彩鲜艳度与视频连续性，为视频着色提供了更优解决方案。

title: Dynamic Image Restoration and Fusion Based on Dynamic Degradation
title_zh: 基于动态退化的动态图像恢复与融合
abstract: The deep-learning-based image restoration and fusion methods have achieved remarkable results. However, the existing restoration and fusion methods paid little research attention to the robustness problem caused by dynamic degradation. In this paper, we propose a novel dynamic image restoration and fusion neural network, termed as DDRF-Net, which is capable of solving two problems, i.e., static restoration and fusion, dynamic degradation. In order to solve the static fusion problem of existing methods, dynamic convolution is introduced to learn dynamic restoration and fusion weights. In addition, a dynamic degradation kernel is proposed to improve the robustness of image restoration and fusion. Our network framework can effectively combine image degradation with image fusion tasks, provide more detailed information for image fusion tasks through image restoration loss, and optimize image restoration tasks through image fusion loss. Therefore, the stumbling blocks of deep learning in image fusion, e.g., static fusion weight and specifically designed network architecture, are greatly mitigated. Extensive experiments show that our method is more superior compared with the state-of-the-art methods.
summary: The deep-learning-based image restoration and fusion methods have achieved remarkable results. However, the existing restoration and fusion methods paid little research attention to the robustness problem caused by dynamic degradation. In this paper, we propose a novel dynamic image restoration and fusion neural network, termed as DDRF-Net, which is capable of solving two problems, i.e., static restoration and fusion, dynamic degradation. In order to solve the static fusion problem of existing methods, dynamic convolution is introduced to learn dynamic restoration and fusion weights. In addition, a dynamic degradation kernel is proposed to improve the robustness of image restoration and fusion. Our network framework can effectively combine image degradation with image fusion tasks, provide more detailed information for image fusion tasks through image restoration loss, and optimize image restoration tasks through image fusion loss. Therefore, the stumbling blocks of deep learning in image fusion, e.g., static fusion weight and specifically designed network architecture, are greatly mitigated. Extensive experiments show that our method is more superior compared with the state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 基于深度学习的图像恢复与融合方法取得了显着的成果。然而，现有的恢复和融合方法很少对动态退化引起的鲁棒性问题进行研究。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的动态图像恢复和融合神经网络，称为DDRF-Net，它能够解决静态恢复和融合、动态退化两个问题。为了解决现有方法的静态融合问题，引入动态卷积来学习动态恢复和融合权重。此外，还提出了动态退化核来提高图像恢复和融合的鲁棒性。我们的网络框架可以有效地将图像退化与图像融合任务结合起来，通过图像恢复损失为图像融合任务提供更详细的信息，并通过图像融合损失优化图像恢复任务。因此，深度学习在图像融合中的绊脚石，例如静态融合权重和专门设计的网络架构，都得到了极大的缓解。大量的实验表明，与最先进的方法相比，我们的方法更加优越。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于动态退化的动态图像恢复与融合方法DDR-FNet，以解决现有方法在动态退化下的鲁棒性不足问题。
AI.motivation: 现有的图像恢复与融合方法在动态退化情况下鲁棒性不足，缺乏对动态退化问题的研究，因此需要一种新的方法来解决静态融合和动态退化问题。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种名为DDR-FNet的动态图像恢复与融合网络，引入动态卷积学习动态恢复和融合权重，并提出动态退化核以提高鲁棒性，将图像退化与图像融合任务有效结合。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在图像恢复与融合任务中优于现有最先进的方法。
AI.conclusion: DDR-FNet通过动态卷积和动态退化核有效缓解了深度学习在图像融合中的静态融合权重和特定网络架构的限制，提高了鲁棒性。

title: Machine Learning-based Lie Detector applied to a Novel Annotated Game Dataset
title_zh: 基于机器学习的测谎器应用于新颖的带注释游戏数据集
abstract: Lie detection is considered a concern for everyone in their day to day life given its impact on human interactions. Thus, people normally pay attention to both what their interlocutors are saying and also to their visual appearances, including faces, to try to find any signs that indicate whether the person is telling the truth or not. While automatic lie detection may help us to understand this lying characteristics, current systems are still fairly limited, partly due to lack of adequate datasets to evaluate their performance in realistic scenarios. In this work, we have collected an annotated dataset of facial images, comprising both 2D and 3D information of several participants during a card game that encourages players to lie. Using our collected dataset, We evaluated several types of machine learning-based lie detectors in terms of their generalization, person-specific and cross-domain experiments. Our results show that models based on deep learning achieve the best accuracy, reaching up to 57\% for the generalization task and 63\% when dealing with a single participant. Finally, we also highlight the limitation of the deep learning based lie detector when dealing with cross-domain lie detection tasks.
summary: Lie detection is considered a concern for everyone in their day to day life given its impact on human interactions. Thus, people normally pay attention to both what their interlocutors are saying and also to their visual appearances, including faces, to try to find any signs that indicate whether the person is telling the truth or not. While automatic lie detection may help us to understand this lying characteristics, current systems are still fairly limited, partly due to lack of adequate datasets to evaluate their performance in realistic scenarios. In this work, we have collected an annotated dataset of facial images, comprising both 2D and 3D information of several participants during a card game that encourages players to lie. Using our collected dataset, We evaluated several types of machine learning-based lie detectors in terms of their generalization, person-specific and cross-domain experiments. Our results show that models based on deep learning achieve the best accuracy, reaching up to 57\% for the generalization task and 63\% when dealing with a single participant. Finally, we also highlight the limitation of the deep learning based lie detector when dealing with cross-domain lie detection tasks.
abstract_zh: 鉴于测谎对人类互动的影响，测谎被认为是每个人日常生活中都关心的问题。因此，人们通常会注意对话者所说的话，也会注意他们的视觉外观，包括面部，试图找到任何表明对方是否说真话的迹象。虽然自动测谎可以帮助我们理解这种说谎的特征，但当前的系统仍然相当有限，部分原因是缺乏足够的数据集来评估其在现实场景中的表现。在这项工作中，我们收集了一个带注释的面部图像数据集，其中包括鼓励玩家撒谎的纸牌游戏期间多名参与者的 2D 和 3D 信息。使用我们收集的数据集，我们评估了几种基于机器学习的测谎仪的泛化性、针对特定人群和跨领域的实验。我们的结果表明，基于深度学习的模型实现了最好的准确率，在泛化任务中达到 57%，在处理单个参与者时达到 63%。最后，我们还强调了基于深度学习的测谎器在处理跨域测谎任务时的局限性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于机器学习的测谎仪，并应用于新收集的标注游戏数据集，评估了多种模型在不同任务中的表现。
AI.motivation: 当前自动测谎系统因缺乏真实场景数据集而性能有限，本文旨在通过构建新型标注数据集提升测谎技术。
AI.method: 收集包含2D/3D面部信息的游戏场景数据集，评估多种机器学习模型在泛化、个体特异性及跨领域任务中的表现。
AI.result: 深度学习模型在泛化任务中达到57%准确率，单人任务达63%，但跨领域检测效果受限。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习在特定数据集上表现优异，但跨领域测谎仍需进一步研究，数据集的领域适应性是关键挑战。

authors_text: Michael T. Goodrich,Siddharth Gupta,Hadi Khodabandeh,Pedro Matias
title: How to Catch Marathon Cheaters: New Approximation Algorithms for Tracking Paths
title_zh: 如何抓住马拉松作弊者：追踪路径的新近似算法
comment: Full version of WADS 2021 conference proceedings paper
comments: Full version of WADS 2021 conference proceedings paper
abstract: Given an undirected graph, $G$, and vertices, $s$ and $t$ in $G$, the tracking paths problem is that of finding the smallest subset of vertices in $G$ whose intersection with any $s$-$t$ path results in a unique sequence. This problem is known to be NP-complete and has applications to animal migration tracking and detecting marathon course-cutting, but its approximability is largely unknown. In this paper, we address this latter issue, giving novel algorithms having approximation ratios of $(1+ε)$, $O(\lg OPT)$ and $O(\lg n)$, for $H$-minor-free, general, and weighted graphs, respectively. We also give a linear kernel for $H$-minor-free graphs and make improvements to the quadratic kernel for general graphs.
summary: Given an undirected graph, $G$, and vertices, $s$ and $t$ in $G$, the tracking paths problem is that of finding the smallest subset of vertices in $G$ whose intersection with any $s$-$t$ path results in a unique sequence. This problem is known to be NP-complete and has applications to animal migration tracking and detecting marathon course-cutting, but its approximability is largely unknown. In this paper, we address this latter issue, giving novel algorithms having approximation ratios of $(1+ε)$, $O(\lg OPT)$ and $O(\lg n)$, for $H$-minor-free, general, and weighted graphs, respectively. We also give a linear kernel for $H$-minor-free graphs and make improvements to the quadratic kernel for general graphs.
abstract_zh: 给定无向图 $G$ 以及 $G$ 中的顶点 $s$ 和 $t$，跟踪路径问题是找到 $G$ 中顶点的最小子集，其与任何 $s$-$t$ 路径的交集会产生唯一的序列。该问题已知为 NP 完全问题，可应用于动物迁徙跟踪和检测马拉松路线切割，但其近似性很大程度上未知。在本文中，我们解决了后一个问题，针对$H$-无次要图、一般图和加权图，分别给出了具有 $(1+ε)$、$O(\lg OPT)$ 和 $O(\lg n)$ 近似比的新颖算法。我们还给出了 $H$-minor-free 图的线性核，并对一般图的二次核进行了改进。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在无向图中找到最小顶点子集以唯一标识所有s-t路径的问题，提出新的近似算法。
AI.motivation: 路径追踪问题在动物迁徙和马拉松作弊检测中有应用，但其近似性研究尚不明确，需开发高效算法。
AI.method: 针对H-小图、一般图和加权图分别设计近似比为(1+ε)、O(lg OPT)和O(lg n)的算法，并改进内核化方法。
AI.result: 提出适用于不同图类型的近似算法，为H-小图设计线性内核，优化一般图的二次内核。
AI.conclusion: 通过新型近似算法和内核优化，提升了路径追踪问题的求解效率，推动了相关应用的发展。
